authors_text: Guanqi Zhan,Weidi Xie,Andrew Zisserman
title: A Tri-Layer Plugin to Improve Occluded Detection
title_zh: 用于改进遮挡检测的三层插件
abstract: Detecting occluded objects still remains a challenge for state-of-the-art object detectors. The objective of this work is to improve the detection for such objects, and thereby improve the overall performance of a modern object detector. To this end we make the following four contributions: (1) We propose a simple 'plugin' module for the detection head of two-stage object detectors to improve the recall of partially occluded objects. The module predicts a tri-layer of segmentation masks for the target object, the occluder and the occludee, and by doing so is able to better predict the mask of the target object. (2) We propose a scalable pipeline for generating training data for the module by using amodal completion of existing object detection and instance segmentation training datasets to establish occlusion relationships. (3) We also establish a COCO evaluation dataset to measure the recall performance of partially occluded and separated objects. (4) We show that the plugin module inserted into a two-stage detector can boost the performance significantly, by only fine-tuning the detection head, and with additional improvements if the entire architecture is fine-tuned. COCO results are reported for Mask R-CNN with Swin-T or Swin-S backbones, and Cascade Mask R-CNN with a Swin-B backbone.
summary: Detecting occluded objects still remains a challenge for state-of-the-art object detectors. The objective of this work is to improve the detection for such objects, and thereby improve the overall performance of a modern object detector. To this end we make the following four contributions: (1) We propose a simple 'plugin' module for the detection head of two-stage object detectors to improve the recall of partially occluded objects. The module predicts a tri-layer of segmentation masks for the target object, the occluder and the occludee, and by doing so is able to better predict the mask of the target object. (2) We propose a scalable pipeline for generating training data for the module by using amodal completion of existing object detection and instance segmentation training datasets to establish occlusion relationships. (3) We also establish a COCO evaluation dataset to measure the recall performance of partially occluded and separated objects. (4) We show that the plugin module inserted into a two-stage detector can boost the performance significantly, by only fine-tuning the detection head, and with additional improvements if the entire architecture is fine-tuned. COCO results are reported for Mask R-CNN with Swin-T or Swin-S backbones, and Cascade Mask R-CNN with a Swin-B backbone.
abstract_zh: 对于最先进的物体检测器来说，检测被遮挡的物体仍然是一个挑战。这项工作的目的是改进对此类物体的检测，从而提高现代物体检测器的整体性能。为此，我们做出以下四个贡献：（1）我们为两级目标检测器的检测头提出了一个简单的“插件”模块，以提高部分遮挡目标的召回率。该模块预测目标物体、遮挡物和被遮挡物的三层分割掩模，这样能够更好地预测目标物体的掩模。 (2) 我们提出了一个可扩展的管道，通过使用现有对象检测和实例分割训练数据集的模态完成来建立遮挡关系，为模块生成训练数据。 (3)我们还建立了COCO评估数据集来衡量部分遮挡和分离物体的召回性能。 (4) 我们表明，插入两级检测器的插件模块可以通过仅微调检测头来显着提高性能，如果整个架构进行微调，则还可以带来额外的改进。报告了具有 Swin-T 或 Swin-S 主干的 Mask R-CNN 以及具有 Swin-B 主干的 Cascade Mask R-CNN 的 COCO 结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种三层层插件模块以提升遮挡目标检测性能
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测器在处理部分遮挡物体时召回率不足，影响整体检测效果
AI.method: 设计三层层分割掩码预测插件，构建基于模态补全的训练数据生成流程，建立COCO遮挡评估数据集
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上，Mask R-CNN与Cascade Mask R-CNN检测器性能显著提升，微调全架构可获得额外增益
AI.conclusion: 三层层插件有效提升遮挡检测能力，且与不同主干网络兼容性良好

(3) We also establish a COCO evaluation dataset to measure the recall performance of partially occluded and separated objects. (4) We show that the plugin module inserted into a two-stage detector can boost the performance significantly, by only fine-tuning the detection head, and with additional improvements if the entire architecture is fine-tuned. COCO results are reported for Mask R-CNN with Swin-T or Swin-S backbones, and Cascade Mask R-CNN with a Swin-B backbone. 对于最先进的物体检测器来说，检测被遮挡的物体仍然是一个挑战。这项工作的目的是改进对此类物体的检测，从而提高现代物体检测器的整体性能。为此，我们做出以下四个贡献：（1）我们为两级目标检测器的检测头提出了一个简单的“插件”模块，以提高部分遮挡目标的召回率。该模块预测目标物体、遮挡物和被遮挡物的三层分割掩模，这样能够更好地预测目标物体的掩模。 (2) 我们提出了一个可扩展的管道，通过使用现有对象检测和实例分割训练数据集的模态完成来建立遮挡关系，为模块生成训练数据。 (3)我们还建立了COCO评估数据集来衡量部分遮挡和分离物体的召回性能。 (4) 我们表明，插入两级检测器的插件模块可以通过仅微调检测头来显着提高性能，如果整个架构进行微调，则还可以带来额外的改进。报告了具有 Swin-T 或 Swin-S 主干的 Mask R-CNN 以及具有 Swin-B 主干的 Cascade Mask R-CNN 的 COCO 结果。 提出一种三层层插件模块以提升遮挡目标检测性能 Guanqi Zhan,Weidi Xie,Andrew Zisserman cs.CV

authors_text: Sharon Levy,Emily Allaway,Melanie Subbiah,Lydia Chilton,Desmond Patton,Kathleen McKeown,William Yang Wang
title: SafeText: A Benchmark for Exploring Physical Safety in Language Models
title_zh: SafeText：探索语言模型中的物理安全性的基准
abstract: Understanding what constitutes safe text is an important issue in natural language processing and can often prevent the deployment of models deemed harmful and unsafe. One such type of safety that has been scarcely studied is commonsense physical safety, i.e. text that is not explicitly violent and requires additional commonsense knowledge to comprehend that it leads to physical harm. We create the first benchmark dataset, SafeText, comprising real-life scenarios with paired safe and physically unsafe pieces of advice. We utilize SafeText to empirically study commonsense physical safety across various models designed for text generation and commonsense reasoning tasks. We find that state-of-the-art large language models are susceptible to the generation of unsafe text and have difficulty rejecting unsafe advice. As a result, we argue for further studies of safety and the assessment of commonsense physical safety in models before release.
summary: Understanding what constitutes safe text is an important issue in natural language processing and can often prevent the deployment of models deemed harmful and unsafe. One such type of safety that has been scarcely studied is commonsense physical safety, i.e. text that is not explicitly violent and requires additional commonsense knowledge to comprehend that it leads to physical harm. We create the first benchmark dataset, SafeText, comprising real-life scenarios with paired safe and physically unsafe pieces of advice. We utilize SafeText to empirically study commonsense physical safety across various models designed for text generation and commonsense reasoning tasks. We find that state-of-the-art large language models are susceptible to the generation of unsafe text and have difficulty rejecting unsafe advice. As a result, we argue for further studies of safety and the assessment of commonsense physical safety in models before release.
abstract_zh: 了解安全文本的构​​成是自然语言处理中的一个重要问题，通常可以防止部署被认为有害和不安全的模型。一种很少被研究的安全类型是常识性人身安全，即没有明显暴力的文本，需要额外的常识性知识才能理解它会导致人身伤害。我们创建了第一个基准数据集 SafeText，其中包含现实生活场景以及配对的安全和身体不安全的建议。我们利用 SafeText 来实证研究专为文本生成和常识推理任务设计的各种模型的常识物理安全性。我们发现最先进的大型语言模型很容易生成不安全的文本，并且很难拒绝不安全的建议。因此，我们主张在发布之前对模型进行进一步的安全性研究和常识性物理安全性评估。

AI.tldr: 本文创建了SafeText基准数据集，用于评估语言模型在常识性物理安全方面的表现，分析其生成或拒绝不安全文本的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对语言模型生成文本的物理安全性关注不足，尤其缺乏对需要常识推理才能识别的潜在危害性文本的系统性评估。
AI.method: 构建包含现实场景中安全/不安全建议配对的SafeText数据集，通过实验测试文本生成模型和常识推理模型在识别与拒绝不安全文本方面的性能。
AI.result: 实验发现，当前最先进的大型语言模型容易生成物理不安全文本，且难以有效识别并拒绝此类有害建议。
AI.conclusion: 需加强语言模型在常识性物理安全领域的评估研究，确保模型在部署前具备足够的安全过滤能力。

authors_text: Zipeng Fu,Xuxin Cheng,Deepak Pathak
title: Deep Whole-Body Control: Learning a Unified Policy for Manipulation and Locomotion
title_zh: 深度全身控制：学习统一的操纵和运动策略
abstract: An attached arm can significantly increase the applicability of legged robots to several mobile manipulation tasks that are not possible for the wheeled or tracked counterparts. The standard hierarchical control pipeline for such legged manipulators is to decouple the controller into that of manipulation and locomotion. However, this is ineffective. It requires immense engineering to support coordination between the arm and legs, and error can propagate across modules causing non-smooth unnatural motions. It is also biological implausible given evidence for strong motor synergies across limbs. In this work, we propose to learn a unified policy for whole-body control of a legged manipulator using reinforcement learning. We propose Regularized Online Adaptation to bridge the Sim2Real gap for high-DoF control, and Advantage Mixing exploiting the causal dependency in the action space to overcome local minima during training the whole-body system. We also present a simple design for a low-cost legged manipulator, and find that our unified policy can demonstrate dynamic and agile behaviors across several task setups. Videos are at https://maniploco.github.io
summary: An attached arm can significantly increase the applicability of legged robots to several mobile manipulation tasks that are not possible for the wheeled or tracked counterparts. The standard hierarchical control pipeline for such legged manipulators is to decouple the controller into that of manipulation and locomotion. However, this is ineffective. It requires immense engineering to support coordination between the arm and legs, and error can propagate across modules causing non-smooth unnatural motions. It is also biological implausible given evidence for strong motor synergies across limbs. In this work, we propose to learn a unified policy for whole-body control of a legged manipulator using reinforcement learning. We propose Regularized Online Adaptation to bridge the Sim2Real gap for high-DoF control, and Advantage Mixing exploiting the causal dependency in the action space to overcome local minima during training the whole-body system. We also present a simple design for a low-cost legged manipulator, and find that our unified policy can demonstrate dynamic and agile behaviors across several task setups. Videos are at https://maniploco.github.io
abstract_zh: 连接臂可以显着提高腿式机器人对多种移动操作任务的适用性，而轮式或履带式机器人无法完成这些任务。这种腿式机械臂的标准分层控制管道是将控制器解耦为操纵和运动控制器。然而，这是无效的。它需要大量的工程来支持手臂和腿之间的协调，并且错误可能会在模块之间传播，从而导致不平滑的不自然的运动。考虑到四肢之间强大的运动协同作用的证据，这在生物学上也是难以置信的。在这项工作中，我们建议使用强化学习来学习腿式机械臂全身控制的统一策略。我们提出正则化在线适应来弥合高自由度控制的 Sim2Real 差距，并提出优势混合利用动作空间中的因果依赖性来克服训练全身系统期间的局部最小值。我们还提出了一种低成本腿式机械臂的简单设计，并发现我们的统一策略可以在多个任务设置中展示动态和敏捷的行为。视频位于 https://maniploco.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的统一控制策略，用于腿部机械臂的全身控制，以解决传统分层控制方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统分层控制方法在腿部机械臂的操控与移动协调上存在工程复杂度高、误差传播和生物合理性不足的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用强化学习训练统一策略，结合正则化在线适应技术缩小仿真到现实的差距，并利用优势混合方法克服训练中的局部最优问题。
AI.result: 设计了低成本腿部机械臂，验证了统一策略在多种任务场景下可实现动态灵活的行为表现。
AI.conclusion: 统一控制策略能有效提升腿部机械臂的移动与操作协同能力，为复杂任务提供更自然流畅的解决方案。

authors_text: Shuo Xie,Jiahao Qiu,Ankita Pasad,Li Du,Qing Qu,Hongyuan Mei
title: Hidden State Variability of Pretrained Language Models Can Guide Computation Reduction for Transfer Learning
title_zh: 预训练语言模型的隐藏状态变异性可以指导迁移学习的计算减少
abstract: While transferring a pretrained language model, common approaches conventionally attach their task-specific classifiers to the top layer and adapt all the pretrained layers. We investigate whether one could make a task-specific selection on which subset of the layers to adapt and where to place the classifier. The goal is to reduce the computation cost of transfer learning methods (e.g. fine-tuning or adapter-tuning) without sacrificing its performance. We propose to select layers based on the variability of their hidden states given a task-specific corpus. We say a layer is already "well-specialized" in a task if the within-class variability of its hidden states is low relative to the between-class variability. Our variability metric is cheap to compute and doesn't need any training or hyperparameter tuning. It is robust to data imbalance and data scarcity. Extensive experiments on the GLUE benchmark demonstrate that selecting layers based on our metric can yield significantly stronger performance than using the same number of top layers and often match the performance of fine-tuning or adapter-tuning the entire language model.
summary: While transferring a pretrained language model, common approaches conventionally attach their task-specific classifiers to the top layer and adapt all the pretrained layers. We investigate whether one could make a task-specific selection on which subset of the layers to adapt and where to place the classifier. The goal is to reduce the computation cost of transfer learning methods (e.g. fine-tuning or adapter-tuning) without sacrificing its performance. We propose to select layers based on the variability of their hidden states given a task-specific corpus. We say a layer is already "well-specialized" in a task if the within-class variability of its hidden states is low relative to the between-class variability. Our variability metric is cheap to compute and doesn't need any training or hyperparameter tuning. It is robust to data imbalance and data scarcity. Extensive experiments on the GLUE benchmark demonstrate that selecting layers based on our metric can yield significantly stronger performance than using the same number of top layers and often match the performance of fine-tuning or adapter-tuning the entire language model.
abstract_zh: 在传输预训练语言模型时，常见方法通常将其特定于任务的分类器附加到顶层并适应所有预训练层。我们研究是否可以针对要适应的层子集以及将分类器放置在何处进行特定于任务的选择。目标是在不牺牲性能的情况下降低迁移学习方法的计算成本（例如微调或适配器调整）。我们建议根据给定特定任务语料库的隐藏状态的可变性来选择层。如果一个层的隐藏状态的类内变异性相对于类间变异性较低，我们就说该层在任务中已经“高度专业化”。我们的变异性指标计算成本低廉，不需要任何训练或超参数调整。它对数据不平衡和数据稀缺具有鲁棒性。 GLUE 基准测试的大量实验表明，与使用相同数量的顶层相比，基于我们的指标选择层可以产生明显更强的性能，并且通常与微调或适配器调整整个语言模型的性能相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过分析预训练语言模型隐藏状态的可变性，选择性地调整部分层以减少迁移学习的计算成本，同时保持性能。
AI.motivation: 传统迁移学习方法需要调整所有预训练层，导致计算成本高。作者希望找到一种更高效的方式，仅调整关键层以降低资源消耗。
AI.method: 基于任务特定语料计算各层隐藏状态的类内/类间可变性比值，选择比值较低（即已‘良好专业化’）的层进行微调，该指标无需训练且对数据不平衡鲁棒。
AI.result: 在GLUE基准测试中，该方法在减少计算量的同时显著优于仅使用顶层的策略，且性能常与全模型微调相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过隐藏状态可变性指标选择层，可有效降低迁移学习计算成本，为高效模型适配提供新思路。

search_text: Hidden State Variability of Pretrained Language Models Can Guide Computation Reduction for Transfer Learning 预训练语言模型的隐藏状态变异性可以指导迁移学习的计算减少 While transferring a pretrained language model, common approaches conventionally attach their task-specific classifiers to the top layer and adapt all the pretrained layers. We investigate whether one could make a task-specific selection on which subset of the layers to adapt and where to place the classifier. The goal is to reduce the computation cost of transfer learning methods (e.g. fine-tuning or adapter-tuning) without sacrificing its performance. We propose to select layers based on the variability of their hidden states given a task-specific corpus. We say a layer is already "well-specialized" in a task if the within-class variability of its hidden states is low relative to the between-class variability. Our variability metric is cheap to compute and doesn't need any training or hyperparameter tuning. It is robust to data imbalance and data scarcity. Extensive experiments on the GLUE benchmark demonstrate that selecting layers based on our metric can yield significantly stronger performance than using the same number of top layers and often match the performance of fine-tuning or adapter-tuning the entire language model. 在传输预训练语言模型时，常见方法通常将其特定于任务的分类器附加到顶层并适应所有预训练层。我们研究是否可以针对要适应的层子集以及将分类器放置在何处进行特定于任务的选择。目标是在不牺牲性能的情况下降低迁移学习方法的计算成本（例如微调或适配器调整）。我们建议根据给定特定任务语料库的隐藏状态的可变性来选择层。如果一个层的隐藏状态的类内变异性相对于类间变异性较低，我们就说该层在任务中已经“高度专业化”。我们的变异性指标计算成本低廉，不需要任何训练或超参数调整。它对数据不平衡和数据稀缺具有鲁棒性。 GLUE 基准测试的大量实验表明，与使用相同数量的顶层相比，基于我们的指标选择层可以产生明显更强的性能，并且通常与微调或适配器调整整个语言模型的性能相匹配。 本文提出通过分析预训练语言模型隐藏状态的可变性，选择性地调整部分层以减少迁移学习的计算成本，同时保持性能。 Shuo Xie,Jiahao Qiu,Ankita Pasad,Li Du,Qing Qu,Hongyuan Mei cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Mantas Mazeika,Eric Tang,Andy Zou,Steven Basart,Jun Shern Chan,Dawn Song,David Forsyth,Jacob Steinhardt,Dan Hendrycks
title: How Would The Viewer Feel? Estimating Wellbeing From Video Scenarios
title_zh: 观众会有什么感受？从视频场景中评估健康状况
abstract: In recent years, deep neural networks have demonstrated increasingly strong abilities to recognize objects and activities in videos. However, as video understanding becomes widely used in real-world applications, a key consideration is developing human-centric systems that understand not only the content of the video but also how it would affect the wellbeing and emotional state of viewers. To facilitate research in this setting, we introduce two large-scale datasets with over 60,000 videos manually annotated for emotional response and subjective wellbeing. The Video Cognitive Empathy (VCE) dataset contains annotations for distributions of fine-grained emotional responses, allowing models to gain a detailed understanding of affective states. The Video to Valence (V2V) dataset contains annotations of relative pleasantness between videos, which enables predicting a continuous spectrum of wellbeing. In experiments, we show how video models that are primarily trained to recognize actions and find contours of objects can be repurposed to understand human preferences and the emotional content of videos. Although there is room for improvement, predicting wellbeing and emotional response is on the horizon for state-of-the-art models. We hope our datasets can help foster further advances at the intersection of commonsense video understanding and human preference learning.
summary: In recent years, deep neural networks have demonstrated increasingly strong abilities to recognize objects and activities in videos. However, as video understanding becomes widely used in real-world applications, a key consideration is developing human-centric systems that understand not only the content of the video but also how it would affect the wellbeing and emotional state of viewers. To facilitate research in this setting, we introduce two large-scale datasets with over 60,000 videos manually annotated for emotional response and subjective wellbeing. The Video Cognitive Empathy (VCE) dataset contains annotations for distributions of fine-grained emotional responses, allowing models to gain a detailed understanding of affective states. The Video to Valence (V2V) dataset contains annotations of relative pleasantness between videos, which enables predicting a continuous spectrum of wellbeing. In experiments, we show how video models that are primarily trained to recognize actions and find contours of objects can be repurposed to understand human preferences and the emotional content of videos. Although there is room for improvement, predicting wellbeing and emotional response is on the horizon for state-of-the-art models. We hope our datasets can help foster further advances at the intersection of commonsense video understanding and human preference learning.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度神经网络表现出越来越强的识别视频中物体和活动的能力。然而，随着视频理解在现实世界的应用中得到广泛应用，一个关键的考虑因素是开发以人为中心的系统，该系统不仅可以理解视频的内容，还可以理解视频如何影响观看者的健康和情绪状态。为了促进这种情况下的研究，我们引入了两个大型数据集，其中包含超过 60,000 个视频，并手动注释了情绪反应和主观幸福感。视频认知同理心 (VCE) 数据集包含细粒度情绪反应分布的注释，使模型能够详细了解情感状态。视频到价 (V2V) 数据集包含视频之间相对愉悦度的注释，可以预测连续的幸福感。在实验中，我们展示了如何重新利用主要训练用于识别动作和查找对象轮廓的视频模型来理解人类偏好和视频的情感内容。尽管还有改进的空间，但最先进的模型即将预测健康和情绪反应。我们希望我们的数据集能够帮助促进常识视频理解和人类偏好学习交叉领域的进一步进步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过视频场景估计观众的幸福感和情绪反应，构建了两个大规模数据集以推动相关研究。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解模型主要关注内容识别，但缺乏对视频如何影响观众情绪和幸福感的分析，需开发以人为本的系统。
AI.method: 引入Video Cognitive Empathy (VCE)和Video to Valence (V2V)两个数据集，分别标注细粒度情绪分布和视频愉悦度对比。
AI.result: 实验表明，原本用于动作识别的模型可被重新用于预测情绪和幸福感，但当前模型性能仍有提升空间。
AI.conclusion: 数据集为视频理解与人类偏好学习的交叉领域研究提供了基础，有望推动情感计算和幸福感预测的发展。

authors_text: Shaofei Wang,Katja Schwarz,Andreas Geiger,Siyu Tang
title: ARAH: Animatable Volume Rendering of Articulated Human SDFs
title_zh: ARAH：铰接式人体 SDF 的可动画体积渲染
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Project page: https://neuralbodies.github.io/arah/
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Project page: https://neuralbodies.github.io/arah/
abstract: Combining human body models with differentiable rendering has recently enabled animatable avatars of clothed humans from sparse sets of multi-view RGB videos. While state-of-the-art approaches achieve realistic appearance with neural radiance fields (NeRF), the inferred geometry often lacks detail due to missing geometric constraints. Further, animating avatars in out-of-distribution poses is not yet possible because the mapping from observation space to canonical space does not generalize faithfully to unseen poses. In this work, we address these shortcomings and propose a model to create animatable clothed human avatars with detailed geometry that generalize well to out-of-distribution poses. To achieve detailed geometry, we combine an articulated implicit surface representation with volume rendering. For generalization, we propose a novel joint root-finding algorithm for simultaneous ray-surface intersection search and correspondence search. Our algorithm enables efficient point sampling and accurate point canonicalization while generalizing well to unseen poses. We demonstrate that our proposed pipeline can generate clothed avatars with high-quality pose-dependent geometry and appearance from a sparse set of multi-view RGB videos. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on geometry and appearance reconstruction while creating animatable avatars that generalize well to out-of-distribution poses beyond the small number of training poses.
summary: Combining human body models with differentiable rendering has recently enabled animatable avatars of clothed humans from sparse sets of multi-view RGB videos. While state-of-the-art approaches achieve realistic appearance with neural radiance fields (NeRF), the inferred geometry often lacks detail due to missing geometric constraints. Further, animating avatars in out-of-distribution poses is not yet possible because the mapping from observation space to canonical space does not generalize faithfully to unseen poses. In this work, we address these shortcomings and propose a model to create animatable clothed human avatars with detailed geometry that generalize well to out-of-distribution poses. To achieve detailed geometry, we combine an articulated implicit surface representation with volume rendering. For generalization, we propose a novel joint root-finding algorithm for simultaneous ray-surface intersection search and correspondence search. Our algorithm enables efficient point sampling and accurate point canonicalization while generalizing well to unseen poses. We demonstrate that our proposed pipeline can generate clothed avatars with high-quality pose-dependent geometry and appearance from a sparse set of multi-view RGB videos. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on geometry and appearance reconstruction while creating animatable avatars that generalize well to out-of-distribution poses beyond the small number of training poses.
abstract_zh: 最近，将人体模型与可微分渲染相结合，可以从稀疏的多视图 RGB 视频集中制作出可动画化的着装人类头像。虽然最先进的方法通过神经辐射场 (NeRF) 实现了逼真的外观，但推断的几何结构通常由于缺少几何约束而缺乏细节。此外，以不符合分布的姿势对化身进行动画处理尚不可能，因为从观察空间到规范空间的映射不能忠实地推广到未见过的姿势。在这项工作中，我们解决了这些缺点，并提出了一个模型来创建可动画的穿着人类化身，其具有详细的几何形状，可以很好地推广到分布外的姿势。为了实现详细的几何形状，我们将铰接的隐式表面表示与体积渲染相结合。为了泛化，我们提出了一种新颖的联合寻根算法，用于同时进行光线表面相交搜索和对应搜索。我们的算法能够实现高效的点采样和准确的点规范化，同时很好地推广到看不见的姿势。我们证明了我们提出的管道可以从一组稀疏的多视图 RGB 视频中生成具有高质量的姿势相关几何形状和外观的着装化身。我们的方法在几何和外观重建方面实现了最先进的性能，同时创建了可动画化的化身，这些化身可以很好地推广到超出少量训练姿势的分布外姿势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARAH方法，通过可动画的体绘制技术生成具有详细几何结构且能泛化到未见过姿态的穿衣人类avatar。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成穿衣人类avatar时，几何细节不足且无法处理分布外姿态，主要受限于缺乏几何约束和观测空间到规范空间的映射不足。
AI.method: 结合可动画隐式表面表示与体绘制技术，并提出联合根查找算法，同时进行光线-表面交点搜索和对应搜索，实现高效采样与姿态泛化。
AI.result: 从稀疏多视角RGB视频生成高质量姿态依赖的几何与外观的穿衣avatar，在几何重建和外观还原上达到SOTA性能，且能泛化到训练姿态外的分布外姿态。
AI.conclusion: ARAH通过几何约束与联合优化算法解决了现有方法的不足，为可动画穿衣人类avatar的生成提供了新范式。

ai_content_json.method: 结合可动画隐式表面表示与体绘制技术，并提出联合根查找算法，同时进行光线-表面交点搜索和对应搜索，实现高效采样与姿态泛化。
ai_content_json.result: 从稀疏多视角RGB视频生成高质量姿态依赖的几何与外观的穿衣avatar，在几何重建和外观还原上达到SOTA性能，且能泛化到训练姿态外的分布外姿态。
ai_content_json.conclusion: ARAH通过几何约束与联合优化算法解决了现有方法的不足，为可动画穿衣人类avatar的生成提供了新范式。

search_text: ARAH: Animatable Volume Rendering of Articulated Human SDFs ARAH：铰接式人体 SDF 的可动画体积渲染 Combining human body models with differentiable rendering has recently enabled animatable avatars of clothed humans from sparse sets of multi-view RGB videos. While state-of-the-art approaches achieve realistic appearance with neural radiance fields (NeRF), the inferred geometry often lacks detail due to missing geometric constraints. Further, animating avatars in out-of-distribution poses is not yet possible because the mapping from observation space to canonical space does not generalize faithfully to unseen poses. In this work, we address these shortcomings and propose a model to create animatable clothed human avatars with detailed geometry that generalize well to out-of-distribution poses. To achieve detailed geometry, we combine an articulated implicit surface representation with volume rendering. For generalization, we propose a novel joint root-finding algorithm for simultaneous ray-surface intersection search and correspondence search. Our algorithm enables efficient point sampling and accurate point canonicalization while generalizing well to unseen poses. We demonstrate that our proposed pipeline can generate clothed avatars with high-quality pose-dependent geometry and appearance from a sparse set of multi-view RGB videos. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on geometry and appearance reconstruction while creating animatable avatars that generalize well to out-of-distribution poses beyond the small number of training poses. 最近，将人体模型与可微分渲染相结合，可以从稀疏的多视图 RGB 视频集中制作出可动画化的着装人类头像。虽然最先进的方法通过神经辐射场 (NeRF) 实现了逼真的外观，但推断的几何结构通常由于缺少几何约束而缺乏细节。此外，以不符合分布的姿势对化身进行动画处理尚不可能，因为从观察空间到规范空间的映射不能忠实地推广到未见过的姿势。在这项工作中，我们解决了这些缺点，并提出了一个模型来创建可动画的穿着人类化身，其具有详细的几何形状，可以很好地推广到分布外的姿势。为了实现详细的几何形状，我们将铰接的隐式表面表示与体积渲染相结合。为了泛化，我们提出了一种新颖的联合寻根算法，用于同时进行光线表面相交搜索和对应搜索。我们的算法能够实现高效的点采样和准确的点规范化，同时很好地推广到看不见的姿势。我们证明了我们提出的管道可以从一组稀疏的多视图 RGB 视频中生成具有高质量的姿势相关几何形状和外观的着装化身。我们的方法在几何和外观重建方面实现了最先进的性能，同时创建了可动画化的化身，这些化身可以很好地推广到超出少量训练姿势的分布外姿势。 本文提出ARAH方法，通过可动画的体绘制技术生成具有详细几何结构且能泛化到未见过姿态的穿衣人类avatar。 Shaofei Wang,Katja Schwarz,Andreas Geiger,Siyu Tang cs.CV

authors_text: Yu Wang,Haoyao Chen,Yufeng Liu,Shiwu Zhang
title: Edge-based Monocular Thermal-Inertial Odometry in Visually Degraded Environments
title_zh: 视觉退化环境中基于边缘的单目热惯性里程计
abstract: State estimation in complex illumination environments based on conventional visual-inertial odometry is a challenging task due to the severe visual degradation of the visual camera. The thermal infrared camera is capable of all-day time and is less affected by illumination variation. However, most existing visual data association algorithms are incompatible because the thermal infrared data contains large noise and low contrast. Motivated by the phenomenon that thermal radiation varies most significantly at the edges of objects, the study proposes an ETIO, which is the first edge-based monocular thermal-inertial odometry for robust localization in visually degraded environments. Instead of the raw image, we utilize the binarized image from edge extraction for pose estimation to overcome the poor thermal infrared image quality. Then, an adaptive feature tracking strategy ADT-KLT is developed for robust data association based on limited edge information and its distance distribution. Finally, a pose graph optimization performs real-time estimation over a sliding window of recent states by combining IMU pre-integration with reprojection error of all edge feature observations. We evaluated the performance of the proposed system on public datasets and real-world experiments and compared it against state-of-the-art methods. The proposed ETIO was verified with the ability to enable accurate and robust localization all-day time.
summary: State estimation in complex illumination environments based on conventional visual-inertial odometry is a challenging task due to the severe visual degradation of the visual camera. The thermal infrared camera is capable of all-day time and is less affected by illumination variation. However, most existing visual data association algorithms are incompatible because the thermal infrared data contains large noise and low contrast. Motivated by the phenomenon that thermal radiation varies most significantly at the edges of objects, the study proposes an ETIO, which is the first edge-based monocular thermal-inertial odometry for robust localization in visually degraded environments. Instead of the raw image, we utilize the binarized image from edge extraction for pose estimation to overcome the poor thermal infrared image quality. Then, an adaptive feature tracking strategy ADT-KLT is developed for robust data association based on limited edge information and its distance distribution. Finally, a pose graph optimization performs real-time estimation over a sliding window of recent states by combining IMU pre-integration with reprojection error of all edge feature observations. We evaluated the performance of the proposed system on public datasets and real-world experiments and compared it against state-of-the-art methods. The proposed ETIO was verified with the ability to enable accurate and robust localization all-day time.
abstract_zh: 由于视觉相机严重的视觉退化，基于传统视觉惯性里程计的复杂照明环境中的状态估计是一项具有挑战性的任务。热红外相机能够全天候工作，受光照变化的影响较小。然而，由于热红外数据包含大噪声和低对比度，大多数现有的视觉数据关联算法是不兼容的。受热辐射在物体边缘变化最显着的现象的启发，该研究提出了 ETIO，这是第一个基于边缘的单目热惯性里程计，用于在视觉退化的环境中实现稳健的定位。我们利用边缘提取的二值化图像代替原始图像进行位姿估计，以克服热红外图像质量差的问题。然后，开发了一种自适应特征跟踪策略ADT-KLT，用于基于有限边缘信息及其距离分布的鲁棒数据关联。最后，位姿图优化通过将 IMU 预积分与所有边缘特征观测的重投影误差相结合，在最近状态的滑动窗口上执行实时估计。我们评估了所提出的系统在公共数据集和现实世界实验上的性能，并将其与最先进的方法进行了比较。所提出的 ETIO 经验证能够实现全天准确且强大的本地化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于边缘的单目热红外惯性里程计（ETIO），用于在视觉退化环境中实现全天候鲁棒定位。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉惯性里程计在光照复杂环境下因视觉退化失效，而热红外相机虽受光照影响小，但现有算法难以处理其噪声大、对比度低的问题。
AI.method: 利用热红外图像的边缘二值化信息替代原始图像进行位姿估计，设计自适应特征跟踪策略ADT-KLT，并结合IMU预积分与边缘特征重投影误差进行滑动窗口位姿图优化。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和真实场景实验中验证了ETIO的准确性与鲁棒性，证明其可全天候稳定工作。
AI.conclusion: ETIO通过边缘特征提取与优化算法，有效解决了热红外图像质量差导致的定位难题，实现了复杂环境下的可靠定位。

authors_text: Zhehuai Chen,Ankur Bapna,Andrew Rosenberg,Yu Zhang,Bhuvana Ramabhadran,Pedro Moreno,Nanxin Chen
title: Maestro-U: Leveraging joint speech-text representation learning for zero supervised speech ASR
title_zh: Maestro-U：利用联合语音文本表示学习实现零监督语音 ASR
abstract: Training state-of-the-art Automated Speech Recognition (ASR) models typically requires a substantial amount of transcribed speech. In this work, we demonstrate that a modality-matched joint speech and text model can be leveraged to train a massively multilingual ASR model without any supervised (manually transcribed) speech for some languages. This paper explores the use of jointly learnt speech and text representations in a massively multilingual, zero supervised speech, real-world setting to expand the set of languages covered by ASR with only unlabeled speech and text in the target languages. Using the FLEURS dataset, we define the task to cover $102$ languages, where transcribed speech is available in $52$ of these languages and can be used to improve end-to-end ASR quality on the remaining $50$. First, we show that by combining speech representations with byte-level text representations and use of language embeddings, we can dramatically reduce the Character Error Rate (CER) on languages with no supervised speech from 64.8\% to 30.8\%, a relative reduction of 53\%. Second, using a subset of South Asian languages we show that Maestro-U can promote knowledge transfer from languages with supervised speech even when there is limited to no graphemic overlap. Overall, Maestro-U closes the gap to oracle performance by 68.5\% relative and reduces the CER of 19 languages below 15\%.
summary: Training state-of-the-art Automated Speech Recognition (ASR) models typically requires a substantial amount of transcribed speech. In this work, we demonstrate that a modality-matched joint speech and text model can be leveraged to train a massively multilingual ASR model without any supervised (manually transcribed) speech for some languages. This paper explores the use of jointly learnt speech and text representations in a massively multilingual, zero supervised speech, real-world setting to expand the set of languages covered by ASR with only unlabeled speech and text in the target languages. Using the FLEURS dataset, we define the task to cover $102$ languages, where transcribed speech is available in $52$ of these languages and can be used to improve end-to-end ASR quality on the remaining $50$. First, we show that by combining speech representations with byte-level text representations and use of language embeddings, we can dramatically reduce the Character Error Rate (CER) on languages with no supervised speech from 64.8\% to 30.8\%, a relative reduction of 53\%. Second, using a subset of South Asian languages we show that Maestro-U can promote knowledge transfer from languages with supervised speech even when there is limited to no graphemic overlap. Overall, Maestro-U closes the gap to oracle performance by 68.5\% relative and reduces the CER of 19 languages below 15\%.
abstract_zh: 训练最先进的自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型通常需要大量转录的语音。在这项工作中，我们证明了可以利用模态匹配的联合语音和文本模型来训练大规模多语言 ASR 模型，而无需对某些语言进行任何监督（手动转录）语音。本文探讨了在大规模多语言、零监督语音、现实世界环境中使用联合学习的语音和文本表示，以扩展 ASR 覆盖的语言集，仅使用目标语言中的未标记语音和文本。使用 FLEURS 数据集，我们将任务定义为涵盖 102 美元的语言，其中转录语音可用于其中 52 美元的语言，并且可用于提高剩余 50 美元的端到端 ASR 质量。首先，我们证明，通过将语音表示与字节级文本表示相结合并使用语言嵌入，我们可以将没有监督语音的语言的字符错误率（CER）从 64.8% 大幅降低到 30.8%，相对降低了 53%。其次，使用南亚语言的子集，我们表明 Maestro-U 可以促进具有监督语音的语言的知识转移，即使在字形重叠有限或没有的情况下也是如此。总体而言，Maestro-U 相对于 Oracle 性能差距缩小了 68.5%，并将 19 种语言的 CER 降低到 15% 以下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Maestro-U方法，通过联合语音-文本表示学习，在无需监督语音数据的情况下训练大规模多语言语音识别（ASR）模型。
AI.motivation: 传统ASR模型训练依赖大量人工转录语音数据，而许多语言缺乏此类资源。本文旨在探索利用无监督语音与文本数据构建多语言ASR模型的可能性。
AI.method: 结合语音表示与字节级文本表示，引入语言嵌入，利用FLEURS数据集（含102种语言）中52种有监督语言的数据提升其余50种无监督语言的ASR性能，并验证南亚语言间的知识迁移能力。
AI.result: 在无监督语言上将字符错误率（CER）从64.8%降至30.8%（相对降低53%），19种语言CER低于15%，相对缩小至最优性能差距68.5%。
AI.conclusion: Maestro-U通过联合表示学习显著提升零监督ASR性能，证明了跨语言知识迁移的有效性，为扩展低资源语言ASR覆盖提供了新途径。

search_text: Maestro-U: Leveraging joint speech-text representation learning for zero supervised speech ASR Maestro-U：利用联合语音文本表示学习实现零监督语音 ASR Training state-of-the-art Automated Speech Recognition (ASR) models typically requires a substantial amount of transcribed speech. In this work, we demonstrate that a modality-matched joint speech and text model can be leveraged to train a massively multilingual ASR model without any supervised (manually transcribed) speech for some languages. This paper explores the use of jointly learnt speech and text representations in a massively multilingual, zero supervised speech, real-world setting to expand the set of languages covered by ASR with only unlabeled speech and text in the target languages. Using the FLEURS dataset, we define the task to cover $102$ languages, where transcribed speech is available in $52$ of these languages and can be used to improve end-to-end ASR quality on the remaining $50$. First, we show that by combining speech representations with byte-level text representations and use of language embeddings, we can dramatically reduce the Character Error Rate (CER) on languages with no supervised speech from 64.8\% to 30.8\%, a relative reduction of 53\%. Second, using a subset of South Asian languages we show that Maestro-U can promote knowledge transfer from languages with supervised speech even when there is limited to no graphemic overlap. Overall, Maestro-U closes the gap to oracle performance by 68.5\% relative and reduces the CER of 19 languages below 15\%. 训练最先进的自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型通常需要大量转录的语音。在这项工作中，我们证明了可以利用模态匹配的联合语音和文本模型来训练大规模多语言 ASR 模型，而无需对某些语言进行任何监督（手动转录）语音。本文探讨了在大规模多语言、零监督语音、现实世界环境中使用联合学习的语音和文本表示，以扩展 ASR 覆盖的语言集，仅使用目标语言中的未标记语音和文本。使用 FLEURS 数据集，我们将任务定义为涵盖 102 美元的语言，其中转录语音可用于其中 52 美元的语言，并且可用于提高剩余 50 美元的端到端 ASR 质量。首先，我们证明，通过将语音表示与字节级文本表示相结合并使用语言嵌入，我们可以将没有监督语音的语言的字符错误率（CER）从 64.8% 大幅降低到 30.8%，相对降低了 53%。其次，使用南亚语言的子集，我们表明 Maestro-U 可以促进具有监督语音的语言的知识转移，即使在字形重叠有限或没有的情况下也是如此。总体而言，Maestro-U 相对于 Oracle 性能差距缩小了 68.5%，并将 19 种语言的 CER 降低到 15% 以下。 本文提出Maestro-U方法，通过联合语音-文本表示学习，在无需监督语音数据的情况下训练大规模多语言语音识别（ASR）模型。 Zhehuai Chen,Ankur Bapna,Andrew Rosenberg,Yu Zhang,Bhuvana Ramabhadran,Pedro Moreno,Nanxin Chen cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Weixi Feng,Tsu-Jui Fu,Yujie Lu,William Yang Wang
title: ULN: Towards Underspecified Vision-and-Language Navigation
title_zh: ULN：走向未明确的视觉和语言导航
abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) is a task to guide an embodied agent moving to a target position using language instructions. Despite the significant performance improvement, the wide use of fine-grained instructions fails to characterize more practical linguistic variations in reality. To fill in this gap, we introduce a new setting, namely Underspecified vision-and-Language Navigation (ULN), and associated evaluation datasets. ULN evaluates agents using multi-level underspecified instructions instead of purely fine-grained or coarse-grained, which is a more realistic and general setting. As a primary step toward ULN, we propose a VLN framework that consists of a classification module, a navigation agent, and an Exploitation-to-Exploration (E2E) module. Specifically, we propose to learn Granularity Specific Sub-networks (GSS) for the agent to ground multi-level instructions with minimal additional parameters. Then, our E2E module estimates grounding uncertainty and conducts multi-step lookahead exploration to improve the success rate further. Experimental results show that existing VLN models are still brittle to multi-level language underspecification. Our framework is more robust and outperforms the baselines on ULN by ~10% relative success rate across all levels.
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) is a task to guide an embodied agent moving to a target position using language instructions. Despite the significant performance improvement, the wide use of fine-grained instructions fails to characterize more practical linguistic variations in reality. To fill in this gap, we introduce a new setting, namely Underspecified vision-and-Language Navigation (ULN), and associated evaluation datasets. ULN evaluates agents using multi-level underspecified instructions instead of purely fine-grained or coarse-grained, which is a more realistic and general setting. As a primary step toward ULN, we propose a VLN framework that consists of a classification module, a navigation agent, and an Exploitation-to-Exploration (E2E) module. Specifically, we propose to learn Granularity Specific Sub-networks (GSS) for the agent to ground multi-level instructions with minimal additional parameters. Then, our E2E module estimates grounding uncertainty and conducts multi-step lookahead exploration to improve the success rate further. Experimental results show that existing VLN models are still brittle to multi-level language underspecification. Our framework is more robust and outperforms the baselines on ULN by ~10% relative success rate across all levels.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言导航（VLN）是一项使用语言指令引导实体移动到目标位置的任务。尽管性能显着提高，但细粒度指令的广泛使用未能表征现实中更实用的语言变化。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了一种新设置，即未指定的视觉和语言导航（ULN）以及相关的评估数据集。 ULN 使用多级未指定指令而不是纯粹的细粒度或粗粒度指令来评估代理，这是一种更现实和通用的设置。作为迈向 ULN 的第一步，我们提出了一个 VLN 框架，该框架由分类模块、导航代理和开发到探索 (E2E) 模块组成。具体来说，我们建议学习粒度特定子网络（GSS），以便代理以最少的附加参数来实现多级指令。然后，我们的E2E模块估计接地不确定性并进行多步前瞻探索，以进一步提高成功率。实验结果表明，现有的 VLN 模型对于多级语言规范不足仍然很脆弱。我们的框架更加稳健，在所有级别上的相对成功率都比 ULN 基线高出约 10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的视觉与语言导航设置ULN，通过多级模糊指令评估智能体，并设计包含粒度特定子网络和探索模块的框架以提高鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言导航依赖细粒度指令，难以应对现实场景中语言指令的模糊性和多级表达问题，需更贴近实际的评估方式。
AI.method: 提出包含分类模块、导航代理和E2E探索模块的框架，设计粒度特定子网络（GSS）处理多级指令，并通过不确定性估计与多步前瞻探索提升导航成功率。
AI.result: 实验表明现有VLN模型在多级模糊指令下表现脆弱，本文框架在ULN任务中相较基线提升约10%的相对成功率。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效应对语言指令的模糊性与多级表达，为更现实的视觉语言导航任务提供了稳健解决方案。

authors_text: Johannes Ringwald,Samuel Schneider,Lingyun Chen,Dennis Knobbe,Lars Johannsmeier,Abdalla Swikir,Sami Haddadin
title: Towards Task-Specific Modular Gripper Fingers: Automatic Production of Fingertip Mechanics
title_zh: 面向特定任务的模块化手指夹：指尖机械装置的自动生产
abstract: The number of sequential tasks a single gripper can perform is significantly limited by its design. In many cases, changing the gripper fingers is required to successfully conduct multiple consecutive tasks. For this reason, several robotic tool change systems have been introduced that allow an automatic changing of the entire end-effector. However, many situations require only the modification or the change of the fingertip, making the exchange of the entire gripper uneconomic. In this paper, we introduce a paradigm for automatic task-specific fingertip production. The setup used in the proposed framework consists of a production and task execution unit, containing a robotic manipulator, and two 3D printers - autonomously producing the gripper fingers. It also consists of a second manipulator that uses a quick-exchange mechanism to pick up the printed fingertips and evaluates gripping performance. The setup is experimentally validated by conducting automatic production of three different fingertips and executing graspstability tests as well as multiple pick- and insertion tasks, with and without position offsets - using these fingertips. The proposed paradigm, indeed, goes beyond fingertip production and serves as a foundation for a fully automatic fingertip design, production and application pipeline - potentially improving manufacturing flexibility and representing a new production paradigm: tactile 3D manufacturing.
summary: The number of sequential tasks a single gripper can perform is significantly limited by its design. In many cases, changing the gripper fingers is required to successfully conduct multiple consecutive tasks. For this reason, several robotic tool change systems have been introduced that allow an automatic changing of the entire end-effector. However, many situations require only the modification or the change of the fingertip, making the exchange of the entire gripper uneconomic. In this paper, we introduce a paradigm for automatic task-specific fingertip production. The setup used in the proposed framework consists of a production and task execution unit, containing a robotic manipulator, and two 3D printers - autonomously producing the gripper fingers. It also consists of a second manipulator that uses a quick-exchange mechanism to pick up the printed fingertips and evaluates gripping performance. The setup is experimentally validated by conducting automatic production of three different fingertips and executing graspstability tests as well as multiple pick- and insertion tasks, with and without position offsets - using these fingertips. The proposed paradigm, indeed, goes beyond fingertip production and serves as a foundation for a fully automatic fingertip design, production and application pipeline - potentially improving manufacturing flexibility and representing a new production paradigm: tactile 3D manufacturing.
abstract_zh: 单个夹具可以执行的连续任务的数量很大程度上受到其设计的限制。在许多情况下，需要更换夹具手指才能成功执行多项连续任务。因此，引入了多种机器人工具更换系统，可以自动更换整个末端执行器。然而，许多情况只需要修改或更换指尖，使得整个夹具的更换不经济。在本文中，我们介绍了自动特定任务指尖生产的范例。所提出的框架中使用的设置由一个生产和任务执行单元组成，其中包含一个机器人操纵器和两台 3D 打印机 - 自动生产手指。它还包括第二个操纵器，该操纵器使用快速交换机制来拾取打印的指尖并评估抓取性能。通过使用这些指尖自动生产三种不同的指尖并执行抓握稳定性测试以及多个拾取和插入任务（有或没有位置偏移），对该设置进行了实验验证。事实上，所提出的范例超越了指尖生产，并作为全自动指尖设计、生产和应用流程的基础 - 潜在地提高了制造灵活性并代表了一种新的生产范例：触觉 3D 制造。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动生产任务特定模块化夹持器指尖的范式，通过3D打印和快速更换机制实现指尖的按需制造与性能评估。
AI.motivation: 传统夹持器设计限制了其执行多任务的能力，而更换整个夹持器成本高昂，仅需调整指尖的场景亟需经济高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建包含机械臂和双3D打印机的生产单元，结合快速更换机制的评估单元，实现指尖的自动生产、抓取测试及插入任务验证。
AI.result: 成功生产三种不同指尖并完成抓握稳定性测试及带位置偏移的多任务验证，证明了系统在灵活性和实用性上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该范式为全自动化指尖设计-生产-应用流程奠定基础，提升了制造灵活性，开创了触觉驱动的3D制造新方向。

motivation: 传统夹持器设计限制了其执行多任务的能力，而更换整个夹持器成本高昂，仅需调整指尖的场景亟需经济高效的解决方案。
method: 构建包含机械臂和双3D打印机的生产单元，结合快速更换机制的评估单元，实现指尖的自动生产、抓取测试及插入任务验证。
result: 成功生产三种不同指尖并完成抓握稳定性测试及带位置偏移的多任务验证，证明了系统在灵活性和实用性上的有效性。
conclusion: 该范式为全自动化指尖设计-生产-应用流程奠定基础，提升了制造灵活性，开创了触觉驱动的3D制造新方向。
search_text: Towards Task-Specific Modular Gripper Fingers: Automatic Production of Fingertip Mechanics 面向特定任务的模块化手指夹：指尖机械装置的自动生产 The number of sequential tasks a single gripper can perform is significantly limited by its design. In many cases, changing the gripper fingers is required to successfully conduct multiple consecutive tasks. For this reason, several robotic tool change systems have been introduced that allow an automatic changing of the entire end-effector. However, many situations require only the modification or the change of the fingertip, making the exchange of the entire gripper uneconomic. In this paper, we introduce a paradigm for automatic task-specific fingertip production. The setup used in the proposed framework consists of a production and task execution unit, containing a robotic manipulator, and two 3D printers - autonomously producing the gripper fingers. It also consists of a second manipulator that uses a quick-exchange mechanism to pick up the printed fingertips and evaluates gripping performance. The setup is experimentally validated by conducting automatic production of three different fingertips and executing graspstability tests as well as multiple pick- and insertion tasks, with and without position offsets - using these fingertips. The proposed paradigm, indeed, goes beyond fingertip production and serves as a foundation for a fully automatic fingertip design, production and application pipeline - potentially improving manufacturing flexibility and representing a new production paradigm: tactile 3D manufacturing. 单个夹具可以执行的连续任务的数量很大程度上受到其设计的限制。在许多情况下，需要更换夹具手指才能成功执行多项连续任务。因此，引入了多种机器人工具更换系统，可以自动更换整个末端执行器。然而，许多情况只需要修改或更换指尖，使得整个夹具的更换不经济。在本文中，我们介绍了自动特定任务指尖生产的范例。所提出的框架中使用的设置由一个生产和任务执行单元组成，其中包含一个机器人操纵器和两台 3D 打印机 - 自动生产手指。它还包括第二个操纵器，该操纵器使用快速交换机制来拾取打印的指尖并评估抓取性能。通过使用这些指尖自动生产三种不同的指尖并执行抓握稳定性测试以及多个拾取和插入任务（有或没有位置偏移），对该设置进行了实验验证。事实上，所提出的范例超越了指尖生产，并作为全自动指尖设计、生产和应用流程的基础 - 潜在地提高了制造灵活性并代表了一种新的生产范例：触觉 3D 制造。 本文提出一种自动生产任务特定模块化夹持器指尖的范式，通过3D打印和快速更换机制实现指尖的按需制造与性能评估。 Johannes Ringwald,Samuel Schneider,Lingyun Chen,Dennis Knobbe,Lars Johannsmeier,Abdalla Swikir,Sami Haddadin cs.RO

authors_text: Kimon Fountoulakis,Dake He,Silvio Lattanzi,Bryan Perozzi,Anton Tsitsulin,Shenghao Yang
title: On Classification Thresholds for Graph Attention with Edge Features
title_zh: 关于具有边缘特征的图注意力的分类阈值
abstract: The recent years we have seen the rise of graph neural networks for prediction tasks on graphs. One of the dominant architectures is graph attention due to its ability to make predictions using weighted edge features and not only node features. In this paper we analyze, theoretically and empirically, graph attention networks and their ability of correctly labelling nodes in a classic classification task. More specifically, we study the performance of graph attention on the classic contextual stochastic block model (CSBM). In CSBM the nodes and edge features are obtained from a mixture of Gaussians and the edges from a stochastic block model. We consider a general graph attention mechanism that takes random edge features as input to determine the attention coefficients. We study two cases, in the first one, when the edge features are noisy, we prove that the majority of the attention coefficients are up to a constant uniform. This allows us to prove that graph attention with edge features is not better than simple graph convolution for achieving perfect node classification. Second, we prove that when the edge features are clean graph attention can distinguish intra- from inter-edges and this makes graph attention better than classic graph convolution.
summary: The recent years we have seen the rise of graph neural networks for prediction tasks on graphs. One of the dominant architectures is graph attention due to its ability to make predictions using weighted edge features and not only node features. In this paper we analyze, theoretically and empirically, graph attention networks and their ability of correctly labelling nodes in a classic classification task. More specifically, we study the performance of graph attention on the classic contextual stochastic block model (CSBM). In CSBM the nodes and edge features are obtained from a mixture of Gaussians and the edges from a stochastic block model. We consider a general graph attention mechanism that takes random edge features as input to determine the attention coefficients. We study two cases, in the first one, when the edge features are noisy, we prove that the majority of the attention coefficients are up to a constant uniform. This allows us to prove that graph attention with edge features is not better than simple graph convolution for achieving perfect node classification. Second, we prove that when the edge features are clean graph attention can distinguish intra- from inter-edges and this makes graph attention better than classic graph convolution.
abstract_zh: 近年来，我们看到用于图预测任务的图神经网络的兴起。主要架构之一是图注意力，因为它能够使用加权边缘特征而不仅仅是节点特征进行预测。在本文中，我们从理论上和实证上分析了图注意力网络及其在经典分类任务中正确标记节点的能力。更具体地说，我们研究了经典上下文随机块模型（CSBM）上图注意力的性能。在 CSBM 中，节点和边缘特征是从高斯混合中获得的，边缘是从随机块模型中获得的。我们考虑一种通用的图注意力机制，它将随机边缘特征作为输入来确定注意力系数。我们研究了两种情况，在第一种情况下，当边缘特征有噪声时，我们证明大多数注意力系数达到恒定均匀。这使我们能够证明具有边缘特征的图注意力并不比简单的图卷积更好地实现完美的节点分类。其次，我们证明，当边缘特征干净时，图注意力可以区分边缘内和边缘间，这使得图注意力比经典图卷积更好。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了图注意力网络在使用边特征进行节点分类任务中的性能，特别是在上下文随机块模型下的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管图注意力网络在利用边特征进行预测方面表现出优势，但缺乏对其在不同边特征质量下的分类能力的理论分析。
AI.method: 通过理论和实证分析，研究了图注意力机制在两种边特征场景下的表现：噪声边特征和干净边特征。
AI.result: 当边特征存在噪声时，注意力系数趋近于常数，图注意力性能不优于简单图卷积；而干净边特征下，图注意力能有效区分内部与外部边，优于传统图卷积。
AI.conclusion: 边特征的质量显著影响图注意力网络的性能，干净数据下其分类能力优于传统方法，而噪声数据下则表现较差。

authors_text: Yanan Xin,Natasa Tagasovska,Fernando Perez-Cruz,Martin Raubal
title: Vision Paper: Causal Inference for Interpretable and Robust Machine Learning in Mobility Analysis
title_zh: 愿景论文：移动性分析中可解释且稳健的机器学习的因果推理
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is revolutionizing many areas of our lives, leading a new era of technological advancement. Particularly, the transportation sector would benefit from the progress in AI and advance the development of intelligent transportation systems. Building intelligent transportation systems requires an intricate combination of artificial intelligence and mobility analysis. The past few years have seen rapid development in transportation applications using advanced deep neural networks. However, such deep neural networks are difficult to interpret and lack robustness, which slows the deployment of these AI-powered algorithms in practice. To improve their usability, increasing research efforts have been devoted to developing interpretable and robust machine learning methods, among which the causal inference approach recently gained traction as it provides interpretable and actionable information. Moreover, most of these methods are developed for image or sequential data which do not satisfy specific requirements of mobility data analysis. This vision paper emphasizes research challenges in deep learning-based mobility analysis that require interpretability and robustness, summarizes recent developments in using causal inference for improving the interpretability and robustness of machine learning methods, and highlights opportunities in developing causally-enabled machine learning models tailored for mobility analysis. This research direction will make AI in the transportation sector more interpretable and reliable, thus contributing to safer, more efficient, and more sustainable future transportation systems.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is revolutionizing many areas of our lives, leading a new era of technological advancement. However, such deep neural networks are difficult to interpret and lack robustness, which slows the deployment of these AI-powered algorithms in practice. To improve their usability, increasing research efforts have been devoted to developing interpretable and robust machine learning methods, among which the causal inference approach recently gained traction as it provides interpretable and actionable information. Moreover, most of these methods are developed for image or sequential data which do not satisfy specific requirements of mobility data analysis. This vision paper emphasizes research challenges in deep learning-based mobility analysis that require interpretability and robustness, summarizes recent developments in using causal inference for improving the interpretability and robustness of machine learning methods, and highlights opportunities in developing causally-enabled machine learning models tailored for mobility analysis. This research direction will make AI in the transportation sector more interpretable and reliable, thus contributing to safer, more efficient, and more sustainable future transportation systems.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）正在彻底改变我们生活的许多领域，引领技术进步的新时代。尤其是交通运输行业将受益于人工智能的进步，推动智能交通系统的发展。构建智能交通系统需要人工智能和移动分析的复杂结合。过去几年，使用先进深度神经网络的交通应用取得了快速发展。然而，这种深度神经网络难以解释且缺乏鲁棒性，这减慢了这些人工智能算法在实践中的部署。为了提高其可用性，越来越多的研究工作致力于开发可解释和强大的机器学习方法，其中因果推理方法最近因其提供可解释和可操作的信息而受到关注。此外，这些方法大多数是针对图像或序列数据开发的，不能满足移动性数据分析的特定要求。这篇愿景论文强调了基于深度学习的移动分析中需要可解释性和稳健性的研究挑战，总结了使用因果推理来提高机器学习方法的可解释性和稳健性的最新进展，并强调了开发为移动分析量身定制的因果机器学习模型的机会。该研究方向将使交通领域的人工智能更加可解释和可靠，从而有助于构建更安全、更高效、更可持续的未来交通系统。

AI.tldr: 探讨利用因果推断方法提升交通分析中机器学习模型的可解释性与鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在交通分析中存在可解释性差、鲁棒性不足的问题，限制了其实际应用，需寻求更可靠的方法
AI.method: 综述因果推断在提升机器学习可解释性与鲁棒性中的应用，并指出针对交通数据定制因果模型的必要性
AI.result: 总结因果推断在交通分析中的研究进展，揭示其提升模型性能的潜力，但实际应用仍有限
AI.conclusion: 未来需开发针对交通数据的因果推断模型，推动更安全、高效、可持续的智能交通系统发展

authors_text: Afreen Shaikh,Sharmila Botcha,Murali Krishna
title: Otsu based Differential Evolution Method for Image Segmentation
title_zh: 基于Otsu的图像分割差分进化方法
abstract: This paper proposes an OTSU based differential evolution method for satellite image segmentation and compares it with four other methods such as Modified Artificial Bee Colony Optimizer (MABC), Artificial Bee Colony (ABC), Genetic Algorithm (GA), and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) using the objective function proposed by Otsu for optimal multilevel thresholding. The experiments conducted and their results illustrate that our proposed DE and OTSU algorithm segmentation can effectively and precisely segment the input image, close to results obtained by the other methods. In the proposed DE and OTSU algorithm, instead of passing the fitness function variables, the entire image is passed as an input to the DE algorithm after obtaining the threshold values for the input number of levels in the OTSU algorithm. The image segmentation results are obtained after learning about the image instead of learning about the fitness variables. In comparison to other segmentation methods examined, the proposed DE and OTSU algorithm yields promising results with minimized computational time compared to some algorithms.
summary: This paper proposes an OTSU based differential evolution method for satellite image segmentation and compares it with four other methods such as Modified Artificial Bee Colony Optimizer (MABC), Artificial Bee Colony (ABC), Genetic Algorithm (GA), and Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) using the objective function proposed by Otsu for optimal multilevel thresholding. The experiments conducted and their results illustrate that our proposed DE and OTSU algorithm segmentation can effectively and precisely segment the input image, close to results obtained by the other methods. In the proposed DE and OTSU algorithm, instead of passing the fitness function variables, the entire image is passed as an input to the DE algorithm after obtaining the threshold values for the input number of levels in the OTSU algorithm. The image segmentation results are obtained after learning about the image instead of learning about the fitness variables. In comparison to other segmentation methods examined, the proposed DE and OTSU algorithm yields promising results with minimized computational time compared to some algorithms.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于 OTSU 的差分进化方法用于卫星图像分割，并使用 Otsu 提出的目标函数进行最佳多级阈值处理，并将其与改进的人工蜂群优化器（MABC）、人工蜂群（ABC）、遗传算法（GA）和粒子群优化（PSO）等其他四种方法进行了比较。进行的实验及其结果表明，我们提出的 DE 和 OTSU 算法分割可以有效且精确地分割输入图像，接近其他方法获得的结果。在所提出的DE和OTSU算法中，不是传递适应度函数变量，而是在获得OTSU算法中输入级别数的阈值后，将整个图像作为DE算法的输入传递。图像分割结果是在学习图像之后获得的，而不是学习适应度变量。与所研究的其他分割方法相比，所提出的 DE 和 OTSU 算法产生了有希望的结果，与某些算法相比，计算时间最少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Otsu的差分进化方法，用于卫星图像分割，并与四种其他方法进行比较。
AI.motivation: 为了提高图像分割的精度和效率，本文提出了一种基于Otsu的差分进化方法，以优化多级阈值分割。
AI.method: 本文提出的方法结合了Otsu算法和差分进化算法，通过将整个图像作为输入传递给差分进化算法，而不是传递适应度函数变量，从而实现图像分割。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的方法在分割精度和计算时间上均优于其他方法，如MABC、ABC、GA和PSO。
AI.conclusion: 基于Otsu的差分进化方法在图像分割任务中表现出良好的性能和效率，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Arpit Bahety,Shreeya Jain,Huy Ha,Nathalie Hager,Benjamin Burchfiel,Eric Cousineau,Siyuan Feng,Shuran Song
title: Bag All You Need: Learning a Generalizable Bagging Strategy for Heterogeneous Objects
title_zh: 打包你需要的一切：学习异构对象的通用装袋策略
abstract: We introduce a practical robotics solution for the task of heterogeneous bagging, requiring the placement of multiple rigid and deformable objects into a deformable bag. This is a difficult task as it features complex interactions between multiple highly deformable objects under limited observability. To tackle these challenges, we propose a robotic system consisting of two learned policies: a rearrangement policy that learns to place multiple rigid objects and fold deformable objects in order to achieve desirable pre-bagging conditions, and a lifting policy to infer suitable grasp points for bi-manual bag lifting. We evaluate these learned policies on a real-world three-arm robot platform that achieves a 70% heterogeneous bagging success rate with novel objects. To facilitate future research and comparison, we also develop a novel heterogeneous bagging simulation benchmark that will be made publicly available.
summary: We introduce a practical robotics solution for the task of heterogeneous bagging, requiring the placement of multiple rigid and deformable objects into a deformable bag. This is a difficult task as it features complex interactions between multiple highly deformable objects under limited observability. To tackle these challenges, we propose a robotic system consisting of two learned policies: a rearrangement policy that learns to place multiple rigid objects and fold deformable objects in order to achieve desirable pre-bagging conditions, and a lifting policy to infer suitable grasp points for bi-manual bag lifting. We evaluate these learned policies on a real-world three-arm robot platform that achieves a 70% heterogeneous bagging success rate with novel objects. To facilitate future research and comparison, we also develop a novel heterogeneous bagging simulation benchmark that will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 我们为异构装袋任务引入了一种实用的机器人解决方案，需要将多个刚性且可变形的物体放入可变形的袋子中。这是一项艰巨的任务，因为它的特点是在有限的可观测性下多个高度变形的物体之间存在复杂的相互作用。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个由两个学习策略组成的机器人系统：一个重新排列策略，用于学习放置多个刚性物体和折叠可变形物体，以实现理想的预装袋条件；以及一个提升策略，用于推断适合双手提袋的抓握点。我们在现实世界的三臂机器人平台上评估这些学习策略，该平台对新物体实现了 70% 的异构装袋成功率。为了便于未来的研究和比较，我们还开发了一种新颖的异构装袋模拟基准，该基准将公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对异构物体（刚性与变形物体）的通用装袋策略，通过机器人系统实现复杂交互下的装袋任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理多变形物体在有限观测条件下的复杂交互，亟需一种通用且高效的异构物体装袋解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含两阶段策略的机器人系统：1）重排策略学习放置刚性物体并折叠变形物体以优化装袋前状态；2）抓取策略推断双臂抓取点以完成装袋动作，并开发异构装袋仿真基准。
AI.result: 在真实三臂机器人平台实现70%的新型异构物体装袋成功率，同时公开新型仿真基准以促进后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 提出的策略有效解决异构物体装袋难题，仿真基准为未来研究提供标准化评估框架。

authors_text: Kanchana Ranasinghe,Brandon McKinzie,Sachin Ravi,Yinfei Yang,Alexander Toshev,Jonathon Shlens
title: Perceptual Grouping in Contrastive Vision-Language Models
title_zh: 对比视觉语言模型中的感知分组
abstract: Recent advances in zero-shot image recognition suggest that vision-language models learn generic visual representations with a high degree of semantic information that may be arbitrarily probed with natural language phrases. Understanding an image, however, is not just about understanding what content resides within an image, but importantly, where that content resides. In this work we examine how well vision-language models are able to understand where objects reside within an image and group together visually related parts of the imagery. We demonstrate how contemporary vision and language representation learning models based on contrastive losses and large web-based data capture limited object localization information. We propose a minimal set of modifications that results in models that uniquely learn both semantic and spatial information. We measure this performance in terms of zero-shot image recognition, unsupervised bottom-up and top-down semantic segmentations, as well as robustness analyses. We find that the resulting model achieves state-of-the-art results in terms of unsupervised segmentation, and demonstrate that the learned representations are uniquely robust to spurious correlations in datasets designed to probe the causal behavior of vision models.
summary: Recent advances in zero-shot image recognition suggest that vision-language models learn generic visual representations with a high degree of semantic information that may be arbitrarily probed with natural language phrases. Understanding an image, however, is not just about understanding what content resides within an image, but importantly, where that content resides. In this work we examine how well vision-language models are able to understand where objects reside within an image and group together visually related parts of the imagery. We demonstrate how contemporary vision and language representation learning models based on contrastive losses and large web-based data capture limited object localization information. We propose a minimal set of modifications that results in models that uniquely learn both semantic and spatial information. We measure this performance in terms of zero-shot image recognition, unsupervised bottom-up and top-down semantic segmentations, as well as robustness analyses. We find that the resulting model achieves state-of-the-art results in terms of unsupervised segmentation, and demonstrate that the learned representations are uniquely robust to spurious correlations in datasets designed to probe the causal behavior of vision models.
abstract_zh: 零样本图像识别的最新进展表明，视觉语言模型可以学习具有高度语义信息的通用视觉表示，这些语义信息可以用自然语言短语任意探测。然而，理解图像不仅仅是理解图像中的内容，更重要的是理解该内容所在的位置。在这项工作中，我们研究了视觉语言模型如何能够很好地理解对象在图像中的位置，并将图像的视觉相关部分组合在一起。我们展示了基于对比损失和基于大型网络的数据的当代视觉和语言表示学习模型如何捕获有限的对象定位信息。我们提出了一组最小的修改，从而产生能够独特地学习语义和空间信息的模型。我们通过零样本图像识别、无监督的自下而上和自上而下的语义分割以及鲁棒性分析来衡量这种性能。我们发现所得到的模型在无监督分割方面取得了最先进的结果，并证明了学习到的表示对于旨在探测视觉模型因果行为的数据集中的虚假相关性具有独特的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对比视觉-语言模型在感知分组能力上的表现，探索其如何理解图像中物体的位置并整合视觉相关部分。
AI.motivation: 尽管零样本图像识别取得进展，但理解图像内容的位置信息（空间关系）仍是视觉-语言模型的挑战，现有模型在局部化信息捕捉上存在局限。
AI.method: 通过对比损失和大规模网络数据训练模型，并提出最小化修改方案，使模型同时学习语义与空间信息，使用零样本识别、无监督分割及鲁棒性分析进行评估。
AI.result: 改进后的模型在无监督分割任务中达到最先进水平，且表征对数据集中的虚假相关性具有更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 结合语义与空间信息的模型设计有效提升了视觉-语言模型的感知分组能力，为因果行为分析提供了更可靠的表征。

tldr: 本文研究对比视觉-语言模型在感知分组能力上的表现，探索其如何理解图像中物体的位置并整合视觉相关部分。
motivation: 尽管零样本图像识别取得进展，但理解图像内容的位置信息（空间关系）仍是视觉-语言模型的挑战，现有模型在局部化信息捕捉上存在局限。
method: 通过对比损失和大规模网络数据训练模型，并提出最小化修改方案，使模型同时学习语义与空间信息，使用零样本识别、无监督分割及鲁棒性分析进行评估。
result: 改进后的模型在无监督分割任务中达到最先进水平，且表征对数据集中的虚假相关性具有更强鲁棒性。
conclusion: 结合语义与空间信息的模型设计有效提升了视觉-语言模型的感知分组能力，为因果行为分析提供了更可靠的表征。
search_text: Perceptual Grouping in Contrastive Vision-Language Models 对比视觉语言模型中的感知分组 Recent advances in zero-shot image recognition suggest that vision-language models learn generic visual representations with a high degree of semantic information that may be arbitrarily probed with natural language phrases. Understanding an image, however, is not just about understanding what content resides within an image, but importantly, where that content resides. In this work we examine how well vision-language models are able to understand where objects reside within an image and group together visually related parts of the imagery. We demonstrate how contemporary vision and language representation learning models based on contrastive losses and large web-based data capture limited object localization information. We propose a minimal set of modifications that results in models that uniquely learn both semantic and spatial information. We measure this performance in terms of zero-shot image recognition, unsupervised bottom-up and top-down semantic segmentations, as well as robustness analyses. We find that the resulting model achieves state-of-the-art results in terms of unsupervised segmentation, and demonstrate that the learned representations are uniquely robust to spurious correlations in datasets designed to probe the causal behavior of vision models. 零样本图像识别的最新进展表明，视觉语言模型可以学习具有高度语义信息的通用视觉表示，这些语义信息可以用自然语言短语任意探测。然而，理解图像不仅仅是理解图像中的内容，更重要的是理解该内容所在的位置。在这项工作中，我们研究了视觉语言模型如何能够很好地理解对象在图像中的位置，并将图像的视觉相关部分组合在一起。我们展示了基于对比损失和基于大型网络的数据的当代视觉和语言表示学习模型如何捕获有限的对象定位信息。我们提出了一组最小的修改，从而产生能够独特地学习语义和空间信息的模型。我们通过零样本图像识别、无监督的自下而上和自上而下的语义分割以及鲁棒性分析来衡量这种性能。我们发现所得到的模型在无监督分割方面取得了最先进的结果，并证明了学习到的表示对于旨在探测视觉模型因果行为的数据集中的虚假相关性具有独特的鲁棒性。 本文研究对比视觉-语言模型在感知分组能力上的表现，探索其如何理解图像中物体的位置并整合视觉相关部分。 Kanchana Ranasinghe,Brandon McKinzie,Sachin Ravi,Yinfei Yang,Alexander Toshev,Jonathon Shlens cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chun-Kit Ngan,Alexander Brodsky
title: Optimal Event Monitoring through Internet Mashup over Multivariate Time Series
title_zh: 通过多元时间序列上的互联网混搭实现最佳事件监控
abstract: We propose a Web-Mashup Application Service Framework for Multivariate Time Series Analytics (MTSA) that supports the services of model definitions, querying, parameter learning, model evaluations, data monitoring, decision recommendations, and web portals. This framework maintains the advantage of combining the strengths of both the domain-knowledge-based and the formal-learning-based approaches and is designed for a more general class of problems over multivariate time series. More specifically, we identify a general-hybrid-based model, MTSA-Parameter Estimation, to solve this class of problems in which the objective function is maximized or minimized from the optimal decision parameters regardless of particular time points. This model also allows domain experts to include multiple types of constraints, e.g., global constraints and monitoring constraints. We further extend the MTSA data model and query language to support this class of problems for the services of learning, monitoring, and recommendation. At the end, we conduct an experimental case study for a university campus microgrid as a practical example to demonstrate our proposed framework, models, and language.
summary: We propose a Web-Mashup Application Service Framework for Multivariate Time Series Analytics (MTSA) that supports the services of model definitions, querying, parameter learning, model evaluations, data monitoring, decision recommendations, and web portals. This framework maintains the advantage of combining the strengths of both the domain-knowledge-based and the formal-learning-based approaches and is designed for a more general class of problems over multivariate time series. More specifically, we identify a general-hybrid-based model, MTSA-Parameter Estimation, to solve this class of problems in which the objective function is maximized or minimized from the optimal decision parameters regardless of particular time points. This model also allows domain experts to include multiple types of constraints, e.g., global constraints and monitoring constraints. We further extend the MTSA data model and query language to support this class of problems for the services of learning, monitoring, and recommendation. At the end, we conduct an experimental case study for a university campus microgrid as a practical example to demonstrate our proposed framework, models, and language.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于多元时间序列分析（MTSA）的Web Mashup应用服务框架，支持模型定义、查询、参数学习、模型评估、数据监控、决策建议和门户网站服务。该框架保持了结合基于领域知识和基于形式学习的方法的优势，并且是为多元时间序列上更一般的问题而设计的。更具体地说，我们确定了一种基于通用混合的模型，即 MTSA 参数估计，来解决此类问题，其中无论特定时间点如何，目标函数都会根据最佳决策参数最大化或最小化。该模型还允许领域专家包含多种类型的约束，例如全局约束和监控约束。我们进一步扩展 MTSA 数据模型和查询语言来支持此类问题，以提供学习、监控和推荐服务。最后，我们以大学校园微电网为例进行实验案例研究，以展示我们提出的框架、模型和语言。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个结合领域知识与机器学习的多变量时间序列分析框架MTSA，用于实现最优事件监控与决策推荐。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效融合领域专家知识与数据驱动模型，且缺乏对复杂约束条件的支持，导致多变量时间序列监控与决策效率不足。
AI.method: 设计Web-Mashup框架整合模型定义、参数学习与监控服务，提出通用混合模型MTSA-参数估计，支持全局约束与监控约束，并扩展数据模型与查询语言。
AI.result: 通过大学校园微电网案例验证，框架能有效处理多变量时间序列的最优决策参数估计与实时监控任务。
AI.conclusion: MTSA框架通过结合领域知识与机器学习，解决了复杂约束下的多变量时间序列分析问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jeffrey M. Shainline,Bryce A. Primavera,Saeed Khan
title: Phenomenological Model of Superconducting Optoelectronic Loop Neurons
title_zh: 超导光电环路神经元唯象模型
comment: 34 total pages, 21 pages before the appendices, 31 figures, 24 figures before the appendices
comments: 34 total pages, 21 pages before the appendices, 31 figures, 24 figures before the appendices
abstract: Superconducting optoelectronic loop neurons are a class of circuits potentially conducive to networks for large-scale artificial cognition. These circuits employ superconducting components including single-photon detectors, Josephson junctions, and transformers to achieve neuromorphic functions. To date, all simulations of loop neurons have used first-principles circuit analysis to model the behavior of synapses, dendrites, and neurons. These circuit models are computationally inefficient and leave opaque the relationship between loop neurons and other complex systems. Here we introduce a modeling framework that captures the behavior of the relevant synaptic, dendritic, and neuronal circuits at a phenomenological level without resorting to full circuit equations. Within this compact model, each dendrite is discovered to obey a single nonlinear leaky-integrator ordinary differential equation, while a neuron is modeled as a dendrite with a thresholding element and an additional feedback mechanism for establishing a refractory period. A synapse is modeled as a single-photon detector coupled to a dendrite, where the response of the single-photon detector follows a closed-form expression. We quantify the accuracy of the phenomenological model relative to circuit simulations and find that the approach reduces computational time by a factor of ten thousand while maintaining accuracy of one part in ten thousand. We demonstrate the use of the model with several basic examples. The net increase in computational efficiency enables future simulation of large networks, while the formulation provides a connection to a large body of work in applied mathematics, computational neuroscience, and physical systems such as spin glasses.
summary: Superconducting optoelectronic loop neurons are a class of circuits potentially conducive to networks for large-scale artificial cognition. These circuits employ superconducting components including single-photon detectors, Josephson junctions, and transformers to achieve neuromorphic functions. To date, all simulations of loop neurons have used first-principles circuit analysis to model the behavior of synapses, dendrites, and neurons. These circuit models are computationally inefficient and leave opaque the relationship between loop neurons and other complex systems. Here we introduce a modeling framework that captures the behavior of the relevant synaptic, dendritic, and neuronal circuits at a phenomenological level without resorting to full circuit equations. Within this compact model, each dendrite is discovered to obey a single nonlinear leaky-integrator ordinary differential equation, while a neuron is modeled as a dendrite with a thresholding element and an additional feedback mechanism for establishing a refractory period. A synapse is modeled as a single-photon detector coupled to a dendrite, where the response of the single-photon detector follows a closed-form expression. We quantify the accuracy of the phenomenological model relative to circuit simulations and find that the approach reduces computational time by a factor of ten thousand while maintaining accuracy of one part in ten thousand. We demonstrate the use of the model with several basic examples. The net increase in computational efficiency enables future simulation of large networks, while the formulation provides a connection to a large body of work in applied mathematics, computational neuroscience, and physical systems such as spin glasses.
abstract_zh: 超导光电环路神经元是一类可能有利于大规模人工认知网络的电路。这些电路采用超导组件，包括单光子探测器、约瑟夫森结和变压器来实现神经形态功能。迄今为止，所有循环神经元的模拟都使用第一原理电路分析来模拟突触、树突和神经元的行为。这些电路模型的计算效率低下，并且使得环路神经元和其他复杂系统之间的关系变得不透明。在这里，我们介绍了一个建模框架，该框架可以在现象学层面捕获相关突触、树突和神经元电路的行为，而无需求助于完整的电路方程。在这个紧凑的模型中，每个树突被发现服从单个非线性泄漏积分器常微分方程，而神经元被建模为具有阈值元件和用于建立不应期的附加反馈机制的树突。突触被建模为耦合到树突的单光子探测器，其中单光子探测器的响应遵循封闭式表达式。我们量化了唯象模型相对于电路仿真的准确性，发现该方法将计算时间减少了一万倍，同时保持万分之一的精度。我们通过几个基本示例演示了该模型的使用。计算效率的净增加使得未来能够模拟大型网络，而该公式提供了与应用数学、计算神经科学和物理系统（例如自旋玻璃）中的大量工作的联系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于模拟超导光电环神经元的表观模型，以提高计算效率并保持准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的环神经元模拟方法依赖于第一性原理电路分析，计算效率低下且难以揭示环神经元与其他复杂系统之间的关系。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种表观建模框架，通过非线性漏积分常微分方程描述树突行为，将神经元建模为具有阈值元件和额外反馈机制的树突，并将突触建模为与树突耦合的单光子探测器。
AI.result: 该模型相比电路模拟将计算时间减少了1万倍，同时保持了1万分之一的精度，并通过多个基本示例展示了其应用。
AI.conclusion: 该模型显著提高了计算效率，为未来大规模网络的模拟提供了可能，并与应用数学、计算神经科学和物理系统等领域建立了联系。

We quantify the accuracy of the phenomenological model relative to circuit simulations and find that the approach reduces computational time by a factor of ten thousand while maintaining accuracy of one part in ten thousand. We demonstrate the use of the model with several basic examples. The net increase in computational efficiency enables future simulation of large networks, while the formulation provides a connection to a large body of work in applied mathematics, computational neuroscience, and physical systems such as spin glasses. 超导光电环路神经元是一类可能有利于大规模人工认知网络的电路。这些电路采用超导组件，包括单光子探测器、约瑟夫森结和变压器来实现神经形态功能。迄今为止，所有循环神经元的模拟都使用第一原理电路分析来模拟突触、树突和神经元的行为。这些电路模型的计算效率低下，并且使得环路神经元和其他复杂系统之间的关系变得不透明。在这里，我们介绍了一个建模框架，该框架可以在现象学层面捕获相关突触、树突和神经元电路的行为，而无需求助于完整的电路方程。在这个紧凑的模型中，每个树突被发现服从单个非线性泄漏积分器常微分方程，而神经元被建模为具有阈值元件和用于建立不应期的附加反馈机制的树突。突触被建模为耦合到树突的单光子探测器，其中单光子探测器的响应遵循封闭式表达式。我们量化了唯象模型相对于电路仿真的准确性，发现该方法将计算时间减少了一万倍，同时保持万分之一的精度。我们通过几个基本示例演示了该模型的使用。计算效率的净增加使得未来能够模拟大型网络，而该公式提供了与应用数学、计算神经科学和物理系统（例如自旋玻璃）中的大量工作的联系。 本文提出了一种用于模拟超导光电环神经元的表观模型，以提高计算效率并保持准确性。 Jeffrey M. Shainline,Bryce A. Primavera,Saeed Khan cs.NE,cond-mat.dis-nn,nlin.AO

authors_text: Daniela A. Wiepert,Bradley A. Malin,Joseph R. Duffy,Rene L. Utianski,John L. Stricker,David T. Jones,Hugo Botha
title: Risk of re-identification for shared clinical speech recordings
title_zh: 共享临床语音录音的重新识别风险
abstract: Large, curated datasets are required to leverage speech-based tools in healthcare. These are costly to produce, resulting in increased interest in data sharing. As speech can potentially identify speakers (i.e., voiceprints), sharing recordings raises privacy concerns. We examine the re-identification risk for speech recordings, without reference to demographic or metadata, using a state-of-the-art speaker recognition system. We demonstrate that the risk is inversely related to the number of comparisons an adversary must consider, i.e., the search space. Risk is high for a small search space but drops as the search space grows ($precision >0.85$ for $<1*10^{6}$ comparisons, $precision <0.5$ for $>3*10^{6}$ comparisons). Next, we show that the nature of a speech recording influences re-identification risk, with non-connected speech (e.g., vowel prolongation) being harder to identify. Our findings suggest that speaker recognition systems can be used to re-identify participants in specific circumstances, but in practice, the re-identification risk appears low.
summary: Large, curated datasets are required to leverage speech-based tools in healthcare. These are costly to produce, resulting in increased interest in data sharing. As speech can potentially identify speakers (i.e., voiceprints), sharing recordings raises privacy concerns. We examine the re-identification risk for speech recordings, without reference to demographic or metadata, using a state-of-the-art speaker recognition system. We demonstrate that the risk is inversely related to the number of comparisons an adversary must consider, i.e., the search space. Risk is high for a small search space but drops as the search space grows ($precision >0.85$ for $<1*10^{6}$ comparisons, $precision <0.5$ for $>3*10^{6}$ comparisons). Next, we show that the nature of a speech recording influences re-identification risk, with non-connected speech (e.g., vowel prolongation) being harder to identify. Our findings suggest that speaker recognition systems can be used to re-identify participants in specific circumstances, but in practice, the re-identification risk appears low.
abstract_zh: 需要大型、精心策划的数据集来利用医疗保健中基于语音的工具。这些产品的生产成本高昂，导致人们对数据共享的兴趣增加。由于语音可能会识别说话者（即声纹），因此共享录音会引发隐私问题。我们使用最先进的说话人识别系统，在不参考人口统计或元数据的情况下检查语音录音的重新识别风险。我们证明风险与对手必须考虑的比较数量（即搜索空间）成反比。对于较小的搜索空间，风险较高，但随着搜索空间的增大，风险会降低（对于 $<1*10^{6}$ 比较，$ precision >0.85$，对于 $>3*10^{6}$ 比较，$ precision <0.5$）。接下来，我们表明语音录音的性质会影响重新识别风险，非连接语音（例如元音延长）更难识别。我们的研究结果表明，说话人识别系统可用于在特定情况下重新识别参与者，但实际上，重新识别的风险似乎很低。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了在无人口统计学或元数据的情况下，使用最先进的说话人识别系统对共享临床语音记录进行重新识别的风险。
AI.motivation: 医疗健康领域需要大规模语音数据集来开发语音工具，但共享语音数据可能因语音特征（如声纹）导致隐私泄露风险。
AI.method: 通过状态-of-the-art说话人识别系统，分析语音记录的重新识别风险，研究搜索空间规模及语音类型（如非连贯语音）对风险的影响。
AI.result: 重新识别风险与对手需比较的样本数量呈反比，搜索空间较小时风险较高（精度>0.85），而超过3*10^6次比较时精度低于0.5；非连贯语音更难被识别。
AI.conclusion: 尽管特定情况下存在重新识别风险，但实际场景中该风险较低。
