authors_text: Daniel A. P. Oliveira,David Martins de Matos
title: Transfer-learning for video classification: Video Swin Transformer on multiple domains
title_zh: 视频分类的迁移学习：多域上的 Video Swin Transformer
abstract: The computer vision community has seen a shift from convolutional-based to pure transformer architectures for both image and video tasks. Training a transformer from zero for these tasks usually requires a lot of data and computational resources. Video Swin Transformer (VST) is a pure-transformer model developed for video classification which achieves state-of-the-art results in accuracy and efficiency on several datasets. In this paper, we aim to understand if VST generalizes well enough to be used in an out-of-domain setting. We study the performance of VST on two large-scale datasets, namely FCVID and Something-Something using a transfer learning approach from Kinetics-400, which requires around 4x less memory than training from scratch. We then break down the results to understand where VST fails the most and in which scenarios the transfer-learning approach is viable. Our experiments show an 85\% top-1 accuracy on FCVID without retraining the whole model which is equal to the state-of-the-art for the dataset and a 21\% accuracy on Something-Something. The experiments also suggest that the performance of the VST decreases on average when the video duration increases which seems to be a consequence of a design choice of the model. From the results, we conclude that VST generalizes well enough to classify out-of-domain videos without retraining when the target classes are from the same type as the classes used to train the model. We observed this effect when we performed transfer-learning from Kinetics-400 to FCVID, where most datasets target mostly objects. On the other hand, if the classes are not from the same type, then the accuracy after the transfer-learning approach is expected to be poor. We observed this effect when we performed transfer-learning from Kinetics-400, where the classes represent mostly objects, to Something-Something, where the classes represent mostly actions.
summary: The computer vision community has seen a shift from convolutional-based to pure transformer architectures for both image and video tasks. Training a transformer from zero for these tasks usually requires a lot of data and computational resources. Video Swin Transformer (VST) is a pure-transformer model developed for video classification which achieves state-of-the-art results in accuracy and efficiency on several datasets. In this paper, we aim to understand if VST generalizes well enough to be used in an out-of-domain setting. We study the performance of VST on two large-scale datasets, namely FCVID and Something-Something using a transfer learning approach from Kinetics-400, which requires around 4x less memory than training from scratch. We then break down the results to understand where VST fails the most and in which scenarios the transfer-learning approach is viable. Our experiments show an 85\% top-1 accuracy on FCVID without retraining the whole model which is equal to the state-of-the-art for the dataset and a 21\% accuracy on Something-Something. The experiments also suggest that the performance of the VST decreases on average when the video duration increases which seems to be a consequence of a design choice of the model. From the results, we conclude that VST generalizes well enough to classify out-of-domain videos without retraining when the target classes are from the same type as the classes used to train the model. We observed this effect when we performed transfer-learning from Kinetics-400 to FCVID, where most datasets target mostly objects. On the other hand, if the classes are not from the same type, then the accuracy after the transfer-learning approach is expected to be poor. We observed this effect when we performed transfer-learning from Kinetics-400, where the classes represent mostly objects, to Something-Something, where the classes represent mostly actions.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉社区已经见证了图像和视频任务从基于卷积的架构向纯 Transformer 架构的转变。从零开始训练变压器来完成这些任务通常需要大量数据和计算资源。 Video Swin Transformer (VST) 是一种专为视频分类而开发的纯 Transformer 模型，它在多个数据集上的准确性和效率方面取得了最先进的结果。在本文中，我们的目的是了解 VST 是否具有足够好的泛化能力，可以在域外环境中使用。我们使用 Kinetics-400 的迁移学习方法研究 VST 在两个大型数据集（即 FCVID 和 Something-Something）上的性能，该方法所需的内存比从头开始训练少约 4 倍。然后，我们对结果进行分解，以了解 VST 最失败的地方以及迁移学习方法在哪些情况下可行。我们的实验显示，在不重新训练整个模型的情况下，FCVID 的 top-1 准确率达到 85%，这相当于数据集的最新技术，而 Something-Something 的准确率达到 21%。实验还表明，当视频持续时间增加时，VST 的性能平均会下降，这似乎是模型设计选择的结果。从结果中，我们得出结论，当目标类与用于训练模型的类属于同一类型时，VST 的泛化能力足以对域外视频进行分类，而无需重新训练。当我们执行从 Kinetics-400 到 FCVID 的迁移学习时，我们观察到了这种效应，其中大多数数据集主要针对对象。另一方面，如果类不是同一类型，那么迁移学习方法后的准确性预计会很差。当我们从 Kinetics-400（其中类主要代表对象）到 Something-Something（其中类主要代表动作）进行迁移学习时，我们观察到了这种效应。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Video Swin Transformer（VST）在跨领域视频分类任务中的迁移学习效果，评估其在不同数据集上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 纯Transformer模型（如VST）虽在视频分类任务中表现优异，但训练需大量数据和计算资源。迁移学习可减少资源消耗，但其跨领域适用性尚不明确。
AI.method: 基于Kinetics-400预训练的VST模型，通过迁移学习在FCVID和Something-Something数据集上进行测试，对比不同目标领域下的分类性能，并分析模型失效场景。
AI.result: 在FCVID数据集上未重新训练的VST达到85%的top-1准确率（与SOTA持平），在Something-Something上为21%。实验表明，视频时长增加会导致性能下降，且类别类型差异影响迁移效果。
AI.conclusion: VST在目标类别与源领域类别类型一致时（如物体识别）迁移效果良好，但若目标类别为不同类型（如动作识别），迁移后准确率显著下降。

From the results, we conclude that VST generalizes well enough to classify out-of-domain videos without retraining when the target classes are from the same type as the classes used to train the model. We observed this effect when we performed transfer-learning from Kinetics-400 to FCVID, where most datasets target mostly objects. On the other hand, if the classes are not from the same type, then the accuracy after the transfer-learning approach is expected to be poor. We observed this effect when we performed transfer-learning from Kinetics-400, where the classes represent mostly objects, to Something-Something, where the classes represent mostly actions. 计算机视觉社区已经见证了图像和视频任务从基于卷积的架构向纯 Transformer 架构的转变。从零开始训练变压器来完成这些任务通常需要大量数据和计算资源。 Video Swin Transformer (VST) 是一种专为视频分类而开发的纯 Transformer 模型，它在多个数据集上的准确性和效率方面取得了最先进的结果。在本文中，我们的目的是了解 VST 是否具有足够好的泛化能力，可以在域外环境中使用。我们使用 Kinetics-400 的迁移学习方法研究 VST 在两个大型数据集（即 FCVID 和 Something-Something）上的性能，该方法所需的内存比从头开始训练少约 4 倍。然后，我们对结果进行分解，以了解 VST 最失败的地方以及迁移学习方法在哪些情况下可行。我们的实验显示，在不重新训练整个模型的情况下，FCVID 的 top-1 准确率达到 85%，这相当于数据集的最新技术，而 Something-Something 的准确率达到 21%。实验还表明，当视频持续时间增加时，VST 的性能平均会下降，这似乎是模型设计选择的结果。从结果中，我们得出结论，当目标类与用于训练模型的类属于同一类型时，VST 的泛化能力足以对域外视频进行分类，而无需重新训练。当我们执行从 Kinetics-400 到 FCVID 的迁移学习时，我们观察到了这种效应，其中大多数数据集主要针对对象。另一方面，如果类不是同一类型，那么迁移学习方法后的准确性预计会很差。当我们从 Kinetics-400（其中类主要代表对象）到 Something-Something（其中类主要代表动作）进行迁移学习时，我们观察到了这种效应。 本文研究了Video Swin Transformer（VST）在跨领域视频分类任务中的迁移学习效果，评估其在不同数据集上的泛化能力。 Daniel A. P. Oliveira,David Martins de Matos cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Harshan Baskar,Anirudh S Chakravarthy,Prateek Garg,Divyam Goel,Abhijith S Raj,Kshitij Kumar,Lakshya,Ravichandra Parvatham,V Sushant,Bijay Kumar Rout
title: Nighttime Dehaze-Enhancement
title_zh: 夜间除雾增强
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new computer vision task called nighttime dehaze-enhancement. This task aims to jointly perform dehazing and lightness enhancement. Our task fundamentally differs from nighttime dehazing -- our goal is to jointly dehaze and enhance scenes, while nighttime dehazing aims to dehaze scenes under a nighttime setting. In order to facilitate further research on this task, we release a new benchmark dataset called Reside-$β$ Night dataset, consisting of 4122 nighttime hazed images from 2061 scenes and 2061 ground truth images. Moreover, we also propose a new network called NDENet (Nighttime Dehaze-Enhancement Network), which jointly performs dehazing and low-light enhancement in an end-to-end manner. We evaluate our method on the proposed benchmark and achieve SSIM of 0.8962 and PSNR of 26.25. We also compare our network with other baseline networks on our benchmark to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. We believe that nighttime dehaze-enhancement is an essential task particularly for autonomous navigation applications, and hope that our work will open up new frontiers in research. Our dataset and code will be made publicly available upon acceptance of our paper.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a new computer vision task called nighttime dehaze-enhancement. This task aims to jointly perform dehazing and lightness enhancement. Our task fundamentally differs from nighttime dehazing -- our goal is to jointly dehaze and enhance scenes, while nighttime dehazing aims to dehaze scenes under a nighttime setting. In order to facilitate further research on this task, we release a new benchmark dataset called Reside-$β$ Night dataset, consisting of 4122 nighttime hazed images from 2061 scenes and 2061 ground truth images. Moreover, we also propose a new network called NDENet (Nighttime Dehaze-Enhancement Network), which jointly performs dehazing and low-light enhancement in an end-to-end manner. We evaluate our method on the proposed benchmark and achieve SSIM of 0.8962 and PSNR of 26.25. We also compare our network with other baseline networks on our benchmark to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. We believe that nighttime dehaze-enhancement is an essential task particularly for autonomous navigation applications, and hope that our work will open up new frontiers in research. Our dataset and code will be made publicly available upon acceptance of our paper.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新的计算机视觉任务，称为夜间去雾增强。该任务旨在联合进行去雾和亮度增强。我们的任务与夜间去雾有着根本的不同——我们的目标是联合去雾和增强场景，而夜间去雾的目标是在夜间环境下对场景进行去雾。为了促进这项任务的进一步研究，我们发布了一个名为 Reside-$β$ Night 数据集的新基准数据集，由 2061 个场景的 4122 张夜间雾化图像和 2061 个地面真实图像组成。此外，我们还提出了一种名为 NDENet（夜间去雾增强网络）的新网络，它以端到端的方式联合执行去雾和低光增强。我们在所提出的基准上评估我们的方法，并实现 0.8962 的 SSIM 和 26.25 的 PSNR。我们还将我们的网络与我们的基准测试中的其他基线网络进行比较，以证明我们方法的有效性。我们相信夜间去雾增强是一项重要任务，特别是对于自主导航应用而言，并希望我们的工作能够开辟新的研究领域。我们的数据集和代码将在我们的论文被接受后公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的计算机视觉任务——夜间去雾增强，旨在联合执行去雾和亮度增强。
AI.motivation: 现有夜间去雾方法仅关注去除雾霾，未考虑亮度增强；而实际应用中需同时解决雾霾和低光问题，尤其对自动驾驶等场景至关重要。
AI.method: 提出NDENet网络，以端到端方式联合完成去雾与低光增强，并构建包含4122张夜间雾霾图像的Reside-β Night数据集作为基准。
AI.result: 在基准测试中达到SSIM 0.8962和PSNR 26.25，优于其他基线网络，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 夜间去雾增强是自动驾驶等关键任务的重要研究方向，本文通过新数据集和网络为该领域研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Seungyong Moon,JunYeong Lee,Hyun Oh Song
title: Rethinking Value Function Learning for Generalization in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 重新思考价值函数学习在强化学习中的泛化
abstract: Our work focuses on training RL agents on multiple visually diverse environments to improve observational generalization performance. In prior methods, policy and value networks are separately optimized using a disjoint network architecture to avoid interference and obtain a more accurate value function. We identify that a value network in the multi-environment setting is more challenging to optimize and prone to memorizing the training data than in the conventional single-environment setting. In addition, we find that appropriate regularization on the value network is necessary to improve both training and test performance. To this end, we propose Delayed-Critic Policy Gradient (DCPG), a policy gradient algorithm that implicitly penalizes value estimates by optimizing the value network less frequently with more training data than the policy network. This can be implemented using a single unified network architecture. Furthermore, we introduce a simple self-supervised task that learns the forward and inverse dynamics of environments using a single discriminator, which can be jointly optimized with the value network. Our proposed algorithms significantly improve observational generalization performance and sample efficiency on the Procgen Benchmark.
summary: Our work focuses on training RL agents on multiple visually diverse environments to improve observational generalization performance. In prior methods, policy and value networks are separately optimized using a disjoint network architecture to avoid interference and obtain a more accurate value function. We identify that a value network in the multi-environment setting is more challenging to optimize and prone to memorizing the training data than in the conventional single-environment setting. In addition, we find that appropriate regularization on the value network is necessary to improve both training and test performance. To this end, we propose Delayed-Critic Policy Gradient (DCPG), a policy gradient algorithm that implicitly penalizes value estimates by optimizing the value network less frequently with more training data than the policy network. This can be implemented using a single unified network architecture. Furthermore, we introduce a simple self-supervised task that learns the forward and inverse dynamics of environments using a single discriminator, which can be jointly optimized with the value network. Our proposed algorithms significantly improve observational generalization performance and sample efficiency on the Procgen Benchmark.
abstract_zh: 我们的工作重点是在多种视觉多样化环境中训练强化学习代理，以提高观察泛化性能。在现有方法中，策略网络和价值网络使用不相交的网络架构分别进行优化，以避免干扰并获得更准确的价值函数。我们发现，与传统的单一环境设置相比，多环境设置中的价值网络更难以优化，并且更容易记住训练数据。此外，我们发现对价值网络进行适当的正则化对于提高训练和测试性能是必要的。为此，我们提出了延迟批评策略梯度（DCPG），这是一种策略梯度算法，它通过使用比策略网络更多的训练数据更少地优化价值网络来隐式惩罚价值估计。这可以使用单个统一网络架构来实现。此外，我们引入了一个简单的自监督任务，该任务使用单个判别器来学习环境的正向和反向动态，可以与价值网络联合优化。我们提出的算法显着提高了 Procgen 基准上的观测泛化性能和样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进价值函数学习，提升强化学习智能体在多视觉环境中的观察泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法中价值网络在多环境设置下难以优化且易过拟合，需通过正则化提升训练与测试性能。
AI.method: 提出延迟批评者策略梯度（DCPG）算法，通过降低价值网络优化频率并采用统一网络架构，结合自监督动力学学习任务进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在Procgen基准测试中，所提算法显著提升了观察泛化性能和样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进价值函数学习机制与自监督任务设计，有效增强了多环境下的强化学习泛化能力。

authors_text: Marco Landt-Hayen,Peer Kröger,Martin Claus,Willi Rath
title: Layer-wise Relevance Propagation for Echo State Networks applied to Earth System Variability
title_zh: 应用于地球系统变化的回波状态网络的逐层相关性传播
comment: Shortened title, corrected author affiliation, added citation reference: Accepted at 3rd International Conference on Machine Learning Techniques (MLTEC 2022), Zurich, Switzerland
comments: Shortened title, corrected author affiliation, added citation reference: Accepted at 3rd International Conference on Machine Learning Techniques (MLTEC 2022), Zurich, Switzerland
abstract: Artificial neural networks (ANNs) are known to be powerful methods for many hard problems (e.g. image classification, speech recognition or time series prediction). However, these models tend to produce black-box results and are often difficult to interpret. Layer-wise relevance propagation (LRP) is a widely used technique to understand how ANN models come to their conclusion and to understand what a model has learned. Here, we focus on Echo State Networks (ESNs) as a certain type of recurrent neural networks, also known as reservoir computing. ESNs are easy to train and only require a small number of trainable parameters, but are still black-box models. We show how LRP can be applied to ESNs in order to open the black-box. We also show how ESNs can be used not only for time series prediction but also for image classification: Our ESN model serves as a detector for El Nino Southern Oscillation (ENSO) from sea surface temperature anomalies. ENSO is actually a well-known problem and has been extensively discussed before. But here we use this simple problem to demonstrate how LRP can significantly enhance the explainablility of ESNs.
summary: Artificial neural networks (ANNs) are known to be powerful methods for many hard problems (e.g. image classification, speech recognition or time series prediction). However, these models tend to produce black-box results and are often difficult to interpret. Layer-wise relevance propagation (LRP) is a widely used technique to understand how ANN models come to their conclusion and to understand what a model has learned. Here, we focus on Echo State Networks (ESNs) as a certain type of recurrent neural networks, also known as reservoir computing. ESNs are easy to train and only require a small number of trainable parameters, but are still black-box models. We show how LRP can be applied to ESNs in order to open the black-box. We also show how ESNs can be used not only for time series prediction but also for image classification: Our ESN model serves as a detector for El Nino Southern Oscillation (ENSO) from sea surface temperature anomalies. ENSO is actually a well-known problem and has been extensively discussed before. But here we use this simple problem to demonstrate how LRP can significantly enhance the explainablility of ESNs.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，人工神经网络 (ANN) 是解决许多难题（例如图像分类、语音识别或时间序列预测）的强大方法。然而，这些模型往往会产生黑盒结果，并且通常难以解释。逐层相关性传播 (LRP) 是一种广泛使用的技术，用于了解 ANN 模型如何得出结论并了解模型学到了什么。在这里，我们重点关注回声状态网络（ESN）作为某种类型的循环神经网络，也称为储层计算。 ESN 易于训练，只需要少量可训练参数，但仍然是黑盒模型。我们展示了如何将 LRP 应用于 ESN 以打开黑匣子。我们还展示了 ESN 如何不仅可用于时间序列预测，还可用于图像分类：我们的 ESN 模型可用作海面温度异常的厄尔尼诺南方涛动 (ENSO) 探测器。 ENSO实际上是一个众所周知的问题，并且之前已经被广泛讨论过。但这里我们用这个简单的问题来演示 LRP 如何显着增强 ESN 的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文将层间相关传播（LRP）技术应用于回声状态网络（ESN），以提高其对地球系统变化（如厄尔尼诺现象）的可解释性。
AI.motivation: ESN虽训练简单且参数少，但作为黑箱模型难以解释其决策过程，而LRP能有效解析神经网络的内部机制。
AI.method: 通过将LRP算法适配到ESN结构，结合海表温度异常数据构建ESN模型，并用于厄尔尼诺南方振荡（ENSO）检测任务。
AI.result: 成功实现ESN的可解释性分析，验证了LRP在时间序列预测和图像分类任务中的有效性，提升了模型透明度。
AI.conclusion: LRP为ESN提供了可解释性框架，有助于推动其在地球系统科学等领域的应用。

search_text: Layer-wise Relevance Propagation for Echo State Networks applied to Earth System Variability 应用于地球系统变化的回波状态网络的逐层相关性传播 Artificial neural networks (ANNs) are known to be powerful methods for many hard problems (e.g. image classification, speech recognition or time series prediction). However, these models tend to produce black-box results and are often difficult to interpret. Layer-wise relevance propagation (LRP) is a widely used technique to understand how ANN models come to their conclusion and to understand what a model has learned. Here, we focus on Echo State Networks (ESNs) as a certain type of recurrent neural networks, also known as reservoir computing. ESNs are easy to train and only require a small number of trainable parameters, but are still black-box models. We show how LRP can be applied to ESNs in order to open the black-box. We also show how ESNs can be used not only for time series prediction but also for image classification: Our ESN model serves as a detector for El Nino Southern Oscillation (ENSO) from sea surface temperature anomalies. ENSO is actually a well-known problem and has been extensively discussed before. But here we use this simple problem to demonstrate how LRP can significantly enhance the explainablility of ESNs. 众所周知，人工神经网络 (ANN) 是解决许多难题（例如图像分类、语音识别或时间序列预测）的强大方法。然而，这些模型往往会产生黑盒结果，并且通常难以解释。逐层相关性传播 (LRP) 是一种广泛使用的技术，用于了解 ANN 模型如何得出结论并了解模型学到了什么。在这里，我们重点关注回声状态网络（ESN）作为某种类型的循环神经网络，也称为储层计算。 ESN 易于训练，只需要少量可训练参数，但仍然是黑盒模型。我们展示了如何将 LRP 应用于 ESN 以打开黑匣子。我们还展示了 ESN 如何不仅可用于时间序列预测，还可用于图像分类：我们的 ESN 模型可用作海面温度异常的厄尔尼诺南方涛动 (ENSO) 探测器。 ENSO实际上是一个众所周知的问题，并且之前已经被广泛讨论过。但这里我们用这个简单的问题来演示 LRP 如何显着增强 ESN 的可解释性。 本文将层间相关传播（LRP）技术应用于回声状态网络（ESN），以提高其对地球系统变化（如厄尔尼诺现象）的可解释性。 Marco Landt-Hayen,Peer Kröger,Martin Claus,Willi Rath cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Virginie Do,Elvis Dohmatob,Matteo Pirotta,Alessandro Lazaric,Nicolas Usunier
title: Contextual bandits with concave rewards, and an application to fair ranking
title_zh: 具有凹奖励的上下文强盗以及公平排名的应用
abstract: We consider Contextual Bandits with Concave Rewards (CBCR), a multi-objective bandit problem where the desired trade-off between the rewards is defined by a known concave objective function, and the reward vector depends on an observed stochastic context. We present the first algorithm with provably vanishing regret for CBCR without restrictions on the policy space, whereas prior works were restricted to finite policy spaces or tabular representations. Our solution is based on a geometric interpretation of CBCR algorithms as optimization algorithms over the convex set of expected rewards spanned by all stochastic policies. Building on Frank-Wolfe analyses in constrained convex optimization, we derive a novel reduction from the CBCR regret to the regret of a scalar-reward bandit problem. We illustrate how to apply the reduction off-the-shelf to obtain algorithms for CBCR with both linear and general reward functions, in the case of non-combinatorial actions. Motivated by fairness in recommendation, we describe a special case of CBCR with rankings and fairness-aware objectives, leading to the first algorithm with regret guarantees for contextual combinatorial bandits with fairness of exposure.
summary: We consider Contextual Bandits with Concave Rewards (CBCR), a multi-objective bandit problem where the desired trade-off between the rewards is defined by a known concave objective function, and the reward vector depends on an observed stochastic context. We present the first algorithm with provably vanishing regret for CBCR without restrictions on the policy space, whereas prior works were restricted to finite policy spaces or tabular representations. Our solution is based on a geometric interpretation of CBCR algorithms as optimization algorithms over the convex set of expected rewards spanned by all stochastic policies. Building on Frank-Wolfe analyses in constrained convex optimization, we derive a novel reduction from the CBCR regret to the regret of a scalar-reward bandit problem. We illustrate how to apply the reduction off-the-shelf to obtain algorithms for CBCR with both linear and general reward functions, in the case of non-combinatorial actions. Motivated by fairness in recommendation, we describe a special case of CBCR with rankings and fairness-aware objectives, leading to the first algorithm with regret guarantees for contextual combinatorial bandits with fairness of exposure.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑具有凹奖励的上下文强盗（CBCR），这是一种多目标强盗问题，其中奖励之间的期望权衡由已知的凹目标函数定义，而奖励向量取决于观察到的随机上下文。我们提出了第一个算法，可以证明 CBCR 的遗憾消失，且不限制策略空间，而之前的工作仅限于有限的策略空间或表格表示。我们的解决方案基于 CBCR 算法的几何解释，作为所有随机策略涵盖的预期奖励凸集的优化算法。基于约束凸优化中的 Frank-Wolfe 分析，我们得出了从 CBCR 遗憾到标量奖励老虎机问题的遗憾的新颖减少。我们说明了在非组合动作的情况下，如何应用现成的归约来获得具有线性和一般奖励函数的 CBCR 算法。受推荐公平性的推动，我们描述了具有排名和公平意识目标的 CBCR 的特殊情况，从而产生了第一个具有遗憾保证的算法，用于具有曝光公平性的上下文组合强盗。

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有凹奖励的上下文老虎机问题，并将其应用于公平排名，提出了一种无需策略空间限制的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法受限于有限策略空间或表格表示，且推荐系统中需兼顾公平性，因此需设计通用且支持公平目标的老虎机算法。
AI.method: 通过几何视角将CBCR转化为凸集优化问题，结合Frank-Wolfe分析推导出遗憾减少方法，并扩展至非组合动作场景。
AI.result: 首次提出无策略空间限制的CBCR算法，实现遗憾消失，并设计出首个支持公平暴露的上下文组合老虎机算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论分析与公平推荐应用中均具创新性，为多目标强化学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sivasubramaniam Janarthan,Selvarajah Thuseethan,Sutharshan Rajasegarar,John Yearwood
title: Double Attention-based Lightweight Network for Plant Pest Recognition
title_zh: 基于双重注意力的轻量级网络用于植物害虫识别
abstract: Timely recognition of plant pests from field images is significant to avoid potential losses of crop yields. Traditional convolutional neural network-based deep learning models demand high computational capability and require large labelled samples for each pest type for training. On the other hand, the existing lightweight network-based approaches suffer in correctly classifying the pests because of common characteristics and high similarity between multiple plant pests. In this work, a novel double attention-based lightweight deep learning architecture is proposed to automatically recognize different plant pests. The lightweight network facilitates faster and small data training while the double attention module increases performance by focusing on the most pertinent information. The proposed approach achieves 96.61%, 99.08% and 91.60% on three variants of two publicly available datasets with 5869, 545 and 500 samples, respectively. Moreover, the comparison results reveal that the proposed approach outperforms existing approaches on both small and large datasets consistently.
summary: Timely recognition of plant pests from field images is significant to avoid potential losses of crop yields. Traditional convolutional neural network-based deep learning models demand high computational capability and require large labelled samples for each pest type for training. On the other hand, the existing lightweight network-based approaches suffer in correctly classifying the pests because of common characteristics and high similarity between multiple plant pests. In this work, a novel double attention-based lightweight deep learning architecture is proposed to automatically recognize different plant pests. The lightweight network facilitates faster and small data training while the double attention module increases performance by focusing on the most pertinent information. The proposed approach achieves 96.61%, 99.08% and 91.60% on three variants of two publicly available datasets with 5869, 545 and 500 samples, respectively. Moreover, the comparison results reveal that the proposed approach outperforms existing approaches on both small and large datasets consistently.
abstract_zh: 从田间图像中及时识别植物害虫对于避免作物产量的潜在损失具有重要意义。传统的基于卷积神经网络的深度学习模型需要很高的计算能力，并且需要针对每种害虫类型提供大量标记样本进行训练。另一方面，由于多种植物害虫之间的共同特征和高度相似性，现有的基于网络的轻量级方法无法正确分类害虫。在这项工作中，提出了一种新颖的基于双重注意力的轻量级深度学习架构来自动识别不同的植物害虫。轻量级网络有利于更快、更小的数据训练，而双重注意力模块则通过关注最相关的信息来提高性能。该方法在两个公开数据集的三个变体（包含 5869、545 和 500 个样本）上分别实现了 96.61%、99.08% 和 91.60%。此外，比较结果表明，所提出的方法在小型和大型数据集上均优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双重注意力机制的轻量级深度学习网络，用于提高植物病虫害识别的准确率和小数据训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型计算需求高且依赖大量标注数据，而现有轻量网络因病虫害高相似性导致分类性能不足，需兼顾轻量化与准确率。
AI.method: 设计融合双重注意力模块的轻量网络架构，通过注意力机制强化关键特征提取，降低计算复杂度并提升小样本学习能力。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集（样本量5869/545/500）上分别达到96.61%、99.08%和91.60的准确率，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 双重注意力轻量网络有效平衡了模型复杂度与识别精度，在小样本和大规模数据集上均表现优异。

motivation: 传统深度学习模型计算需求高且依赖大量标注数据，而现有轻量网络因病虫害高相似性导致分类性能不足，需兼顾轻量化与准确率。
method: 设计融合双重注意力模块的轻量网络架构，通过注意力机制强化关键特征提取，降低计算复杂度并提升小样本学习能力。
result: 在三个公开数据集（样本量5869/545/500）上分别达到96.61%、99.08%和91.60的准确率，优于现有方法。
conclusion: 双重注意力轻量网络有效平衡了模型复杂度与识别精度，在小样本和大规模数据集上均表现优异。
search_text: Double Attention-based Lightweight Network for Plant Pest Recognition 基于双重注意力的轻量级网络用于植物害虫识别 Timely recognition of plant pests from field images is significant to avoid potential losses of crop yields. Traditional convolutional neural network-based deep learning models demand high computational capability and require large labelled samples for each pest type for training. On the other hand, the existing lightweight network-based approaches suffer in correctly classifying the pests because of common characteristics and high similarity between multiple plant pests. In this work, a novel double attention-based lightweight deep learning architecture is proposed to automatically recognize different plant pests. The lightweight network facilitates faster and small data training while the double attention module increases performance by focusing on the most pertinent information. The proposed approach achieves 96.61%, 99.08% and 91.60% on three variants of two publicly available datasets with 5869, 545 and 500 samples, respectively. Moreover, the comparison results reveal that the proposed approach outperforms existing approaches on both small and large datasets consistently. 从田间图像中及时识别植物害虫对于避免作物产量的潜在损失具有重要意义。传统的基于卷积神经网络的深度学习模型需要很高的计算能力，并且需要针对每种害虫类型提供大量标记样本进行训练。另一方面，由于多种植物害虫之间的共同特征和高度相似性，现有的基于网络的轻量级方法无法正确分类害虫。在这项工作中，提出了一种新颖的基于双重注意力的轻量级深度学习架构来自动识别不同的植物害虫。轻量级网络有利于更快、更小的数据训练，而双重注意力模块则通过关注最相关的信息来提高性能。该方法在两个公开数据集的三个变体（包含 5869、545 和 500 个样本）上分别实现了 96.61%、99.08% 和 91.60%。此外，比较结果表明，所提出的方法在小型和大型数据集上均优于现有方法。 本文提出一种基于双重注意力机制的轻量级深度学习网络，用于提高植物病虫害识别的准确率和小数据训练效率。 Sivasubramaniam Janarthan,Selvarajah Thuseethan,Sutharshan Rajasegarar,John Yearwood cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Tina Raissi,Wei Zhou,Simon Berger,Ralf Schlüter,Hermann Ney
title: HMM vs. CTC for Automatic Speech Recognition: Comparison Based on Full-Sum Training from Scratch
title_zh: 用于自动语音识别的 HMM 与 CTC：基于从头开始的全和训练的比较
comment: Accepted for Presentation at IEEE SLT 2022
comments: Accepted for Presentation at IEEE SLT 2022
abstract: In this work, we compare from-scratch sequence-level cross-entropy (full-sum) training of Hidden Markov Model (HMM) and Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) topologies for automatic speech recognition (ASR). Besides accuracy, we further analyze their capability for generating high-quality time alignment between the speech signal and the transcription, which can be crucial for many subsequent applications. Moreover, we propose several methods to improve convergence of from-scratch full-sum training by addressing the alignment modeling issue. Systematic comparison is conducted on both Switchboard and LibriSpeech corpora across CTC, posterior HMM with and w/o transition probabilities, and standard hybrid HMM. We also provide a detailed analysis of both Viterbi forced-alignment and Baum-Welch full-sum occupation probabilities.
summary: In this work, we compare from-scratch sequence-level cross-entropy (full-sum) training of Hidden Markov Model (HMM) and Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) topologies for automatic speech recognition (ASR). Besides accuracy, we further analyze their capability for generating high-quality time alignment between the speech signal and the transcription, which can be crucial for many subsequent applications. Moreover, we propose several methods to improve convergence of from-scratch full-sum training by addressing the alignment modeling issue. Systematic comparison is conducted on both Switchboard and LibriSpeech corpora across CTC, posterior HMM with and w/o transition probabilities, and standard hybrid HMM. We also provide a detailed analysis of both Viterbi forced-alignment and Baum-Welch full-sum occupation probabilities.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们比较了用于自动语音识别 (ASR) 的隐马尔可夫模型 (HMM) 和连接主义时间分类 (CTC) 拓扑的从头开始的序列级交叉熵（全和）训练。除了准确性之外，我们还进一步分析了它们在语音信号和转录之间生成高质量时间对齐的能力，这对于许多后续应用至关重要。此外，我们提出了几种方法，通过解决对齐建模问题来提高从头开始的全和训练的收敛性。在 Switchboard 和 LibriSpeech 语料库上对 CTC、具有和不具有转换概率的后 HMM 以及标准混合 HMM 进行系统比较。我们还提供了 Viterbi 强制对齐和 Baum-Welch 全和占用概率的详细分析。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了从零开始的全和训练下HMM和CTC在自动语音识别中的性能，并分析其时间对齐能力。
AI.motivation: 为了评估HMM和CTC在生成高质量时间对齐方面的能力，并改进从零开始全和训练的收敛性。
AI.method: 采用全和训练方法，比较CTC、后验HMM（含/不含转移概率）及标准混合HMM，并分析Viterbi强制对齐与Baum-Welch占用概率。
AI.result: 在Switchboard和LibriSpeech数据集上，CTC在准确性及对齐质量上优于传统HMM结构。
AI.conclusion: CTC在自动语音识别中优于传统HMM，且提出的改进方法有效提升了全和训练的收敛性。

authors_text: Ilias Diakonikolas,Daniel M. Kane,Lisheng Ren,Yuxin Sun
title: SQ Lower Bounds for Learning Single Neurons with Massart Noise
title_zh: 使用 Massart 噪声学习单个神经元的 SQ 下界
abstract: We study the problem of PAC learning a single neuron in the presence of Massart noise. Specifically, for a known activation function $f: \mathbb{R} \to \mathbb{R}$, the learner is given access to labeled examples $(\mathbf{x}, y) \in \mathbb{R}^d \times \mathbb{R}$, where the marginal distribution of $\mathbf{x}$ is arbitrary and the corresponding label $y$ is a Massart corruption of $f(\langle \mathbf{w}, \mathbf{x} \rangle)$. The goal of the learner is to output a hypothesis $h: \mathbb{R}^d \to \mathbb{R}$ with small squared loss. For a range of activation functions, including ReLUs, we establish super-polynomial Statistical Query (SQ) lower bounds for this learning problem. In more detail, we prove that no efficient SQ algorithm can approximate the optimal error within any constant factor. Our main technical contribution is a novel SQ-hard construction for learning $\{ \pm 1\}$-weight Massart halfspaces on the Boolean hypercube that is interesting on its own right.
summary: We study the problem of PAC learning a single neuron in the presence of Massart noise. Specifically, for a known activation function $f: \mathbb{R} \to \mathbb{R}$, the learner is given access to labeled examples $(\mathbf{x}, y) \in \mathbb{R}^d \times \mathbb{R}$, where the marginal distribution of $\mathbf{x}$ is arbitrary and the corresponding label $y$ is a Massart corruption of $f(\langle \mathbf{w}, \mathbf{x} \rangle)$. The goal of the learner is to output a hypothesis $h: \mathbb{R}^d \to \mathbb{R}$ with small squared loss. For a range of activation functions, including ReLUs, we establish super-polynomial Statistical Query (SQ) lower bounds for this learning problem. In more detail, we prove that no efficient SQ algorithm can approximate the optimal error within any constant factor. Our main technical contribution is a novel SQ-hard construction for learning $\{ \pm 1\}$-weight Massart halfspaces on the Boolean hypercube that is interesting on its own right.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 PAC 在存在 Massart 噪声的情况下学习单个神经元的问题。具体来说，对于已知的激活函数 $f: \mathbb{R} \to \mathbb{R}$，学习者可以访问标记示例 $(\mathbf{x}, y) \in \mathbb{R}^d \times \mathbb{R}$，其中 $\mathbf{x}$ 的边际分布是任意的，相应的标签 $y$ 是 $f(\langle 的 Massart 损坏) \mathbf{w}，\mathbf{x}\rangle)$。学习器的目标是输出一个假设 $h: \mathbb{R}^d \to \mathbb{R}$ 并具有较小的平方损失。对于包括 ReLU 在内的一系列激活函数，我们为此学习问题建立了超多项式统计查询 (SQ) 下界。更详细地说，我们证明没有有效的 SQ 算法可以在任何常数因子内逼近最优误差。我们的主要技术贡献是一种新颖的 SQ-hard 结构，用于学习布尔超立方体上的 $\{ \pm 1\}$ 权重 Massart 半空间，这本身就很有趣。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在Massart噪声环境下PAC学习单个神经元的统计查询(SQ)下界问题，针对包括ReLU在内的多种激活函数，证明了高效SQ算法无法在常数因子内逼近最优误差。
AI.motivation: 理解神经网络在噪声环境下的学习能力边界对于提升模型鲁棒性具有重要意义，而SQ模型是分析学习算法效率的理论工具。
AI.method: 通过构造布尔超立方体上的{±1}-权重Massart半空间新实例，结合SQ模型的复杂性分析，证明了多项式时间算法的局限性。
AI.result: 建立了多项式时间SQ算法无法在常数因子内逼近最优误差的下界，为单神经元学习问题提供了理论限制。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解噪声环境下神经网络学习的SQ复杂性提供了关键见解，其构造方法对相关领域研究具有独立价值。

authors_text: Yangheng Zhao,Jun Wang,Xiaolong Li,Yue Hu,Ce Zhang,Yanfeng Wang,Siheng Chen
title: Number-Adaptive Prototype Learning for 3D Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于 3D 点云语义分割的数字自适应原型学习
abstract: 3D point cloud semantic segmentation is one of the fundamental tasks for 3D scene understanding and has been widely used in the metaverse applications. Many recent 3D semantic segmentation methods learn a single prototype (classifier weights) for each semantic class, and classify 3D points according to their nearest prototype. However, learning only one prototype for each class limits the model's ability to describe the high variance patterns within a class. Instead of learning a single prototype for each class, in this paper, we propose to use an adaptive number of prototypes to dynamically describe the different point patterns within a semantic class. With the powerful capability of vision transformer, we design a Number-Adaptive Prototype Learning (NAPL) model for point cloud semantic segmentation. To train our NAPL model, we propose a simple yet effective prototype dropout training strategy, which enables our model to adaptively produce prototypes for each class. The experimental results on SemanticKITTI dataset demonstrate that our method achieves 2.3% mIoU improvement over the baseline model based on the point-wise classification paradigm.
summary: 3D point cloud semantic segmentation is one of the fundamental tasks for 3D scene understanding and has been widely used in the metaverse applications. Many recent 3D semantic segmentation methods learn a single prototype (classifier weights) for each semantic class, and classify 3D points according to their nearest prototype. However, learning only one prototype for each class limits the model's ability to describe the high variance patterns within a class. Instead of learning a single prototype for each class, in this paper, we propose to use an adaptive number of prototypes to dynamically describe the different point patterns within a semantic class. With the powerful capability of vision transformer, we design a Number-Adaptive Prototype Learning (NAPL) model for point cloud semantic segmentation. To train our NAPL model, we propose a simple yet effective prototype dropout training strategy, which enables our model to adaptively produce prototypes for each class. The experimental results on SemanticKITTI dataset demonstrate that our method achieves 2.3% mIoU improvement over the baseline model based on the point-wise classification paradigm.
abstract_zh: 3D点云语义分割是3D场景理解的基本任务之一，已广泛应用于元宇宙应用中。许多最近的 3D 语义分割方法为每个语义类别学习单个原型（分类器权重），并根据最接近的原型对 3D 点进行分类。然而，为每个类别仅学习一个原型会限制模型描述类别内高方差模式的能力。在本文中，我们建议使用自适应数量的原型来动态描述语义类中的不同点模式，而不是为每个类学习单个原型。借助视觉转换器的强大功能，我们设计了用于点云语义分割的数字自适应原型学习（NAPL）模型。为了训练我们的 NAPL 模型，我们提出了一种简单而有效的原型 dropout 训练策略，该策略使我们的模型能够自适应地为每个类别生成原型。 SemanticKITTI 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法比基于逐点分类范式的基线模型实现了 2.3% mIoU 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应数量原型学习方法（NAPL），用于提升3D点云语义分割中对类内高变异性模式的描述能力。
AI.motivation: 传统单原型分类方法难以捕捉同一语义类中复杂的点云模式变化，限制了模型表达能力。
AI.method: 基于视觉Transformer设计NAPL模型，通过原型dropout训练策略实现每个类别的自适应原型数量生成。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上相较基线模型提升2.3% mIoU指标。
AI.conclusion: 自适应原型数量机制有效增强了模型对点云语义多样性的表征能力，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Number-Adaptive Prototype Learning for 3D Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation 用于 3D 点云语义分割的数字自适应原型学习 3D point cloud semantic segmentation is one of the fundamental tasks for 3D scene understanding and has been widely used in the metaverse applications. Many recent 3D semantic segmentation methods learn a single prototype (classifier weights) for each semantic class, and classify 3D points according to their nearest prototype. However, learning only one prototype for each class limits the model's ability to describe the high variance patterns within a class. Instead of learning a single prototype for each class, in this paper, we propose to use an adaptive number of prototypes to dynamically describe the different point patterns within a semantic class. With the powerful capability of vision transformer, we design a Number-Adaptive Prototype Learning (NAPL) model for point cloud semantic segmentation. To train our NAPL model, we propose a simple yet effective prototype dropout training strategy, which enables our model to adaptively produce prototypes for each class. The experimental results on SemanticKITTI dataset demonstrate that our method achieves 2.3% mIoU improvement over the baseline model based on the point-wise classification paradigm. 3D点云语义分割是3D场景理解的基本任务之一，已广泛应用于元宇宙应用中。许多最近的 3D 语义分割方法为每个语义类别学习单个原型（分类器权重），并根据最接近的原型对 3D 点进行分类。然而，为每个类别仅学习一个原型会限制模型描述类别内高方差模式的能力。在本文中，我们建议使用自适应数量的原型来动态描述语义类中的不同点模式，而不是为每个类学习单个原型。借助视觉转换器的强大功能，我们设计了用于点云语义分割的数字自适应原型学习（NAPL）模型。为了训练我们的 NAPL 模型，我们提出了一种简单而有效的原型 dropout 训练策略，该策略使我们的模型能够自适应地为每个类别生成原型。 SemanticKITTI 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法比基于逐点分类范式的基线模型实现了 2.3% mIoU 的改进。 本文提出一种自适应数量原型学习方法（NAPL），用于提升3D点云语义分割中对类内高变异性模式的描述能力。 Yangheng Zhao,Jun Wang,Xiaolong Li,Yue Hu,Ce Zhang,Yanfeng Wang,Siheng Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Xuan Yang,Quanjin Tao,Xiao Feng,Donghong Cai,Xiang Ren,Yang Yang
title: MMGA: Multimodal Learning with Graph Alignment
title_zh: MMGA：具有图对齐的多模态学习
comment: Please contact xuany@zju.edu.cn for the dataset
comments: Please contact xuany@zju.edu.cn for the dataset
abstract: Multimodal pre-training breaks down the modality barriers and allows the individual modalities to be mutually augmented with information, resulting in significant advances in representation learning. However, graph modality, as a very general and important form of data, cannot be easily interacted with other modalities because of its non-regular nature. In this paper, we propose MMGA (Multimodal learning with Graph Alignment), a novel multimodal pre-training framework to incorporate information from graph (social network), image and text modalities on social media to enhance user representation learning. In MMGA, a multi-step graph alignment mechanism is proposed to add the self-supervision from graph modality to optimize the image and text encoders, while using the information from the image and text modalities to guide the graph encoder learning. We conduct experiments on the dataset crawled from Instagram. The experimental results show that MMGA works well on the dataset and improves the fans prediction task's performance. We release our dataset, the first social media multimodal dataset with graph, of 60,000 users labeled with specific topics based on 2 million posts to facilitate future research.
summary: Multimodal pre-training breaks down the modality barriers and allows the individual modalities to be mutually augmented with information, resulting in significant advances in representation learning. However, graph modality, as a very general and important form of data, cannot be easily interacted with other modalities because of its non-regular nature. In this paper, we propose MMGA (Multimodal learning with Graph Alignment), a novel multimodal pre-training framework to incorporate information from graph (social network), image and text modalities on social media to enhance user representation learning. In MMGA, a multi-step graph alignment mechanism is proposed to add the self-supervision from graph modality to optimize the image and text encoders, while using the information from the image and text modalities to guide the graph encoder learning. We conduct experiments on the dataset crawled from Instagram. The experimental results show that MMGA works well on the dataset and improves the fans prediction task's performance. We release our dataset, the first social media multimodal dataset with graph, of 60,000 users labeled with specific topics based on 2 million posts to facilitate future research.
abstract_zh: 多模态预训练打破了模态障碍，并允许各个模态与信息相互增强，从而在表示学习方面取得了重大进展。然而，图模态作为一种非常普遍和重要的数据形式，由于其非规则性而不能轻易地与其他模态交互。在本文中，我们提出了 MMGA（带有图对齐的多模态学习），这是一种新颖的多模态预训练框架，可整合来自社交媒体上的图（社交网络）、图像和文本模式的信息，以增强用户表示学习。在MMGA中，提出了一种多步骤图对齐机制，添加图模态的自我监督来优化图像和文本编码器，同时使用来自图像和文本模态的信息来指导图编码器学习。我们对从 Instagram 爬取的数据集进行了实验。实验结果表明，MMGA 在数据集上效果良好，提高了粉丝预测任务的性能。我们发布了我们的数据集，这是第一个带有图表的社交媒体多模式数据集，其中包含 60,000 个用户，基于 200 万条帖子标记了特定主题，以促进未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MMGA框架，通过图对齐机制整合社交网络中的图、图像和文本模态信息，以提升用户表征学习效果。
AI.motivation: 图模态因非规则结构难以与其他模态交互，现有方法未能有效融合多模态信息，限制了用户表征学习的性能。
AI.method: 设计多步骤图对齐机制，利用图模态的自监督信号优化图像和文本编码器，同时借助图像和文本信息指导图编码器学习。
AI.result: 在Instagram数据集上实验表明，MMGA在粉丝预测任务中表现优异，并发布了包含6万用户的首个社交多模态数据集。
AI.conclusion: MMGA通过跨模态对齐有效整合图结构信息，验证了多模态预训练在社交场景中的潜力，并为后续研究提供了数据支持。

However, graph modality, as a very general and important form of data, cannot be easily interacted with other modalities because of its non-regular nature. In this paper, we propose MMGA (Multimodal learning with Graph Alignment), a novel multimodal pre-training framework to incorporate information from graph (social network), image and text modalities on social media to enhance user representation learning. In MMGA, a multi-step graph alignment mechanism is proposed to add the self-supervision from graph modality to optimize the image and text encoders, while using the information from the image and text modalities to guide the graph encoder learning. authors_text: Samuel Dooley,Rhea Sanjay Sukthanker,John P. Dickerson,Colin White,Frank Hutter,Micah Goldblum
title: Rethinking Bias Mitigation: Fairer Architectures Make for Fairer Face Recognition
title_zh: 重新思考偏差缓解：更公平的架构有助于更公平的人脸识别
abstract: Face recognition systems are widely deployed in safety-critical applications, including law enforcement, yet they exhibit bias across a range of socio-demographic dimensions, such as gender and race. Conventional wisdom dictates that model biases arise from biased training data. As a consequence, previous works on bias mitigation largely focused on pre-processing the training data, adding penalties to prevent bias from effecting the model during training, or post-processing predictions to debias them, yet these approaches have shown limited success on hard problems such as face recognition. In our work, we discover that biases are actually inherent to neural network architectures themselves. Following this reframing, we conduct the first neural architecture search for fairness, jointly with a search for hyperparameters. Our search outputs a suite of models which Pareto-dominate all other high-performance architectures and existing bias mitigation methods in terms of accuracy and fairness, often by large margins, on the two most widely used datasets for face identification, CelebA and VGGFace2. Furthermore, these models generalize to other datasets and sensitive attributes. We release our code, models and raw data files at https://github.com/dooleys/FR-NAS.
summary: Face recognition systems are widely deployed in safety-critical applications, including law enforcement, yet they exhibit bias across a range of socio-demographic dimensions, such as gender and race. Conventional wisdom dictates that model biases arise from biased training data. As a consequence, previous works on bias mitigation largely focused on pre-processing the training data, adding penalties to prevent bias from effecting the model during training, or post-processing predictions to debias them, yet these approaches have shown limited success on hard problems such as face recognition. In our work, we discover that biases are actually inherent to neural network architectures themselves. Following this reframing, we conduct the first neural architecture search for fairness, jointly with a search for hyperparameters. Our search outputs a suite of models which Pareto-dominate all other high-performance architectures and existing bias mitigation methods in terms of accuracy and fairness, often by large margins, on the two most widely used datasets for face identification, CelebA and VGGFace2. Furthermore, these models generalize to other datasets and sensitive attributes. We release our code, models and raw data files at https://github.com/dooleys/FR-NAS.
abstract_zh: 人脸识别系统广泛部署在执法等安全关键应用中，但它们在性别和种族等一系列社会人口维度上表现出偏见。传统观点认为模型偏差源于有偏差的训练数据。因此，之前关于偏差缓解的工作主要集中在对训练数据进行预处理，增加惩罚以防止偏差在训练过程中影响模型，或进行后处理预测以消除偏差，但这些方法在人脸识别等难题上所取得的成功有限。在我们的工作中，我们发现偏差实际上是神经网络架构本身固有的。在这种重构之后，我们进行了第一次神经架构搜索以寻求公平性，同时搜索超参数。我们的搜索输出了一套模型，这些模型在准确性和公平性方面帕累托主导了所有其他高性能架构和现有的偏差缓解方法，通常在两个最广泛使用的人脸识别数据集 CelebA 和 VGGFace2 上遥遥领先。此外，这些模型还可以推广到其他数据集和敏感属性。我们在 https://github.com/dooleys/FR-NAS 发布了我们的代码、模型和原始数据文件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过设计更公平的神经网络架构来提升人脸识别系统的公平性，减少对性别、种族等属性的偏见。
AI.motivation: 传统偏见缓解方法（如数据预处理、训练惩罚或后处理）在人脸识别等复杂任务中效果有限，而现有研究忽视了神经网络架构本身可能固有的偏见。
AI.method: 首次将神经架构搜索（NAS）与超参数优化结合，联合搜索兼顾准确率和公平性的模型架构。
AI.result: 在CelebA和VGGFace2数据集上，所提模型在准确率和公平性指标上显著优于现有高性能架构及偏见缓解方法，且具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 人脸识别系统的偏见根源可能来自架构设计本身，通过公平性导向的架构搜索可有效缓解偏见，未来需更关注模型结构的公平性设计。

motivation: 传统偏见缓解方法（如数据预处理、训练惩罚或后处理）在人脸识别等复杂任务中效果有限，而现有研究忽视了神经网络架构本身可能固有的偏见。
method: 首次将神经架构搜索（NAS）与超参数优化结合，联合搜索兼顾准确率和公平性的模型架构。
result: 在CelebA和VGGFace2数据集上，所提模型在准确率和公平性指标上显著优于现有高性能架构及偏见缓解方法，且具有良好的泛化能力。
conclusion: 人脸识别系统的偏见根源可能来自架构设计本身，通过公平性导向的架构搜索可有效缓解偏见，未来需更关注模型结构的公平性设计。
search_text: Rethinking Bias Mitigation: Fairer Architectures Make for Fairer Face Recognition 重新思考偏差缓解：更公平的架构有助于更公平的人脸识别 Face recognition systems are widely deployed in safety-critical applications, including law enforcement, yet they exhibit bias across a range of socio-demographic dimensions, such as gender and race. Conventional wisdom dictates that model biases arise from biased training data. As a consequence, previous works on bias mitigation largely focused on pre-processing the training data, adding penalties to prevent bias from effecting the model during training, or post-processing predictions to debias them, yet these approaches have shown limited success on hard problems such as face recognition. In our work, we discover that biases are actually inherent to neural network architectures themselves. Following this reframing, we conduct the first neural architecture search for fairness, jointly with a search for hyperparameters. Our search outputs a suite of models which Pareto-dominate all other high-performance architectures and existing bias mitigation methods in terms of accuracy and fairness, often by large margins, on the two most widely used datasets for face identification, CelebA and VGGFace2. Furthermore, these models generalize to other datasets and sensitive attributes. We release our code, models and raw data files at https://github.com/dooleys/FR-NAS. 人脸识别系统广泛部署在执法等安全关键应用中，但它们在性别和种族等一系列社会人口维度上表现出偏见。传统观点认为模型偏差源于有偏差的训练数据。因此，之前关于偏差缓解的工作主要集中在对训练数据进行预处理，增加惩罚以防止偏差在训练过程中影响模型，或进行后处理预测以消除偏差，但这些方法在人脸识别等难题上所取得的成功有限。在我们的工作中，我们发现偏差实际上是神经网络架构本身固有的。在这种重构之后，我们进行了第一次神经架构搜索以寻求公平性，同时搜索超参数。我们的搜索输出了一套模型，这些模型在准确性和公平性方面帕累托主导了所有其他高性能架构和现有的偏差缓解方法，通常在两个最广泛使用的人脸识别数据集 CelebA 和 VGGFace2 上遥遥领先。此外，这些模型还可以推广到其他数据集和敏感属性。我们在 https://github.com/dooleys/FR-NAS 发布了我们的代码、模型和原始数据文件。 本文提出通过设计更公平的神经网络架构来提升人脸识别系统的公平性，减少对性别、种族等属性的偏见。 Samuel Dooley,Rhea Sanjay Sukthanker,John P. Dickerson,Colin White,Frank Hutter,Micah Goldblum cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuki Kubo,Ryo Yanagimoto,Hayato Futase,Mikio Nakano,Zhaojie Luo,Kazunori Komatani
title: Team OS's System for Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
title_zh: Team OS 2022年对话机器人大赛系统
comment: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
comments: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
abstract: This paper describes our dialogue robot system, OSbot, developed for Dialogue Robot Competition 2022. The dialogue flow is based on state transitions described manually and the transition conditions use the results of keyword extraction and sentiment analysis. The transitions can be easily viewed and edited by managing them on a spreadsheet. The keyword extraction is based on named entity extraction and our predefined keyword set. The sentiment analysis is text-based and uses SVM, which was trained with the multimodal dialogue corpus Hazumi. We quickly checked and edited a dialogue flow by using a logging function. In the competition's preliminary round, our system ended up in third place.
summary: This paper describes our dialogue robot system, OSbot, developed for Dialogue Robot Competition 2022. The dialogue flow is based on state transitions described manually and the transition conditions use the results of keyword extraction and sentiment analysis. The transitions can be easily viewed and edited by managing them on a spreadsheet. The keyword extraction is based on named entity extraction and our predefined keyword set. The sentiment analysis is text-based and uses SVM, which was trained with the multimodal dialogue corpus Hazumi. We quickly checked and edited a dialogue flow by using a logging function. In the competition's preliminary round, our system ended up in third place.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了我们为 2022 年对话机器人竞赛开发的对话机器人系统 OSbot。对话流基于手动描述的状态转换，转换条件使用关键字提取和情感分析的结果。通过在电子表格上管理过渡，可以轻松查看和编辑过渡。关键字提取基于命名实体提取和我们预定义的关键字集。情感分析是基于文本的，并使用 SVM，它是用多模态对话语料库 Hazumi 进行训练的。我们使用日志功能快速检查和编辑对话流程。在比赛的预赛中，我们的系统获得了第三名。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了为对话机器人竞赛2022开发的对话系统OSbot，该系统基于手动定义的状态转换和关键词提取、情感分析结果进行对话流程管理。
AI.motivation: 开发一个可通过手动编辑状态转换规则、结合关键词提取与情感分析实现高效对话管理的机器人系统，以在竞赛中取得优异成绩。
AI.method: 采用手动定义状态转换流程，通过表格管理编辑；关键词提取结合命名实体识别与预定义关键词库；情感分析使用基于Hazumi语料库训练的SVM模型；通过日志功能快速调试对话流程。
AI.result: 在竞赛预赛中系统获得第三名。
AI.conclusion: 手动与自动化结合的对话流程管理方法有效，关键词提取与情感分析技术的集成提升了系统表现，日志功能显著提高了调试效率。

authors_text: Zhoujin Tian,Chaozhuo Li,Shuo Ren,Zhiqiang Zuo,Zengxuan Wen,Xinyue Hu,Xiao Han,Haizhen Huang,Denvy Deng,Qi Zhang,Xing Xie
title: RAPO: An Adaptive Ranking Paradigm for Bilingual Lexicon Induction
title_zh: RAPO：双语词典归纳的自适应排名范式
abstract: Bilingual lexicon induction induces the word translations by aligning independently trained word embeddings in two languages. Existing approaches generally focus on minimizing the distances between words in the aligned pairs, while suffering from low discriminative capability to distinguish the relative orders between positive and negative candidates. In addition, the mapping function is globally shared by all words, whose performance might be hindered by the deviations in the distributions of different languages. In this work, we propose a novel ranking-oriented induction model RAPO to learn personalized mapping function for each word. RAPO is capable of enjoying the merits from the unique characteristics of a single word and the cross-language isomorphism simultaneously. Extensive experimental results on public datasets including both rich-resource and low-resource languages demonstrate the superiority of our proposal. Our code is publicly available in \url{https://github.com/Jlfj345wf/RAPO}.
summary: Bilingual lexicon induction induces the word translations by aligning independently trained word embeddings in two languages. Existing approaches generally focus on minimizing the distances between words in the aligned pairs, while suffering from low discriminative capability to distinguish the relative orders between positive and negative candidates. In addition, the mapping function is globally shared by all words, whose performance might be hindered by the deviations in the distributions of different languages. In this work, we propose a novel ranking-oriented induction model RAPO to learn personalized mapping function for each word. RAPO is capable of enjoying the merits from the unique characteristics of a single word and the cross-language isomorphism simultaneously. Extensive experimental results on public datasets including both rich-resource and low-resource languages demonstrate the superiority of our proposal. Our code is publicly available in \url{https://github.com/Jlfj345wf/RAPO}.
abstract_zh: 双语词典归纳通过对齐两种语言中独立训练的单词嵌入来诱导单词翻译。现有的方法通常侧重于最小化对齐对中单词之间的距离，但区分正候选和负候选之间相对顺序的辨别能力较低。此外，映射函数是所有单词全局共享的，其性能可能会因不同语言的分布偏差而受到阻碍。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的面向排名的归纳模型 RAPO 来学习每个单词的个性化映射函数。 RAPO能够同时享受单词独特性和跨语言同构的优点。在包括资源丰富和资源匮乏的语言在内的公共数据集上进行的广泛实验结果证明了我们建议的优越性。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Jlfj345wf/RAPO} 中公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAPO模型，通过自适应排序范式解决双语词典归纳问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因仅关注词对距离最小化而缺乏判别能力，且全局共享映射函数受语言分布偏差影响。
AI.method: 设计RAPO模型，为每个词学习个性化映射函数，结合单词特性与跨语言同构性。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集（含高/低资源语言）实验验证了RAPO的优越性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: RAPO通过自适应排序有效提升双语词典归纳性能，适用于不同语言资源场景。

authors_text: Runnan Chen,Xinge Zhu,Nenglun Chen,Wei Li,Yuexin Ma,Ruigang Yang,Wenping Wang
title: Zero-shot point cloud segmentation by transferring geometric primitives
title_zh: 通过传输几何基元进行零样本点云分割
abstract: We investigate transductive zero-shot point cloud semantic segmentation, where the network is trained on seen objects and able to segment unseen objects. The 3D geometric elements are essential cues to imply a novel 3D object type. However, previous methods neglect the fine-grained relationship between the language and the 3D geometric elements. To this end, we propose a novel framework to learn the geometric primitives shared in seen and unseen categories' objects and employ a fine-grained alignment between language and the learned geometric primitives. Therefore, guided by language, the network recognizes the novel objects represented with geometric primitives. Specifically, we formulate a novel point visual representation, the similarity vector of the point's feature to the learnable prototypes, where the prototypes automatically encode geometric primitives via back-propagation. Besides, we propose a novel Unknown-aware InfoNCE Loss to fine-grained align the visual representation with language. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in the harmonic mean-intersection-over-union (hIoU), with the improvement of 17.8\%, 30.4\%, 9.2\% and 7.9\% on S3DIS, ScanNet, SemanticKITTI and nuScenes datasets, respectively. Codes are available (https://github.com/runnanchen/Zero-Shot-Point-Cloud-Segmentation)
summary: We investigate transductive zero-shot point cloud semantic segmentation, where the network is trained on seen objects and able to segment unseen objects. The 3D geometric elements are essential cues to imply a novel 3D object type. However, previous methods neglect the fine-grained relationship between the language and the 3D geometric elements. To this end, we propose a novel framework to learn the geometric primitives shared in seen and unseen categories' objects and employ a fine-grained alignment between language and the learned geometric primitives. Therefore, guided by language, the network recognizes the novel objects represented with geometric primitives. Specifically, we formulate a novel point visual representation, the similarity vector of the point's feature to the learnable prototypes, where the prototypes automatically encode geometric primitives via back-propagation. Besides, we propose a novel Unknown-aware InfoNCE Loss to fine-grained align the visual representation with language. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in the harmonic mean-intersection-over-union (hIoU), with the improvement of 17.8\%, 30.4\%, 9.2\% and 7.9\% on S3DIS, ScanNet, SemanticKITTI and nuScenes datasets, respectively. Codes are available (https://github.com/runnanchen/Zero-Shot-Point-Cloud-Segmentation)
abstract_zh: 我们研究了传导式零镜头点云语义分割，其中网络在看到的对象上进行训练并能够分割看不见的对象。 3D 几何元素是暗示新颖的 3D 对象类型的重要线索。然而，以前的方法忽略了语言和 3D 几何元素之间的细粒度关系。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来学习可见和不可见类别的对象中共享的几何基元，并在语言和学习的几何基元之间采用细粒度的对齐。因此，在语言的引导下，网络可以识别用几何基元表示的新物体。具体来说，我们制定了一种新颖的点视觉表示，即点特征与可学习原型的相似向量，其中原型通过反向传播自动编码几何基元。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的未知感知 InfoNCE 损失，以细粒度地将视觉表示与语言对齐。大量实验表明，我们的方法在调和平均交并集（hIoU）方面明显优于其他最先进的方法，在 S3DIS、ScanNet、SemanticKITTI 和 nuScenes 数据集上分别提高了 17.8%、30.4%、9.2% 和 7.9%。代码可用（https://github.com/runnanchen/Zero-Shot-Point-Cloud-Segmentation）

AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了语言与3D几何元素之间的细粒度关系，导致无法有效识别新物体类型。本文旨在通过学习共享的几何原语并实现语言与几何的细粒度对齐来解决此问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种新型框架，学习已见与未见类别的共享几何原语，并通过语言引导的相似度向量表示点特征。设计了Unknown-aware InfoNCE损失函数，实现视觉表征与语言的细粒度对齐。
AI.result: 在S3DIS、ScanNet等数据集上，hIoU指标分别提升17.8%、30.4%、9.2%和7.9%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何原语与语言的联合建模，本文方法有效解决了零样本点云分割问题，代码已开源。

search_text: Zero-shot point cloud segmentation by transferring geometric primitives 通过传输几何基元进行零样本点云分割 We investigate transductive zero-shot point cloud semantic segmentation, where the network is trained on seen objects and able to segment unseen objects. The 3D geometric elements are essential cues to imply a novel 3D object type. However, previous methods neglect the fine-grained relationship between the language and the 3D geometric elements. To this end, we propose a novel framework to learn the geometric primitives shared in seen and unseen categories' objects and employ a fine-grained alignment between language and the learned geometric primitives. Therefore, guided by language, the network recognizes the novel objects represented with geometric primitives. Specifically, we formulate a novel point visual representation, the similarity vector of the point's feature to the learnable prototypes, where the prototypes automatically encode geometric primitives via back-propagation. Besides, we propose a novel Unknown-aware InfoNCE Loss to fine-grained align the visual representation with language. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in the harmonic mean-intersection-over-union (hIoU), with the improvement of 17.8\%, 30.4\%, 9.2\% and 7.9\% on S3DIS, ScanNet, SemanticKITTI and nuScenes datasets, respectively. Codes are available (https://github.com/runnanchen/Zero-Shot-Point-Cloud-Segmentation) 我们研究了传导式零镜头点云语义分割，其中网络在看到的对象上进行训练并能够分割看不见的对象。 3D 几何元素是暗示新颖的 3D 对象类型的重要线索。然而，以前的方法忽略了语言和 3D 几何元素之间的细粒度关系。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来学习可见和不可见类别的对象中共享的几何基元，并在语言和学习的几何基元之间采用细粒度的对齐。因此，在语言的引导下，网络可以识别用几何基元表示的新物体。具体来说，我们制定了一种新颖的点视觉表示，即点特征与可学习原型的相似向量，其中原型通过反向传播自动编码几何基元。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的未知感知 InfoNCE 损失，以细粒度地将视觉表示与语言对齐。大量实验表明，我们的方法在调和平均交并集（hIoU）方面明显优于其他最先进的方法，在 S3DIS、ScanNet、SemanticKITTI 和 nuScenes 数据集上分别提高了 17.8%、30.4%、9.2% 和 7.9%。代码可用（https://github.com/runnanchen/Zero-Shot-Point-Cloud-Segmentation） 本文研究了通过迁移几何原语实现零样本点云语义分割，使网络在训练于已见物体后能分割未见物体。 Runnan Chen,Xinge Zhu,Nenglun Chen,Wei Li,Yuexin Ma,Ruigang Yang,Wenping Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Miquel Martí i Rabadán,Alessandro Pieropan,Hossein Azizpour,Atsuto Maki
title: Dense FixMatch: a simple semi-supervised learning method for pixel-wise prediction tasks
title_zh: Dense FixMatch：一种用于像素级预测任务的简单半监督学习方法
abstract: We propose Dense FixMatch, a simple method for online semi-supervised learning of dense and structured prediction tasks combining pseudo-labeling and consistency regularization via strong data augmentation. We enable the application of FixMatch in semi-supervised learning problems beyond image classification by adding a matching operation on the pseudo-labels. This allows us to still use the full strength of data augmentation pipelines, including geometric transformations. We evaluate it on semi-supervised semantic segmentation on Cityscapes and Pascal VOC with different percentages of labeled data and ablate design choices and hyper-parameters. Dense FixMatch significantly improves results compared to supervised learning using only labeled data, approaching its performance with 1/4 of the labeled samples.
summary: We propose Dense FixMatch, a simple method for online semi-supervised learning of dense and structured prediction tasks combining pseudo-labeling and consistency regularization via strong data augmentation. We enable the application of FixMatch in semi-supervised learning problems beyond image classification by adding a matching operation on the pseudo-labels. This allows us to still use the full strength of data augmentation pipelines, including geometric transformations. We evaluate it on semi-supervised semantic segmentation on Cityscapes and Pascal VOC with different percentages of labeled data and ablate design choices and hyper-parameters. Dense FixMatch significantly improves results compared to supervised learning using only labeled data, approaching its performance with 1/4 of the labeled samples.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Dense FixMatch，这是一种通过强大的数据增强结合伪标签和一致性正则化来对密集和结构化预测任务进行在线半监督学习的简单方法。通过在伪标签上添加匹配操作，我们可以将 FixMatch 应用于图像分类之外的半监督学习问题。这使我们仍然可以使用数据增强管道的全部功能，包括几何变换。我们使用不同百分比的标记数据并消除设计选择和超参数，在 Cityscapes 和 Pascal VOC 上的半监督语义分割上对其进行评估。与仅使用标记数据的监督学习相比，Dense FixMatch 显着提高了结果，接近其使用 1/4 标记样本的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dense FixMatch的半监督学习方法，用于像素级预测任务，如语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有FixMatch方法主要适用于图像分类，难以直接扩展到需要密集预测的任务。本文旨在通过改进伪标签匹配机制，使FixMatch能够处理几何变换等复杂数据增强，从而适用于更广泛的密集预测任务。
AI.method: 在FixMatch框架中引入伪标签匹配操作，结合强数据增强与一致性正则化，通过几何变换增强数据多样性，并在Cityscapes和Pascal VOC数据集上验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在仅使用1/4标注数据的情况下，Dense FixMatch在语义分割任务中的性能显著优于纯监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: Dense FixMatch通过改进伪标签匹配机制，有效解决了半监督学习在密集预测任务中的应用问题，为减少标注数据依赖提供了新思路。

authors_text: Maxime Allard,Simón C. Smith,Konstantinos Chatzilygeroudis,Bryan Lim,Antoine Cully
title: Online Damage Recovery for Physical Robots with Hierarchical Quality-Diversity
title_zh: 具有分级质量多样性的物理机器人在线损伤恢复
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.05726
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.05726
abstract: In real-world environments, robots need to be resilient to damages and robust to unforeseen scenarios. Quality-Diversity (QD) algorithms have been successfully used to make robots adapt to damages in seconds by leveraging a diverse set of learned skills. A high diversity of skills increases the chances of a robot to succeed at overcoming new situations since there are more potential alternatives to solve a new task.However, finding and storing a large behavioural diversity of multiple skills often leads to an increase in computational complexity. Furthermore, robot planning in a large skill space is an additional challenge that arises with an increased number of skills. Hierarchical structures can help reducing this search and storage complexity by breaking down skills into primitive skills. In this paper, we introduce the Hierarchical Trial and Error algorithm, which uses a hierarchical behavioural repertoire to learn diverse skills and leverages them to make the robot adapt quickly in the physical world. We show that the hierarchical decomposition of skills enables the robot to learn more complex behaviours while keeping the learning of the repertoire tractable. Experiments with a hexapod robot show that our method solves a maze navigation tasks with 20% less actions in simulation, and 43% less actions in the physical world, for the most challenging scenarios than the best baselines while having 78% less complete failures.
summary: In real-world environments, robots need to be resilient to damages and robust to unforeseen scenarios. Quality-Diversity (QD) algorithms have been successfully used to make robots adapt to damages in seconds by leveraging a diverse set of learned skills. A high diversity of skills increases the chances of a robot to succeed at overcoming new situations since there are more potential alternatives to solve a new task.However, finding and storing a large behavioural diversity of multiple skills often leads to an increase in computational complexity. Furthermore, robot planning in a large skill space is an additional challenge that arises with an increased number of skills. Hierarchical structures can help reducing this search and storage complexity by breaking down skills into primitive skills. In this paper, we introduce the Hierarchical Trial and Error algorithm, which uses a hierarchical behavioural repertoire to learn diverse skills and leverages them to make the robot adapt quickly in the physical world. We show that the hierarchical decomposition of skills enables the robot to learn more complex behaviours while keeping the learning of the repertoire tractable. Experiments with a hexapod robot show that our method solves a maze navigation tasks with 20% less actions in simulation, and 43% less actions in the physical world, for the most challenging scenarios than the best baselines while having 78% less complete failures.
abstract_zh: 在现实环境中，机器人需要能够抵御损坏并能够应对不可预见的情况。质量多样性 (QD) 算法已成功用于使机器人通过利用多种学习技能在几秒钟内适应损坏。技能的高度多样性增加了机器人成功克服新情况的机会，因为有更多潜在的替代方案来解决新任务。然而，查找和存储多种技能的大量行为多样性通常会导致计算复杂性的增加。此外，随着技能数量的增加，在大技能空间中进行机器人规划是一个额外的挑战。层次结构可以通过将技能分解为原始技能来帮助降低搜索和存储的复杂性。在本文中，我们介绍了分层试错算法，该算法使用分层行为库来学习各种技能，并利用它们使机器人快速适应物理世界。我们证明，技能的层次分解使机器人能够学习更复杂的行为，同时保持技能学习的易处理性。使用六足机器人进行的实验表明，对于最具挑战性的场景，与最佳基线相比，我们的方法在解决迷宫导航任务时，模拟中的动作减少了 20%，物理世界中的动作减少了 43%，同时完全失败的情况减少了 78%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层质量多样性（QD）的在线损伤恢复方法，使物理机器人能够通过分层行为技能库快速适应损伤和新场景。
AI.motivation: 现有QD算法虽能提升机器人适应损伤的能力，但技能多样性增加导致计算复杂度和规划难度上升，亟需降低复杂度的同时保持技能多样性。
AI.method: 提出分层试错算法（Hierarchical Trial and Error），通过将复杂技能分解为原始技能的分层行为库，降低搜索与存储复杂度，并利用分层结构实现快速适应。
AI.result: 在六足机器人迷宫导航实验中，该方法在模拟环境和物理世界分别减少20%和43%的动作次数，且将完全失败率降低78%。
AI.conclusion: 分层技能分解有效平衡了技能多样性与计算复杂度，显著提升了机器人在线损伤恢复的效率与鲁棒性。

search_text: Online Damage Recovery for Physical Robots with Hierarchical Quality-Diversity 具有分级质量多样性的物理机器人在线损伤恢复 In real-world environments, robots need to be resilient to damages and robust to unforeseen scenarios. Quality-Diversity (QD) algorithms have been successfully used to make robots adapt to damages in seconds by leveraging a diverse set of learned skills. A high diversity of skills increases the chances of a robot to succeed at overcoming new situations since there are more potential alternatives to solve a new task.However, finding and storing a large behavioural diversity of multiple skills often leads to an increase in computational complexity. Furthermore, robot planning in a large skill space is an additional challenge that arises with an increased number of skills. Hierarchical structures can help reducing this search and storage complexity by breaking down skills into primitive skills. In this paper, we introduce the Hierarchical Trial and Error algorithm, which uses a hierarchical behavioural repertoire to learn diverse skills and leverages them to make the robot adapt quickly in the physical world. We show that the hierarchical decomposition of skills enables the robot to learn more complex behaviours while keeping the learning of the repertoire tractable. Experiments with a hexapod robot show that our method solves a maze navigation tasks with 20% less actions in simulation, and 43% less actions in the physical world, for the most challenging scenarios than the best baselines while having 78% less complete failures. 在现实环境中，机器人需要能够抵御损坏并能够应对不可预见的情况。质量多样性 (QD) 算法已成功用于使机器人通过利用多种学习技能在几秒钟内适应损坏。技能的高度多样性增加了机器人成功克服新情况的机会，因为有更多潜在的替代方案来解决新任务。然而，查找和存储多种技能的大量行为多样性通常会导致计算复杂性的增加。此外，随着技能数量的增加，在大技能空间中进行机器人规划是一个额外的挑战。层次结构可以通过将技能分解为原始技能来帮助降低搜索和存储的复杂性。在本文中，我们介绍了分层试错算法，该算法使用分层行为库来学习各种技能，并利用它们使机器人快速适应物理世界。我们证明，技能的层次分解使机器人能够学习更复杂的行为，同时保持技能学习的易处理性。使用六足机器人进行的实验表明，对于最具挑战性的场景，与最佳基线相比，我们的方法在解决迷宫导航任务时，模拟中的动作减少了 20%，物理世界中的动作减少了 43%，同时完全失败的情况减少了 78%。 本文提出了一种基于分层质量多样性（QD）的在线损伤恢复方法，使物理机器人能够通过分层行为技能库快速适应损伤和新场景。 Maxime Allard,Simón C. Smith,Konstantinos Chatzilygeroudis,Bryan Lim,Antoine Cully cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Yibo Hu,Yu Lin,Erick Skorupa Parolin,Latifur Khan,Kevin Hamlen
title: Controllable Fake Document Infilling for Cyber Deception
title_zh: 用于网络欺骗的可控虚假文件填充
abstract: Recent works in cyber deception study how to deter malicious intrusion by generating multiple fake versions of a critical document to impose costs on adversaries who need to identify the correct information. However, existing approaches are context-agnostic, resulting in sub-optimal and unvaried outputs. We propose a novel context-aware model, Fake Document Infilling (FDI), by converting the problem to a controllable mask-then-infill procedure. FDI masks important concepts of varied lengths in the document, then infills a realistic but fake alternative considering both the previous and future contexts. We conduct comprehensive evaluations on technical documents and news stories. Results show that FDI outperforms the baselines in generating highly believable fakes with moderate modification to protect critical information and deceive adversaries.
summary: Recent works in cyber deception study how to deter malicious intrusion by generating multiple fake versions of a critical document to impose costs on adversaries who need to identify the correct information. However, existing approaches are context-agnostic, resulting in sub-optimal and unvaried outputs. We propose a novel context-aware model, Fake Document Infilling (FDI), by converting the problem to a controllable mask-then-infill procedure. FDI masks important concepts of varied lengths in the document, then infills a realistic but fake alternative considering both the previous and future contexts. We conduct comprehensive evaluations on technical documents and news stories. Results show that FDI outperforms the baselines in generating highly believable fakes with moderate modification to protect critical information and deceive adversaries.
abstract_zh: 最近的网络欺骗工作研究了如何通过生成关键文档的多个虚假版本来阻止恶意入侵，从而给需要识别正确信息的对手带来成本。然而，现有的方法与上下文无关，导致输出次优且不变。我们提出了一种新颖的上下文感知模型，即假文档填充（FDI），通过将问题转换为可控的掩码然后填充过程。 FDI 在文件中掩盖了不同长度的重要概念，然后考虑到过去和未来的背景，填充了一个现实但虚假的替代方案。我们对技术文档和新闻报道进行综合评估。结果表明，FDI 在生成高度可信的假货并进行适度修改以保护关键信息和欺骗对手方面优于基线。

AI.tldr: 开发一种可控的假文档填充方法，用于网络欺骗中的信息保护
AI.motivation: 现有假文档生成方法缺乏上下文感知能力，导致生成内容可信度不足且缺乏多样性，难以有效增加攻击者识别真实信息的成本
AI.method: 提出上下文感知模型FDI，通过可控制的掩码-填充流程，结合前后文语境生成具有迷惑性的假文档内容
AI.result: 在技术文档和新闻数据集上验证，FDI生成的假文档在可信度指标上优于基线方法，且能保持关键信息的适度修改
AI.conclusion: FDI通过上下文感知的可控生成机制，有效提升了假文档的欺骗性，为网络防御提供了新的技术手段

authors_text: Aya Watanabe,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Yuki Saito,Detai Xin,Hiroshi Saruwatari
title: Mid-attribute speaker generation using optimal-transport-based interpolation of Gaussian mixture models
title_zh: 使用基于最优传输的高斯混合模型插值生成中属性说话人
abstract: In this paper, we propose a method for intermediating multiple speakers' attributes and diversifying their voice characteristics in ``speaker generation,'' an emerging task that aims to synthesize a nonexistent speaker's naturally sounding voice. The conventional TacoSpawn-based speaker generation method represents the distributions of speaker embeddings by Gaussian mixture models (GMMs) conditioned with speaker attributes. Although this method enables the sampling of various speakers from the speaker-attribute-aware GMMs, it is not yet clear whether the learned distributions can represent speakers with an intermediate attribute (i.e., mid-attribute). To this end, we propose an optimal-transport-based method that interpolates the learned GMMs to generate nonexistent speakers with mid-attribute (e.g., gender-neutral) voices. We empirically validate our method and evaluate the naturalness of synthetic speech and the controllability of two speaker attributes: gender and language fluency. The evaluation results show that our method can control the generated speakers' attributes by a continuous scalar value without statistically significant degradation of speech naturalness.
summary: In this paper, we propose a method for intermediating multiple speakers' attributes and diversifying their voice characteristics in ``speaker generation,'' an emerging task that aims to synthesize a nonexistent speaker's naturally sounding voice. The conventional TacoSpawn-based speaker generation method represents the distributions of speaker embeddings by Gaussian mixture models (GMMs) conditioned with speaker attributes. Although this method enables the sampling of various speakers from the speaker-attribute-aware GMMs, it is not yet clear whether the learned distributions can represent speakers with an intermediate attribute (i.e., mid-attribute). To this end, we propose an optimal-transport-based method that interpolates the learned GMMs to generate nonexistent speakers with mid-attribute (e.g., gender-neutral) voices. We empirically validate our method and evaluate the naturalness of synthetic speech and the controllability of two speaker attributes: gender and language fluency. The evaluation results show that our method can control the generated speakers' attributes by a continuous scalar value without statistically significant degradation of speech naturalness.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种在“说话人生成”中中介多个说话人的属性并使其声音特征多样化的方法，这是一项新兴任务，旨在合成不存在的说话人的自然声音。传统的基于 TacoSpawn 的说话人生成方法通过以说话人属性为条件的高斯混合模型 (GMM) 表示说话人嵌入的分布。虽然这种方法能够从说话者属性感知的 GMM 中对各种说话者进行采样，但尚不清楚学习到的分布是否可以代表具有中间属性（即中间属性）的说话者。为此，我们提出了一种基于最优传输的方法，该方法对学习到的 GMM 进行插值，以生成具有中等属性（例如，性别中立）声音的不存在的说话者。我们根据经验验证了我们的方法，并评估了合成语音的自然度以及两个说话者属性的可控性：性别和语言流畅性。评估结果表明，我们的方法可以通过连续标量值来控制生成的说话人的属性，而不会显着降低语音自然度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最优传输的高斯混合模型插值方法，用于生成具有中间属性（如性别中立）的说话人语音。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人生成方法难以明确生成具有中间属性（如性别中立）的说话人，需探索新方法实现属性连续控制。
AI.method: 通过最优传输理论对条件高斯混合模型进行插值，生成不存在的中间属性说话人。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在性别和语言流利度属性控制上的有效性，语音自然度无显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了说话人属性的连续控制，为生成中间属性语音提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Gonzalo Navarro
title: Computing MEMs and Relatives on Repetitive Text Collections
title_zh: 计算重复文本集合上的 MEM 和相关项
abstract: We consider the problem of computing the Maximal Exact Matches (MEMs) of a given pattern $P[1 .. m]$ on a large repetitive text collection $T[1 .. n]$, which is represented as a (hopefully much smaller) run-length context-free grammar of size $g_{rl}$. We show that the problem can be solved in time $O(m^2 \log^εn)$, for any constant $ε> 0$, on a data structure of size $O(g_{rl})$. Further, on a locally consistent grammar of size $O(δ\log\frac{n}δ)$, the time decreases to $O(m\log m(\log m + \log^εn))$. The value $δ$ is a function of the substring complexity of $T$ and $Ω(δ\log\frac{n}δ)$ is a tight lower bound on the compressibility of repetitive texts $T$, so our structure has optimal size in terms of $n$ and $δ$. We extend our results to several related problems, such as finding $k$-MEMs, MUMs, rare MEMs, and applications.
summary: We consider the problem of computing the Maximal Exact Matches (MEMs) of a given pattern $P[1 .. m]$ on a large repetitive text collection $T[1 .. n]$, which is represented as a (hopefully much smaller) run-length context-free grammar of size $g_{rl}$. We show that the problem can be solved in time $O(m^2 \log^εn)$, for any constant $ε> 0$, on a data structure of size $O(g_{rl})$. Further, on a locally consistent grammar of size $O(δ\log\frac{n}δ)$, the time decreases to $O(m\log m(\log m + \log^εn))$. The value $δ$ is a function of the substring complexity of $T$ and $Ω(δ\log\frac{n}δ)$ is a tight lower bound on the compressibility of repetitive texts $T$, so our structure has optimal size in terms of $n$ and $δ$. We extend our results to several related problems, such as finding $k$-MEMs, MUMs, rare MEMs, and applications.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在大型重复文本集合 $T[1 .. n]$ 上计算给定模式 $P[1 .. m]$ 的最大精确匹配 (MEM) 的问题，该集合表示为大小为 $g_{rl}$ 的（希望小得多）游程长度上下文无关语法。我们证明，对于任何常数 $ε> 0$，在大小为 $O(g_{rl})$ 的数据结构上，该问题可以在 $O(m^2 \log^εn)$ 时间内解决。此外，在大小为 $O(δ\log\frac{n}δ)$ 的局部一致语法上，时间减少到 $O(m\log m(\log m + \log^εn))$。值 $δ$ 是 $T$ 子串复杂度的函数，而 $Ω(δ\log\frac{n}δ)$ 是重复文本 $T$ 的可压缩性的严格下界，因此我们的结构在 $n$ 和 $δ$ 方面具有最佳大小。我们将结果扩展到几个相关问题，例如寻找 $k$-MEM、MUM、稀有 MEM 和应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在重复文本集合上高效计算最大精确匹配（MEMs）及其相关问题，提出基于运行长度上下文无关文法（RLCFG）的算法。
AI.motivation: 重复文本在生物信息学和数据压缩中广泛存在，传统方法处理大规模重复文本效率低下，需设计更高效的MEM计算方案。
AI.method: 构建基于运行长度上下文无关文法的压缩数据结构，结合局部一致性文法特性，设计时间复杂度为O(m² log^εn)和O(m log m (log m + log^εn))的算法。
AI.result: 提出最优大小的数据结构，实现MEMs、k-MEMs、MUMs等扩展问题的高效求解，时间复杂度与文法规模g_rl及重复文本子串复杂度δ相关。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在理论复杂度和实际应用中均达到最优，为处理大规模重复文本的模式匹配提供了有效解决方案。
