search_text: Computing MEMs and Relatives on Repetitive Text Collections 计算重复文本集合上的 MEM 和相关项 We consider the problem of computing the Maximal Exact Matches (MEMs) of a given pattern $P[1 .. m]$ on a large repetitive text collection $T[1 .. n]$, which is represented as a (hopefully much smaller) run-length context-free grammar of size $g_{rl}$. We show that the problem can be solved in time $O(m^2 \log^εn)$, for any constant $ε> 0$, on a data structure of size $O(g_{rl})$. Further, on a locally consistent grammar of size $O(δ\log\frac{n}δ)$, the time decreases to $O(m\log m(\log m + \log^εn))$. The value $δ$ is a function of the substring complexity of $T$ and $Ω(δ\log\frac{n}δ)$ is a tight lower bound on the compressibility of repetitive texts $T$, so our structure has optimal size in terms of $n$ and $δ$. We extend our results to several related problems, such as finding $k$-MEMs, MUMs, rare MEMs, and applications. 我们考虑在大型重复文本集合 $T[1 .. n]$ 上计算给定模式 $P[1 .. m]$ 的最大精确匹配 (MEM) 的问题，该集合表示为大小为 $g_{rl}$ 的（希望小得多）游程长度上下文无关语法。我们证明，对于任何常数 $ε> 0$，在大小为 $O(g_{rl})$ 的数据结构上，该问题可以在 $O(m^2 \log^εn)$ 时间内解决。此外，在大小为 $O(δ\log\frac{n}δ)$ 的局部一致语法上，时间减少到 $O(m\log m(\log m + \log^εn))$。值 $δ$ 是 $T$ 子串复杂度的函数，而 $Ω(δ\log\frac{n}δ)$ 是重复文本 $T$ 的可压缩性的严格下界，因此我们的结构在 $n$ 和 $δ$ 方面具有最佳大小。我们将结果扩展到几个相关问题，例如寻找 $k$-MEM、MUM、稀有 MEM 和应用程序。 本文研究如何在重复文本集合上高效计算最大精确匹配（MEMs）及其相关问题，提出基于运行长度上下文无关文法（RLCFG）的算法。 Gonzalo Navarro cs.DS

authors_text: Luke Swanson,David Gagnon,Jennifer Scianna,John McCloskey,Nicholas Spevacek,Stefan Slater,Erik Harpstead
title: Leveraging Cluster Analysis to Understand Educational Game Player Experiences and Support Design
title_zh: 利用聚类分析来了解教育游戏玩家体验并支持设计
comment: Presented at Games, Learning & Society (GLS) 2022 Conference. Irving, CA
comments: Presented at Games, Learning & Society (GLS) 2022 Conference. Irving, CA
abstract: The ability for an educational game designer to understand their audience's play styles and resulting experience is an essential tool for improving their game's design. As a game is subjected to large-scale player testing, the designers require inexpensive, automated methods for categorizing patterns of player-game interactions. In this paper we present a simple, reusable process using best practices for data clustering, feasible for use within a small educational game studio. We utilize the method to analyze a real-time strategy game, processing game telemetry data to determine categories of players based on their in-game actions, the feedback they received, and their progress through the game. An interpretive analysis of these clusters results in actionable insights for the game's designers.
summary: The ability for an educational game designer to understand their audience's play styles and resulting experience is an essential tool for improving their game's design. As a game is subjected to large-scale player testing, the designers require inexpensive, automated methods for categorizing patterns of player-game interactions. In this paper we present a simple, reusable process using best practices for data clustering, feasible for use within a small educational game studio. We utilize the method to analyze a real-time strategy game, processing game telemetry data to determine categories of players based on their in-game actions, the feedback they received, and their progress through the game. An interpretive analysis of these clusters results in actionable insights for the game's designers.
abstract_zh: 教育游戏设计师了解受众的游戏风格和由此产生的体验的能力是改进游戏设计的重要工具。由于游戏要接受大规模玩家测试，设计者需要廉价的自动化方法来对玩家与游戏交互的模式进行分类。在本文中，我们提出了一个使用数据集群最佳实践的简单、可重用的流程，适合在小型教育游戏工作室中使用。我们利用该方法来分析实时策略游戏，处理游戏遥测数据，根据玩家在游戏中的操作、收到的反馈以及游戏进度来确定玩家的类别。对这些集群的解释性分析可以为游戏设计者提供可行的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用聚类分析方法对教育游戏玩家的行为数据进行分类，以支持游戏设计优化。
AI.motivation: 教育游戏设计师需要低成本、自动化的工具来分析大规模玩家测试中的互动模式，从而改进游戏设计。
AI.method: 采用数据聚类最佳实践，通过分析游戏 telemetry 数据（玩家行为、反馈及进度）对玩家进行分类，并进行解释性分析。
AI.result: 识别出不同玩家行为模式的聚类结果，为设计师提供可操作的优化建议。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为小型教育游戏工作室提供了可行的玩家行为分析框架，有助于基于数据驱动的设计改进。

authors_text: Lea Goetz
title: Uncertainty estimation for out-of-distribution detection in computational histopathology
title_zh: 计算组织病理学中分布外检测的不确定性估计
abstract: In computational histopathology algorithms now outperform humans on a range of tasks, but to date none are employed for automated diagnoses in the clinic. Before algorithms can be involved in such high-stakes decisions they need to "know when they don't know", i.e., they need to estimate their predictive uncertainty. This allows them to defer potentially erroneous predictions to a human pathologist, thus increasing their safety. Here, we evaluate the predictive performance and calibration of several uncertainty estimation methods on clinical histopathology data. We show that a distance-aware uncertainty estimation method outperforms commonly used approaches, such as Monte Carlo dropout and deep ensembles. However, we observe a drop in predictive performance and calibration on novel samples across all uncertainty estimation methods tested. We also investigate the use of uncertainty thresholding to reject out-of-distribution samples for selective prediction. We demonstrate the limitations of this approach and suggest areas for future research.
summary: In computational histopathology algorithms now outperform humans on a range of tasks, but to date none are employed for automated diagnoses in the clinic. Before algorithms can be involved in such high-stakes decisions they need to "know when they don't know", i.e., they need to estimate their predictive uncertainty. This allows them to defer potentially erroneous predictions to a human pathologist, thus increasing their safety. Here, we evaluate the predictive performance and calibration of several uncertainty estimation methods on clinical histopathology data. We show that a distance-aware uncertainty estimation method outperforms commonly used approaches, such as Monte Carlo dropout and deep ensembles. However, we observe a drop in predictive performance and calibration on novel samples across all uncertainty estimation methods tested. We also investigate the use of uncertainty thresholding to reject out-of-distribution samples for selective prediction. We demonstrate the limitations of this approach and suggest areas for future research.
abstract_zh: 在计算组织病理学中，算法现在在一系列任务上都优于人类，但迄今为止还没有一种算法被用于临床的自动诊断。在算法参与此类高风险决策之前，它们需要“知道何时不知道”，即，它们需要估计其预测不确定性。这使得他们能够将可能错误的预测推迟给人类病理学家，从而提高他们的安全性。在这里，我们评估了几种不确定性估计方法对临床组织病理学数据的预测性能和校准。我们证明，距离感知的不确定性估计方法优于常用的方法，例如蒙特卡洛丢失和深度集成。然而，我们观察到在所有测试的不确定性估计方法中，新样本的预测性能和校准有所下降。我们还研究了使用不确定性阈值来拒绝分布外样本以进行选择性预测。我们展示了这种方法的局限性，并提出了未来研究的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文评估多种不确定性估计方法在计算组织病理学中检测分布外样本的效果，以提高算法诊断安全性。
AI.motivation: 尽管计算病理学算法性能超越人类，但缺乏不确定性估计能力导致无法在临床中可靠使用，需解决算法'知错'问题以提升安全性。
AI.method: 对比分析距离感知不确定性估计、蒙特卡洛dropout和深度集成等方法在临床数据上的预测性能与校准效果，并测试不确定性阈值筛选分布外样本的可行性。
AI.result: 距离感知方法优于传统方法，但所有方法在新型样本上均出现性能下降，不确定性阈值筛选存在显著局限性。
AI.conclusion: 需开发更鲁棒的不确定性估计框架，特别是提升分布外样本的检测能力，以推动算法临床应用。

We demonstrate the limitations of this approach and suggest areas for future research. 在计算组织病理学中，算法现在在一系列任务上都优于人类，但迄今为止还没有一种算法被用于临床的自动诊断。在算法参与此类高风险决策之前，它们需要“知道何时不知道”，即，它们需要估计其预测不确定性。这使得他们能够将可能错误的预测推迟给人类病理学家，从而提高他们的安全性。在这里，我们评估了几种不确定性估计方法对临床组织病理学数据的预测性能和校准。我们证明，距离感知的不确定性估计方法优于常用的方法，例如蒙特卡洛丢失和深度集成。然而，我们观察到在所有测试的不确定性估计方法中，新样本的预测性能和校准有所下降。我们还研究了使用不确定性阈值来拒绝分布外样本以进行选择性预测。我们展示了这种方法的局限性，并提出了未来研究的领域。 本文评估多种不确定性估计方法在计算组织病理学中检测分布外样本的效果，以提高算法诊断安全性。 Lea Goetz cs.CV,cs.LG

authors: Maria O. C. Z. San Pedro
authors_json: Maria O. C. Z. San Pedro
authors_text: David J. Gagnon,Ryan S. Baker,Sarah Gagnon,Luke Swanson,Nick Spevacek,Juliana Andres,Erik Harpstead,Jennifer Scianna,Stefan Slater,Maria O. C. Z. San Pedro
title: Exploring players' experience of humor and snark in a grade 3-6 history practices game
title_zh: 探索玩家在 3-6 年级历史练习游戏中的幽默和讽刺体验
comment: Presented at Games, Learning & Society (GLS) 2022 conference. Irvine, CA
comments: Presented at Games, Learning & Society (GLS) 2022 conference. Irvine, CA
abstract: In this paper we use an existing history learning game with an active audience as a research platform for exploring how humor and "snarkiness" in the dialog script affect students' progression and attitudes about the game. We conducted a 2x2 randomized experiment with 11,804 anonymous 3rd-6th grade students. Using one-way ANOVA and Kruskall-Wallis tests, we find that changes to the script produced measurable results in the self-reported perceived humor of the game and the likeability of the player character. Different scripts did not produce significant differences in player completion of the game, or how much of the game was played. Perceived humor and enjoyment of the game and its main character contributed significantly to progress in the game, as did self-perceived reading skill.
summary: In this paper we use an existing history learning game with an active audience as a research platform for exploring how humor and "snarkiness" in the dialog script affect students' progression and attitudes about the game. We conducted a 2x2 randomized experiment with 11,804 anonymous 3rd-6th grade students. Using one-way ANOVA and Kruskall-Wallis tests, we find that changes to the script produced measurable results in the self-reported perceived humor of the game and the likeability of the player character. Different scripts did not produce significant differences in player completion of the game, or how much of the game was played. Perceived humor and enjoyment of the game and its main character contributed significantly to progress in the game, as did self-perceived reading skill.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们使用现有的具有活跃受众的历史学习游戏作为研究平台，探索对话脚本中的幽默和“尖刻”如何影响学生的进步和对游戏的态度。我们对 11,804 名匿名 3 至 6 年级学生进行了 2x2 随机实验。使用单向方差分析和 Kruskall-Wallis 测试，我们发现对脚本的更改在游戏的自我报告感知幽默和玩家角色的可爱度方面产生了可测量的结果。不同的脚本并不会在玩家完成游戏或玩游戏的时间方面产生显着差异。对游戏及其主角的幽默感和享受感以及自我感知的阅读能力对游戏的进展有显着贡献。

AI.tldr: 研究历史学习游戏中幽默与讽刺对话对3至6年级学生游戏体验的影响。
AI.motivation: 探索幽默和讽刺元素是否能提升学生对历史游戏的参与度和态度，从而增强学习效果。
AI.method: 通过2x2随机实验，对11,804名学生进行匿名测试，结合单因素方差分析和克鲁斯卡尔-沃利斯检验分析数据。
AI.result: 对话脚本的调整显著影响学生对游戏幽默感的感知和角色喜爱度，但未显著影响游戏完成率或游玩时长。幽默感和角色喜爱度与游戏进度及阅读能力相关。
AI.conclusion: 幽默和讽刺元素可提升学生的游戏体验和参与度，但未直接影响完成率，而自我感知的阅读能力对进度有显著影响。

authors_text: Housheng Xie,Junhui Qiu,Yuan Dai,Yang Yang,Changcheng Xiang,Yukuan Zhang
title: SA-DNet: A on-demand semantic object registration network adapting to non-rigid deformation
title_zh: SA-DNet：一种适应非刚性变形的按需语义对象注册网络
abstract: As an essential processing step before the fusing of infrared and visible images, the performance of image registration determines whether the two images can be fused at correct spatial position. In the actual scenario, the varied imaging devices may lead to a change in perspective or time gap between shots, making significant non-rigid spatial relationship in infrared and visible images. Even if a large number of feature points are matched, the registration accuracy may still be inadequate, affecting the result of image fusion and other vision tasks. To alleviate this problem, we propose a Semantic-Aware on-Demand registration network (SA-DNet), which mainly purpose is to confine the feature matching process to the semantic region of interest (sROI) by designing semantic-aware module (SAM) and HOL-Deep hybrid matching module (HDM). After utilizing TPS to transform infrared and visible images based on the corresponding feature points in sROI, the registered images are fused using image fusion module (IFM) to achieve a fully functional registration and fusion network. Moreover, we point out that for different demands, this type of approach allows us to select semantic objects for feature matching as needed and accomplishes task-specific registration based on specific requirements. To demonstrate the robustness of SA-DNet for non-rigid distortions, we conduct extensive experiments by comparing SA-DNet with five state-of-the-art infrared and visible image feature matching methods, and the experimental results show that our method adapts better to the presence of non-rigid distortions in the images and provides semantically well-registered images.
summary: As an essential processing step before the fusing of infrared and visible images, the performance of image registration determines whether the two images can be fused at correct spatial position. In the actual scenario, the varied imaging devices may lead to a change in perspective or time gap between shots, making significant non-rigid spatial relationship in infrared and visible images. Even if a large number of feature points are matched, the registration accuracy may still be inadequate, affecting the result of image fusion and other vision tasks. To alleviate this problem, we propose a Semantic-Aware on-Demand registration network (SA-DNet), which mainly purpose is to confine the feature matching process to the semantic region of interest (sROI) by designing semantic-aware module (SAM) and HOL-Deep hybrid matching module (HDM). After utilizing TPS to transform infrared and visible images based on the corresponding feature points in sROI, the registered images are fused using image fusion module (IFM) to achieve a fully functional registration and fusion network. Moreover, we point out that for different demands, this type of approach allows us to select semantic objects for feature matching as needed and accomplishes task-specific registration based on specific requirements. To demonstrate the robustness of SA-DNet for non-rigid distortions, we conduct extensive experiments by comparing SA-DNet with five state-of-the-art infrared and visible image feature matching methods, and the experimental results show that our method adapts better to the presence of non-rigid distortions in the images and provides semantically well-registered images.
abstract_zh: 图像配准作为红外和可见光图像融合前的一个重要处理步骤，其性能决定了两幅图像能否在正确的空间位置融合。在实际场景中，不同的成像设备可能会导致视角或镜头之间的时间间隔发生变化，从而使红外和可见光图像产生显着的非刚性空间关系。即使匹配大量特征点，配准精度仍然可能不够，影响图像融合和其他视觉任务的结果。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种语义感知按需注册网络（SA-DNet），其主要目的是通过设计语义感知模块（SAM）和HOL-Deep混合匹配模块（HDM）将特征匹配过程限制在语义感兴趣区域（sROI）。利用TPS根据sROI中的相应特征点对红外和可见光图像进行变换后，使用图像融合模块（IFM）对配准图像进行融合，以实现功能齐全的配准和融合网络。此外，我们指出，针对不同的需求，这种方法允许我们根据需要选择语义对象进行特征匹配，并根据特定需求完成特定任务的注册。为了证明 SA-DNet 对非刚性扭曲的鲁棒性，我们进行了大量的实验，将 SA-DNet 与五种最先进的红外和可见光图像特征匹配方法进行比较，实验结果表明，我们的方法更好地适应图像中存在的非刚性扭曲，并提供语义上配准良好的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SA-DNet网络，通过语义感知模块和混合匹配模块解决红外与可见光图像在非刚性变形下的注册问题，并实现图像融合。
AI.motivation: 现有图像注册方法在非刚性变形场景下匹配精度不足，难以满足红外与可见光图像融合需求，需针对性优化语义区域匹配过程。
AI.method: 设计语义感知模块(SAM)定位语义感兴趣区域(sROI)，结合HOL-Deep混合匹配模块(HDM)进行特征匹配，采用TPS变换对齐图像，并通过图像融合模块(IFM)生成最终结果。
AI.result: 在五种先进方法对比实验中，SA-DNet在非刚性变形场景下展现出更优的注册适应性，生成语义对齐效果更佳的融合图像。
AI.conclusion: SA-DNet通过语义驱动的按需匹配机制和混合模块设计，有效提升了非刚性变形下红外与可见光图像的注册精度与鲁棒性。

search_text: SA-DNet: A on-demand semantic object registration network adapting to non-rigid deformation SA-DNet：一种适应非刚性变形的按需语义对象注册网络 As an essential processing step before the fusing of infrared and visible images, the performance of image registration determines whether the two images can be fused at correct spatial position. In the actual scenario, the varied imaging devices may lead to a change in perspective or time gap between shots, making significant non-rigid spatial relationship in infrared and visible images. To alleviate this problem, we propose a Semantic-Aware on-Demand registration network (SA-DNet), which mainly purpose is to confine the feature matching process to the semantic region of interest (sROI) by designing semantic-aware module (SAM) and HOL-Deep hybrid matching module (HDM). After utilizing TPS to transform infrared and visible images based on the corresponding feature points in sROI, the registered images are fused using image fusion module (IFM) to achieve a fully functional registration and fusion network. Moreover, we point out that for different demands, this type of approach allows us to select semantic objects for feature matching as needed and accomplishes task-specific registration based on specific requirements. To demonstrate the robustness of SA-DNet for non-rigid distortions, we conduct extensive experiments by comparing SA-DNet with five state-of-the-art infrared and visible image feature matching methods, and the experimental results show that our method adapts better to the presence of non-rigid distortions in the images and provides semantically well-registered images. 图像配准作为红外和可见光图像融合前的一个重要处理步骤，其性能决定了两幅图像能否在正确的空间位置融合。在实际场景中，不同的成像设备可能会导致视角或镜头之间的时间间隔发生变化，从而使红外和可见光图像产生显着的非刚性空间关系。即使匹配大量特征点，配准精度仍然可能不够，影响图像融合和其他视觉任务的结果。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种语义感知按需注册网络（SA-DNet），其主要目的是通过设计语义感知模块（SAM）和HOL-Deep混合匹配模块（HDM）将特征匹配过程限制在语义感兴趣区域（sROI）。利用TPS根据sROI中的相应特征点对红外和可见光图像进行变换后，使用图像融合模块（IFM）对配准图像进行融合，以实现功能齐全的配准和融合网络。此外，我们指出，针对不同的需求，这种方法允许我们根据需要选择语义对象进行特征匹配，并根据特定需求完成特定任务的注册。为了证明 SA-DNet 对非刚性扭曲的鲁棒性，我们进行了大量的实验，将 SA-DNet 与五种最先进的红外和可见光图像特征匹配方法进行比较，实验结果表明，我们的方法更好地适应图像中存在的非刚性扭曲，并提供语义上配准良好的图像。 本文提出SA-DNet网络，通过语义感知模块和混合匹配模块解决红外与可见光图像在非刚性变形下的注册问题，并实现图像融合。 Housheng Xie,Junhui Qiu,Yuan Dai,Yang Yang,Changcheng Xiang,Yukuan Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Michael Lampis
title: First Order Logic on Pathwidth Revisited Again
title_zh: 再次回顾路径宽度的一阶逻辑
abstract: Courcelle's celebrated theorem states that all MSO-expressible properties can be decided in linear time on graphs of bounded treewidth. Unfortunately, the hidden constant implied by this theorem is a tower of exponentials whose height increases with each quantifier alternation in the formula. More devastatingly, this cannot be improved, under standard assumptions, even if we consider the much more restricted problem of deciding FO-expressible properties on trees. In this paper we revisit this well-studied topic and identify a natural special case where the dependence of Courcelle's theorem can, in fact, be improved. Specifically, we show that all FO-expressible properties can be decided with an elementary dependence on the input formula, if the input graph has bounded pathwidth (rather than treewidth). This is a rare example of treewidth and pathwidth having different complexity behaviors. Our result is also in sharp contrast with MSO logic on graphs of bounded pathwidth, where it is known that the dependence has to be non-elementary, under standard assumptions. Our work builds upon, and generalizes, a corresponding meta-theorem by Gajarsk{ý} and Hlin{ě}n{ý} for the more restricted class of graphs of bounded tree-depth.
summary: Courcelle's celebrated theorem states that all MSO-expressible properties can be decided in linear time on graphs of bounded treewidth. Unfortunately, the hidden constant implied by this theorem is a tower of exponentials whose height increases with each quantifier alternation in the formula. More devastatingly, this cannot be improved, under standard assumptions, even if we consider the much more restricted problem of deciding FO-expressible properties on trees. In this paper we revisit this well-studied topic and identify a natural special case where the dependence of Courcelle's theorem can, in fact, be improved. Specifically, we show that all FO-expressible properties can be decided with an elementary dependence on the input formula, if the input graph has bounded pathwidth (rather than treewidth). This is a rare example of treewidth and pathwidth having different complexity behaviors. Our result is also in sharp contrast with MSO logic on graphs of bounded pathwidth, where it is known that the dependence has to be non-elementary, under standard assumptions. Our work builds upon, and generalizes, a corresponding meta-theorem by Gajarsk{ý} and Hlin{ě}n{ý} for the more restricted class of graphs of bounded tree-depth.
abstract_zh: Courcelle 著名的定理指出，所有 MSO 可表达的属性都可以在有界树宽图上在线性时间内决定。不幸的是，该定理隐含的隐藏常数是一座指数塔，其高度随着公式中每次量词的变化而增加。更具破坏性的是，在标准假设下，即使我们考虑决定树上 FO 可表达属性的更受限制的问题，这一点也无法得到改善。在本文中，我们重新审视这个经过深入研究的主题，并确定了一种自然的特殊情况，其中库塞勒定理的依赖性实际上可以得到改善。具体来说，我们表明，如果输入图具有有界路径宽度（而不是树宽），则所有 FO 可表达的属性都可以通过对输入公式的基本依赖来确定。这是树宽度和路径宽度具有不同复杂性行为的罕见示例。我们的结果也与有界路径宽度图上的 MSO 逻辑形成鲜明对比，已知在标准假设下，依赖性必须是非基本的。我们的工作建立在 Gajarsk{ý} 和 Hlin{ě}n{ý} 的相应元定理的基础上，并对其进行了概括，该元定理适用于更受限制的有界树深度图类。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在路径宽度有界图上使用一阶逻辑（FO）表达性质的复杂性问题，旨在改进Courcelle定理中隐含的指数级常数依赖。
AI.motivation: Courcelle定理指出，所有MSO可表达性质可在树宽有界图上线性时间内判定，但其隐含常数呈指数塔形式，且无法改进。论文希望找到一种特殊情况，使FO性质的判定复杂度依赖更优。
AI.method: 基于Gajarský和Hliněný的元定理，通过分析路径宽度（pathwidth）比树宽（treewidth）更受限的结构，结合FO逻辑的特性，推导出新的复杂性边界。
AI.result: 证明了在路径宽度有界图上，所有FO可表达性质的判定复杂度具有初等函数依赖（elementary dependence），优于树宽情形下的指数塔依赖。
AI.conclusion: 路径宽度与树宽在复杂性行为上存在显著差异，FO逻辑在路径宽度有界图上的判定复杂度可优化，而MSO逻辑仍需非初等依赖，突显了逻辑类型与图参数的关联性。

authors_text: Mathias Parger,Chengcheng Tang,Thomas Neff,Christopher D. Twigg,Cem Keskin,Robert Wang,Markus Steinberger
title: MotionDeltaCNN: Sparse CNN Inference of Frame Differences in Moving Camera Videos
title_zh: MotionDeltaCNN：运动摄像机视频中帧差异的稀疏 CNN 推断
abstract: Convolutional neural network inference on video input is computationally expensive and requires high memory bandwidth. Recently, DeltaCNN managed to reduce the cost by only processing pixels with significant updates over the previous frame. However, DeltaCNN relies on static camera input. Moving cameras add new challenges in how to fuse newly unveiled image regions with already processed regions efficiently to minimize the update rate - without increasing memory overhead and without knowing the camera extrinsics of future frames. In this work, we propose MotionDeltaCNN, a sparse CNN inference framework that supports moving cameras. We introduce spherical buffers and padded convolutions to enable seamless fusion of newly unveiled regions and previously processed regions -- without increasing memory footprint. Our evaluation shows that we outperform DeltaCNN by up to 90% for moving camera videos.
summary: Convolutional neural network inference on video input is computationally expensive and requires high memory bandwidth. Recently, DeltaCNN managed to reduce the cost by only processing pixels with significant updates over the previous frame. However, DeltaCNN relies on static camera input. Moving cameras add new challenges in how to fuse newly unveiled image regions with already processed regions efficiently to minimize the update rate - without increasing memory overhead and without knowing the camera extrinsics of future frames. In this work, we propose MotionDeltaCNN, a sparse CNN inference framework that supports moving cameras. We introduce spherical buffers and padded convolutions to enable seamless fusion of newly unveiled regions and previously processed regions -- without increasing memory footprint. Our evaluation shows that we outperform DeltaCNN by up to 90% for moving camera videos.
abstract_zh: 对视频输入进行卷积神经网络推理的计算成本很高，并且需要高内存带宽。最近，DeltaCNN 通过仅处理与前一帧相比有显着更新的像素，成功地降低了成本。然而，DeltaCNN 依赖于静态相机输入。移动相机增加了新的挑战，即如何有效地将新揭示的图像区域与已处理的区域融合，以最小化更新率——而不增加内存开销，也不知道未来帧的相机外在因素。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MotionDeltaCNN，这是一种支持移动摄像机的稀疏 CNN 推理框架。我们引入球形缓冲区和填充卷积，以实现新揭示的区域和先前处理的区域的无缝融合——而不增加内存占用。我们的评估表明，对于移动摄像机视频，我们的性能比 DeltaCNN 高出 90%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MotionDeltaCNN框架，通过稀疏CNN推理处理移动摄像头视频中的帧差异，降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: DeltaCNN虽能减少静态摄像头视频的计算量，但无法有效处理移动摄像头中新暴露区域与已处理区域的融合问题，且需避免内存开销增加。
AI.method: 引入球形缓冲区与填充卷积技术，实现新旧区域的无缝融合，无需增加内存占用。
AI.result: 在移动摄像头视频任务中，相比DeltaCNN性能提升最高达90%。
AI.conclusion: MotionDeltaCNN有效解决了移动摄像头视频的稀疏CNN推理问题，在保持内存效率的同时显著提升计算性能。

authors_text: Yudong Xu,Elias B. Khalil,Scott Sanner
title: Graphs, Constraints, and Search for the Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus
title_zh: 抽象和推理语料库的图形、约束和搜索
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, to be published in AAAI-23
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures, to be published in AAAI-23
abstract: The Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC) aims at benchmarking the performance of general artificial intelligence algorithms. The ARC's focus on broad generalization and few-shot learning has made it difficult to solve using pure machine learning. A more promising approach has been to perform program synthesis within an appropriately designed Domain Specific Language (DSL). However, these too have seen limited success. We propose Abstract Reasoning with Graph Abstractions (ARGA), a new object-centric framework that first represents images using graphs and then performs a search for a correct program in a DSL that is based on the abstracted graph space. The complexity of this combinatorial search is tamed through the use of constraint acquisition, state hashing, and Tabu search. An extensive set of experiments demonstrates the promise of ARGA in tackling some of the complicated object-centric tasks of the ARC rather efficiently, producing programs that are correct and easy to understand.
summary: The Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC) aims at benchmarking the performance of general artificial intelligence algorithms. The ARC's focus on broad generalization and few-shot learning has made it difficult to solve using pure machine learning. A more promising approach has been to perform program synthesis within an appropriately designed Domain Specific Language (DSL). However, these too have seen limited success. We propose Abstract Reasoning with Graph Abstractions (ARGA), a new object-centric framework that first represents images using graphs and then performs a search for a correct program in a DSL that is based on the abstracted graph space. The complexity of this combinatorial search is tamed through the use of constraint acquisition, state hashing, and Tabu search. An extensive set of experiments demonstrates the promise of ARGA in tackling some of the complicated object-centric tasks of the ARC rather efficiently, producing programs that are correct and easy to understand.
abstract_zh: 抽象与推理语料库（ARC）旨在对通用人工智能算法的性能进行基准测试。 ARC 对广泛泛化和小样本学习的关注使得使用纯机器学习来解决问题变得困难。一种更有前途的方法是在适当设计的领域特定语言（DSL）中执行程序综合。然而，这些也取得了有限的成功。我们提出了带有图抽象的抽象推理（ARGA），这是一种新的以对象为中心的框架，它首先使用图表示图像，然后在基于抽象图空间的 DSL 中搜索正确的程序。通过使用约束获取、状态散列和禁忌搜索来降低这种组合搜索的复杂性。一系列广泛的实验证明了 ARGA 在相当有效地处理 ARC 的一些复杂的以对象为中心的任务方面的前景，生成正确且易于理解的程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARGA框架，通过图抽象和搜索方法解决Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC)中的复杂抽象推理任务。
AI.motivation: ARC基准测试对通用人工智能算法的广义化和少样本学习能力提出挑战，传统机器学习和领域特定语言程序合成方法效果有限。
AI.method: 设计ARGA框架，将图像表示为图结构，在抽象图空间中通过约束获取、状态哈希和Tabu搜索优化DSL程序合成过程。
AI.result: 实验表明ARGA能高效解决ARC中复杂的对象中心任务，生成的程序具有正确性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: ARGA通过图抽象与搜索策略有效提升了抽象推理任务的解决能力，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Graphs, Constraints, and Search for the Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus 抽象和推理语料库的图形、约束和搜索 The Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC) aims at benchmarking the performance of general artificial intelligence algorithms. The ARC's focus on broad generalization and few-shot learning has made it difficult to solve using pure machine learning. A more promising approach has been to perform program synthesis within an appropriately designed Domain Specific Language (DSL). However, these too have seen limited success. We propose Abstract Reasoning with Graph Abstractions (ARGA), a new object-centric framework that first represents images using graphs and then performs a search for a correct program in a DSL that is based on the abstracted graph space. The complexity of this combinatorial search is tamed through the use of constraint acquisition, state hashing, and Tabu search. An extensive set of experiments demonstrates the promise of ARGA in tackling some of the complicated object-centric tasks of the ARC rather efficiently, producing programs that are correct and easy to understand. 抽象与推理语料库（ARC）旨在对通用人工智能算法的性能进行基准测试。 ARC 对广泛泛化和小样本学习的关注使得使用纯机器学习来解决问题变得困难。一种更有前途的方法是在适当设计的领域特定语言（DSL）中执行程序综合。然而，这些也取得了有限的成功。我们提出了带有图抽象的抽象推理（ARGA），这是一种新的以对象为中心的框架，它首先使用图表示图像，然后在基于抽象图空间的 DSL 中搜索正确的程序。通过使用约束获取、状态散列和禁忌搜索来降低这种组合搜索的复杂性。一系列广泛的实验证明了 ARGA 在相当有效地处理 ARC 的一些复杂的以对象为中心的任务方面的前景，生成正确且易于理解的程序。 本文提出ARGA框架，通过图抽象和搜索方法解决Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC)中的复杂抽象推理任务。 Yudong Xu,Elias B. Khalil,Scott Sanner cs.AI

authors_text: Jan Niklas Böhm,Philipp Berens,Dmitry Kobak
title: Unsupervised visualization of image datasets using contrastive learning
title_zh: 使用对比学习对图像数据集进行无监督可视化
abstract: Visualization methods based on the nearest neighbor graph, such as t-SNE or UMAP, are widely used for visualizing high-dimensional data. Yet, these approaches only produce meaningful results if the nearest neighbors themselves are meaningful. For images represented in pixel space this is not the case, as distances in pixel space are often not capturing our sense of similarity and therefore neighbors are not semantically close. This problem can be circumvented by self-supervised approaches based on contrastive learning, such as SimCLR, relying on data augmentation to generate implicit neighbors, but these methods do not produce two-dimensional embeddings suitable for visualization. Here, we present a new method, called t-SimCNE, for unsupervised visualization of image data. T-SimCNE combines ideas from contrastive learning and neighbor embeddings, and trains a parametric mapping from the high-dimensional pixel space into two dimensions. We show that the resulting 2D embeddings achieve classification accuracy comparable to the state-of-the-art high-dimensional SimCLR representations, thus faithfully capturing semantic relationships. Using t-SimCNE, we obtain informative visualizations of the CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets, showing rich cluster structure and highlighting artifacts and outliers.

Yet, these approaches only produce meaningful results if the nearest neighbors themselves are meaningful. For images represented in pixel space this is not the case, as distances in pixel space are often not capturing our sense of similarity and therefore neighbors are not semantically close. This problem can be circumvented by self-supervised approaches based on contrastive learning, such as SimCLR, relying on data augmentation to generate implicit neighbors, but these methods do not produce two-dimensional embeddings suitable for visualization. Here, we present a new method, called t-SimCNE, for unsupervised visualization of image data. T-SimCNE combines ideas from contrastive learning and neighbor embeddings, and trains a parametric mapping from the high-dimensional pixel space into two dimensions. We show that the resulting 2D embeddings achieve classification accuracy comparable to the state-of-the-art high-dimensional SimCLR representations, thus faithfully capturing semantic relationships. Using t-SimCNE, we obtain informative visualizations of the CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets, showing rich cluster structure and highlighting artifacts and outliers.
abstract_zh: 基于最近邻图的可视化方法，例如 t-SNE 或 UMAP，广泛用于可视化高维数据。然而，只有当最近邻居本身有意义时，这些方法才会产生有意义的结果。对于像素空间中表示的图像，情况并非如此，因为像素空间中的距离通常无法捕捉我们的相似感，因此邻居在语义上并不接近。这个问题可以通过基于对比学习的自监督方法来规避，例如 SimCLR，依靠数据增强来生成隐式邻居，但这些方法不会产生适合可视化的二维嵌入。在这里，我们提出了一种称为 t-SimCNE 的新方法，用于图像数据的无监督可视化。 T-SimCNE 结合了对比学习和邻域嵌入的思想，并训练从高维像素空间到二维的参数映射。我们表明，由此产生的 2D 嵌入实现了与最先进的高维 SimCLR 表示相当的分类精度，从而忠实地捕获了语义关系。使用 t-SimCNE，我们获得了 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 数据集的信息可视化，显示了丰富的聚类结构并突出显示了伪影和异常值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为t-SimCNE的新方法，结合对比学习与邻域嵌入技术，实现图像数据的无监督可视化。
AI.motivation: 传统邻域图可视化方法（如t-SNE/UMAP）在像素空间中无法捕捉语义相似性，而对比学习方法（如SimCLR）虽能生成语义表征，但无法直接输出适合可视化的二维嵌入。
AI.method: t-SimCNE通过数据增强生成隐式邻域关系，结合对比学习框架与参数化映射函数，将高维像素空间映射到二维可视化空间。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100数据集上，t-SimCNE生成的二维嵌入在分类准确率上达到与SimCLR高维表征相当的水平，并能清晰展现聚类结构与异常点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了像素空间语义距离问题，实现了兼具语义保真度与可视化效果的图像数据无监督表征学习。

authors_text: Tabish Ahmed,Sahan Bulathwela
title: Towards Proactive Information Retrieval in Noisy Text with Wikipedia Concepts
title_zh: 使用维基百科概念在嘈杂文本中进行主动信息检索
comment: To be published at the First Workshop on Proactive and Agent-Supported Information Retrieval at CIKM 2022
comments: To be published at the First Workshop on Proactive and Agent-Supported Information Retrieval at CIKM 2022
abstract: Extracting useful information from the user history to clearly understand informational needs is a crucial feature of a proactive information retrieval system. Regarding understanding information and relevance, Wikipedia can provide the background knowledge that an intelligent system needs. This work explores how exploiting the context of a query using Wikipedia concepts can improve proactive information retrieval on noisy text. We formulate two models that use entity linking to associate Wikipedia topics with the relevance model. Our experiments around a podcast segment retrieval task demonstrate that there is a clear signal of relevance in Wikipedia concepts while a ranking model can improve precision by incorporating them. We also find Wikifying the background context of a query can help disambiguate the meaning of the query, further helping proactive information retrieval.
summary: Extracting useful information from the user history to clearly understand informational needs is a crucial feature of a proactive information retrieval system. Regarding understanding information and relevance, Wikipedia can provide the background knowledge that an intelligent system needs. This work explores how exploiting the context of a query using Wikipedia concepts can improve proactive information retrieval on noisy text. We formulate two models that use entity linking to associate Wikipedia topics with the relevance model. Our experiments around a podcast segment retrieval task demonstrate that there is a clear signal of relevance in Wikipedia concepts while a ranking model can improve precision by incorporating them. We also find Wikifying the background context of a query can help disambiguate the meaning of the query, further helping proactive information retrieval.
abstract_zh: 从用户历史记录中提取有用信息以清楚地了解信息需求是主动信息检索系统的重要特征。在理解信息和相关性方面，维基百科可以提供智能系统所需的背景知识。这项工作探讨了如何利用维基百科概念利用查询上下文来改进对嘈杂文本的主动信息检索。我们制定了两个模型，使用实体链接将维基百科主题与相关性模型相关联。我们围绕播客片段检索任务进行的实验表明，维基百科概念中存在明显的相关性信号，而排名模型可以通过合并它们来提高精度。我们还发现将查询的背景上下文维基化可以帮助消除查询含义的歧义，进一步帮助主动进行信息检索。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用维基百科概念提升噪声文本中的主动信息检索效果。
AI.motivation: 噪声文本中用户需求理解困难，而维基百科能提供背景知识辅助智能系统理解信息相关性。
AI.method: 构建两种基于实体链接的模型，将维基百科主题与相关性模型结合，并通过播客片段检索任务验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明引入维基百科概念可提升排序模型精度，并有助于查询语义消歧。
AI.conclusion: 利用维基百科概念通过实体链接增强主动信息检索，在噪声文本场景下具有显著效果。

authors_text: Zhengyang Yu,Jochen Triesch
title: Sequence and Circle: Exploring the Relationship Between Patches
title_zh: 序列和圆：探索补丁之间的关系
abstract: The vision transformer (ViT) has achieved state-of-the-art results in various vision tasks. It utilizes a learnable position embedding (PE) mechanism to encode the location of each image patch. However, it is presently unclear if this learnable PE is really necessary and what its benefits are. This paper explores two alternative ways of encoding the location of individual patches that exploit prior knowledge about their spatial arrangement. One is called the sequence relationship embedding (SRE), and the other is called the circle relationship embedding (CRE). Among them, the SRE considers all patches to be in order, and adjacent patches have the same interval distance. The CRE considers the central patch as the center of the circle and measures the distance of the remaining patches from the center based on the four neighborhoods principle. Multiple concentric circles with different radii combine different patches. Finally, we implemented these two relations on three classic ViTs and tested them on four popular datasets. Experiments show that SRE and CRE can replace PE to reduce the random learnable parameters while achieving the same performance. Combining SRE or CRE with PE gets better performance than only using PE.
summary: The vision transformer (ViT) has achieved state-of-the-art results in various vision tasks. It utilizes a learnable position embedding (PE) mechanism to encode the location of each image patch. However, it is presently unclear if this learnable PE is really necessary and what its benefits are. This paper explores two alternative ways of encoding the location of individual patches that exploit prior knowledge about their spatial arrangement. One is called the sequence relationship embedding (SRE), and the other is called the circle relationship embedding (CRE). Among them, the SRE considers all patches to be in order, and adjacent patches have the same interval distance. The CRE considers the central patch as the center of the circle and measures the distance of the remaining patches from the center based on the four neighborhoods principle. Multiple concentric circles with different radii combine different patches. Finally, we implemented these two relations on three classic ViTs and tested them on four popular datasets. Experiments show that SRE and CRE can replace PE to reduce the random learnable parameters while achieving the same performance. Combining SRE or CRE with PE gets better performance than only using PE.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器（ViT）在各种视觉任务中取得了最先进的结果。它利用可学习的位置嵌入（PE）机制来编码每个图像块的位置。然而，目前尚不清楚这种可学习的 PE 是否真的有必要以及它的好处是什么。本文探讨了两种编码单个斑块位置的替代方法，这些方法利用了有关其空间排列的先验知识。一种称为序列关系嵌入（SRE），另一种称为循环关系嵌入（CRE）。其中，SRE认为所有的patch都是有序的，相邻的patch具有相同的间隔距离。 CRE将中心斑块视为圆的中心，并根据四邻域原则测量其余斑块距中心的距离。多个不同半径的同心圆组合不同的面片。最后，我们在三个经典 ViT 上实现了这两种关系，并在四个流行数据集上进行了测试。实验表明，SRE和CRE可以替代PE，在达到相同性能的情况下减少随机可学习参数。将 SRE 或 CRE 与 PE 结合使用比仅使用 PE 可以获得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了两种替代可学习位置嵌入（PE）的方法，即序列关系嵌入（SRE）和环形关系嵌入（CRE），以在视觉Transformer（ViT）中编码图像块的空间关系。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT通过可学习PE取得了优异性能，但其必要性及优势尚不明确。本文旨在探索利用先验空间知识的替代方案，以减少随机参数并保持性能。
AI.method: 提出SRE（基于顺序关系的等距编码）和CRE（基于环形邻域的中心距离编码）两种方法，并在三种经典ViT模型和四个数据集上进行实验验证。
AI.result: SRE和CRE可替代PE实现相同性能，且与PE结合时性能更优，表明其能有效减少参数量并提升模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用空间先验知识设计的SRE和CRE可有效替代ViT中的可学习PE，在保持性能的同时提升效率，为位置编码提供了新思路。

search_text: Sequence and Circle: Exploring the Relationship Between Patches 序列和圆：探索补丁之间的关系 The vision transformer (ViT) has achieved state-of-the-art results in various vision tasks. It utilizes a learnable position embedding (PE) mechanism to encode the location of each image patch. However, it is presently unclear if this learnable PE is really necessary and what its benefits are. This paper explores two alternative ways of encoding the location of individual patches that exploit prior knowledge about their spatial arrangement. One is called the sequence relationship embedding (SRE), and the other is called the circle relationship embedding (CRE). Among them, the SRE considers all patches to be in order, and adjacent patches have the same interval distance. The CRE considers the central patch as the center of the circle and measures the distance of the remaining patches from the center based on the four neighborhoods principle. Multiple concentric circles with different radii combine different patches. Finally, we implemented these two relations on three classic ViTs and tested them on four popular datasets. Experiments show that SRE and CRE can replace PE to reduce the random learnable parameters while achieving the same performance. Combining SRE or CRE with PE gets better performance than only using PE. 视觉转换器（ViT）在各种视觉任务中取得了最先进的结果。它利用可学习的位置嵌入（PE）机制来编码每个图像块的位置。然而，目前尚不清楚这种可学习的 PE 是否真的有必要以及它的好处是什么。本文探讨了两种编码单个斑块位置的替代方法，这些方法利用了有关其空间排列的先验知识。一种称为序列关系嵌入（SRE），另一种称为循环关系嵌入（CRE）。其中，SRE认为所有的patch都是有序的，相邻的patch具有相同的间隔距离。 CRE将中心斑块视为圆的中心，并根据四邻域原则测量其余斑块距中心的距离。多个不同半径的同心圆组合不同的面片。最后，我们在三个经典 ViT 上实现了这两种关系，并在四个流行数据集上进行了测试。实验表明，SRE和CRE可以替代PE，在达到相同性能的情况下减少随机可学习参数。将 SRE 或 CRE 与 PE 结合使用比仅使用 PE 可以获得更好的性能。 本文探讨了两种替代可学习位置嵌入（PE）的方法，即序列关系嵌入（SRE）和环形关系嵌入（CRE），以在视觉Transformer（ViT）中编码图像块的空间关系。 Zhengyang Yu,Jochen Triesch cs.CV

authors_text: Sravanti Addepalli,Kaushal Bhogale,Priyam Dey,R. Venkatesh Babu
title: Towards Efficient and Effective Self-Supervised Learning of Visual Representations
title_zh: 迈向高效且有效的视觉表征自我监督学习
abstract: Self-supervision has emerged as a propitious method for visual representation learning after the recent paradigm shift from handcrafted pretext tasks to instance-similarity based approaches. Most state-of-the-art methods enforce similarity between various augmentations of a given image, while some methods additionally use contrastive approaches to explicitly ensure diverse representations. While these approaches have indeed shown promising direction, they require a significantly larger number of training iterations when compared to the supervised counterparts. In this work, we explore reasons for the slow convergence of these methods, and further propose to strengthen them using well-posed auxiliary tasks that converge significantly faster, and are also useful for representation learning. The proposed method utilizes the task of rotation prediction to improve the efficiency of existing state-of-the-art methods. We demonstrate significant gains in performance using the proposed method on multiple datasets, specifically for lower training epochs.
summary: Self-supervision has emerged as a propitious method for visual representation learning after the recent paradigm shift from handcrafted pretext tasks to instance-similarity based approaches. Most state-of-the-art methods enforce similarity between various augmentations of a given image, while some methods additionally use contrastive approaches to explicitly ensure diverse representations. While these approaches have indeed shown promising direction, they require a significantly larger number of training iterations when compared to the supervised counterparts. In this work, we explore reasons for the slow convergence of these methods, and further propose to strengthen them using well-posed auxiliary tasks that converge significantly faster, and are also useful for representation learning. The proposed method utilizes the task of rotation prediction to improve the efficiency of existing state-of-the-art methods. We demonstrate significant gains in performance using the proposed method on multiple datasets, specifically for lower training epochs.
abstract_zh: 在最近的范式从手工设计的借口任务转向基于实例相似性的方法之后，自我监督已成为视觉表示学习的一种有利方法。大多数最先进的方法都强制给定图像的各种增强之间的相似性，而某些方法还使用对比方法来明确确保多样化的表示。虽然这些方法确实显示出了有希望的方向，但与监督方法相比，它们需要大量的训练迭代。在这项工作中，我们探讨了这些方法收敛缓慢的原因，并进一步建议使用适定的辅助任务来加强它们，这些任务收敛速度明显更快，并且对于表示学习也很有用。所提出的方法利用旋转预测任务来提高现有最先进方法的效率。我们在多个数据集上使用所提出的方法证明了性能的显着提高，特别是对于较低的训练时期。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效且有效的自监督视觉表征学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法收敛速度慢，需要更多训练次数，因此需要更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入旋转预测任务作为辅助任务，加速自监督学习的收敛过程。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，尤其在较低训练轮次下，性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 辅助任务能有效提升自监督学习效率，为视觉表征学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Sravanti Addepalli,Samyak Jain,Gaurang Sriramanan,R. Venkatesh Babu
title: Scaling Adversarial Training to Large Perturbation Bounds
title_zh: 将对抗训练扩展到大扰动范围
abstract: The vulnerability of Deep Neural Networks to Adversarial Attacks has fuelled research towards building robust models. While most Adversarial Training algorithms aim at defending attacks constrained within low magnitude Lp norm bounds, real-world adversaries are not limited by such constraints. In this work, we aim to achieve adversarial robustness within larger bounds, against perturbations that may be perceptible, but do not change human (or Oracle) prediction. The presence of images that flip Oracle predictions and those that do not makes this a challenging setting for adversarial robustness. We discuss the ideal goals of an adversarial defense algorithm beyond perceptual limits, and further highlight the shortcomings of naively extending existing training algorithms to higher perturbation bounds. In order to overcome these shortcomings, we propose a novel defense, Oracle-Aligned Adversarial Training (OA-AT), to align the predictions of the network with that of an Oracle during adversarial training. The proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance at large epsilon bounds (such as an L-inf bound of 16/255 on CIFAR-10) while outperforming existing defenses (AWP, TRADES, PGD-AT) at standard bounds (8/255) as well.
summary: The vulnerability of Deep Neural Networks to Adversarial Attacks has fuelled research towards building robust models. While most Adversarial Training algorithms aim at defending attacks constrained within low magnitude Lp norm bounds, real-world adversaries are not limited by such constraints. In this work, we aim to achieve adversarial robustness within larger bounds, against perturbations that may be perceptible, but do not change human (or Oracle) prediction. The presence of images that flip Oracle predictions and those that do not makes this a challenging setting for adversarial robustness. We discuss the ideal goals of an adversarial defense algorithm beyond perceptual limits, and further highlight the shortcomings of naively extending existing training algorithms to higher perturbation bounds. In order to overcome these shortcomings, we propose a novel defense, Oracle-Aligned Adversarial Training (OA-AT), to align the predictions of the network with that of an Oracle during adversarial training. The proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance at large epsilon bounds (such as an L-inf bound of 16/255 on CIFAR-10) while outperforming existing defenses (AWP, TRADES, PGD-AT) at standard bounds (8/255) as well.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络面对对抗性攻击的脆弱性推动了构建稳健模型的研究。虽然大多数对抗训练算法旨在防御限制在低幅度 Lp 范数范围内的攻击，但现实世界的对手并不受此类限制的限制。在这项工作中，我们的目标是在更大的范围内实现对抗鲁棒性，对抗可能可感知的扰动，但不改变人类（或预言机）的预测。翻转预言机预测的图像和不翻转预言机预测的图像的存在使得这对于对抗鲁棒性来说是一个具有挑战性的设置。我们讨论了超越感知极限的对抗性防御算法的理想目标，并进一步强调了将现有训练算法简单地扩展到更高扰动范围的缺点。为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了一种新颖的防御方法，即预言机对齐对抗训练（OA-AT），以在对抗训练期间将网络的预测与预言机的预测保持一致。所提出的方法在大 epsilon 边界（例如 CIFAR-10 上的 L-inf 边界为 16/255）上实现了最先进的性能，同时在标准边界 (8/255) 上也优于现有防御（AWP、TRADES、PGD-AT）。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过扩展对抗训练方法，提升深度神经网络在大扰动范围内的对抗鲁棒性，同时保持人类或Oracle预测不变。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练算法主要针对小幅度Lp范数扰动，但现实场景中攻击者可能施加更大扰动且不改变人类判断，需突破传统方法限制以应对更复杂威胁。
AI.method: 提出Oracle-Aligned Adversarial Training (OA-AT)方法，在对抗训练中强制对齐模型预测与Oracle预测，通过动态调整损失函数实现鲁棒性提升。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，OA-AT在L-inf扰动界16/255下达到SOTA性能，且在标准8/255界下优于AWP、TRADES等现有防御方法。
AI.conclusion: OA-AT通过引入Oracle对齐机制有效解决了大扰动对抗训练难题，为构建更安全的深度学习系统提供了新思路。

In this work, we aim to achieve adversarial robustness within larger bounds, against perturbations that may be perceptible, but do not change human (or Oracle) prediction. The presence of images that flip Oracle predictions and those that do not makes this a challenging setting for adversarial robustness. We discuss the ideal goals of an adversarial defense algorithm beyond perceptual limits, and further highlight the shortcomings of naively extending existing training algorithms to higher perturbation bounds. In order to overcome these shortcomings, we propose a novel defense, Oracle-Aligned Adversarial Training (OA-AT), to align the predictions of the network with that of an Oracle during adversarial training. The proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art performance at large epsilon bounds (such as an L-inf bound of 16/255 on CIFAR-10) while outperforming existing defenses (AWP, TRADES, PGD-AT) at standard bounds (8/255) as well. 深度神经网络面对对抗性攻击的脆弱性推动了构建稳健模型的研究。虽然大多数对抗训练算法旨在防御限制在低幅度 Lp 范数范围内的攻击，但现实世界的对手并不受此类限制的限制。在这项工作中，我们的目标是在更大的范围内实现对抗鲁棒性，对抗可能可感知的扰动，但不改变人类（或预言机）的预测。翻转预言机预测的图像和不翻转预言机预测的图像的存在使得这对于对抗鲁棒性来说是一个具有挑战性的设置。我们讨论了超越感知极限的对抗性防御算法的理想目标，并进一步强调了将现有训练算法简单地扩展到更高扰动范围的缺点。为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了一种新颖的防御方法，即预言机对齐对抗训练（OA-AT），以在对抗训练期间将网络的预测与预言机的预测保持一致。所提出的方法在大 epsilon 边界（例如 CIFAR-10 上的 L-inf 边界为 16/255）上实现了最先进的性能，同时在标准边界 (8/255) 上也优于现有防御（AWP、TRADES、PGD-AT）。 本文旨在通过扩展对抗训练方法，提升深度神经网络在大扰动范围内的对抗鲁棒性，同时保持人类或Oracle预测不变。 Sravanti Addepalli,Samyak Jain,Gaurang Sriramanan,R. Venkatesh Babu cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Yu Yuan,Jiaqi Wu,Zhongliang Jing,Henry Leung,Han Pan
title: Multimodal Image Fusion based on Hybrid CNN-Transformer and Non-local Cross-modal Attention
title_zh: 基于混合 CNN-Transformer 和非局部跨模态注意力的多模态图像融合
abstract: The fusion of images taken by heterogeneous sensors helps to enrich the information and improve the quality of imaging. In this article, we present a hybrid model consisting of a convolutional encoder and a Transformer-based decoder to fuse multimodal images. In the encoder, a non-local cross-modal attention block is proposed to capture both local and global dependencies of multiple source images. A branch fusion module is designed to adaptively fuse the features of the two branches. We embed a Transformer module with linear complexity in the decoder to enhance the reconstruction capability of the proposed network. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method by comparing it with existing state-of-the-art fusion models. The source code of our work is available at https://github.com/pandayuanyu/HCFusion.
summary: The fusion of images taken by heterogeneous sensors helps to enrich the information and improve the quality of imaging. In this article, we present a hybrid model consisting of a convolutional encoder and a Transformer-based decoder to fuse multimodal images. In the encoder, a non-local cross-modal attention block is proposed to capture both local and global dependencies of multiple source images. A branch fusion module is designed to adaptively fuse the features of the two branches. We embed a Transformer module with linear complexity in the decoder to enhance the reconstruction capability of the proposed network. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method by comparing it with existing state-of-the-art fusion models. The source code of our work is available at https://github.com/pandayuanyu/HCFusion.
abstract_zh: 异构传感器拍摄的图像融合有助于丰富信息并提高成像质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种由卷积编码器和基于 Transformer 的解码器组成的混合模型，用于融合多模态图像。在编码器中，提出了非局部跨模态注意块来捕获多个源图像的局部和全局依赖性。分支融合模块被设计为自适应地融合两个分支的特征。我们在解码器中嵌入了具有线性复杂度的 Transformer 模块，以增强所提出网络的重建能力。通过与现有最先进的融合模型进行比较，定性和定量实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。我们工作的源代码可在 https://github.com/pandayuanyu/HCFusion 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合CNN-Transformer架构和非局部跨模态注意力机制的多模态图像融合方法，旨在提升异源传感器图像的融合质量。
AI.motivation: 现有图像融合方法在捕捉多源图像的局部-全局依赖关系及跨模态特征交互方面存在局限性，需设计更高效的特征融合机制。
AI.method: 构建包含卷积编码器与Transformer解码器的混合网络，编码器引入非局部跨模态注意力块提取多尺度依赖关系，通过分支融合模块自适应整合双分支特征，解码器嵌入线性复杂度Transformer增强重建能力。
AI.result: 在定性和定量实验中，该方法较现有先进模型表现出更优的融合效果，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过创新性网络结构有效提升了多模态图像融合性能，验证了非局部跨模态注意力与混合架构的有效性。

authors_text: Aryan Garg,Renu M. Rameshan
title: G-PECNet: Towards a Generalizable Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction System
title_zh: G-PECNet：迈向可推广的行人轨迹预测系统
abstract: Navigating dynamic physical environments without obstructing or damaging human assets is of quintessential importance for social robots. In this work, we solve autonomous drone navigation's sub-problem of predicting out-of-domain human and agent trajectories using a deep generative model. Our method: General-PECNet or G-PECNet observes an improvement of 9.5\% on the Final Displacement Error (FDE) on 2020's benchmark: PECNet through a combination of architectural improvements inspired by periodic activation functions and synthetic trajectory (data) augmentations using Hidden Markov Models (HMMs) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). Additionally, we propose a simple geometry-inspired metric for trajectory non-linearity and outlier detection, helpful for the task. Code available at https://github.com/Aryan-Garg/PECNet-Pedestrian-Trajectory-Prediction.git
summary: Navigating dynamic physical environments without obstructing or damaging human assets is of quintessential importance for social robots. In this work, we solve autonomous drone navigation's sub-problem of predicting out-of-domain human and agent trajectories using a deep generative model. Our method: General-PECNet or G-PECNet observes an improvement of 9.5\% on the Final Displacement Error (FDE) on 2020's benchmark: PECNet through a combination of architectural improvements inspired by periodic activation functions and synthetic trajectory (data) augmentations using Hidden Markov Models (HMMs) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). Additionally, we propose a simple geometry-inspired metric for trajectory non-linearity and outlier detection, helpful for the task. Code available at https://github.com/Aryan-Garg/PECNet-Pedestrian-Trajectory-Prediction.git
abstract_zh: 对于社交机器人来说，在动态的物理环境中导航而不妨碍或损害人力资产至关重要。在这项工作中，我们解决了自主无人机导航的子问题，即使用深度生成模型预测域外人类和代理轨迹。我们的方法：General-PECNet 或 G-PECNet 在 2020 年的基准上观察到最终位移误差 (FDE) 提高了 9.5\%：PECNet 通过结合受周期性激活函数启发的架构改进和使用隐马尔可夫模型 (HMM) 和强化学习 (RL) 的合成轨迹（数据）增强。此外，我们提出了一种简单的几何启发度量，用于轨迹非线性和异常值检测，对完成任务很有帮助。代码可在 https://github.com/Aryan-Garg/PECNet-Pedestrian-Trajectory-Prediction.git 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出G-PECNet模型，通过改进架构和数据增强方法，提升行人轨迹预测的泛化能力，用于自主无人机导航。
AI.motivation: 社交机器人需在动态环境中避免阻碍人类资产，而现有方法在预测领域外轨迹时表现不足，需提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 结合周期性激活函数改进模型架构，利用HMM和强化学习生成合成轨迹数据，并提出几何启发的非线性度量与异常检测方法。
AI.result: 在PECNet基准测试中，最终位移误差(FDE)指标相较原方法提升9.5%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: G-PECNet通过架构优化与数据增强有效提升了轨迹预测性能，为通用化预测任务提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Azzam Habib
title: Performance evaluation of approximation algorithms for the minimum size 2-vertex strongly connected subgraph problem
title_zh: 最小尺寸2顶点强连通子图问题的逼近算法的性能评估
abstract: Jaberi [7] presented approximation algorithms for the problem of computing a minimum size 2-vertex strongly biconnected subgraph in directed graphs. We have implemented approximation algorithms presented in [7] and we have tested the implementation on some graphs. The experimental results show that these algorithms work well in practice.
summary: Jaberi [7] presented approximation algorithms for the problem of computing a minimum size 2-vertex strongly biconnected subgraph in directed graphs. We have implemented approximation algorithms presented in [7] and we have tested the implementation on some graphs. The experimental results show that these algorithms work well in practice.
abstract_zh: Jaberi [7] 提出了用于计算有向图中最小尺寸 2 顶点强双连通子图问题的近似算法。我们已经实现了[7]中提出的近似算法，并在一些图上测试了该实现。实验结果表明这些算法在实际中效果良好。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了用于计算有向图中最小大小2-顶点强连通子图的近似算法的性能。
AI.motivation: Jaberi 提出了一种用于计算有向图中最小大小2-顶点强双连通子图的近似算法，该论文旨在验证这些算法在实际中的表现。
AI.method: 论文实现了 Jaberi 提出的近似算法，并在一些图上进行了测试。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，这些算法在实践中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: Jaberi 提出的近似算法在实际应用中具有良好的性能，值得进一步研究和应用。

We have implemented approximation algorithms presented in [7] and we have tested the implementation on some graphs. The experimental results show that these algorithms work well in practice. Jaberi [7] 提出了用于计算有向图中最小尺寸 2 顶点强双连通子图问题的近似算法。我们已经实现了[7]中提出的近似算法，并在一些图上测试了该实现。实验结果表明这些算法在实际中效果良好。 该论文评估了用于计算有向图中最小大小2-顶点强连通子图的近似算法的性能。 Azzam Habib cs.DS

authors_text: Emanuele Maiorana,Chiara Romano,Emiliano Schena,Carlo Massaroni
title: BIOWISH: Biometric Recognition using Wearable Inertial Sensors detecting Heart Activity
title_zh: BIOWISH：使用可穿戴惯性传感器检测心脏活动进行生物识别
abstract: Wearable devices are increasingly used, thanks to the wide set of applications that can be deployed exploiting their ability to monitor physical activity and health-related parameters. Their usage has been recently proposed to perform biometric recognition, leveraging on the uniqueness of the recorded traits to generate discriminative identifiers. Most of the studies conducted on this topic have considered signals derived from cardiac activity, detecting it mainly using electrical measurements thorugh electrocardiography, or optical recordings employing photoplethysmography. In this paper we instead propose a BIOmetric recognition approach using Wearable Inertial Sensors detecting Heart activity (BIOWISH). In more detail, we investigate the feasibility of exploiting mechanical measurements obtained through seismocardiography and gyrocardiography to recognize a person. Several feature extractors and classifiers, including deep learning techniques relying on transfer learning and siamese training, are employed to derive distinctive characteristics from the considered signals, and differentiate between legitimate and impostor subjects. An multi-session database, comprising acquisitions taken from subjects performing different activities, is employed to perform experimental tests simulating a verification system. The obtained results testify that identifiers derived from measurements of chest vibrations, collected by wearable inertial sensors, could be employed to guarantee high recognition performance, even when considering short-time recordings.

Their usage has been recently proposed to perform biometric recognition, leveraging on the uniqueness of the recorded traits to generate discriminative identifiers. Most of the studies conducted on this topic have considered signals derived from cardiac activity, detecting it mainly using electrical measurements thorugh electrocardiography, or optical recordings employing photoplethysmography. In this paper we instead propose a BIOmetric recognition approach using Wearable Inertial Sensors detecting Heart activity (BIOWISH). In more detail, we investigate the feasibility of exploiting mechanical measurements obtained through seismocardiography and gyrocardiography to recognize a person. Several feature extractors and classifiers, including deep learning techniques relying on transfer learning and siamese training, are employed to derive distinctive characteristics from the considered signals, and differentiate between legitimate and impostor subjects. An multi-session database, comprising acquisitions taken from subjects performing different activities, is employed to perform experimental tests simulating a verification system. The obtained results testify that identifiers derived from measurements of chest vibrations, collected by wearable inertial sensors, could be employed to guarantee high recognition performance, even when considering short-time recordings.
abstract_zh: 可穿戴设备的使用越来越广泛，这得益于可利用其监测身体活动和健康相关参数的能力来部署广泛的应用程序。最近有人提议使用它们来执行生物识别，利用记录特征的唯一性来生成有区别的标识符。关于这个主题进行的大多数研究都考虑了源自心脏活动的信号，主要使用通过心电图的电测量或采用光电体积描记法的光学记录来检测它。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用可穿戴惯性传感器检测心脏活动（BIOWISH）的生物识别方法。更详细地说，我们研究了利用通过地震心动图和陀螺仪获得的机械测量来识别人的可行性。采用多种特征提取器和分类器，包括依赖于迁移学习和连体训练的深度学习技术，从所考虑的信号中得出独特的特征，并区分合法主体和冒充主体。多会话数据库包含从执行不同活动的受试者采集的数据，用于执行模拟验证系统的实验测试。获得的结果证明，即使在考虑短时间记录时，也可以利用可穿戴惯性传感器收集的胸部振动测量结果来保证高识别性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可穿戴惯性传感器检测心活动的生物识别方法（BIOWISH），利用机械测量替代传统电或光学方法进行身份验证。
AI.motivation: 现有生物识别研究多依赖心电图或光电容积描记法，而可穿戴惯性传感器通过机械测量（如心震图、陀螺心图）可更便捷地获取心活动数据，具有潜在应用优势。
AI.method: 采用心震图与陀螺心图获取胸部振动信号，结合特征提取器及深度学习分类器（迁移学习、孪生网络训练），基于多会话活动数据库验证短时记录的识别性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，通过可穿戴惯性传感器采集的胸部振动数据可实现高准确率的生物识别，即使在短时录音条件下亦表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 机械测量结合惯性传感器可有效用于生物识别，为可穿戴设备在身份验证场景提供可行方案。

authors_text: Ali Rohan
title: Deep Scattering Spectrum germaneness to Fault Detection and Diagnosis for Component-level Prognostics and Health Management (PHM)
title_zh: 深度散射光谱与组件级预测和健康管理 (PHM) 的故障检测和诊断的密切关系
abstract: In fault detection and diagnosis of prognostics and health management (PHM) systems, most of the methodologies utilize machine learning (ML) or deep learning (DL) through which either some features are extracted beforehand (in the case of ML) or filters are used to extract features autonomously (in case of DL) to perform the critical classification task. Particularly in the fault detection and diagnosis of industrial robots where electric current, vibration or acoustic emissions signals are the primary sources of information, a feature domain that can map the signals into their constituent components with compressed information at different levels can reduce the complexities and size of typical ML and DL-based frameworks. The Deep Scattering Spectrum (DSS) is one of the strategies that use the Wavelet Transform (WT) analogy to separate and extract the information encoded in a signal's various temporal and frequency domains. As a result, the focus of this work is on the study of the DSS's relevance to fault detection and daignosis for mechanical components of industrail robots. We used multiple industrial robots and distinct mechanical faults to build an approach for classifying the faults using low-variance features extracted from the input signals. The presented approach was implemented on the practical test benches and demonstrated satisfactory performance in fault detection and diagnosis for simple and complex classification problems with a classification accuracy of 99.7% and 88.1%, respectively.
summary: In fault detection and diagnosis of prognostics and health management (PHM) systems, most of the methodologies utilize machine learning (ML) or deep learning (DL) through which either some features are extracted beforehand (in the case of ML) or filters are used to extract features autonomously (in case of DL) to perform the critical classification task. Particularly in the fault detection and diagnosis of industrial robots where electric current, vibration or acoustic emissions signals are the primary sources of information, a feature domain that can map the signals into their constituent components with compressed information at different levels can reduce the complexities and size of typical ML and DL-based frameworks. The Deep Scattering Spectrum (DSS) is one of the strategies that use the Wavelet Transform (WT) analogy to separate and extract the information encoded in a signal's various temporal and frequency domains. As a result, the focus of this work is on the study of the DSS's relevance to fault detection and daignosis for mechanical components of industrail robots. We used multiple industrial robots and distinct mechanical faults to build an approach for classifying the faults using low-variance features extracted from the input signals. The presented approach was implemented on the practical test benches and demonstrated satisfactory performance in fault detection and diagnosis for simple and complex classification problems with a classification accuracy of 99.7% and 88.1%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在预测和健康管理 (PHM) 系统的故障检测和诊断中，大多数方法都利用机器学习 (ML) 或深度学习 (DL)，通过预先提取一些特征（在 ML 的情况下）或使用过滤器自主提取特征（在 DL 的情况下）来执行关键的分类任务。特别是在工业机器人的故障检测和诊断中，电流、振动或声发射信号是主要信息源，可以将信号映射到具有不同级别的压缩信息的组成部分的特征域可以降低典型的基于机器学习和深度学习的框架的复杂性和规模。深度散射谱 (DSS) 是使用小波变换 (WT) 类比来分离和提取信号的各个时域和频域中编码的信息的策略之一。因此，这项工作的重点是研究 DSS 与工业机器人机械部件故障检测和诊断的相关性。我们使用多个工业机器人和不同的机械故障来构建一种使用从输入信号中提取的低方差特征对故障进行分类的方法。该方法在实际测试台上实现，在简单和复杂分类问题的故障检测和诊断方面表现出令人满意的性能，分类准确率分别为99.7%和88.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度散射谱（DSS）在工业机器人机械部件故障检测与诊断中的应用，通过提取低方差特征实现高效分类。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习和深度学习方法在故障诊断中存在特征提取复杂、模型规模大的问题，需更高效的信号特征映射方法。
AI.method: 基于深度散射谱理论，利用类似小波变换的多尺度分析技术，从电流、振动等信号中提取多层级压缩特征进行故障分类。
AI.result: 在实际测试平台中，简单故障分类准确率达99.7%，复杂故障分类准确率为88.1%。
AI.conclusion: 深度散射谱能有效降低特征维度并保持诊断精度，为工业机器人PHM系统提供了一种高效可靠的故障分析方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究深度散射谱（DSS）在工业机器人机械部件故障检测与诊断中的应用，通过提取低方差特征实现高效分类。

authors_text: Guofeng Mei,Fabio Poiesi,Cristiano Saltori,Jian Zhang,Elisa Ricci,Nicu Sebe
title: Overlap-guided Gaussian Mixture Models for Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: 用于点云配准的重叠引导高斯混合模型
abstract: Probabilistic 3D point cloud registration methods have shown competitive performance in overcoming noise, outliers, and density variations. However, registering point cloud pairs in the case of partial overlap is still a challenge. This paper proposes a novel overlap-guided probabilistic registration approach that computes the optimal transformation from matched Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) parameters. We reformulate the registration problem as the problem of aligning two Gaussian mixtures such that a statistical discrepancy measure between the two corresponding mixtures is minimized. We introduce a Transformer-based detection module to detect overlapping regions, and represent the input point clouds using GMMs by guiding their alignment through overlap scores computed by this detection module. Experiments show that our method achieves superior registration accuracy and efficiency than state-of-the-art methods when handling point clouds with partial overlap and different densities on synthetic and real-world datasets. https://github.com/gfmei/ogmm
summary: Probabilistic 3D point cloud registration methods have shown competitive performance in overcoming noise, outliers, and density variations. However, registering point cloud pairs in the case of partial overlap is still a challenge. This paper proposes a novel overlap-guided probabilistic registration approach that computes the optimal transformation from matched Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) parameters. We reformulate the registration problem as the problem of aligning two Gaussian mixtures such that a statistical discrepancy measure between the two corresponding mixtures is minimized. We introduce a Transformer-based detection module to detect overlapping regions, and represent the input point clouds using GMMs by guiding their alignment through overlap scores computed by this detection module. Experiments show that our method achieves superior registration accuracy and efficiency than state-of-the-art methods when handling point clouds with partial overlap and different densities on synthetic and real-world datasets. https://github.com/gfmei/ogmm
abstract_zh: 概率 3D 点云配准方法在克服噪声、异常值和密度变化方面表现出具有竞争力的性能。然而，在部分重叠的情况下注册点云对仍然是一个挑战。本文提出了一种新颖的重叠引导概率配准方法，该方法根据匹配的高斯混合模型（GMM）参数计算最优变换。我们将配准问题重新表述为对齐两个高斯混合物的问题，以使两个相应混合物之间的统计差异度量最小化。我们引入了基于 Transformer 的检测模块来检测重叠区域，并通过该检测模块计算的重叠分数指导输入点云的对齐，从而使用 GMM 表示输入点云。实验表明，在处理合成数据集和真实数据集上部分重叠和不同密度的点云时，我们的方法比最先进的方法具有更高的配准精度和效率。 https://github.com/gfmei/ogmm

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于重叠区域引导的高斯混合模型（GMM）方法，用于解决点云配准中部分重叠和密度差异的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有概率方法在处理部分重叠点云时仍存在困难，需通过重叠区域信息提升配准精度。
AI.method: 引入Transformer检测模块识别重叠区域，利用重叠得分引导GMM参数对齐，并通过最小化混合分布统计差异实现配准。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，该方法在部分重叠和密度差异场景下均优于现有最先进方法，精度和效率更优。
AI.conclusion: 重叠引导的GMM配准方法能有效应对点云部分重叠与密度变化问题，为配准任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhizhong Huang,Junping Zhang,Hongming Shan
title: When Age-Invariant Face Recognition Meets Face Age Synthesis: A Multi-Task Learning Framework and A New Benchmark
title_zh: 当年龄不变人脸识别遇上人脸年龄合成：多任务学习框架和新基准
comment: TPAMI 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.01520
comments: TPAMI 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.01520
abstract: To minimize the impact of age variation on face recognition, age-invariant face recognition (AIFR) extracts identity-related discriminative features by minimizing the correlation between identity- and age-related features while face age synthesis (FAS) eliminates age variation by converting the faces in different age groups to the same group. However, AIFR lacks visual results for model interpretation and FAS compromises downstream recognition due to artifacts. Therefore, we propose a unified, multi-task framework to jointly handle these two tasks, termed MTLFace, which can learn the age-invariant identity-related representation for face recognition while achieving pleasing face synthesis for model interpretation. Specifically, we propose an attention-based feature decomposition to decompose the mixed face features into two uncorrelated components -- identity- and age-related features -- in a spatially constrained way. Unlike the conventional one-hot encoding that achieves group-level FAS, we propose a novel identity conditional module to achieve identity-level FAS, which can improve the age smoothness of synthesized faces through a weight-sharing strategy. Benefiting from the proposed multi-task framework, we then leverage those high-quality synthesized faces from FAS to further boost AIFR via a novel selective fine-tuning strategy. Furthermore, to advance both AIFR and FAS, we collect and release a large cross-age face dataset with age and gender annotations, and a new benchmark specifically designed for tracing long-missing children. Extensive experimental results on five benchmark cross-age datasets demonstrate that MTLFace yields superior performance for both AIFR and FAS. We further validate MTLFace on two popular general face recognition datasets, obtaining competitive performance on face recognition in the wild. Code is available at http://hzzone.github.io/MTLFace.

However, AIFR lacks visual results for model interpretation and FAS compromises downstream recognition due to artifacts. Therefore, we propose a unified, multi-task framework to jointly handle these two tasks, termed MTLFace, which can learn the age-invariant identity-related representation for face recognition while achieving pleasing face synthesis for model interpretation. Specifically, we propose an attention-based feature decomposition to decompose the mixed face features into two uncorrelated components -- identity- and age-related features -- in a spatially constrained way. Unlike the conventional one-hot encoding that achieves group-level FAS, we propose a novel identity conditional module to achieve identity-level FAS, which can improve the age smoothness of synthesized faces through a weight-sharing strategy. Benefiting from the proposed multi-task framework, we then leverage those high-quality synthesized faces from FAS to further boost AIFR via a novel selective fine-tuning strategy. Furthermore, to advance both AIFR and FAS, we collect and release a large cross-age face dataset with age and gender annotations, and a new benchmark specifically designed for tracing long-missing children. Extensive experimental results on five benchmark cross-age datasets demonstrate that MTLFace yields superior performance for both AIFR and FAS. We further validate MTLFace on two popular general face recognition datasets, obtaining competitive performance on face recognition in the wild. Code is available at http://hzzone.github.io/MTLFace.
abstract_zh: 为了最大限度地减少年龄变化对人脸识别的影响，年龄不变人脸识别（AIFR）通过最小化身份和年龄相关特征之间的相关性来提取身份相关的判别特征，而人脸年龄合成（FAS）通过将不同年龄组的人脸转换为同一组来消除年龄变化。然而，AIFR 缺乏模型解释的视觉结果，而 FAS 由于伪影而损害了下游识别。因此，我们提出了一个统一的多任务框架来共同处理这两个任务，称为 MTLFace，它可以学习用于人脸识别的年龄不变的身份相关表示，同时实现用于模型解释的令人愉悦的人脸合成。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于注意力的特征分解，以空间受限的方式将混合面部特征分解为两个不相关的成分——身份和年龄相关的特征。与实现群体级FAS的传统one-hot编码不同，我们提出了一种新颖的身份条件模块来实现身份级FAS，它可以通过权重共享策略提高合成人脸的年龄平滑度。受益于所提出的多任务框架，我们然后利用 FAS 中的高质量合成面孔，通过新颖的选择性微调策略进一步提高 AIFR。此外，为了推进 AIFR 和 FAS，我们收集并发布了一个包含年龄和性别注释的大型跨年龄人脸数据集，以及专门为追踪长期失踪儿童而设计的新基准。对五个基准跨年龄数据集的广泛实验结果表明，MTLFace 在 AIFR 和 FAS 方面均具有卓越的性能。我们进一步在两个流行的通用人脸识别数据集上验证 MTLFace，在野外人脸识别方面获得有竞争力的性能。代码可在 http://hzzone.github.io/MTLFace 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多任务学习框架MTLFace，结合年龄不变人脸识别（AIFR）与人脸年龄合成（FAS），通过联合优化提升模型性能并解决可视化解释问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AIFR缺乏可视化结果，FAS因伪影影响下游识别，需联合优化两者以提升模型解释性与识别效果。
AI.method: 设计注意力机制分解身份与年龄特征，提出身份条件模块实现细粒度年龄合成，并通过选择性微调策略利用合成数据增强AIFR，同时构建跨年龄数据集与新基准。
AI.result: 在五个跨年龄数据集及两个通用人脸识别数据集上均取得优越性能，合成图像质量与识别准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MTLFace通过多任务联合学习有效解决了年龄变化对人脸识别的影响，为AIFR与FAS研究提供了新框架与基准数据集。

authors_text: Thomas Duboudin,Emmanuel Dellandréa,Corentin Abgrall,Gilles Hénaff,Liming Chen
title: Learning Less Generalizable Patterns with an Asymmetrically Trained Double Classifier for Better Test-Time Adaptation
title_zh: 使用不对称训练的双分类器学习不太通用的模式，以实现更好的测试时间适应
abstract: Deep neural networks often fail to generalize outside of their training distribution, in particular when only a single data domain is available during training. While test-time adaptation has yielded encouraging results in this setting, we argue that, to reach further improvements, these approaches should be combined with training procedure modifications aiming to learn a more diverse set of patterns. Indeed, test-time adaptation methods usually have to rely on a limited representation because of the shortcut learning phenomenon: only a subset of the available predictive patterns is learned with standard training. In this paper, we first show that the combined use of existing training-time strategies, and test-time batch normalization, a simple adaptation method, does not always improve upon the test-time adaptation alone on the PACS benchmark. Furthermore, experiments on Office-Home show that very few training-time methods improve upon standard training, with or without test-time batch normalization. We therefore propose a novel approach using a pair of classifiers and a shortcut patterns avoidance loss that mitigates the shortcut learning behavior by reducing the generalization ability of the secondary classifier, using the additional shortcut patterns avoidance loss that encourages the learning of samples specific patterns. The primary classifier is trained normally, resulting in the learning of both the natural and the more complex, less generalizable, features. Our experiments show that our method improves upon the state-of-the-art results on both benchmarks and benefits the most to test-time batch normalization.
summary: Deep neural networks often fail to generalize outside of their training distribution, in particular when only a single data domain is available during training. While test-time adaptation has yielded encouraging results in this setting, we argue that, to reach further improvements, these approaches should be combined with training procedure modifications aiming to learn a more diverse set of patterns. Indeed, test-time adaptation methods usually have to rely on a limited representation because of the shortcut learning phenomenon: only a subset of the available predictive patterns is learned with standard training. In this paper, we first show that the combined use of existing training-time strategies, and test-time batch normalization, a simple adaptation method, does not always improve upon the test-time adaptation alone on the PACS benchmark. Furthermore, experiments on Office-Home show that very few training-time methods improve upon standard training, with or without test-time batch normalization. We therefore propose a novel approach using a pair of classifiers and a shortcut patterns avoidance loss that mitigates the shortcut learning behavior by reducing the generalization ability of the secondary classifier, using the additional shortcut patterns avoidance loss that encourages the learning of samples specific patterns. The primary classifier is trained normally, resulting in the learning of both the natural and the more complex, less generalizable, features. Our experiments show that our method improves upon the state-of-the-art results on both benchmarks and benefits the most to test-time batch normalization.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络通常无法在其训练分布之外进行泛化，特别是当训练期间只有单个数据域可用时。虽然测试时间适应在这种情况下取​​得了令人鼓舞的结果，但我们认为，为了实现进一步的改进，这些方法应该与旨在学习更多样化模式的训练程序修改相结合。事实上，由于捷径学习现象，测试时适应方法通常必须依赖于有限的表示：通过标准训练只能学习到可用预测模式的子集。在本文中，我们首先表明，结合使用现有的训练时间策略和测试时间批量归一化（一种简单的适应方法）并不总能在 PACS 基准上优于单独的测试时间适应。此外，Office-Home 上的实验表明，无论有或没有测试时间批量归一化，很少有训练时间方法能够比标准训练有所改进。因此，我们提出了一种使用一对分类器和快捷模式避免损失的新颖方法，该方法通过降低二级分类器的泛化能力来减轻快捷学习行为，并使用额外的快捷模式避免损失来鼓励学习样本特定模式。主要分类器经过正常训练，从而学习自然特征和更复杂、不易概括的特征。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在两个基准测试中都改进了最先进的结果，并且对测试时批量标准化有最大的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用不对称训练的双分类器方法，通过学习更少泛化的模式来提升测试时的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在训练分布外的泛化能力不足，尤其当仅有一个数据域时。现有测试时适应方法因快捷学习现象依赖有限的表示，难以充分利用多样化的预测模式。
AI.method: 设计包含主分类器和次分类器的双分类器结构，主分类器正常训练以学习自然和复杂特征，次分类器通过引入快捷模式避免损失降低泛化能力，强制模型学习特定样本模式。
AI.result: 在PACS和Office-Home基准测试中，该方法优于现有方法，尤其在结合测试时批量归一化时效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 通过双分类器结构和损失设计，模型能有效学习多样化模式，缓解快捷学习问题，为域适应提供新思路。
