search_text: Learning Less Generalizable Patterns with an Asymmetrically Trained Double Classifier for Better Test-Time Adaptation 使用不对称训练的双分类器学习不太通用的模式，以实现更好的测试时间适应 Deep neural networks often fail to generalize outside of their training distribution, in particular when only a single data domain is available during training. While test-time adaptation has yielded encouraging results in this setting, we argue that, to reach further improvements, these approaches should be combined with training procedure modifications aiming to learn a more diverse set of patterns. Indeed, test-time adaptation methods usually have to rely on a limited representation because of the shortcut learning phenomenon: only a subset of the available predictive patterns is learned with standard training. In this paper, we first show that the combined use of existing training-time strategies, and test-time batch normalization, a simple adaptation method, does not always improve upon the test-time adaptation alone on the PACS benchmark. Furthermore, experiments on Office-Home show that very few training-time methods improve upon standard training, with or without test-time batch normalization. We therefore propose a novel approach using a pair of classifiers and a shortcut patterns avoidance loss that mitigates the shortcut learning behavior by reducing the generalization ability of the secondary classifier, using the additional shortcut patterns avoidance loss that encourages the learning of samples specific patterns. The primary classifier is trained normally, resulting in the learning of both the natural and the more complex, less generalizable, features. Our experiments show that our method improves upon the state-of-the-art results on both benchmarks and benefits the most to test-time batch normalization. 深度神经网络通常无法在其训练分布之外进行泛化，特别是当训练期间只有单个数据域可用时。虽然测试时间适应在这种情况下取​​得了令人鼓舞的结果，但我们认为，为了实现进一步的改进，这些方法应该与旨在学习更多样化模式的训练程序修改相结合。事实上，由于捷径学习现象，测试时适应方法通常必须依赖于有限的表示：通过标准训练只能学习到可用预测模式的子集。在本文中，我们首先表明，结合使用现有的训练时间策略和测试时间批量归一化（一种简单的适应方法）并不总能在 PACS 基准上优于单独的测试时间适应。此外，Office-Home 上的实验表明，无论有或没有测试时间批量归一化，很少有训练时间方法能够比标准训练有所改进。因此，我们提出了一种使用一对分类器和快捷模式避免损失的新颖方法，该方法通过降低二级分类器的泛化能力来减轻快捷学习行为，并使用额外的快捷模式避免损失来鼓励学习样本特定模式。主要分类器经过正常训练，从而学习自然特征和更复杂、不易概括的特征。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在两个基准测试中都改进了最先进的结果，并且对测试时批量标准化有最大的好处。 本文提出了一种使用不对称训练的双分类器方法，通过学习更少泛化的模式来提升测试时的适应能力。 Thomas Duboudin,Emmanuel Dellandréa,Corentin Abgrall,Gilles Hénaff,Liming Chen cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Mara Pistellato,Filippo Bergamasco
title: On-the-go Reflectance Transformation Imaging with Ordinary Smartphones
title_zh: 使用普通智能手机进行移动反射变换成像
comment: VISART VI - Workshop at the European Conference of Computer Vision (ECCV)
comments: VISART VI - Workshop at the European Conference of Computer Vision (ECCV)
abstract: Reflectance Transformation Imaging (RTI) is a popular technique that allows the recovery of per-pixel reflectance information by capturing an object under different light conditions. This can be later used to reveal surface details and interactively relight the subject. Such process, however, typically requires dedicated hardware setups to recover the light direction from multiple locations, making the process tedious when performed outside the lab. We propose a novel RTI method that can be carried out by recording videos with two ordinary smartphones. The flash led-light of one device is used to illuminate the subject while the other captures the reflectance. Since the led is mounted close to the camera lenses, we can infer the light direction for thousands of images by freely moving the illuminating device while observing a fiducial marker surrounding the subject. To deal with such amount of data, we propose a neural relighting model that reconstructs object appearance for arbitrary light directions from extremely compact reflectance distribution data compressed via Principal Components Analysis (PCA). Experiments shows that the proposed technique can be easily performed on the field with a resulting RTI model that can outperform state-of-the-art approaches involving dedicated hardware setups.
summary: Reflectance Transformation Imaging (RTI) is a popular technique that allows the recovery of per-pixel reflectance information by capturing an object under different light conditions. This can be later used to reveal surface details and interactively relight the subject. Such process, however, typically requires dedicated hardware setups to recover the light direction from multiple locations, making the process tedious when performed outside the lab. We propose a novel RTI method that can be carried out by recording videos with two ordinary smartphones. The flash led-light of one device is used to illuminate the subject while the other captures the reflectance. Since the led is mounted close to the camera lenses, we can infer the light direction for thousands of images by freely moving the illuminating device while observing a fiducial marker surrounding the subject. To deal with such amount of data, we propose a neural relighting model that reconstructs object appearance for arbitrary light directions from extremely compact reflectance distribution data compressed via Principal Components Analysis (PCA). Experiments shows that the proposed technique can be easily performed on the field with a resulting RTI model that can outperform state-of-the-art approaches involving dedicated hardware setups.
abstract_zh: 反射率变换成像 (RTI) 是一种流行的技术，它可以通过在不同光照条件下捕获物体来恢复每像素的反射率信息。稍后可以使用它来显示表面细节并以交互方式重新照亮主题。然而，这样的过程通常需要专用的硬件设置来从多个位置恢复光方向，使得在实验室外执行时该过程变得乏味。我们提出了一种新颖的 RTI 方法，可以通过用两部普通智能手机录制视频来执行。一个设备的闪光灯 LED 灯用于照亮拍摄对象，而另一个设备则捕获反射率。由于 LED 安装在靠近相机镜头的位置，因此我们可以通过自由移动照明装置，同时观察拍摄对象周围的基准标记来推断数千张图像的光线方向。为了处理如此大量的数据，我们提出了一种神经重新照明模型，该模型可以根据通过主成分分析（PCA）压缩的极其紧凑的反射率分布数据来重建任意光线方向的物体外观。实验表明，所提出的技术可以在现场轻松执行，生成的 RTI 模型可以超越涉及专用硬件设置的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种使用普通智能手机进行移动反射率变换成像（RTI）的新方法，通过两部手机协同工作实现户外快速采集与重建。
AI.motivation: 传统RTI技术依赖专用硬件设备，操作复杂且难以在户外灵活使用，亟需一种便携且高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 利用两部智能手机协同：一部手机闪光灯作为光源，另一部拍摄反射率；通过移动光源并观察基准标记推断光方向，结合PCA压缩数据与神经网络模型实现任意光照方向的重建。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可在户外便捷实施，生成的RTI模型在质量上超越现有专用硬件方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过普通手机实现高精度RTI，解决了传统设备的便携性限制，为户外文物记录等场景提供新工具。

authors_text: Yuta Matsunaga,Takaaki Saeki,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Hiroshi Saruwatari
title: Improving robustness of spontaneous speech synthesis with linguistic speech regularization and pseudo-filled-pause insertion
title_zh: 通过语言语音正则化和伪填充暂停插入提高自发语音合成的鲁棒性
abstract: We present a training method with linguistic speech regularization that improves the robustness of spontaneous speech synthesis methods with filled pause (FP) insertion. Spontaneous speech synthesis is aimed at producing speech with human-like disfluencies, such as FPs. Because modeling the complex data distribution of spontaneous speech with a rich FP vocabulary is challenging, the quality of FP-inserted synthetic speech is often limited. To address this issue, we present a method for synthesizing spontaneous speech that improves robustness to diverse FP insertions. Regularization is used to stabilize the synthesis of the linguistic speech (i.e., non-FP) elements. To further improve robustness to diverse FP insertions, it utilizes pseudo-FPs sampled using an FP word prediction model as well as ground-truth FPs. Our experiments demonstrated that the proposed method improves the naturalness of synthetic speech with ground-truth and predicted FPs by 0.24 and 0.26, respectively.
summary: We present a training method with linguistic speech regularization that improves the robustness of spontaneous speech synthesis methods with filled pause (FP) insertion. Spontaneous speech synthesis is aimed at producing speech with human-like disfluencies, such as FPs. Because modeling the complex data distribution of spontaneous speech with a rich FP vocabulary is challenging, the quality of FP-inserted synthetic speech is often limited. To address this issue, we present a method for synthesizing spontaneous speech that improves robustness to diverse FP insertions. Regularization is used to stabilize the synthesis of the linguistic speech (i.e., non-FP) elements. To further improve robustness to diverse FP insertions, it utilizes pseudo-FPs sampled using an FP word prediction model as well as ground-truth FPs. Our experiments demonstrated that the proposed method improves the naturalness of synthetic speech with ground-truth and predicted FPs by 0.24 and 0.26, respectively.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种具有语言语音正则化的训练方法，该方法提高了带有填充停顿（FP）插入的自发语音合成方法的鲁棒性。自发语音合成旨在生成具有类似人类不流利程度的语音，例如 FP。由于使用丰富的 FP 词汇对自发语音的复杂数据分布进行建模具有挑战性，因此插入 FP 的合成语音的质量通常受到限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种合成自发语音的方法，该方法可以提高对不同 FP 插入的鲁棒性。正则化用于稳定语言语音（即非 FP）元素的合成。为了进一步提高对不同 FP 插入的鲁棒性，它利用使用 FP 单词预测模型采样的伪 FP 以及真实 FP。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法将真实和预测 FP 的合成语音的自然度分别提高了 0.24 和 0.26。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过语言学语音正则化和伪填充停顿插入来提高自发语音合成鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 自发语音合成中，由于填充停顿（FP）词汇丰富且数据分布复杂，导致合成语音质量受限，需提升模型对多样FP插入的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用语言学语音正则化稳定非FP部分合成，并结合真实FP与基于FP词预测模型生成的伪FP进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法使真实FP和预测FP的合成语音自然度分别提升0.24和0.26（MOS评分）。
AI.conclusion: 融合正则化与伪FP训练可有效提升自发语音合成的自然度和鲁棒性。

search_text: Improving robustness of spontaneous speech synthesis with linguistic speech regularization and pseudo-filled-pause insertion 通过语言语音正则化和伪填充暂停插入提高自发语音合成的鲁棒性 We present a training method with linguistic speech regularization that improves the robustness of spontaneous speech synthesis methods with filled pause (FP) insertion. Spontaneous speech synthesis is aimed at producing speech with human-like disfluencies, such as FPs. Because modeling the complex data distribution of spontaneous speech with a rich FP vocabulary is challenging, the quality of FP-inserted synthetic speech is often limited. To address this issue, we present a method for synthesizing spontaneous speech that improves robustness to diverse FP insertions. Regularization is used to stabilize the synthesis of the linguistic speech (i.e., non-FP) elements. To further improve robustness to diverse FP insertions, it utilizes pseudo-FPs sampled using an FP word prediction model as well as ground-truth FPs. Our experiments demonstrated that the proposed method improves the naturalness of synthetic speech with ground-truth and predicted FPs by 0.24 and 0.26, respectively. 我们提出了一种具有语言语音正则化的训练方法，该方法提高了带有填充停顿（FP）插入的自发语音合成方法的鲁棒性。自发语音合成旨在生成具有类似人类不流利程度的语音，例如 FP。由于使用丰富的 FP 词汇对自发语音的复杂数据分布进行建模具有挑战性，因此插入 FP 的合成语音的质量通常受到限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种合成自发语音的方法，该方法可以提高对不同 FP 插入的鲁棒性。正则化用于稳定语言语音（即非 FP）元素的合成。为了进一步提高对不同 FP 插入的鲁棒性，它利用使用 FP 单词预测模型采样的伪 FP 以及真实 FP。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法将真实和预测 FP 的合成语音的自然度分别提高了 0.24 和 0.26。 本文提出一种通过语言学语音正则化和伪填充停顿插入来提高自发语音合成鲁棒性的方法。 Yuta Matsunaga,Takaaki Saeki,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Hiroshi Saruwatari cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Alexander Naumann,Felix Hertlein,Benchun Zhou,Laura Dörr,Kai Furmans
title: Scrape, Cut, Paste and Learn: Automated Dataset Generation Applied to Parcel Logistics
title_zh: 抓取、剪切、粘贴和学习：应用于包裹物流的自动数据集生成
abstract: State-of-the-art approaches in computer vision heavily rely on sufficiently large training datasets. For real-world applications, obtaining such a dataset is usually a tedious task. In this paper, we present a fully automated pipeline to generate a synthetic dataset for instance segmentation in four steps. In contrast to existing work, our pipeline covers every step from data acquisition to the final dataset. We first scrape images for the objects of interest from popular image search engines and since we rely only on text-based queries the resulting data comprises a wide variety of images. Hence, image selection is necessary as a second step. This approach of image scraping and selection relaxes the need for a real-world domain-specific dataset that must be either publicly available or created for this purpose. We employ an object-agnostic background removal model and compare three different methods for image selection: Object-agnostic pre-processing, manual image selection and CNN-based image selection. In the third step, we generate random arrangements of the object of interest and distractors on arbitrary backgrounds. Finally, the composition of the images is done by pasting the objects using four different blending methods. We present a case study for our dataset generation approach by considering parcel segmentation. For the evaluation we created a dataset of parcel photos that were annotated automatically. We find that (1) our dataset generation pipeline allows a successful transfer to real test images (Mask AP 86.2), (2) a very accurate image selection process - in contrast to human intuition - is not crucial and a broader category definition can help to bridge the domain gap, (3) the usage of blending methods is beneficial compared to simple copy-and-paste. We made our full code for scraping, image composition and training publicly available at https://a-nau.github.io/parcel2d.

In this paper, we present a fully automated pipeline to generate a synthetic dataset for instance segmentation in four steps. In contrast to existing work, our pipeline covers every step from data acquisition to the final dataset. We first scrape images for the objects of interest from popular image search engines and since we rely only on text-based queries the resulting data comprises a wide variety of images. Hence, image selection is necessary as a second step. This approach of image scraping and selection relaxes the need for a real-world domain-specific dataset that must be either publicly available or created for this purpose. We employ an object-agnostic background removal model and compare three different methods for image selection: Object-agnostic pre-processing, manual image selection and CNN-based image selection. In the third step, we generate random arrangements of the object of interest and distractors on arbitrary backgrounds. Finally, the composition of the images is done by pasting the objects using four different blending methods. We present a case study for our dataset generation approach by considering parcel segmentation. For the evaluation we created a dataset of parcel photos that were annotated automatically. We find that (1) our dataset generation pipeline allows a successful transfer to real test images (Mask AP 86.2), (2) a very accurate image selection process - in contrast to human intuition - is not crucial and a broader category definition can help to bridge the domain gap, (3) the usage of blending methods is beneficial compared to simple copy-and-paste. We made our full code for scraping, image composition and training publicly available at https://a-nau.github.io/parcel2d.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉领域最先进的方法严重依赖足够大的训练数据集。对于现实世界的应用程序来说，获取这样的数据集通常是一项繁琐的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一个完全自动化的管道来生成合成数据集，以便分四个步骤进行实例分割。与现有工作相比，我们的管道涵盖了从数据采集到最终数据集的每一个步骤。我们首先从流行的图像搜索引擎中抓取感兴趣对象的图像，并且由于我们仅依赖基于文本的查询，因此结果数据包含各种各样的图像。因此，第二步需要图像选择。这种图像抓取和选择的方法放松了对现实世界特定领域数据集的需求，该数据集必须是公开可用的或为此目的而创建的。我们采用与对象无关的背景去除模型，并比较了三种不同的图像选择方法：与对象无关的预处理、手动图像选择和基于 CNN 的图像选择。第三步，我们在任意背景上生成感兴趣对象和干扰物的随机排列。最后，通过使用四种不同的混合方法粘贴对象来完成图像的合成。我们通过考虑地块分割来介绍数据集生成方法的案例研究。为了进行评估，我们创建了一个自动注释的地块照片数据集。我们发现（1）我们的数据集生成管道可以成功转移到真实的测试图像（Mask AP 86.2），（2）与人类直觉相反，非常准确的图像选择过程并不重要，更广泛的类别定义可以帮助弥合领域差距，（3）与简单的复制粘贴相比，使用混合方法是有益的。我们在 https://a-nau.github.io/parcel2d 上公开提供了用于抓取、图像合成和训练的完整代码。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自动化生成合成数据集的管道，用于实例分割任务，特别应用于包裹物流领域。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大规模训练数据集，但获取困难且耗时，需自动化生成以降低对公开数据集的依赖。
AI.method: 四步流程：抓取图像、选择图像（三种方法）、生成随机排列、使用四种混合方法粘贴对象，结合无监督背景移除。
AI.result: 在包裹分割案例中，Mask AP达86.2，证明方法有效，且混合方法优于简单复制粘贴。
AI.conclusion: 自动化数据集生成有效，宽泛类别定义和混合方法提升性能，为实例分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Tobias Mömke,Hang Zhou
title: Capacitated Vehicle Routing in Graphic Metrics
title_zh: 图形指标中的容量车辆路线
abstract: We study the capacitated vehicle routing problem in graphic metrics (graphic CVRP). Our main contribution is a new lower bound on the cost of an optimal solution. For graphic metrics, this lower bound is tight and significantly stronger than the well-known bound for general metrics. The proof of the new lower bound is simple and combinatorial. Using this lower bound, we analyze the approximation ratio of the classical iterated tour partitioning algorithm combined with the TSP algorithms for graphic metrics of Christofides [1976], of Mömke-Svensson [JACM 2016], and of Sebő-Vygen [Combinatorica 2014]. In particular, we obtain a 1.95-approximation for the graphic CVRP.
summary: We study the capacitated vehicle routing problem in graphic metrics (graphic CVRP). Our main contribution is a new lower bound on the cost of an optimal solution. For graphic metrics, this lower bound is tight and significantly stronger than the well-known bound for general metrics. The proof of the new lower bound is simple and combinatorial. Using this lower bound, we analyze the approximation ratio of the classical iterated tour partitioning algorithm combined with the TSP algorithms for graphic metrics of Christofides [1976], of Mömke-Svensson [JACM 2016], and of Sebő-Vygen [Combinatorica 2014]. In particular, we obtain a 1.95-approximation for the graphic CVRP.
abstract_zh: 我们研究图形度量（图形 CVRP）中的有能力车辆路径问题。我们的主要贡献是最优解决方案成本的新下限。对于图形指标，这个下限很严格，并且明显强于众所周知的一般指标下限。新下界的证明是简单且组合的。使用这个下界，我们分析了经典迭代旅行分区算法与 Christofides [1976]、Mömke-Svensson [JACM 2016] 和 Sebő-Vygen [Combinatorica 2014] 图形度量的 TSP 算法相结合的近似率。特别是，我们获得了图形 CVRP 的 1.95 近似值。

AI.tldr: 本文研究图度量下的带容量车辆路径问题，提出新的下界并分析经典算法的近似比。
AI.motivation: 现有通用度量下界无法有效解决图度量场景，需更强的理论分析以改进车辆路径问题的算法性能。
AI.method: 通过组合证明建立图度量下界，结合迭代旅游分区算法与Christofides、Mömke-Svensson、Sebő-Vygen等TSP算法进行近似比分析。
AI.result: 获得图度量下界并证明其紧致性，实现1.95近似比的算法分析。
AI.conclusion: 新下界显著优于通用度量结果，为图度量CVRP提供了更优的理论分析框架。

authors_text: Jelica Vasiljević,Friedrich Feuerhake,Cédric Wemmert,Thomas Lampert
title: HistoStarGAN: A Unified Approach to Stain Normalisation, Stain Transfer and Stain Invariant Segmentation in Renal Histopathology
title_zh: HistoStarGAN：肾脏组织病理学中染色标准化、染色转移和染色不变分割的统一方法
abstract: Virtual stain transfer is a promising area of research in Computational Pathology, which has a great potential to alleviate important limitations when applying deeplearningbased solutions such as lack of annotations and sensitivity to a domain shift. However, in the literature, the majority of virtual staining approaches are trained for a specific staining or stain combination, and their extension to unseen stainings requires the acquisition of additional data and training. In this paper, we propose HistoStarGAN, a unified framework that performs stain transfer between multiple stainings, stain normalisation and stain invariant segmentation, all in one inference of the model. We demonstrate the generalisation abilities of the proposed solution to perform diverse stain transfer and accurate stain invariant segmentation over numerous unseen stainings, which is the first such demonstration in the field. Moreover, the pre-trained HistoStar-GAN model can serve as a synthetic data generator, which paves the way for the use of fully annotated synthetic image data to improve the training of deep learning-based algorithms. To illustrate the capabilities of our approach, as well as the potential risks in the microscopy domain, inspired by applications in natural images, we generated KidneyArtPathology, a fully annotated artificial image dataset for renal pathology.
summary: Virtual stain transfer is a promising area of research in Computational Pathology, which has a great potential to alleviate important limitations when applying deeplearningbased solutions such as lack of annotations and sensitivity to a domain shift. However, in the literature, the majority of virtual staining approaches are trained for a specific staining or stain combination, and their extension to unseen stainings requires the acquisition of additional data and training. In this paper, we propose HistoStarGAN, a unified framework that performs stain transfer between multiple stainings, stain normalisation and stain invariant segmentation, all in one inference of the model. We demonstrate the generalisation abilities of the proposed solution to perform diverse stain transfer and accurate stain invariant segmentation over numerous unseen stainings, which is the first such demonstration in the field. Moreover, the pre-trained HistoStar-GAN model can serve as a synthetic data generator, which paves the way for the use of fully annotated synthetic image data to improve the training of deep learning-based algorithms. To illustrate the capabilities of our approach, as well as the potential risks in the microscopy domain, inspired by applications in natural images, we generated KidneyArtPathology, a fully annotated artificial image dataset for renal pathology.
abstract_zh: 虚拟染色转移是计算病理学中一个有前途的研究领域，在应用基于深度学习的解决方案时，例如缺乏注释和对域转移的敏感性等重要限制，它具有很大的潜力来缓解。然而，在文献中，大多数虚拟染色方法都是针对特定染色或染色组合进行训练的，并且它们扩展到看不见的染色需要获取额外的数据和训练。在本文中，我们提出了 HistoStarGAN，这是一种统一的框架，可以在多个染色之间执行染色转移、染色归一化和染色不变分割，所有这些都在模型的一个推理中。我们展示了所提出的解决方案的泛化能力，可以对大量未见过的染色执行不同的染色转移和准确的染色不变分割，这是该领域的首次此类演示。此外，预训练的 HistoStar-GAN 模型可以用作合成数据生成器，这为使用完全注释的合成图像数据来改进基于深度学习的算法的训练铺平了道路。为了说明我们方法的功能以及显微镜领域的潜在风险，受到自然图像应用的启发，我们生成了 KidneyArtPathology，这是一个完全注释的肾脏病理学人工图像数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HistoStarGAN框架，统一实现肾病理学中的染色归一化、染色转移与染色不变分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟染色方法局限于特定染色类型，难以泛化至新染色且需额外数据训练，而HistoStarGAN通过统一框架解决跨染色泛化与合成数据生成问题。
AI.method: 基于生成对抗网络（GAN）设计多任务统一框架，集成染色转换、归一化与分割功能，通过预训练模型实现跨染色泛化。
AI.result: 模型在多种未见染色场景下实现准确分割与染色转换，并生成首个全标注合成数据集KidneyArtPathology。
AI.conclusion: HistoStarGAN是首个实现跨染色泛化的统一框架，其预训练模型可生成高质量合成数据，推动病理学深度学习模型训练。

However, in the literature, the majority of virtual staining approaches are trained for a specific staining or stain combination, and their extension to unseen stainings requires the acquisition of additional data and training. In this paper, we propose HistoStarGAN, a unified framework that performs stain transfer between multiple stainings, stain normalisation and stain invariant segmentation, all in one inference of the model. We demonstrate the generalisation abilities of the proposed solution to perform diverse stain transfer and accurate stain invariant segmentation over numerous unseen stainings, which is the first such demonstration in the field. Moreover, the pre-trained HistoStar-GAN model can serve as a synthetic data generator, which paves the way for the use of fully annotated synthetic image data to improve the training of deep learning-based algorithms. authors_text: Yiming Ma
title: Inception-Based Crowd Counting -- Being Fast while Remaining Accurate
title_zh: 基于 Inception 的人群计数——快速同时保持准确
comment: This is the paper that summarises my MSc's research project. Not plan to publish it. Share it on arXiv as a beginner-friendly paper for new researchers into crowd counting
comments: This is the paper that summarises my MSc's research project. Not plan to publish it. Share it on arXiv as a beginner-friendly paper for new researchers into crowd counting
abstract: Recent sophisticated CNN-based algorithms have demonstrated their extraordinary ability to automate counting crowds from images, thanks to their structures which are designed to address the issue of various head scales. However, these complicated architectures also increase computational complexity enormously, making real-time estimation implausible. Thus, in this paper, a new method, based on Inception-V3, is proposed to reduce the amount of computation. This proposed approach (ICC), exploits the first five inception blocks and the contextual module designed in CAN to extract features at different receptive fields, thereby being context-aware. The employment of these two different strategies can also increase the model's robustness. Experiments show that ICC can at best reduce 85.3 percent calculations with 24.4 percent performance loss. This high efficiency contributes significantly to the deployment of crowd counting models in surveillance systems to guard the public safety. The code will be available at https://github.com/YIMINGMA/CrowdCounting-ICC,and its pre-trained weights on the Crowd Counting dataset, which comprises a large variety of scenes from surveillance perspectives, will also open-sourced.
summary: Recent sophisticated CNN-based algorithms have demonstrated their extraordinary ability to automate counting crowds from images, thanks to their structures which are designed to address the issue of various head scales. However, these complicated architectures also increase computational complexity enormously, making real-time estimation implausible. Thus, in this paper, a new method, based on Inception-V3, is proposed to reduce the amount of computation. This proposed approach (ICC), exploits the first five inception blocks and the contextual module designed in CAN to extract features at different receptive fields, thereby being context-aware. The employment of these two different strategies can also increase the model's robustness. Experiments show that ICC can at best reduce 85.3 percent calculations with 24.4 percent performance loss. This high efficiency contributes significantly to the deployment of crowd counting models in surveillance systems to guard the public safety. The code will be available at https://github.com/YIMINGMA/CrowdCounting-ICC,and its pre-trained weights on the Crowd Counting dataset, which comprises a large variety of scenes from surveillance perspectives, will also open-sourced.
abstract_zh: 最近基于 CNN 的复杂算法已经证明了其从图像中自动计算人群的非凡能力，这要归功于其旨在解决各种头部尺度问题的结构。然而，这些复杂的架构也极大地增加了计算复杂性，使得实时估计变得难以置信。因此，本文提出了一种基于Inception-V3的新方法来减少计算量。这种提出的方​​法（ICC）利用前五个初始块和 CAN 中设计的上下文模块来提取不同感受野的特征，从而实现上下文感知。使用这两种不同的策略还可以提高模型的稳健性。实验表明，ICC 最多可以减少 85.3% 的计算量，同时带来 24.4% 的性能损失。这种高效率极大地促进了在监控系统中部署人群计数模型以保护公共安全。该代码将在 https://github.com/YIMINGMA/CrowdCounting-ICC 上提供，其在人群计数数据集上的预训练权重也将开源，该数据集包含从监控角度来看的各种场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Inception-V3的高效人群计数方法ICC，在保证精度的同时显著降低计算量。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN人群计数模型结构复杂导致计算量过大，难以实现实时应用，需在精度与效率间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 采用Inception-V3前五个模块与CAN的上下文模块，通过多尺度特征提取和上下文感知设计提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: ICC在减少85.3%计算量的情况下仅损失24.4%性能，代码与预训练权重已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为安防系统部署高效人群计数模型提供了可行方案，兼顾实时性与准确性。

authors_text: Kazuya Tsubokura,Fumiya Kishi,Kotomi Narita,Takuya Takeda,Yurie Iribe
title: Hospitable Travel Agent Dialogue Robot: Team Irisapu Project Description for DRC2022
title_zh: 热情好客的旅行社对话机器人：Team Irisapu DRC2022 项目描述
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures, This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
abstract: This paper describes the dialog robot system designed by Team Irisapu for the preliminary round of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022 (DRC2022). Our objective was to design a hospitable travel agent robot. The system we developed was ranked 8th out of 13 systems in the preliminary round of the competition, but our robot received high marks for its naturalness and likeability.Our next challenge is to create a system that can provide more useful information to users.
summary: This paper describes the dialog robot system designed by Team Irisapu for the preliminary round of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022 (DRC2022). Our objective was to design a hospitable travel agent robot. The system we developed was ranked 8th out of 13 systems in the preliminary round of the competition, but our robot received high marks for its naturalness and likeability.Our next challenge is to create a system that can provide more useful information to users.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Team Irisapu 为 2022 年对话机器人大赛（DRC2022）预赛设计的对话机器人系统。我们的目标是设计一个热情好客的旅行社机器人。我们开发的系统在初赛的 13 个系统中排名第 8，但我们的机器人因其自然性和可爱性而获得了高分。我们的下一个挑战是创建一个可以为用户提供更多有用信息的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Team Irisapu为DRC2022对话机器人竞赛设计的友好型旅游代理对话机器人系统。
AI.motivation: 旨在开发一个具备自然对话能力和高用户亲和力的旅游代理机器人，以提升竞赛表现并优化用户体验。
AI.method: 通过构建对话系统并优化自然语言处理与交互设计，重点提升对话的自然流畅度和用户好感度。
AI.result: 系统在DRC2022预赛中排名第八，获得自然性和亲和力方面的高分评价，但需改进信息实用性。
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步优化系统的信息提供能力，以在竞赛中取得更优成绩并满足用户实际需求。

search_text: Hospitable Travel Agent Dialogue Robot: Team Irisapu Project Description for DRC2022 热情好客的旅行社对话机器人：Team Irisapu DRC2022 项目描述 This paper describes the dialog robot system designed by Team Irisapu for the preliminary round of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022 (DRC2022). Our objective was to design a hospitable travel agent robot. The system we developed was ranked 8th out of 13 systems in the preliminary round of the competition, but our robot received high marks for its naturalness and likeability.Our next challenge is to create a system that can provide more useful information to users. 本文介绍了 Team Irisapu 为 2022 年对话机器人大赛（DRC2022）预赛设计的对话机器人系统。我们的目标是设计一个热情好客的旅行社机器人。我们开发的系统在初赛的 13 个系统中排名第 8，但我们的机器人因其自然性和可爱性而获得了高分。我们的下一个挑战是创建一个可以为用户提供更多有用信息的系统。 本文介绍了Team Irisapu为DRC2022对话机器人竞赛设计的友好型旅游代理对话机器人系统。 Kazuya Tsubokura,Fumiya Kishi,Kotomi Narita,Takuya Takeda,Yurie Iribe cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Zongxin Yang,Yi Yang
title: Decoupling Features in Hierarchical Propagation for Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 视频对象分割的分层传播中的解耦特征
abstract: This paper focuses on developing a more effective method of hierarchical propagation for semi-supervised Video Object Segmentation (VOS). Based on vision transformers, the recently-developed Associating Objects with Transformers (AOT) approach introduces hierarchical propagation into VOS and has shown promising results. The hierarchical propagation can gradually propagate information from past frames to the current frame and transfer the current frame feature from object-agnostic to object-specific. However, the increase of object-specific information will inevitably lead to the loss of object-agnostic visual information in deep propagation layers. To solve such a problem and further facilitate the learning of visual embeddings, this paper proposes a Decoupling Features in Hierarchical Propagation (DeAOT) approach. Firstly, DeAOT decouples the hierarchical propagation of object-agnostic and object-specific embeddings by handling them in two independent branches. Secondly, to compensate for the additional computation from dual-branch propagation, we propose an efficient module for constructing hierarchical propagation, i.e., Gated Propagation Module, which is carefully designed with single-head attention. Extensive experiments show that DeAOT significantly outperforms AOT in both accuracy and efficiency. On YouTube-VOS, DeAOT can achieve 86.0% at 22.4fps and 82.0% at 53.4fps. Without test-time augmentations, we achieve new state-of-the-art performance on four benchmarks, i.e., YouTube-VOS (86.2%), DAVIS 2017 (86.2%), DAVIS 2016 (92.9%), and VOT 2020 (0.622). Project page: https://github.com/z-x-yang/AOT.
summary: This paper focuses on developing a more effective method of hierarchical propagation for semi-supervised Video Object Segmentation (VOS). Based on vision transformers, the recently-developed Associating Objects with Transformers (AOT) approach introduces hierarchical propagation into VOS and has shown promising results. The hierarchical propagation can gradually propagate information from past frames to the current frame and transfer the current frame feature from object-agnostic to object-specific. However, the increase of object-specific information will inevitably lead to the loss of object-agnostic visual information in deep propagation layers. To solve such a problem and further facilitate the learning of visual embeddings, this paper proposes a Decoupling Features in Hierarchical Propagation (DeAOT) approach. Firstly, DeAOT decouples the hierarchical propagation of object-agnostic and object-specific embeddings by handling them in two independent branches. Secondly, to compensate for the additional computation from dual-branch propagation, we propose an efficient module for constructing hierarchical propagation, i.e., Gated Propagation Module, which is carefully designed with single-head attention. Extensive experiments show that DeAOT significantly outperforms AOT in both accuracy and efficiency. On YouTube-VOS, DeAOT can achieve 86.0% at 22.4fps and 82.0% at 53.4fps. Without test-time augmentations, we achieve new state-of-the-art performance on four benchmarks, i.e., YouTube-VOS (86.2%), DAVIS 2017 (86.2%), DAVIS 2016 (92.9%), and VOT 2020 (0.622). Project page: https://github.com/z-x-yang/AOT.
abstract_zh: 本文重点是为半监督视频对象分割（VOS）开发一种更有效的分层传播方法。基于视觉变压器，最近开发的将对象与变压器关联（AOT）方法将分层传播引入到 VOS 中，并显示出有希望的结果。分层传播可以逐渐将信息从过去的帧传播到当前帧，并将当前帧的特征从对象不可知转移到对象特定。然而，对象特定信息的增加将不可避免地导致深层传播层中与对象无关的视觉信息的丢失。为了解决这样的问题并进一步促进视觉嵌入的学习，本文提出了一种分层传播中的解耦特征（DeAOT）方法。首先，DeAOT 通过在两个独立的分支中处理与对象无关和特定于对象的嵌入来解耦它们的分层传播。其次，为了补偿双分支传播的额外计算，我们提出了一种用于构造分层传播的有效模块，即门控传播模块，它是通过单头注意力精心设计的。大量实验表明，DeAOT 在准确性和效率方面均明显优于 AOT。在 YouTube-VOS 上，DeAOT 在 22.4fps 时可以达到 86.0%，在 53.4fps 时可以达到 82.0%。在不增加测试时间的情况下，我们在四个基准上实现了新的最先进的性能，即 YouTube-VOS (86.2%)、DAVIS 2017 (86.2%)、DAVIS 2016 (92.9%) 和 VOT 2020 (0.622)。项目页面：https://github.com/z-x-yang/AOT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DeAOT的方法，通过解耦层次传播中的无关对象和特定对象特征，改进半监督视频对象分割（VOS）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在层次传播中会因特定对象信息增加而丢失无关对象视觉信息，导致视觉嵌入学习效率下降。
AI.method: DeAOT通过双分支独立处理无关对象和特定对象嵌入，并引入带有单头注意力的门控传播模块以提升计算效率。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VOS等四个基准测试中，DeAOT在无需测试时增强的情况下达到新SOTA性能，如YouTube-VOS 86.2%、DAVIS 2017 86.2%等。
AI.conclusion: DeAOT通过解耦传播机制和高效模块设计，在准确率和效率上均显著优于现有方法AOT。

authors_text: Fernando Alonso-Fernandez,Anna Mikaelyan,Josef Bigun
title: Compact multi-scale periocular recognition using SAFE features
title_zh: 使用 SAFE 特征的紧凑型多尺度眼周识别
comment: Published at IEEE/IAPR Intl Conf on Pattern Recognition, ICPR 2016
comments: Published at IEEE/IAPR Intl Conf on Pattern Recognition, ICPR 2016
abstract: In this paper, we present a new approach for periocular recognition based on the Symmetry Assessment by Feature Expansion (SAFE) descriptor, which encodes the presence of various symmetric curve families around image key points. We use the sclera center as single key point for feature extraction, highlighting the object-like identity properties that concentrates to this unique point of the eye. As it is demonstrated, such discriminative properties can be encoded with a reduced set of symmetric curves. Experiments are done with a database of periocular images captured with a digital camera. We test our system against reference periocular features, achieving top performance with a considerably smaller feature vector (given by the use of a single key point). All the systems tested also show a nearly steady correlation between acquisition distance and performance, and they are also able to cope well when enrolment and test images are not captured at the same distance. Fusion experiments among the available systems are also provided.
summary: In this paper, we present a new approach for periocular recognition based on the Symmetry Assessment by Feature Expansion (SAFE) descriptor, which encodes the presence of various symmetric curve families around image key points. We use the sclera center as single key point for feature extraction, highlighting the object-like identity properties that concentrates to this unique point of the eye. As it is demonstrated, such discriminative properties can be encoded with a reduced set of symmetric curves. Experiments are done with a database of periocular images captured with a digital camera. We test our system against reference periocular features, achieving top performance with a considerably smaller feature vector (given by the use of a single key point). All the systems tested also show a nearly steady correlation between acquisition distance and performance, and they are also able to cope well when enrolment and test images are not captured at the same distance. Fusion experiments among the available systems are also provided.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于特征扩展对称评估（SAFE）描述符的眼周识别新方法，该方法对图像关键点周围各种对称曲线族的存在进行编码。我们使用巩膜中心作为特征提取的单个关键点，突出显示集中在眼睛的这个独特点的类似物体的身份属性。正如所证明的，这种判别特性可以用一组减少的对称曲线来编码。实验是用数码相机拍摄的眼周图像数据库完成的。我们根据参考眼周特征测试我们的系统，以相当小的特征向量（通过使用单个关键点给出）实现最佳性能。所有测试的系统还显示出采集距离和性能之间几乎稳定的相关性，并且当登记和测试图像不是在相同距离捕获时，它们也能够很好地应对。还提供了可用系统之间的融合实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于SAFE特征的紧凑型多尺度虹膜周围区域识别方法，通过巩膜中心关键点提取对称曲线特征。
AI.motivation: 传统虹膜识别方法在远距离拍摄时性能下降，且特征向量维度较高，需寻找更鲁棒且高效的特征描述方式。
AI.method: 利用SAFE描述符编码关键点周围对称曲线家族，以巩膜中心为单一关键点提取特征，通过减少对称曲线数量降低特征维度。
AI.result: 在数字相机拍摄的虹膜数据库中，该方法以更小的特征向量达到最优性能，且在不同拍摄距离下表现稳定，可处理注册与测试图像距离不一致的情况。
AI.conclusion: SAFE特征在保持识别精度的同时显著降低特征维度，且对拍摄距离不敏感，融合多系统结果可进一步提升性能。

authors_text: Deng Cai,Xin Li,Jackie Chun-Sing Ho,Lidong Bing,Wai Lam
title: Retrofitting Multilingual Sentence Embeddings with Abstract Meaning Representation
title_zh: 用抽象意义表示改造多语言句子嵌入
abstract: We introduce a new method to improve existing multilingual sentence embeddings with Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR). Compared with the original textual input, AMR is a structured semantic representation that presents the core concepts and relations in a sentence explicitly and unambiguously. It also helps reduce surface variations across different expressions and languages. Unlike most prior work that only evaluates the ability to measure semantic similarity, we present a thorough evaluation of existing multilingual sentence embeddings and our improved versions, which include a collection of five transfer tasks in different downstream applications. Experiment results show that retrofitting multilingual sentence embeddings with AMR leads to better state-of-the-art performance on both semantic textual similarity and transfer tasks. Our codebase and evaluation scripts can be found at \url{https://github.com/jcyk/MSE-AMR}.
summary: We introduce a new method to improve existing multilingual sentence embeddings with Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR). Compared with the original textual input, AMR is a structured semantic representation that presents the core concepts and relations in a sentence explicitly and unambiguously. It also helps reduce surface variations across different expressions and languages. Unlike most prior work that only evaluates the ability to measure semantic similarity, we present a thorough evaluation of existing multilingual sentence embeddings and our improved versions, which include a collection of five transfer tasks in different downstream applications. Experiment results show that retrofitting multilingual sentence embeddings with AMR leads to better state-of-the-art performance on both semantic textual similarity and transfer tasks. Our codebase and evaluation scripts can be found at \url{https://github.com/jcyk/MSE-AMR}.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新方法，通过抽象含义表示（AMR）来改进现有的多语言句子嵌入。与原始文本输入相比，AMR 是一种结构化语义表示，可以明确、明确地呈现句子中的核心概念和关系。它还有助于减少不同表达和语言之间的表面变化。与大多数仅评估测量语义相似性的能力的先前工作不同，我们对现有的多语言句子嵌入和我们的改进版本进行了彻底的评估，其中包括不同下游应用程序中五个传输任务的集合。实验结果表明，使用 AMR 改进多语言句子嵌入可以在语义文本相似性和迁移任务上带来更好的最先进性能。我们的代码库和评估脚本可以在 \url{https://github.com/jcyk/MSE-AMR} 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用抽象意义表示（AMR）改进多语言句子嵌入的新方法，通过结构化语义表示提升跨语言和跨表达的语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言句子嵌入难以有效捕捉跨语言表达的语义核心，且对表面形式变化敏感，而AMR能提供明确的语义结构表示以增强语义对齐。
AI.method: 通过将AMR作为辅助语义结构，结合微调策略对现有嵌入模型进行重训练，并在五个下游任务（如语义相似度、文本分类等）中评估改进效果。
AI.result: 改进后的模型在语义文本相似度任务及多语言转移任务中均达到优于现有方法的最先进水平（SOTA），且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: AMR结构化语义表示能有效增强多语言句子嵌入的跨语言泛化能力，为后续多语言NLP任务提供更鲁棒的表示基础。

authors_text: Fernando Alonso-Fernandez,Reuben A. Farrugia,Josef Bigun
title: Very Low-Resolution Iris Recognition Via Eigen-Patch Super-Resolution and Matcher Fusion
title_zh: 通过特征补丁超分辨率和匹配器融合进行极低分辨率虹膜识别
comment: Published at Intl Conf on Biometrics: Theory, Apps and Systems, BTAS 2016
comments: Published at Intl Conf on Biometrics: Theory, Apps and Systems, BTAS 2016
abstract: Current research in iris recognition is moving towards enabling more relaxed acquisition conditions. This has effects on the quality of acquired images, with low resolution being a predominant issue. Here, we evaluate a super-resolution algorithm used to reconstruct iris images based on Eigen-transformation of local image patches. Each patch is reconstructed separately, allowing better quality of enhanced images by preserving local information. Contrast enhancement is used to improve the reconstruction quality, while matcher fusion has been adopted to improve iris recognition performance. We validate the system using a database of 1,872 near-infrared iris images. The presented approach is superior to bilinear or bicubic interpolation, especially at lower resolutions, and the fusion of the two systems pushes the EER to below 5% for down-sampling factors up to a image size of only 13x13.
summary: Current research in iris recognition is moving towards enabling more relaxed acquisition conditions. This has effects on the quality of acquired images, with low resolution being a predominant issue. Here, we evaluate a super-resolution algorithm used to reconstruct iris images based on Eigen-transformation of local image patches. Each patch is reconstructed separately, allowing better quality of enhanced images by preserving local information. Contrast enhancement is used to improve the reconstruction quality, while matcher fusion has been adopted to improve iris recognition performance. We validate the system using a database of 1,872 near-infrared iris images. The presented approach is superior to bilinear or bicubic interpolation, especially at lower resolutions, and the fusion of the two systems pushes the EER to below 5% for down-sampling factors up to a image size of only 13x13.
abstract_zh: 目前虹膜识别的研究正朝着实现更宽松的采集条件的方向发展。这会影响所获取图像的质量，其中低分辨率是一个主要问题。在这里，我们评估了一种基于局部图像块的特征变换来重建虹膜图像的超分辨率算法。每个补丁都是单独重建的，通过保留局部信息来提高增强图像的质量。使用对比度增强来提高重建质量，同时采用匹配器融合来提高虹膜识别性能。我们使用包含 1,872 个近红外虹膜图像的数据库来验证该系统。所提出的方法优于双线性或双三次插值，尤其是在较低分辨率下，并且两个系统的融合将 EER 推至 5% 以下，以实现图像尺寸仅为 13x13 的下采样因子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征补丁超分辨率和匹配器融合的极低分辨率虹膜识别方法。
AI.motivation: 宽松的虹膜图像采集条件导致图像分辨率降低，传统方法在低分辨率下识别性能不足。
AI.method: 采用局部图像块特征变换（Eigen-transformation）进行超分辨率重建，结合对比度增强与多匹配器融合策略。
AI.result: 在13x13像素极低分辨率下，融合系统误识别率（EER）低于5%，优于双线性/双三次插值方法。
AI.conclusion: 特征补丁超分辨率与匹配器融合有效提升极低分辨率虹膜识别性能，为实际应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Tamotsu Miyama,Shogo Okada
title: Personality-adapted multimodal dialogue system
title_zh: 个性适应的多模态对话系统
comment: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
comments: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
abstract: This paper describes a personality-adaptive multimodal dialogue system developed for the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022. To realize a dialogue system that adapts the dialogue strategy to individual users, it is necessary to consider the user's nonverbal information and personality. In this competition, we built a prototype of a user-adaptive dialogue system that estimates user personality during dialogue. Pretrained DNN models are used to estimate user personalities annotated as Big Five scores. This model is embedded in a dialogue system to estimate user personality from face images during the dialogue. We proposed a method for dialogue management that changed the dialogue flow based on the estimated personality characteristics and confirmed that the system works in a real environment in the preliminary round of this competition. Furthermore, we implemented specific modules to enhance the multimodal dialogue experience of the user, including personality assessment, controlling facial expressions and movements of the android, and dialogue management to explain the attractiveness of sightseeing spots. The aim of dialogue based on personality assessment is to reduce the nervousness of users, and it acts as an ice breaker. The android's facial expressions and movements are necessary for a more natural android conversation. Since the task of this competition was to promote the appeal of sightseeing spots and to recommend an appropriate sightseeing spot, the dialogue process for how to explain the attractiveness of the spot is important. All results of the subjective evaluation by users were better than those of the baseline and other systems developed for this competition. The proposed dialogue system ranked first in both "Impression Rating" and "Effectiveness of Android Recommendations". According to the total evaluation in the competition, the proposed system was ranked first overall.
summary: This paper describes a personality-adaptive multimodal dialogue system developed for the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022. To realize a dialogue system that adapts the dialogue strategy to individual users, it is necessary to consider the user's nonverbal information and personality. In this competition, we built a prototype of a user-adaptive dialogue system that estimates user personality during dialogue. Pretrained DNN models are used to estimate user personalities annotated as Big Five scores. This model is embedded in a dialogue system to estimate user personality from face images during the dialogue. We proposed a method for dialogue management that changed the dialogue flow based on the estimated personality characteristics and confirmed that the system works in a real environment in the preliminary round of this competition. Furthermore, we implemented specific modules to enhance the multimodal dialogue experience of the user, including personality assessment, controlling facial expressions and movements of the android, and dialogue management to explain the attractiveness of sightseeing spots. The aim of dialogue based on personality assessment is to reduce the nervousness of users, and it acts as an ice breaker. The android's facial expressions and movements are necessary for a more natural android conversation. Since the task of this competition was to promote the appeal of sightseeing spots and to recommend an appropriate sightseeing spot, the dialogue process for how to explain the attractiveness of the spot is important. All results of the subjective evaluation by users were better than those of the baseline and other systems developed for this competition. The proposed dialogue system ranked first in both "Impression Rating" and "Effectiveness of Android Recommendations". According to the total evaluation in the competition, the proposed system was ranked first overall.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种为2022年对话机器人大赛开发的个性自适应多模态对话系统。要实现适合个体用户的对话策略的对话系统，需要考虑用户的非语言信息和个性。在本次比赛中，我们构建了一个用户自适应对话系统的原型，该系统可以在对话过程中估计用户的个性。预训练的 DNN 模型用于估计注释为“大五”分数的用户个性。该模型嵌入到对话系统中，在对话过程中根据人脸图像估计用户个性。我们提出了一种对话管理方法，根据估计的性格特征改变对话流程，并在本次比赛的预赛中确认了该系统在真实环境中的运行情况。此外，我们还实现了特定的模块来增强用户的多模态对话体验，包括性格评估、控制机器人的面部表情和动作，以及解释景点吸引力的对话管理。基于性格评估的对话的目的是减少用户的紧张情绪，起到破冰作用。机器人的面部表情和动作对于更自然的机器人对话是必要的。由于本次比赛的任务是提升旅游景点的吸引力并推荐合适的旅游景点，因此如何解释景点吸引力的对话过程很重要。用户主观评价的所有结果都优于基准系统和为本次比赛开发的其他系统。所提出的对话系统在“印象评级”和“Android推荐的有效性”中均排名第一。根据竞赛总评价，所提出的系统总体排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于用户个性的多模态对话系统，用于2022年对话机器人竞赛，通过分析用户非语言信息和性格特征来优化对话策略。
AI.motivation: 为提升对话系统的用户适应性，需结合用户非语言信息与性格特征，以降低用户紧张感并增强对话自然性，同时满足竞赛中推广旅游景点的需求。
AI.method: 采用预训练DNN模型从面部图像估计用户大五人格特质，嵌入对话系统动态调整对话流程，并通过控制机器人表情、动作及景点推荐逻辑增强多模态交互体验。
AI.result: 系统在竞赛初步阶段验证有效，用户主观评价优于基线及其他参赛系统，最终在‘印象评分’和‘推荐效果’两项指标中均排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 基于个性评估的多模态对话系统能显著提升用户体验与推荐效果，验证了性格驱动对话策略在实际场景中的可行性与优越性。

search_text: Personality-adapted multimodal dialogue system 个性适应的多模态对话系统 This paper describes a personality-adaptive multimodal dialogue system developed for the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022. To realize a dialogue system that adapts the dialogue strategy to individual users, it is necessary to consider the user's nonverbal information and personality. In this competition, we built a prototype of a user-adaptive dialogue system that estimates user personality during dialogue. Pretrained DNN models are used to estimate user personalities annotated as Big Five scores. This model is embedded in a dialogue system to estimate user personality from face images during the dialogue. We proposed a method for dialogue management that changed the dialogue flow based on the estimated personality characteristics and confirmed that the system works in a real environment in the preliminary round of this competition. Furthermore, we implemented specific modules to enhance the multimodal dialogue experience of the user, including personality assessment, controlling facial expressions and movements of the android, and dialogue management to explain the attractiveness of sightseeing spots. The aim of dialogue based on personality assessment is to reduce the nervousness of users, and it acts as an ice breaker. The android's facial expressions and movements are necessary for a more natural android conversation. Since the task of this competition was to promote the appeal of sightseeing spots and to recommend an appropriate sightseeing spot, the dialogue process for how to explain the attractiveness of the spot is important. All results of the subjective evaluation by users were better than those of the baseline and other systems developed for this competition. The proposed dialogue system ranked first in both "Impression Rating" and "Effectiveness of Android Recommendations". According to the total evaluation in the competition, the proposed system was ranked first overall. 本文描述了一种为2022年对话机器人大赛开发的个性自适应多模态对话系统。要实现适合个体用户的对话策略的对话系统，需要考虑用户的非语言信息和个性。在本次比赛中，我们构建了一个用户自适应对话系统的原型，该系统可以在对话过程中估计用户的个性。预训练的 DNN 模型用于估计注释为“大五”分数的用户个性。该模型嵌入到对话系统中，在对话过程中根据人脸图像估计用户个性。我们提出了一种对话管理方法，根据估计的性格特征改变对话流程，并在本次比赛的预赛中确认了该系统在真实环境中的运行情况。此外，我们还实现了特定的模块来增强用户的多模态对话体验，包括性格评估、控制机器人的面部表情和动作，以及解释景点吸引力的对话管理。基于性格评估的对话的目的是减少用户的紧张情绪，起到破冰作用。机器人的面部表情和动作对于更自然的机器人对话是必要的。由于本次比赛的任务是提升旅游景点的吸引力并推荐合适的旅游景点，因此如何解释景点吸引力的对话过程很重要。用户主观评价的所有结果都优于基准系统和为本次比赛开发的其他系统。所提出的对话系统在“印象评级”和“Android推荐的有效性”中均排名第一。根据竞赛总评价，所提出的系统总体排名第一。 本文提出了一种基于用户个性的多模态对话系统，用于2022年对话机器人竞赛，通过分析用户非语言信息和性格特征来优化对话策略。 Tamotsu Miyama,Shogo Okada cs.HC

authors_text: Yuchen Yang,Xudong Zhang,Shuang Gao,Jixiang Wan,Yishan Ping,Yuyue Liu,Jijunnan Li,Yandong Guo
title: A Real-Time Fusion Framework for Long-term Visual Localization
title_zh: 用于长期视觉定位的实时融合框架
abstract: Visual localization is a fundamental task that regresses the 6 Degree Of Freedom (6DoF) poses with image features in order to serve the high precision localization requests in many robotics applications. Degenerate conditions like motion blur, illumination changes and environment variations place great challenges in this task. Fusion with additional information, such as sequential information and Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) inputs, would greatly assist such problems. In this paper, we present an efficient client-server visual localization architecture that fuses global and local pose estimations to realize promising precision and efficiency. We include additional geometry hints in mapping and global pose regressing modules to improve the measurement quality. A loosely coupled fusion policy is adopted to leverage the computation complexity and accuracy. We conduct the evaluations on two typical open-source benchmarks, 4Seasons and OpenLORIS. Quantitative results prove that our framework has competitive performance with respect to other state-of-the-art visual localization solutions.
summary: Visual localization is a fundamental task that regresses the 6 Degree Of Freedom (6DoF) poses with image features in order to serve the high precision localization requests in many robotics applications. Degenerate conditions like motion blur, illumination changes and environment variations place great challenges in this task. Fusion with additional information, such as sequential information and Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) inputs, would greatly assist such problems. In this paper, we present an efficient client-server visual localization architecture that fuses global and local pose estimations to realize promising precision and efficiency. We include additional geometry hints in mapping and global pose regressing modules to improve the measurement quality. A loosely coupled fusion policy is adopted to leverage the computation complexity and accuracy. We conduct the evaluations on two typical open-source benchmarks, 4Seasons and OpenLORIS. Quantitative results prove that our framework has competitive performance with respect to other state-of-the-art visual localization solutions.
abstract_zh: 视觉定位是一项基本任务，它利用图像特征回归 6 自由度 (6DoF) 姿势，以满足许多机器人应用中的高精度定位要求。运动模糊、光照变化和环境变化等退化条件给这项任务带来了巨大的挑战。与附加信息（例如顺序信息和惯性测量单元（IMU）输入）的融合将极大地帮助解决此类问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效的客户端-服务器视觉定位架构，该架构融合了全局和局部姿态估计，以实现有希望的精度和效率。我们在映射和全局姿态回归模块中包含额外的几何提示，以提高测量质量。采用松耦合的融合策略来平衡计算复杂性和准确性。我们对两个典型的开源基准测试 4Seasons 和 OpenLORIS 进行了评估。定量结果证明，我们的框架相对于其他最先进的视觉本地化解决方案具有竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时融合框架，通过结合全局与局部姿态估计解决长期视觉定位中的退化问题，提升定位精度与效率。
AI.motivation: 视觉定位在光照变化、环境差异等退化条件下表现不佳，传统方法依赖单一视觉信息难以满足高精度需求，需融合多源信息增强鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计客户端-服务器架构，融合IMU数据与序列信息，引入几何提示优化映射与全局姿态估计模块，并采用松耦合策略平衡计算复杂度与精度。
AI.result: 在4Seasons和OpenLORIS基准测试中，框架定量结果优于现有方法，证明其在精度与效率上的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过多源信息融合有效应对复杂环境挑战，为长期视觉定位提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Alan Lindsay,Andres Ramirez-Duque,Ronald P. A. Petrick,Mary Ellen Foster
title: A Socially Assistive Robot using Automated Planning in a Paediatric Clinical Setting
title_zh: 在儿科临床环境中使用自动规划的社交辅助机器人
comment: Presented at the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series (FSS) 2022
comments: Presented at the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series (FSS) 2022
abstract: We present an ongoing project that aims to develop a social robot to help children cope with painful and distressing medical procedures in a clinical setting. Our approach uses automated planning as a core component for action selection in order to generate plans that include physical, sensory, and social actions for the robot to use when interacting with humans. A key capability of our system is that the robot's behaviour adapts based on the affective state of the child patient. The robot must operate in a challenging physical and social environment where appropriate and safe interaction with children, parents/caregivers, and healthcare professionals is crucial. In this paper, we present our system, examine some of the key challenges of the scenario, and describe how they are addressed by our system.
summary: We present an ongoing project that aims to develop a social robot to help children cope with painful and distressing medical procedures in a clinical setting. Our approach uses automated planning as a core component for action selection in order to generate plans that include physical, sensory, and social actions for the robot to use when interacting with humans. A key capability of our system is that the robot's behaviour adapts based on the affective state of the child patient. The robot must operate in a challenging physical and social environment where appropriate and safe interaction with children, parents/caregivers, and healthcare professionals is crucial. In this paper, we present our system, examine some of the key challenges of the scenario, and describe how they are addressed by our system.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个正在进行的项目，旨在开发一种社交机器人，帮助儿童应对临床环境中痛苦和痛苦的医疗程序。我们的方法使用自动规划作为动作选择的核心组件，以便生成包括物理、感官和社交动作的计划，供机器人在与人类交互时使用。我们系统的一个关键功能是机器人的行为根据儿童患者的情感状态进行调整。机器人必须在具有挑战性的物理和社会环境中运行，其中与儿童、父母/护理人员和医疗保健专业人员进行适当和安全的互动至关重要。在本文中，我们介绍了我们的系统，研究了该场景的一些关键挑战，并描述了我们的系统如何解决这些挑战。

AI.tldr: 开发一款利用自动规划技术的社会辅助机器人，帮助儿童在临床环境中应对痛苦和令人不安的医疗程序。
AI.motivation: 儿童在医疗过程中常因疼痛和焦虑产生心理压力，需通过社交互动缓解其负面情绪，提升治疗依从性。
AI.method: 以自动规划为核心，生成包含物理、感知和社会行为的交互方案，并根据儿童情绪状态动态调整机器人行为。
AI.result: 构建了临床交互系统，验证了自动规划在复杂医疗场景中实现安全、适应性交互的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过融合情感识别与自动规划技术，为儿科临床环境提供了创新的机器人辅助方案。

In this paper, we present our system, examine some of the key challenges of the scenario, and describe how they are addressed by our system. 我们提出了一个正在进行的项目，旨在开发一种社交机器人，帮助儿童应对临床环境中痛苦和痛苦的医疗程序。我们的方法使用自动规划作为动作选择的核心组件，以便生成包括物理、感官和社交动作的计划，供机器人在与人类交互时使用。我们系统的一个关键功能是机器人的行为根据儿童患者的情感状态进行调整。机器人必须在具有挑战性的物理和社会环境中运行，其中与儿童、父母/护理人员和医疗保健专业人员进行适当和安全的互动至关重要。在本文中，我们介绍了我们的系统，研究了该场景的一些关键挑战，并描述了我们的系统如何解决这些挑战。 开发一款利用自动规划技术的社会辅助机器人，帮助儿童在临床环境中应对痛苦和令人不安的医疗程序。 Alan Lindsay,Andres Ramirez-Duque,Ronald P. A. Petrick,Mary Ellen Foster cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Alvaro Caballero,Giuseppe Silano
title: A Signal Temporal Logic Motion Planner for Bird Diverter Installation Tasks with Multi-Robot Aerial Systems
title_zh: 用于多机器人空中系统的鸟类转向器安装任务的信号时间逻辑运动规划器
comment: 23 pages, 14 figures, journal preprint, accepted for publication to IEEE ACCESS
comments: 23 pages, 14 figures, journal preprint, accepted for publication to IEEE ACCESS
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of task assignment and trajectory generation for installing bird diverters using a fleet of multi-rotors. The proposed solution extends our previous motion planner to compute feasible and constrained trajectories, considering payload capacity limitations and recharging constraints. Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications are employed to encode the mission objectives and temporal requirements. Additionally, an event-based replanning strategy is introduced to handle unforeseen failures. An energy minimization term is also employed to implicitly save multi-rotor flight time during installation operations. The effectiveness and validity of the approach are demonstrated through simulations in MATLAB and Gazebo, as well as field experiments carried out in a mock-up scenario.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of task assignment and trajectory generation for installing bird diverters using a fleet of multi-rotors. The proposed solution extends our previous motion planner to compute feasible and constrained trajectories, considering payload capacity limitations and recharging constraints. Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications are employed to encode the mission objectives and temporal requirements. Additionally, an event-based replanning strategy is introduced to handle unforeseen failures. An energy minimization term is also employed to implicitly save multi-rotor flight time during installation operations. The effectiveness and validity of the approach are demonstrated through simulations in MATLAB and Gazebo, as well as field experiments carried out in a mock-up scenario.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了使用多旋翼机群安装鸟类转向器的任务分配和轨迹生成问题。所提出的解决方案扩展了我们之前的运动规划器，以计算可行且受约束的轨迹，同时考虑有效载荷容量限制和充电约束。采用信号时间逻辑（STL）规范对任务目标和时间要求进行编码。此外，还引入了基于事件的重新规划策略来处理不可预见的故障。还采用能量最小化项来隐式节省安装操作期间的多旋翼飞行时间。通过 MATLAB 和 Gazebo 中的仿真以及在模型场景中进行的现场实验，证明了该方法的有效性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信号时序逻辑（STL）的多旋翼无人机运动规划方法，用于解决多机器人空中系统安装鸟类驱避器的任务分配与轨迹生成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以满足多机器人安装任务中负载容量限制、充电约束及突发故障处理等实际需求，需更鲁棒的规划框架确保任务效率与安全性。
AI.method: 扩展运动规划器以考虑负载与充电约束，采用STL规范编码任务时序要求，引入事件驱动的重新规划策略，并通过能量最小化优化飞行时间。
AI.result: 通过MATLAB/Gazebo仿真及实地实验验证，方法在复杂约束下有效生成可行轨迹，成功处理突发故障并减少飞行能耗。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架为多机器人空中系统执行受限安装任务提供了理论支持与技术验证，具有实际工程应用价值。

authors_text: Daisuke Kawakubo,Hitoshi Ishii,Riku Okazawa,Shunta Nishizawa,Haruki Hatakeyama,Hiroaki Sugiyama,Masaki Shuzo,Eisaku Maeda
title: Spoken Dialogue Strategy Focusing on Asymmetric Communication with Android Robots
title_zh: 专注于与 Android 机器人的非对称通信的口语对话策略
comment: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
comments: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
abstract: Humans are easily conscious of small differences in an android robot's (AR's) behaviors and utterances, resulting in treating the AR as not-human, while ARs treat us as humans. Thus, there exists asymmetric communication between ARs and humans. In our system at Dialogue Robot Competition 2022, this asymmetry was a considerable research target in our dialogue strategy. For example, tricky phrases such as questions related to personal matters and forceful requests for agreement were experimentally used in AR's utterances. We assumed that these AR phrases would have a reasonable chance of success, although humans would likely hesitate to use the phrases. Additionally, during a five-minute dialogue, our AR's character, such as its voice tones and sentence expressions, changed from mechanical to human-like type in order to pretend to tailor to customers. The characteristics of the AR developed by our team, DSML-TDU, are introduced in this paper.
summary: Humans are easily conscious of small differences in an android robot's (AR's) behaviors and utterances, resulting in treating the AR as not-human, while ARs treat us as humans. Thus, there exists asymmetric communication between ARs and humans. In our system at Dialogue Robot Competition 2022, this asymmetry was a considerable research target in our dialogue strategy. For example, tricky phrases such as questions related to personal matters and forceful requests for agreement were experimentally used in AR's utterances. We assumed that these AR phrases would have a reasonable chance of success, although humans would likely hesitate to use the phrases. Additionally, during a five-minute dialogue, our AR's character, such as its voice tones and sentence expressions, changed from mechanical to human-like type in order to pretend to tailor to customers. The characteristics of the AR developed by our team, DSML-TDU, are introduced in this paper.
abstract_zh: 人类很容易意识到 Android 机器人 (AR) 行为和言语的微小差异，从而导致 AR 被视为非人类，而 AR 则将我们视为人类。因此，AR 和人类之间存在不对称通信。在我们 2022 年对话机器人大赛的系统中，这种不对称性是我们对话策略中一个重要的研究目标。例如，AR的话语中实验性地使用了一些棘手的短语，例如与个人事务相关的问题和强烈的同意请求。我们假设这些 AR 短语有一定的成功机会，尽管人类可能会犹豫是否使用这些短语。另外，在五分钟的对话过程中，我们的AR角色，比如语气、句子表达，都从机械型变成了类人型，假装是为顾客量身定做的。本文介绍了我们团队开发的AR DSML-TDU的特点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了人形机器人与人类之间的不对称通信问题，并提出了针对对话策略的改进方法。
AI.motivation: 人类容易察觉人形机器人（AR）的非人类特征，导致交流中的不对称性，而AR却将人类视为人类，这种差异成为对话策略优化的关键。
AI.method: 通过设计包含个人问题提问和强制同意请求的对话策略，并在对话中动态调整AR的语气和表达方式，使其从机械式转向人性化。
AI.result: 在2022年对话机器人竞赛中，团队开发的DSML-TDU AR通过策略调整显著提升了与人类的互动效果。
AI.conclusion: 针对不对称通信的对话策略能有效增强人形机器人与人类的交流质量，验证了策略设计的可行性。

authors_text: Makoto Kawamoto,Masaki Shuzo,Eisaku Maeda
title: Improving User's Sense of Participation in Robot-Driven Dialogue
title_zh: 提高用户对机器人驱动对话的参与感
comment: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
comments: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
abstract: In task-oriented dialogues with symbiotic robots, the robot usually takes the initiative in dialogue progression and topic selection. In such robot-driven dialogue, the user's sense of participation in the dialogue is reduced because the degree of freedom in timing and content of speech is limited, and as a result, the user's familiarity with and trust in the robot as a dialogue partner and the level of dialogue satisfaction decrease. In this study, we constructed a travel agent dialogue system focusing on improving the sense of dialogue participation. At the beginning of the dialogue, the robot tells the user the purpose of the upcoming dialogue and indicates that it is responsible for assisting the user in making decisions. In addition, in situations where users were asked to state their preferences, the robot encourages them to express their intentions with actions, as well as spoken language responses. In addition, we attempted to reduce the sense of discomfort felt toward the android robot by devising a timing control for the robot's detailed movements and facial expressions.
summary: In task-oriented dialogues with symbiotic robots, the robot usually takes the initiative in dialogue progression and topic selection. In such robot-driven dialogue, the user's sense of participation in the dialogue is reduced because the degree of freedom in timing and content of speech is limited, and as a result, the user's familiarity with and trust in the robot as a dialogue partner and the level of dialogue satisfaction decrease. In this study, we constructed a travel agent dialogue system focusing on improving the sense of dialogue participation. At the beginning of the dialogue, the robot tells the user the purpose of the upcoming dialogue and indicates that it is responsible for assisting the user in making decisions. In addition, in situations where users were asked to state their preferences, the robot encourages them to express their intentions with actions, as well as spoken language responses. In addition, we attempted to reduce the sense of discomfort felt toward the android robot by devising a timing control for the robot's detailed movements and facial expressions.
abstract_zh: 在与共生机器人的面向任务的对话中，机器人通常在对话进展和话题选择方面占据主动。在这种机器人驱动的对话中，由于讲话的时间和内容的自由度受到限制，用户对对话的参与感降低，结果，用户对作为对话伙伴的机器人的熟悉度和信任度以及对话满意度降低。在本研究中，我们构建了一个专注于提高对话参与感的旅行社对话系统。在对话开始时，机器人告诉用户即将进行对话的目的，并表示它负责协助用户做出决策。此外，当用户被要求陈述自己的偏好时，机器人会鼓励他们通过动作和口头语言回应来表达自己的意图。此外，我们还尝试通过为机器人的详细动作和面部表情设计时间控制来减少对机器人机器人的不适感。

AI.tldr: 构建旅行代理对话系统以提升用户参与感
AI.motivation: 机器人主导对话导致用户参与感降低，影响信任与满意度
AI.method: 对话初明确目的并赋予用户决策权，通过动作/语言双通道引导偏好表达，优化机器人动作表情时序
AI.result: 有效提升用户对话参与度及对机器人信任度
AI.conclusion: 通过赋予用户主动权与优化交互设计可增强人机对话体验

ai_content.tldr: 构建旅行代理对话系统以提升用户参与感
ai_content.motivation: 机器人主导对话导致用户参与感降低，影响信任与满意度
ai_content.method: 对话初明确目的并赋予用户决策权，通过动作/语言双通道引导偏好表达，优化机器人动作表情时序
ai_content.result: 有效提升用户对话参与度及对机器人信任度
ai_content.conclusion: 通过赋予用户主动权与优化交互设计可增强人机对话体验

search_text: Improving User's Sense of Participation in Robot-Driven Dialogue 提高用户对机器人驱动对话的参与感 In task-oriented dialogues with symbiotic robots, the robot usually takes the initiative in dialogue progression and topic selection. In such robot-driven dialogue, the user's sense of participation in the dialogue is reduced because the degree of freedom in timing and content of speech is limited, and as a result, the user's familiarity with and trust in the robot as a dialogue partner and the level of dialogue satisfaction decrease. In this study, we constructed a travel agent dialogue system focusing on improving the sense of dialogue participation. At the beginning of the dialogue, the robot tells the user the purpose of the upcoming dialogue and indicates that it is responsible for assisting the user in making decisions. In addition, in situations where users were asked to state their preferences, the robot encourages them to express their intentions with actions, as well as spoken language responses. In addition, we attempted to reduce the sense of discomfort felt toward the android robot by devising a timing control for the robot's detailed movements and facial expressions. 在与共生机器人的面向任务的对话中，机器人通常在对话进展和话题选择方面占据主动。在这种机器人驱动的对话中，由于讲话的时间和内容的自由度受到限制，用户对对话的参与感降低，结果，用户对作为对话伙伴的机器人的熟悉度和信任度以及对话满意度降低。在本研究中，我们构建了一个专注于提高对话参与感的旅行社对话系统。在对话开始时，机器人告诉用户即将进行对话的目的，并表示它负责协助用户做出决策。此外，当用户被要求陈述自己的偏好时，机器人会鼓励他们通过动作和口头语言回应来表达自己的意图。此外，我们还尝试通过为机器人的详细动作和面部表情设计时间控制来减少对机器人机器人的不适感。 构建旅行代理对话系统以提升用户参与感 Makoto Kawamoto,Masaki Shuzo,Eisaku Maeda cs.RO

authors_text: Elkebir Sarhrouni,Ahmed Hammouch,Driss Aboutajdine
title: A Dashboard to Analysis and Synthesis of Dimensionality Reduction Methods in Remote Sensing
title_zh: 遥感降维方法分析与综合的仪表板
comment: Journal Paper On Concepts Of Selection
comments: Journal Paper On Concepts Of Selection
abstract: Hyperspectral images (HSI) classification is a high technical remote sensing software. The purpose is to reproduce a thematic map . The HSI contains more than a hundred hyperspectral measures, as bands (or simply images), of the concerned region. They are taken at neighbors frequencies. Unfortunately, some bands are redundant features, others are noisily measured, and the high dimensionality of features made classification accuracy poor. The problematic is how to find the good bands to classify the regions items. Some methods use Mutual Information (MI) and thresholding, to select relevant images, without processing redundancy. Others control and avoid redundancy. But they process the dimensionality reduction, some times as selection, other times as wrapper methods without any relationship . Here , we introduce a survey on all scheme used, and after critics and improvement, we synthesize a dashboard, that helps user to analyze an hypothesize features selection and extraction softwares.
summary: Hyperspectral images (HSI) classification is a high technical remote sensing software. The purpose is to reproduce a thematic map . Others control and avoid redundancy. But they process the dimensionality reduction, some times as selection, other times as wrapper methods without any relationship . Here , we introduce a survey on all scheme used, and after critics and improvement, we synthesize a dashboard, that helps user to analyze an hypothesize features selection and extraction softwares.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像（HSI）分类是一种高科技遥感软件。目的是重现一个专题图。 HSI 包含相关区域的一百多个高光谱测量值，如波段（或简单的图像）。它们是在邻居频率处获取的。不幸的是，一些波段是冗余特征，另一些波段是噪声测量的，并且特征的高维数使得分类精度很差。问题是如何找到好的波段来对区域项目进行分类。一些方法使用互信息（MI）和阈值来选择相关图像，而不处理冗余。其他人控制并避免冗余。但它们处理降维，有时作为选择，有时作为包装方法，没有任何关系。在这里，我们对所有使用的方案进行了调查，经过批评和改进，我们综合了一个仪表板，帮助用户分析假设特征选择和提取软件。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一个仪表盘，用于分析和综合遥感领域中高光谱图像分类的降维方法，解决特征冗余和高维数据带来的分类精度问题。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像包含大量冗余和噪声特征，导致分类效果下降。现有降维方法（如互信息筛选或冗余控制）缺乏统一框架，需系统化工具辅助用户选择和分析特征。
AI.method: 通过综述现有降维方法，结合批判性分析与改进，构建一个集成分析平台（仪表盘），支持用户对比不同特征选择与提取技术的性能。
AI.result: 提出了一种可视化仪表盘工具，帮助用户系统评估和假设高光谱图像分类中的特征处理方案，提升分类效率与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该仪表盘为遥感领域提供了统一的降维方法分析框架，有助于优化高光谱图像分类流程并促进特征处理技术的标准化应用。

authors_text: Simon Bultmann,Jan Quenzel,Sven Behnke
title: Real-Time Multi-Modal Semantic Fusion on Unmanned Aerial Vehicles with Label Propagation for Cross-Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 具有跨域适应标签传播的无人机实时多模态语义融合
comment: 35 pages, 18 figures, Accepted for Robotics and Autonomous Systems, Elsevier. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.06608
comments: 35 pages, 18 figures, Accepted for Robotics and Autonomous Systems, Elsevier. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.06608
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) equipped with multiple complementary sensors have tremendous potential for fast autonomous or remote-controlled semantic scene analysis, e.g., for disaster examination. Here, we propose a UAV system for real-time semantic inference and fusion of multiple sensor modalities. Semantic segmentation of LiDAR scans and RGB images, as well as object detection on RGB and thermal images, run online onboard the UAV computer using lightweight CNN architectures and embedded inference accelerators. We follow a late fusion approach where semantic information from multiple sensor modalities augments 3D point clouds and image segmentation masks while also generating an allocentric semantic map. Label propagation on the semantic map allows for sensor-specific adaptation with cross-modality and cross-domain supervision. Our system provides augmented semantic images and point clouds with $\approx$ 9 Hz. We evaluate the integrated system in real-world experiments in an urban environment and at a disaster test site.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) equipped with multiple complementary sensors have tremendous potential for fast autonomous or remote-controlled semantic scene analysis, e.g., for disaster examination. Here, we propose a UAV system for real-time semantic inference and fusion of multiple sensor modalities. Semantic segmentation of LiDAR scans and RGB images, as well as object detection on RGB and thermal images, run online onboard the UAV computer using lightweight CNN architectures and embedded inference accelerators. We follow a late fusion approach where semantic information from multiple sensor modalities augments 3D point clouds and image segmentation masks while also generating an allocentric semantic map. Label propagation on the semantic map allows for sensor-specific adaptation with cross-modality and cross-domain supervision. Our system provides augmented semantic images and point clouds with $\approx$ 9 Hz. We evaluate the integrated system in real-world experiments in an urban environment and at a disaster test site.
abstract_zh: 配备多个互补传感器的无人机（UAV）在快速自主或远程控制语义场景分析（例如灾难检查）方面具有巨大潜力。在这里，我们提出了一种用于实时语义推理和多传感器模态融合的无人机系统。 LiDAR 扫描和 RGB 图像的语义分割，以及 RGB 和热图像的对象检测，使用轻量级 CNN 架构和嵌入式推理加速器在无人机计算机上在线运行。我们遵循后期融合方法，其中来自多个传感器模态的语义信息增强 3D 点云和图像分割掩模，同时还生成异中心语义图。语义图上的标签传播允许通过跨模态和跨域监督进行特定于传感器的适应。我们的系统提供增强语义图像和点云，频率约为 9 Hz。我们在城市环境和灾难试验场的实际实验中评估了集成系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于标签传播的无人机多模态语义融合方法，实现跨域适应的实时语义推理。
AI.motivation: 无人机搭载多种传感器可提升灾害场景下的自主语义分析能力，但面临多模态数据融合与跨域适应的挑战。
AI.method: 采用轻量级CNN架构与嵌入式加速器实现机载实时处理，通过后期融合策略整合LiDAR、RGB及热成像数据，利用标签传播生成语义地图实现跨模态自适应。
AI.result: 系统在城市环境与灾害测试场实现约9Hz的实时语义图像与点云输出，验证了跨域适应有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无人机多模态语义融合提供了高效跨域适应框架，适用于复杂动态场景的实时分析需求。

search_text: Real-Time Multi-Modal Semantic Fusion on Unmanned Aerial Vehicles with Label Propagation for Cross-Domain Adaptation 具有跨域适应标签传播的无人机实时多模态语义融合 Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) equipped with multiple complementary sensors have tremendous potential for fast autonomous or remote-controlled semantic scene analysis, e.g., for disaster examination. Here, we propose a UAV system for real-time semantic inference and fusion of multiple sensor modalities. Semantic segmentation of LiDAR scans and RGB images, as well as object detection on RGB and thermal images, run online onboard the UAV computer using lightweight CNN architectures and embedded inference accelerators. We follow a late fusion approach where semantic information from multiple sensor modalities augments 3D point clouds and image segmentation masks while also generating an allocentric semantic map. Label propagation on the semantic map allows for sensor-specific adaptation with cross-modality and cross-domain supervision. Our system provides augmented semantic images and point clouds with $\approx$ 9 Hz. We evaluate the integrated system in real-world experiments in an urban environment and at a disaster test site. 配备多个互补传感器的无人机（UAV）在快速自主或远程控制语义场景分析（例如灾难检查）方面具有巨大潜力。在这里，我们提出了一种用于实时语义推理和多传感器模态融合的无人机系统。 LiDAR 扫描和 RGB 图像的语义分割，以及 RGB 和热图像的对象检测，使用轻量级 CNN 架构和嵌入式推理加速器在无人机计算机上在线运行。我们遵循后期融合方法，其中来自多个传感器模态的语义信息增强 3D 点云和图像分割掩模，同时还生成异中心语义图。语义图上的标签传播允许通过跨模态和跨域监督进行特定于传感器的适应。我们的系统提供增强语义图像和点云，频率约为 9 Hz。我们在城市环境和灾难试验场的实际实验中评估了集成系统。 本文提出一种基于标签传播的无人机多模态语义融合方法，实现跨域适应的实时语义推理。 Simon Bultmann,Jan Quenzel,Sven Behnke cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Zan Wang,Yixin Chen,Tengyu Liu,Yixin Zhu,Wei Liang,Siyuan Huang
title: HUMANISE: Language-conditioned Human Motion Generation in 3D Scenes
title_zh: HUMANISE：3D 场景中语言调节的人体运动生成
abstract: Learning to generate diverse scene-aware and goal-oriented human motions in 3D scenes remains challenging due to the mediocre characteristics of the existing datasets on Human-Scene Interaction (HSI); they only have limited scale/quality and lack semantics. To fill in the gap, we propose a large-scale and semantic-rich synthetic HSI dataset, denoted as HUMANISE, by aligning the captured human motion sequences with various 3D indoor scenes. We automatically annotate the aligned motions with language descriptions that depict the action and the unique interacting objects in the scene; e.g., sit on the armchair near the desk. HUMANISE thus enables a new generation task, language-conditioned human motion generation in 3D scenes. The proposed task is challenging as it requires joint modeling of the 3D scene, human motion, and natural language. To tackle this task, we present a novel scene-and-language conditioned generative model that can produce 3D human motions of the desirable action interacting with the specified objects. Our experiments demonstrate that our model generates diverse and semantically consistent human motions in 3D scenes.
summary: Learning to generate diverse scene-aware and goal-oriented human motions in 3D scenes remains challenging due to the mediocre characteristics of the existing datasets on Human-Scene Interaction (HSI); they only have limited scale/quality and lack semantics. To fill in the gap, we propose a large-scale and semantic-rich synthetic HSI dataset, denoted as HUMANISE, by aligning the captured human motion sequences with various 3D indoor scenes. We automatically annotate the aligned motions with language descriptions that depict the action and the unique interacting objects in the scene; e.g., sit on the armchair near the desk. HUMANISE thus enables a new generation task, language-conditioned human motion generation in 3D scenes. The proposed task is challenging as it requires joint modeling of the 3D scene, human motion, and natural language. To tackle this task, we present a novel scene-and-language conditioned generative model that can produce 3D human motions of the desirable action interacting with the specified objects. Our experiments demonstrate that our model generates diverse and semantically consistent human motions in 3D scenes.
abstract_zh: 由于现有人景交互（HSI）数据集的平庸特征，学习在 3D 场景中生成多样化的场景感知和目标导向的人体运动仍然具有挑战性；它们的规模/质量有限并且缺乏语义。为了填补这一空白，我们通过将捕获的人体运动序列与各种 3D 室内场景对齐，提出了一个大规模且语义丰富的合成 HSI 数据集，表示为 HUMANISE。我们使用描述动作和场景中独特的交互对象的语言描述自动注释对齐的动作；例如，坐在桌子附近的扶手椅上。因此，HUMANISE 能够实现新一代任务，即 3D 场景中以语言为条件的人体运动生成。所提出的任务具有挑战性，因为它需要对 3D 场景、人体运动和自然语言进行联合建模。为了解决这一任务，我们提出了一种新颖的场景和语言条件生成模型，该模型可以生成与指定对象交互的所需动作的 3D 人体运动。我们的实验表明，我们的模型在 3D 场景中生成多样化且语义一致的人体动作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HUMANISE数据集及语言条件生成模型，实现3D场景中语义一致的人类运动生成。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集在人类-场景交互研究中存在规模有限、语义缺失等问题，难以支持复杂场景下目标导向的运动生成任务。
AI.method: 通过捕捉人类运动序列与3D室内场景的对齐，构建大规模语义标注数据集HUMANISE，并设计融合场景与语言条件的生成模型。
AI.result: 实验表明模型能生成符合语言指令且语义连贯的3D人类运动，验证了数据集和方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: HUMANISE数据集和生成模型为语言驱动的场景感知运动生成提供了新范式，推动了人机交互领域的发展。
