search_text: HUMANISE: Language-conditioned Human Motion Generation in 3D Scenes HUMANISE：3D 场景中语言调节的人体运动生成 Learning to generate diverse scene-aware and goal-oriented human motions in 3D scenes remains challenging due to the mediocre characteristics of the existing datasets on Human-Scene Interaction (HSI); they only have limited scale/quality and lack semantics. To fill in the gap, we propose a large-scale and semantic-rich synthetic HSI dataset, denoted as HUMANISE, by aligning the captured human motion sequences with various 3D indoor scenes. We automatically annotate the aligned motions with language descriptions that depict the action and the unique interacting objects in the scene; e.g., sit on the armchair near the desk. HUMANISE thus enables a new generation task, language-conditioned human motion generation in 3D scenes. The proposed task is challenging as it requires joint modeling of the 3D scene, human motion, and natural language. To tackle this task, we present a novel scene-and-language conditioned generative model that can produce 3D human motions of the desirable action interacting with the specified objects. Our experiments demonstrate that our model generates diverse and semantically consistent human motions in 3D scenes. 由于现有人景交互（HSI）数据集的平庸特征，学习在 3D 场景中生成多样化的场景感知和目标导向的人体运动仍然具有挑战性；它们的规模/质量有限并且缺乏语义。为了填补这一空白，我们通过将捕获的人体运动序列与各种 3D 室内场景对齐，提出了一个大规模且语义丰富的合成 HSI 数据集，表示为 HUMANISE。我们使用描述动作和场景中独特的交互对象的语言描述自动注释对齐的动作；例如，坐在桌子附近的扶手椅上。因此，HUMANISE 能够实现新一代任务，即 3D 场景中以语言为条件的人体运动生成。所提出的任务具有挑战性，因为它需要对 3D 场景、人体运动和自然语言进行联合建模。为了解决这一任务，我们提出了一种新颖的场景和语言条件生成模型，该模型可以生成与指定对象交互的所需动作的 3D 人体运动。我们的实验表明，我们的模型在 3D 场景中生成多样化且语义一致的人体动作。 本文提出HUMANISE数据集及语言条件生成模型，实现3D场景中语义一致的人类运动生成。 Zan Wang,Yixin Chen,Tengyu Liu,Yixin Zhu,Wei Liang,Siyuan Huang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Hankyul Baek,Won Joon Yun,Joongheon Kim
title: 3D Scalable Quantum Convolutional Neural Networks for Point Cloud Data Processing in Classification Applications
title_zh: 用于分类应用中点云数据处理的 3D 可扩展量子卷积神经网络
abstract: With the beginning of the noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) era, a quantum neural network (QNN) has recently emerged as a solution for several specific problems that classical neural networks cannot solve. Moreover, a quantum convolutional neural network (QCNN) is the quantum-version of CNN because it can process high-dimensional vector inputs in contrast to QNN. However, due to the nature of quantum computing, it is difficult to scale up the QCNN to extract a sufficient number of features due to barren plateaus. Motivated by this, a novel 3D scalable QCNN (sQCNN-3D) is proposed for point cloud data processing in classification applications. Furthermore, reverse fidelity training (RF-Train) is additionally considered on top of sQCNN-3D for diversifying features with a limited number of qubits using the fidelity of quantum computing. Our data-intensive performance evaluation verifies that the proposed algorithm achieves desired performance.
summary: With the beginning of the noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) era, a quantum neural network (QNN) has recently emerged as a solution for several specific problems that classical neural networks cannot solve. Moreover, a quantum convolutional neural network (QCNN) is the quantum-version of CNN because it can process high-dimensional vector inputs in contrast to QNN. However, due to the nature of quantum computing, it is difficult to scale up the QCNN to extract a sufficient number of features due to barren plateaus. Motivated by this, a novel 3D scalable QCNN (sQCNN-3D) is proposed for point cloud data processing in classification applications. Furthermore, reverse fidelity training (RF-Train) is additionally considered on top of sQCNN-3D for diversifying features with a limited number of qubits using the fidelity of quantum computing. Our data-intensive performance evaluation verifies that the proposed algorithm achieves desired performance.
abstract_zh: 随着噪声中尺度量子（NISQ）时代的开始，量子神经网络（QNN）最近出现，作为经典神经网络无法解决的几个特定问题的解决方案。此外，量子卷积神经网络 (QCNN) 是 CNN 的量子版本，因为与 QNN 相比，它可以处理高维向量输入。然而，由于量子计算的性质，由于贫瘠的平台，很难扩展 QCNN 来提取足够数量的特征。受此启发，提出了一种新颖的 3D 可扩展 QCNN (sQCNN-3D)，用于分类应用中的点云数据处理。此外，在 sQCNN-3D 之上还考虑了反向保真度训练（RF-Train），以利用量子计算的保​​真度以有限数量的量子位实现特征多样化。我们的数据密集型性能评估验证了所提出的算法达到了预期的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于点云数据分类的3D可扩展量子卷积神经网络（sQCNN-3D）。
AI.motivation: 由于量子计算的特性，传统的量子卷积神经网络（QCNN）在提取足够特征时面临困难，如 barren plateaus 问题，因此需要一种新的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种3D可扩展量子卷积神经网络（sQCNN-3D），并引入了反向保真度训练（RF-Train）方法，以在有限的量子比特下多样化特征。
AI.result: 数据密集型的性能评估验证了所提出算法能够达到预期的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为点云数据分类提供了一种新的量子计算方法，并通过引入反向保真度训练，提高了在有限量子比特下的性能表现。

authors_text: Marius-Mihail Gurgu,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund
title: Vision-based GNSS-Free Localization for UAVs in the Wild
title_zh: 野外无人机基于视觉的 GNSS-Free 定位
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, submitted to the International Conference on Mechanical Engineering and Robotics Research 2022
comments: 6 pages, 6 figures, submitted to the International Conference on Mechanical Engineering and Robotics Research 2022
abstract: Considering the accelerated development of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) applications in both industrial and research scenarios, there is an increasing need for localizing these aerial systems in non-urban environments, using GNSS-Free, vision-based methods. Our paper proposes a vision-based localization algorithm that utilizes deep features to compute geographical coordinates of a UAV flying in the wild. The method is based on matching salient features of RGB photographs captured by the drone camera and sections of a pre-built map consisting of georeferenced open-source satellite images. Experimental results prove that vision-based localization has comparable accuracy with traditional GNSS-based methods, which serve as ground truth. Compared to state-of-the-art Visual Odometry (VO) approaches, our solution is designed for long-distance, high-altitude UAV flights. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/TIERS/wildnav.
summary: Considering the accelerated development of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) applications in both industrial and research scenarios, there is an increasing need for localizing these aerial systems in non-urban environments, using GNSS-Free, vision-based methods. Our paper proposes a vision-based localization algorithm that utilizes deep features to compute geographical coordinates of a UAV flying in the wild. The method is based on matching salient features of RGB photographs captured by the drone camera and sections of a pre-built map consisting of georeferenced open-source satellite images. Experimental results prove that vision-based localization has comparable accuracy with traditional GNSS-based methods, which serve as ground truth. Compared to state-of-the-art Visual Odometry (VO) approaches, our solution is designed for long-distance, high-altitude UAV flights. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/TIERS/wildnav.
abstract_zh: 考虑到无人机 (UAV) 应用在工业和研究场景中的加速发展，越来越需要使用无 GNSS、基于视觉的方法在非城市环境中定位这些航空系统。我们的论文提出了一种基于视觉的定位算法，利用深度特征来计算野外飞行的无人机的地理坐标。该方法基于将无人机相机捕获的 RGB 照片的显着特征与由地理参考开源卫星图像组成的预构建地图的部分进行匹配。实验结果证明，基于视觉的定位与传统的基于 GNSS 的方法（作为地面实况）具有相当的精度。与最先进的视觉里程计 (VO) 方法相比，我们的解决方案专为长距离、高空无人机飞行而设计。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/TIERS/wildnav 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需GNSS的视觉定位方法，通过匹配无人机拍摄的RGB图像与预构建地理卫星地图，实现野外环境下的高精度无人机定位。
AI.motivation: 随着无人机在非城市环境中的应用增加，传统GNSS定位存在信号遮挡等问题，亟需开发无需GNSS的视觉定位技术以保证定位可靠性。
AI.method: 基于深度学习提取RGB图像显著特征，与预构建的地理参考卫星图像进行特征匹配，通过计算视觉特征对应关系推算无人机地理坐标。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法定位精度与传统GNSS相当，且相比现有视觉里程计方法更适用于长距离、高海拔飞行场景。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了视觉定位在复杂野外环境下的可行性，为GNSS受限场景提供了有效替代方案，且开源代码促进技术复用。

Our paper proposes a vision-based localization algorithm that utilizes deep features to compute geographical coordinates of a UAV flying in the wild. The method is based on matching salient features of RGB photographs captured by the drone camera and sections of a pre-built map consisting of georeferenced open-source satellite images. Experimental results prove that vision-based localization has comparable accuracy with traditional GNSS-based methods, which serve as ground truth. Compared to state-of-the-art Visual Odometry (VO) approaches, our solution is designed for long-distance, high-altitude UAV flights. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/TIERS/wildnav. 考虑到无人机 (UAV) 应用在工业和研究场景中的加速发展，越来越需要使用无 GNSS、基于视觉的方法在非城市环境中定位这些航空系统。我们的论文提出了一种基于视觉的定位算法，利用深度特征来计算野外飞行的无人机的地理坐标。该方法基于将无人机相机捕获的 RGB 照片的显着特征与由地理参考开源卫星图像组成的预构建地图的部分进行匹配。实验结果证明，基于视觉的定位与传统的基于 GNSS 的方法（作为地面实况）具有相当的精度。与最先进的视觉里程计 (VO) 方法相比，我们的解决方案专为长距离、高空无人机飞行而设计。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/TIERS/wildnav 获取。 本文提出一种无需GNSS的视觉定位方法，通过匹配无人机拍摄的RGB图像与预构建地理卫星地图，实现野外环境下的高精度无人机定位。 Marius-Mihail Gurgu,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund cs.RO

authors_text: Md Shajalal,Md Atabuzzaman,Maksuda Bilkis Baby,Md Rezaul Karim,Alexander Boden
title: Textual Entailment Recognition with Semantic Features from Empirical Text Representation
title_zh: 基于经验文本表示的语义特征的文本蕴涵识别
comment: Pre-print for our paper at International Conference on Speech & Language Technology for Low-resource Languages (SPELLL'2022)
comments: Pre-print for our paper at International Conference on Speech & Language Technology for Low-resource Languages (SPELLL'2022)
abstract: Textual entailment recognition is one of the basic natural language understanding(NLU) tasks. Understanding the meaning of sentences is a prerequisite before applying any natural language processing(NLP) techniques to automatically recognize the textual entailment. A text entails a hypothesis if and only if the true value of the hypothesis follows the text. Classical approaches generally utilize the feature value of each word from word embedding to represent the sentences. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to identifying the textual entailment relationship between text and hypothesis, thereby introducing a new semantic feature focusing on empirical threshold-based semantic text representation. We employ an element-wise Manhattan distance vector-based feature that can identify the semantic entailment relationship between the text-hypothesis pair. We carried out several experiments on a benchmark entailment classification(SICK-RTE) dataset. We train several machine learning(ML) algorithms applying both semantic and lexical features to classify the text-hypothesis pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Our empirical sentence representation technique enriches the semantic information of the texts and hypotheses found to be more efficient than the classical ones. In the end, our approach significantly outperforms known methods in understanding the meaning of the sentences for the textual entailment classification task.
summary: Textual entailment recognition is one of the basic natural language understanding(NLU) tasks. Understanding the meaning of sentences is a prerequisite before applying any natural language processing(NLP) techniques to automatically recognize the textual entailment. Classical approaches generally utilize the feature value of each word from word embedding to represent the sentences. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to identifying the textual entailment relationship between text and hypothesis, thereby introducing a new semantic feature focusing on empirical threshold-based semantic text representation. We employ an element-wise Manhattan distance vector-based feature that can identify the semantic entailment relationship between the text-hypothesis pair. We carried out several experiments on a benchmark entailment classification(SICK-RTE) dataset. We train several machine learning(ML) algorithms applying both semantic and lexical features to classify the text-hypothesis pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Our empirical sentence representation technique enriches the semantic information of the texts and hypotheses found to be more efficient than the classical ones. In the end, our approach significantly outperforms known methods in understanding the meaning of the sentences for the textual entailment classification task.
abstract_zh: 文本蕴涵识别是基本的自然语言理解（NLU）任务之一。在应用任何自然语言处理（NLP）技术自动识别文本蕴涵之前，理解句子的含义是先决条件。当且仅当假设的真实值遵循文本时，文本才包含假设。经典方法通常利用单词嵌入中每个单词的特征值来表示句子。在本文中，我们提出了一种识别文本和假设之间的文本蕴涵关系的新方法，从而引入了一种新的语义特征，重点关注基于经验阈值的语义文本表示。我们采用基于元素的曼哈顿距离向量的特征，可以识别文本假设对之间的语义蕴涵关系。我们在基准蕴涵分类（SICK-RTE）数据集上进行了多项实验。我们训练了几种机器学习（ML）算法，应用语义和词汇特征将文本假设对分类为蕴涵、中性或矛盾。我们的经验句子表示技术丰富了文本和假设的语义信息，被发现比经典的更有效。最后，我们的方法在理解文本蕴涵分类任务的句子含义方面明显优于已知方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于实证文本表示的语义特征方法，用于提升文本蕴含关系识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖词嵌入的词级特征，难以有效捕捉文本间的语义关联，需引入更高效的语义表示方式。
AI.method: 通过计算文本与假设间的逐元素曼哈顿距离向量特征，结合语义与词法特征，利用机器学习算法进行分类。
AI.result: 在SICK-RTE基准数据集上，该方法在文本蕴含分类任务中显著优于现有方法，准确率提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 实证语义特征表示能更高效地增强文本语义信息，为文本蕴含识别提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Benjamin Chamand,Olivier Risser-Maroix,Camille Kurtz,Philippe Joly,Nicolas Loménie
title: Fine-tune your Classifier: Finding Correlations With Temperature
title_zh: 微调您的分类器：寻找与温度的相关性
abstract: Temperature is a widely used hyperparameter in various tasks involving neural networks, such as classification or metric learning, whose choice can have a direct impact on the model performance. Most of existing works select its value using hyperparameter optimization methods requiring several runs to find the optimal value. We propose to analyze the impact of temperature on classification tasks by describing a dataset as a set of statistics computed on representations on which we can build a heuristic giving us a default value of temperature. We study the correlation between these extracted statistics and the observed optimal temperatures. This preliminary study on more than a hundred combinations of different datasets and features extractors highlights promising results towards the construction of a general heuristic for temperature.
summary: Temperature is a widely used hyperparameter in various tasks involving neural networks, such as classification or metric learning, whose choice can have a direct impact on the model performance. Most of existing works select its value using hyperparameter optimization methods requiring several runs to find the optimal value. We propose to analyze the impact of temperature on classification tasks by describing a dataset as a set of statistics computed on representations on which we can build a heuristic giving us a default value of temperature. We study the correlation between these extracted statistics and the observed optimal temperatures. This preliminary study on more than a hundred combinations of different datasets and features extractors highlights promising results towards the construction of a general heuristic for temperature.
abstract_zh: 温度是涉及神经网络的各种任务中广泛使用的超参数，例如分类或度量学习，其选择可以直接影响模型性能。大多数现有工作使用超参数优化方法来选择其值，需要多次运行才能找到最佳值。我们建议通过将数据集描述为一组根据表示计算的统计数据来分析温度对分类任务的影响，我们可以在其上构建启发式算法，为我们提供默认的温度值。我们研究这些提取的统计数据与观察到的最佳温度之间的相关性。这项对一百多种不同数据集和特征提取器组合的初步研究凸显了构建通用温度启发式方法的有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出通过分析数据集统计信息来构建温度参数的启发式方法，以优化分类任务中的温度选择。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖超参数优化需多次运行寻找最佳温度，而本文旨在通过数据集统计特征构建启发式方法，以更高效地确定温度值。
AI.method: 通过计算数据集表示的统计信息，构建启发式方法确定温度默认值，并分析统计量与最优温度的相关性。
AI.result: 在超过一百种数据集和特征提取器组合的初步研究中，显示出构建通用温度启发式方法的前景。
AI.conclusion: 统计量与最优温度存在显著相关性，为构建通用温度选择启发式方法提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Zixuan Li,Zhongni Hou,Saiping Guan,Xiaolong Jin,Weihua Peng,Long Bai,Yajuan Lyu,Wei Li,Jiafeng Guo,Xueqi Cheng
title: HiSMatch: Historical Structure Matching based Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning
title_zh: HiSMatch：基于时态知识图推理的历史结构匹配
abstract: A Temporal Knowledge Graph (TKG) is a sequence of KGs with respective timestamps, which adopts quadruples in the form of (\emph{subject}, \emph{relation}, \emph{object}, \emph{timestamp}) to describe dynamic facts. TKG reasoning has facilitated many real-world applications via answering such queries as (\emph{query entity}, \emph{query relation}, \emph{?}, \emph{future timestamp}) about future. This is actually a matching task between a query and candidate entities based on their historical structures, which reflect behavioral trends of the entities at different timestamps. In addition, recent KGs provide background knowledge of all the entities, which is also helpful for the matching. Thus, in this paper, we propose the \textbf{Hi}storical \textbf{S}tructure \textbf{Match}ing (\textbf{HiSMatch}) model. It applies two structure encoders to capture the semantic information contained in the historical structures of the query and candidate entities. Besides, it adopts another encoder to integrate the background knowledge into the model. TKG reasoning experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate the significant improvement of the proposed HiSMatch model, with up to 5.6\% performance improvement in MRR, compared to the state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: A Temporal Knowledge Graph (TKG) is a sequence of KGs with respective timestamps, which adopts quadruples in the form of (\emph{subject}, \emph{relation}, \emph{object}, \emph{timestamp}) to describe dynamic facts. TKG reasoning has facilitated many real-world applications via answering such queries as (\emph{query entity}, \emph{query relation}, \emph{?}, \emph{future timestamp}) about future. This is actually a matching task between a query and candidate entities based on their historical structures, which reflect behavioral trends of the entities at different timestamps. In addition, recent KGs provide background knowledge of all the entities, which is also helpful for the matching. Thus, in this paper, we propose the \textbf{Hi}storical \textbf{S}tructure \textbf{Match}ing (\textbf{HiSMatch}) model. It applies two structure encoders to capture the semantic information contained in the historical structures of the query and candidate entities. Besides, it adopts another encoder to integrate the background knowledge into the model. TKG reasoning experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate the significant improvement of the proposed HiSMatch model, with up to 5.6\% performance improvement in MRR, compared to the state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 时间知识图谱（TKG）是具有各自时间戳的知识图谱序列，采用（\emph{subject}，\emph{relation}，\emph{object}，\emph{timestamp}）形式的四元组来描述动态事实。 TKG 推理通过回答诸如（\emph{查询实体}、\emph{查询关系}、\emph{?}、\emph{未来时间戳}）等关于未来的查询，促进了许多现实世界的应用程序。这实际上是查询和候选实体之间基于历史结构的匹配任务，它反映了实体在不同时间戳下的行为趋势。此外，最近的知识图谱提供了所有实体的背景知识，这也有助于匹配。因此，在本文中，我们提出了 \textbf{Hi}storical \textbf{S}tructure \textbf{Match}ing (\textbf{HiSMatch}) 模型。它应用两个结构编码器来捕获查询和候选实体的历史结构中包含的语义信息。此外，它采用另一种编码器将背景知识集成到模型中。在六个基准数据集上进行的 TKG 推理实验证明了所提出的 HiSMatch 模型的显着改进，与最先进的基线相比，MRR 性能提高了高达 5.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiSMatch模型，通过匹配查询实体与候选实体的历史结构及背景知识，解决时序知识图谱中未来时间戳的推理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分结合实体的历史结构演变与背景知识，导致未来事实推理效果受限，需设计更有效的匹配机制。
AI.method: 采用双结构编码器提取查询与候选实体的历史结构语义，并引入背景知识编码器整合实体背景信息，通过多模态融合实现精准匹配。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上实验表明，HiSMatch在MRR指标上较现有最佳模型提升最高5.6%，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 历史结构匹配与背景知识融合显著提升时序知识图谱推理性能，为未来动态事实预测提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出HiSMatch模型，通过匹配查询实体与候选实体的历史结构及背景知识，解决时序知识图谱中未来时间戳的推理问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法未能充分结合实体的历史结构演变与背景知识，导致未来事实推理效果受限，需设计更有效的匹配机制。
ai_content.method: 采用双结构编码器提取查询与候选实体的历史结构语义，并引入背景知识编码器整合实体背景信息，通过多模态融合实现精准匹配。
ai_content.result: 在六个基准数据集上实验表明，HiSMatch在MRR指标上较现有最佳模型提升最高5.6%，验证了方法有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 历史结构匹配与背景知识融合显著提升时序知识图谱推理性能，为未来动态事实预测提供新思路。

search_text: HiSMatch: Historical Structure Matching based Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning HiSMatch：基于时态知识图推理的历史结构匹配 A Temporal Knowledge Graph (TKG) is a sequence of KGs with respective timestamps, which adopts quadruples in the form of (\emph{subject}, \emph{relation}, \emph{object}, \emph{timestamp}) to describe dynamic facts. TKG reasoning has facilitated many real-world applications via answering such queries as (\emph{query entity}, \emph{query relation}, \emph{?}, \emph{future timestamp}) about future. This is actually a matching task between a query and candidate entities based on their historical structures, which reflect behavioral trends of the entities at different timestamps. In addition, recent KGs provide background knowledge of all the entities, which is also helpful for the matching. Thus, in this paper, we propose the \textbf{Hi}storical \textbf{S}tructure \textbf{Match}ing (\textbf{HiSMatch}) model. It applies two structure encoders to capture the semantic information contained in the historical structures of the query and candidate entities. Besides, it adopts another encoder to integrate the background knowledge into the model. TKG reasoning experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate the significant improvement of the proposed HiSMatch model, with up to 5.6\% performance improvement in MRR, compared to the state-of-the-art baselines. 时间知识图谱（TKG）是具有各自时间戳的知识图谱序列，采用（\emph{subject}，\emph{relation}，\emph{object}，\emph{timestamp}）形式的四元组来描述动态事实。 TKG 推理通过回答诸如（\emph{查询实体}、\emph{查询关系}、\emph{?}、\emph{未来时间戳}）等关于未来的查询，促进了许多现实世界的应用程序。这实际上是查询和候选实体之间基于历史结构的匹配任务，它反映了实体在不同时间戳下的行为趋势。此外，最近的知识图谱提供了所有实体的背景知识，这也有助于匹配。因此，在本文中，我们提出了 \textbf{Hi}storical \textbf{S}tructure \textbf{Match}ing (\textbf{HiSMatch}) 模型。它应用两个结构编码器来捕获查询和候选实体的历史结构中包含的语义信息。此外，它采用另一种编码器将背景知识集成到模型中。在六个基准数据集上进行的 TKG 推理实验证明了所提出的 HiSMatch 模型的显着改进，与最先进的基线相比，MRR 性能提高了高达 5.6%。 本文提出HiSMatch模型，通过匹配查询实体与候选实体的历史结构及背景知识，解决时序知识图谱中未来时间戳的推理问题。 Zixuan Li,Zhongni Hou,Saiping Guan,Xiaolong Jin,Weihua Peng,Long Bai,Yajuan Lyu,Wei Li,Jiafeng Guo,Xueqi Cheng cs.AI

authors_text: Wasja Brunotte,Alexander Specht,Larissa Chazette,Kurt Schneider
title: Privacy Explanations - A Means to End-User Trust
title_zh: 隐私说明 - 获得最终用户信任的一种手段
abstract: Software systems are ubiquitous, and their use is ingrained in our everyday lives. They enable us to get in touch with people quickly and easily, support us in gathering information, and help us perform our daily tasks. In return, we provide these systems with a large amount of personal information, often unaware that this is jeopardizing our privacy. End users are typically unaware of what data is collected, for what purpose, who has access to it, and where and how it is stored. To address this issue, we looked into how explainability might help to tackle this problem. We created privacy explanations that aim to help to clarify to end users why and for what purposes specific data is required. We asked end users about privacy explanations in a survey and found that the majority of respondents (91.6 \%) are generally interested in receiving privacy explanations. Our findings reveal that privacy explanations can be an important step towards increasing trust in software systems and can increase the privacy awareness of end users. These findings are a significant step in developing privacy-aware systems and incorporating usable privacy features into them, assisting users in protecting their privacy.
summary: Software systems are ubiquitous, and their use is ingrained in our everyday lives. They enable us to get in touch with people quickly and easily, support us in gathering information, and help us perform our daily tasks. In return, we provide these systems with a large amount of personal information, often unaware that this is jeopardizing our privacy. End users are typically unaware of what data is collected, for what purpose, who has access to it, and where and how it is stored. To address this issue, we looked into how explainability might help to tackle this problem. We created privacy explanations that aim to help to clarify to end users why and for what purposes specific data is required. We asked end users about privacy explanations in a survey and found that the majority of respondents (91.6 \%) are generally interested in receiving privacy explanations. Our findings reveal that privacy explanations can be an important step towards increasing trust in software systems and can increase the privacy awareness of end users. These findings are a significant step in developing privacy-aware systems and incorporating usable privacy features into them, assisting users in protecting their privacy.
abstract_zh: 软件系统无处不在，它们的使用在我们的日常生活中根深蒂固。它们使我们能够快速、轻松地与人们联系，支持我们收集信息，并帮助我们执行日常任务。作为回报，我们向这些系统提供大量个人信息，但通常没有意识到这正在危害我们的隐私。最终用户通常不知道收集哪些数据、出于什么目的、谁有权访问这些数据以及这些数据的存储位置和方式。为了解决这个问题，我们研究了可解释性如何帮助解决这个问题。我们创建了隐私解释，旨在帮助最终用户阐明为什么需要特定数据以及出于什么目的需要特定数据。我们在一项调查中向最终用户询问了隐私说明，发现大多数受访者（91.6％）普遍对接收隐私说明感兴趣。我们的研究结果表明，隐私解释可以是增强对软件系统信任的重要一步，并且可以提高最终用户的隐私意识。这些发现是开发隐私感知系统并将可用的隐私功能融入其中、帮助用户保护其隐私的重要一步。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨通过隐私解释提升软件系统终端用户的信任度与隐私意识。
AI.motivation: 软件系统广泛收集用户个人数据，但用户通常不了解数据收集的目的、存储方式及风险，导致隐私泄露隐患。
AI.method: 设计隐私解释机制并开展问卷调查，分析用户对隐私解释的兴趣及接受度。
AI.result: 91.6%的受访者表示对隐私解释感兴趣，表明其能有效增强用户信任与隐私意识。
AI.conclusion: 隐私解释是构建隐私友好型系统的重要途径，有助于用户更好地保护自身隐私。

authors_text: Ali Mirzazadeh,Florian Dubost,Maxwell Pike,Krish Maniar,Max Zuo,Christopher Lee-Messer,Daniel Rubin
title: ATCON: Attention Consistency for Vision Models
title_zh: ATCON：视觉模型的注意力一致性
abstract: Attention--or attribution--maps methods are methods designed to highlight regions of the model's input that were discriminative for its predictions. However, different attention maps methods can highlight different regions of the input, with sometimes contradictory explanations for a prediction. This effect is exacerbated when the training set is small. This indicates that either the model learned incorrect representations or that the attention maps methods did not accurately estimate the model's representations. We propose an unsupervised fine-tuning method that optimizes the consistency of attention maps and show that it improves both classification performance and the quality of attention maps. We propose an implementation for two state-of-the-art attention computation methods, Grad-CAM and Guided Backpropagation, which relies on an input masking technique. We also show results on Grad-CAM and Integrated Gradients in an ablation study. We evaluate this method on our own dataset of event detection in continuous video recordings of hospital patients aggregated and curated for this work. As a sanity check, we also evaluate the proposed method on PASCAL VOC and SVHN. With the proposed method, with small training sets, we achieve a 6.6 points lift of F1 score over the baselines on our video dataset, a 2.9 point lift of F1 score on PASCAL, and a 1.8 points lift of mean Intersection over Union over Grad-CAM for weakly supervised detection on PASCAL. Those improved attention maps may help clinicians better understand vision model predictions and ease the deployment of machine learning systems into clinical care. We share part of the code for this article at the following repository: https://github.com/alimirzazadeh/SemisupervisedAttention.
summary: Attention--or attribution--maps methods are methods designed to highlight regions of the model's input that were discriminative for its predictions. However, different attention maps methods can highlight different regions of the input, with sometimes contradictory explanations for a prediction. This effect is exacerbated when the training set is small. This indicates that either the model learned incorrect representations or that the attention maps methods did not accurately estimate the model's representations. We propose an unsupervised fine-tuning method that optimizes the consistency of attention maps and show that it improves both classification performance and the quality of attention maps. We propose an implementation for two state-of-the-art attention computation methods, Grad-CAM and Guided Backpropagation, which relies on an input masking technique. We also show results on Grad-CAM and Integrated Gradients in an ablation study. We evaluate this method on our own dataset of event detection in continuous video recordings of hospital patients aggregated and curated for this work. As a sanity check, we also evaluate the proposed method on PASCAL VOC and SVHN. With the proposed method, with small training sets, we achieve a 6.6 points lift of F1 score over the baselines on our video dataset, a 2.9 point lift of F1 score on PASCAL, and a 1.8 points lift of mean Intersection over Union over Grad-CAM for weakly supervised detection on PASCAL. Those improved attention maps may help clinicians better understand vision model predictions and ease the deployment of machine learning systems into clinical care. We share part of the code for this article at the following repository: https://github.com/alimirzazadeh/SemisupervisedAttention.
abstract_zh: 注意力（或归因）图方法是旨在突出显示模型输入中对其预测具有区分性的区域的方法。然而，不同的注意力图方法可以突出显示输入的不同区域，有时对预测的解释是矛盾的。当训练集较小时，这种影响会加剧。这表明模型学习了不正确的表示，或者注意力图方法没有准确地估计模型的表示。我们提出了一种无监督微调方法，可以优化注意力图的一致性，并表明它可以提高分类性能和注意力图的质量。我们提出了两种最先进的注意力计算方法的实现，即 Grad-CAM 和引导反向传播，它依赖于输入掩蔽技术。我们还在消融研究中展示了 Grad-CAM 和积分梯度的结果。我们在为这项工作汇总和策划的医院患者连续视频记录中的事件检测数据集上评估了这种方法。作为健全性检查，我们还在 PASCAL VOC 和 SVHN 上评估了所提出的方法。通过所提出的方法，在小训练集上，我们在视频数据集上的 F1 分数比基线提高了 6.6 分，在 PASCAL 上的 F1 分数提高了 2.9 分，在 PASCAL 上的弱监督检测中，平均交集比 Grad-CAM 的平均交集比联盟提高了 1.8 分。这些改进的注意力图可以帮助临床医生更好地理解视觉模型预测，并简化机器学习系统在临床护理中的部署。我们在以下存储库中共享本文的部分代码：https://github.com/alimirzazadeh/SemisupervisedAttention。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ATCON方法，通过优化注意力图的一致性来提升视觉模型的分类性能和注意力图质量。
AI.motivation: 不同注意力图方法在小训练集上会产生矛盾的解释，表明模型可能学习了错误表示或注意力图方法未能准确估计模型表示。
AI.method: 提出无监督微调方法优化注意力图一致性，实现Grad-CAM和Guided Backpropagation的输入掩码技术，并进行消融实验验证效果。
AI.result: 在医疗视频数据集上F1分数提升6.6点，在PASCAL VOC提升2.9点，在弱监督检测中mean IoU提升1.8点。
AI.conclusion: 改进的注意力图有助于临床理解模型预测，促进医疗AI系统部署，代码部分开源于GitHub。

With the proposed method, with small training sets, we achieve a 6.6 points lift of F1 score over the baselines on our video dataset, a 2.9 point lift of F1 score on PASCAL, and a 1.8 points lift of mean Intersection over Union over Grad-CAM for weakly supervised detection on PASCAL. We share part of the code for this article at the following repository: https://github.com/alimirzazadeh/SemisupervisedAttention. 注意力（或归因）图方法是旨在突出显示模型输入中对其预测具有区分性的区域的方法。然而，不同的注意力图方法可以突出显示输入的不同区域，有时对预测的解释是矛盾的。当训练集较小时，这种影响会加剧。这表明模型学习了不正确的表示，或者注意力图方法没有准确地估计模型的表示。我们提出了一种无监督微调方法，可以优化注意力图的一致性，并表明它可以提高分类性能和注意力图的质量。我们提出了两种最先进的注意力计算方法的实现，即 Grad-CAM 和引导反向传播，它依赖于输入掩蔽技术。我们还在消融研究中展示了 Grad-CAM 和积分梯度的结果。我们在为这项工作汇总和策划的医院患者连续视频记录中的事件检测数据集上评估了这种方法。作为健全性检查，我们还在 PASCAL VOC 和 SVHN 上评估了所提出的方法。通过所提出的方法，在小训练集上，我们在视频数据集上的 F1 分数比基线提高了 6.6 分，在 PASCAL 上的 F1 分数提高了 2.9 分，在 PASCAL 上的弱监督检测中，平均交集比 Grad-CAM 的平均交集比联盟提高了 1.8 分。这些改进的注意力图可以帮助临床医生更好地理解视觉模型预测，并简化机器学习系统在临床护理中的部署。我们在以下存储库中共享本文的部分代码：https://github.com/alimirzazadeh/SemisupervisedAttention。 本文提出ATCON方法，通过优化注意力图的一致性来提升视觉模型的分类性能和注意力图质量。 Ali Mirzazadeh,Florian Dubost,Maxwell Pike,Krish Maniar,Max Zuo,Christopher Lee-Messer,Daniel Rubin cs.CV

authors_text: Tommaso Di Noto,Meritxell Bach Cuadra,Chirine Atat,Eduardo Gamito Teiga,Monika Hegi,Andreas Hottinger,Patric Hagmann,Jonas Richiardi
title: Weakly Supervised Learning with Automated Labels from Radiology Reports for Glioma Change Detection
title_zh: 利用放射学报告中的自动标签进行弱监督学习以检测神经胶质瘤变化
comment: This work has been submitted as Original Paper to a Journal
comments: This work has been submitted as Original Paper to a Journal
abstract: Gliomas are the most frequent primary brain tumors in adults. Glioma change detection aims at finding the relevant parts of the image that change over time. Although Deep Learning (DL) shows promising performances in similar change detection tasks, the creation of large annotated datasets represents a major bottleneck for supervised DL applications in radiology. To overcome this, we propose a combined use of weak labels (imprecise, but fast-to-create annotations) and Transfer Learning (TL). Specifically, we explore inductive TL, where source and target domains are identical, but tasks are different due to a label shift: our target labels are created manually by three radiologists, whereas our source weak labels are generated automatically from radiology reports via NLP. We frame knowledge transfer as hyperparameter optimization, thus avoiding heuristic choices that are frequent in related works. We investigate the relationship between model size and TL, comparing a low-capacity VGG with a higher-capacity ResNeXt model. We evaluate our models on 1693 T2-weighted magnetic resonance imaging difference maps created from 183 patients, by classifying them into stable or unstable according to tumor evolution. The weak labels extracted from radiology reports allowed us to increase dataset size more than 3-fold, and improve VGG classification results from 75% to 82% AUC. Mixed training from scratch led to higher performance than fine-tuning or feature extraction. To assess generalizability, we ran inference on an open dataset (BraTS-2015: 15 patients, 51 difference maps), reaching up to 76% AUC. Overall, results suggest that medical imaging problems may benefit from smaller models and different TL strategies with respect to computer vision datasets, and that report-generated weak labels are effective in improving model performances. Code, in-house dataset and BraTS labels are released.

We frame knowledge transfer as hyperparameter optimization, thus avoiding heuristic choices that are frequent in related works. We investigate the relationship between model size and TL, comparing a low-capacity VGG with a higher-capacity ResNeXt model. The weak labels extracted from radiology reports allowed us to increase dataset size more than 3-fold, and improve VGG classification results from 75% to 82% AUC. Overall, results suggest that medical imaging problems may benefit from smaller models and different TL strategies with respect to computer vision datasets, and that report-generated weak labels are effective in improving model performances. Code, in-house dataset and BraTS labels are released.
abstract_zh: 神经胶质瘤是成人中最常见的原发性脑肿瘤。胶质瘤变化检测旨在找到图像中随时间变化的相关部分。尽管深度学习 (DL) 在类似的变化检测任务中显示出良好的性能，但大型注释数据集的创建是放射学中监督式 DL 应用的主要瓶颈。为了克服这个问题，我们建议结合使用弱标签（不精确但快速创建注释）和迁移学习（TL）。具体来说，我们探索归纳 TL，其中源域和目标域相同，但由于标签转换而任务不同：我们的目标标签由三名放射科医生手动创建，而我们的源弱标签是通过 NLP 从放射学报告自动生成的。我们将知识转移构建为超参数优化，从而避免相关工作中常见的启发式选择。我们研究了模型大小和 TL 之间的关系，将低容量 VGG 与高容量 ResNeXt 模型进行了比较。我们在 183 名患者创建的 1693 个 T2 加权磁共振成像差异图上评估我们的模型，根据肿瘤进化将它们分类为稳定或不稳定。从放射学报告中提取的弱标签使我们能够将数据集大小增加 3 倍以上，并将 VGG 分类结果从 75% AUC 提高到 82%。从头开始的混合训练比微调或特征提取具有更高的性能。为了评估普遍性，我们在开放数据集（BraTS-2015：15 名患者，51 个差异图）上进行推断，AUC 高达 76%。总体而言，结果表明，医学成像问题可能受益于计算机视觉数据集的较小模型和不同的 TL 策略，并且报告生成的弱标签可有效提高模型性能。代码、内部数据集和 BraTS 标签已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用放射科报告中自动生成的弱标签，结合迁移学习，解决胶质瘤变化检测中的标注数据不足问题。
AI.motivation: 医学影像领域标注数据获取成本高，而深度学习需要大量标注数据，因此需探索弱监督方法以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用同域不同任务的归纳迁移学习，源域使用自然语言处理生成的弱标签，目标域使用放射科医生标注的精确标签，通过超参数优化框架进行知识迁移，并对比VGG与ResNeXt模型性能。
AI.result: 弱标签使数据量提升3倍，VGG分类AUC从75%提升至82%；混合训练优于微调和特征提取，在BraTS-2015数据集上达到76% AUC。
AI.conclusion: 医学影像任务需采用小模型与特定迁移策略，弱标签能有效提升模型性能，且方法具有临床推广价值。

authors_text: Chaoli Zhang,Tian Zhou,Qingsong Wen,Liang Sun
title: TFAD: A Decomposition Time Series Anomaly Detection Architecture with Time-Frequency Analysis
title_zh: TFAD：具有时频分析的分解时间序列异常检测架构
comment: Accepted by the ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 2022)
comments: Accepted by the ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 2022)
abstract: Time series anomaly detection is a challenging problem due to the complex temporal dependencies and the limited label data. Although some algorithms including both traditional and deep models have been proposed, most of them mainly focus on time-domain modeling, and do not fully utilize the information in the frequency domain of the time series data. In this paper, we propose a Time-Frequency analysis based time series Anomaly Detection model, or TFAD for short, to exploit both time and frequency domains for performance improvement. Besides, we incorporate time series decomposition and data augmentation mechanisms in the designed time-frequency architecture to further boost the abilities of performance and interpretability. Empirical studies on widely used benchmark datasets show that our approach obtains state-of-the-art performance in univariate and multivariate time series anomaly detection tasks. Code is provided at https://github.com/DAMO-DI-ML/CIKM22-TFAD.
summary: Time series anomaly detection is a challenging problem due to the complex temporal dependencies and the limited label data. Although some algorithms including both traditional and deep models have been proposed, most of them mainly focus on time-domain modeling, and do not fully utilize the information in the frequency domain of the time series data. In this paper, we propose a Time-Frequency analysis based time series Anomaly Detection model, or TFAD for short, to exploit both time and frequency domains for performance improvement. Besides, we incorporate time series decomposition and data augmentation mechanisms in the designed time-frequency architecture to further boost the abilities of performance and interpretability. Empirical studies on widely used benchmark datasets show that our approach obtains state-of-the-art performance in univariate and multivariate time series anomaly detection tasks. Code is provided at https://github.com/DAMO-DI-ML/CIKM22-TFAD.
abstract_zh: 由于复杂的时间依赖性和有限的标签数据，时间序列异常检测是一个具有挑战性的问题。尽管已经提出了一些包括传统模型和深度模型的算法，但大多数主要集中于时域建模，并没有充分利用时间序列数据的频域信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于时频分析的时间序列异常检测模型（简称 TFAD），以利用时域和频域来提高性能。此外，我们在设计的时频架构中结合了时间序列分解和数据增强机制，以进一步提高性能和可解释性的能力。对广泛使用的基准数据集的实证研究表明，我们的方法在单变量和多变量时间序列异常检测任务中获得了最先进的性能。代码位于 https://github.com/DAMO-DI-ML/CIKM22-TFAD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间-频率分析的分解时间序列异常检测架构TFAD，通过结合时域和频域信息提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列异常检测方法主要依赖时域建模，未能充分利用频域信息，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计TFAD模型，融合时间-频率分析技术，结合时间序列分解与数据增强机制，增强模型性能与可解释性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，TFAD在单变量和多变量时间序列异常检测任务中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: TFAD通过有效利用时频信息和分解技术，显著提升异常检测能力，代码已开源供研究使用。

authors_text: Williams Rizzi,Chiara Di Francescomarino,Chiara Ghidini,Fabrizio Maria Maggi
title: Nirdizati: an Advanced Predictive Process Monitoring Toolkit
title_zh: Nirdizati：高级预测过程监控工具包
abstract: Predictive Process Monitoring is a field of Process Mining that aims at predicting how an ongoing execution of a business process will develop in the future using past process executions recorded in event logs. The recent stream of publications in this field shows the need for tools able to support researchers and users in analyzing, comparing and selecting the techniques that are the most suitable for them. Nirdizati is a dedicated tool for supporting users in building, comparing, analyzing, and explaining predictive models that can then be used to perform predictions on the future of an ongoing case. By providing a rich set of different state-of-the-art approaches, Nirdizati offers BPM researchers and practitioners a useful and flexible instrument for investigating and comparing Predictive Process Monitoring techniques. In this paper, we present the current version of Nirdizati, together with its architecture which has been developed to improve its modularity and scalability. The features of Nirdizati enrich its capability to support researchers and practitioners within the entire pipeline for constructing reliable Predictive Process Monitoring models.
summary: Predictive Process Monitoring is a field of Process Mining that aims at predicting how an ongoing execution of a business process will develop in the future using past process executions recorded in event logs. The recent stream of publications in this field shows the need for tools able to support researchers and users in analyzing, comparing and selecting the techniques that are the most suitable for them. Nirdizati is a dedicated tool for supporting users in building, comparing, analyzing, and explaining predictive models that can then be used to perform predictions on the future of an ongoing case. By providing a rich set of different state-of-the-art approaches, Nirdizati offers BPM researchers and practitioners a useful and flexible instrument for investigating and comparing Predictive Process Monitoring techniques. In this paper, we present the current version of Nirdizati, together with its architecture which has been developed to improve its modularity and scalability. The features of Nirdizati enrich its capability to support researchers and practitioners within the entire pipeline for constructing reliable Predictive Process Monitoring models.
abstract_zh: 预测流程监控是流程挖掘的一个领域，旨在使用事件日志中记录的过去流程执行来预测业务流程的持续执行在未来将如何发展。该领域最近的一系列出版物表明需要能够支持研究人员和用户分析、比较和选择最适合他们的技术的工具。 Nirdizati 是一款专用工具，用于支持用户构建、比较、分析和解释预测模型，然后使用这些模型对正在进行的案例的未来进行预测。通过提供一组丰富的不同的最先进方法，Nirdizati 为 BPM 研究人员和从业者提供了一个有用且灵活的工具来研究和比较预测过程监控技术。在本文中，我们介绍了 Nirdizati 的当前版本，以及为提高其模块化性和可扩展性而开发的架构。 Nirdizati 的功能丰富了其支持整个流程中的研究人员和从业人员构建可靠的预测过程监控模型的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Nirdizati的预测性流程监控工具包，旨在帮助用户构建、比较和分析预测模型以预测业务流程的未来走向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏支持研究人员和实践者有效分析、比较预测性流程监控技术的工具，需开发一个灵活且功能丰富的工具来满足需求。
AI.method: 设计并实现了一个模块化、可扩展的Nirdizati工具包，整合多种先进算法，支持模型构建、比较及结果解释的全流程。
AI.result: Nirdizati提供了丰富的功能，增强了研究人员和实践者在预测性流程监控领域构建可靠模型的能力，并验证了其灵活性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: Nirdizati作为一个高效的预测性流程监控工具，为学术研究和实际应用提供了重要支持，推动了该领域技术的发展。

authors_text: Jongseok Lee,Ribin Balachandran,Konstantin Kondak,Andre Coelho,Marco De Stefano,Matthias Humt,Jianxiang Feng,Tamim Asfour,Rudolph Triebel
title: Virtual Reality via Object Pose Estimation and Active Learning: Realizing Telepresence Robots with Aerial Manipulation Capabilities
title_zh: 通过物体姿态估计和主动学习实现虚拟现实：实现具有空中操纵能力的远程呈现机器人
abstract: This article presents a novel telepresence system for advancing aerial manipulation in dynamic and unstructured environments. The proposed system not only features a haptic device, but also a virtual reality (VR) interface that provides real-time 3D displays of the robot's workspace as well as a haptic guidance to its remotely located operator. To realize this, multiple sensors namely a LiDAR, cameras and IMUs are utilized. For processing of the acquired sensory data, pose estimation pipelines are devised for industrial objects of both known and unknown geometries. We further propose an active learning pipeline in order to increase the sample efficiency of a pipeline component that relies on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) based object detection. All these algorithms jointly address various challenges encountered during the execution of perception tasks in industrial scenarios. In the experiments, exhaustive ablation studies are provided to validate the proposed pipelines. Methodologically, these results commonly suggest how an awareness of the algorithms' own failures and uncertainty (`introspection') can be used tackle the encountered problems. Moreover, outdoor experiments are conducted to evaluate the effectiveness of the overall system in enhancing aerial manipulation capabilities. In particular, with flight campaigns over days and nights, from spring to winter, and with different users and locations, we demonstrate over 70 robust executions of pick-and-place, force application and peg-in-hole tasks with the DLR cable-Suspended Aerial Manipulator (SAM). As a result, we show the viability of the proposed system in future industrial applications.

The proposed system not only features a haptic device, but also a virtual reality (VR) interface that provides real-time 3D displays of the robot's workspace as well as a haptic guidance to its remotely located operator. To realize this, multiple sensors namely a LiDAR, cameras and IMUs are utilized. For processing of the acquired sensory data, pose estimation pipelines are devised for industrial objects of both known and unknown geometries. All these algorithms jointly address various challenges encountered during the execution of perception tasks in industrial scenarios. In the experiments, exhaustive ablation studies are provided to validate the proposed pipelines. Methodologically, these results commonly suggest how an awareness of the algorithms' own failures and uncertainty (`introspection') can be used tackle the encountered problems. In particular, with flight campaigns over days and nights, from spring to winter, and with different users and locations, we demonstrate over 70 robust executions of pick-and-place, force application and peg-in-hole tasks with the DLR cable-Suspended Aerial Manipulator (SAM). As a result, we show the viability of the proposed system in future industrial applications.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的远程呈现系统，用于在动态和非结构化环境中推进空中操纵。所提出的系统不仅具有触觉设备，还具有虚拟现实 (VR) 界面，可提供机器人工作空间的实时 3D 显示，并为其远程操作员提供触觉指导。为了实现这一点，需要使用多个传感器，即激光雷达、摄像头和 IMU。为了处理获取的传感数据，为已知和未知几何形状的工业对象设计了姿态估计管道。我们进一步提出了一种主动学习管道，以提高依赖于基于深度神经网络（DNN）的对象检测的管道组件的样本效率。所有这些算法共同解决了工业场景中感知任务执行过程中遇到的各种挑战。在实验中，提供了详尽的消融研究来验证所提出的管道。从方法论上讲，这些结果通常表明如何利用对算法自身失败和不确定性（“内省”）的认识来解决遇到的问题。此外，还进行了室外实验，以评估整个系统在增强空中操纵能力方面的有效性。特别是，通过从春季到冬季的日日夜夜的飞行活动，以及不同用户和地点的飞行活动，我们展示了使用 DLR 电缆悬挂式空中操纵器 (SAM) 执行的 70 多项拾放、施力和孔中钉任务的稳健执行。因此，我们展示了所提出的系统在未来工业应用中的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合虚拟现实（VR）和触觉反馈的远程存在系统，用于提升动态非结构化环境中空中机械臂的操控能力。
AI.motivation: 现有空中机械臂在工业场景中面临感知任务复杂、样本效率低及环境不确定性等挑战，需通过集成VR与主动学习技术提升系统鲁棒性与操作效率。
AI.method: 融合LiDAR、摄像头和IMU多传感器数据，设计针对已知与未知几何工业物体的姿态估计流程，并引入基于深度神经网络的主动学习框架优化检测样本效率，结合消融实验与多场景户外测试验证系统性能。
AI.result: 在不同季节、时间及用户条件下，使用DLR电缆悬挂空中机械臂（SAM）成功完成70余次抓取、力应用及插孔任务，验证了系统的高可靠性与环境适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过算法自我感知能力与主动学习机制，有效解决了工业场景中的感知与操控难题，为未来工业应用提供了可行的远程操作解决方案。

authors_text: Chi Zhang,Wei Yin,Zhibin Wang,Gang Yu,Bin Fu,Chunhua Shen
title: Hierarchical Normalization for Robust Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: 稳健单目深度估计的分层归一化
abstract: In this paper, we address monocular depth estimation with deep neural networks. To enable training of deep monocular estimation models with various sources of datasets, state-of-the-art methods adopt image-level normalization strategies to generate affine-invariant depth representations. However, learning with image-level normalization mainly emphasizes the relations of pixel representations with the global statistic in the images, such as the structure of the scene, while the fine-grained depth difference may be overlooked. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-scale depth normalization method that hierarchically normalizes the depth representations based on spatial information and depth distributions. Compared with previous normalization strategies applied only at the holistic image level, the proposed hierarchical normalization can effectively preserve the fine-grained details and improve accuracy. We present two strategies that define the hierarchical normalization contexts in the depth domain and the spatial domain, respectively. Our extensive experiments show that the proposed normalization strategy remarkably outperforms previous normalization methods, and we set new state-of-the-art on five zero-shot transfer benchmark datasets.
summary: In this paper, we address monocular depth estimation with deep neural networks. To enable training of deep monocular estimation models with various sources of datasets, state-of-the-art methods adopt image-level normalization strategies to generate affine-invariant depth representations. However, learning with image-level normalization mainly emphasizes the relations of pixel representations with the global statistic in the images, such as the structure of the scene, while the fine-grained depth difference may be overlooked. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-scale depth normalization method that hierarchically normalizes the depth representations based on spatial information and depth distributions. Compared with previous normalization strategies applied only at the holistic image level, the proposed hierarchical normalization can effectively preserve the fine-grained details and improve accuracy. We present two strategies that define the hierarchical normalization contexts in the depth domain and the spatial domain, respectively. Our extensive experiments show that the proposed normalization strategy remarkably outperforms previous normalization methods, and we set new state-of-the-art on five zero-shot transfer benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们利用深度神经网络解决单目深度估计问题。为了能够使用各种数据源训练深度单目估计模型，最先进的方法采用图像级归一化策略来生成仿射不变深度表示。然而，图像级归一化学习主要强调像素表示与图像中全局统计量的关系，例如场景的结构，而细粒度的深度差异可能被忽略。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多尺度深度归一化方法，该方法根据空间信息和深度分布对深度表示进行分层归一化。与以前仅在整体图像级别应用的归一化策略相比，所提出的分层归一化可以有效保留细粒度细节并提高准确性。我们提出了两种策略，分别定义深度域和空间域中的层次标准化上下文。我们广泛的实验表明，所提出的标准化策略明显优于以前的标准化方法，并且我们在五个零样本传输基准数据集上设置了新的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层归一化方法，用于提升单目深度估计的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过图像级归一化生成仿射不变深度表示，但可能忽略细粒度深度差异，导致精度不足。
AI.method: 设计多尺度深度归一化方法，分别在深度域和空间域定义分层归一化上下文，结合空间信息与深度分布进行分层归一化。
AI.result: 在五个零样本迁移基准数据集上取得新SOTA结果，显著优于传统归一化方法。
AI.conclusion: 分层归一化有效保留细粒度细节，提升深度估计精度，为单目深度估计提供新思路。

authors_text: Sushil Thapa
title: On effects of Knowledge Distillation on Transfer Learning
title_zh: 论知识蒸馏对迁移学习的影响
abstract: Knowledge distillation is a popular machine learning technique that aims to transfer knowledge from a large 'teacher' network to a smaller 'student' network and improve the student's performance by training it to emulate the teacher. In recent years, there has been significant progress in novel distillation techniques that push performance frontiers across multiple problems and benchmarks. Most of the reported work focuses on achieving state-of-the-art results on the specific problem. However, there has been a significant gap in understanding the process and how it behaves under certain training scenarios. Similarly, transfer learning (TL) is an effective technique in training neural networks on a limited dataset faster by reusing representations learned from a different but related problem. Despite its effectiveness and popularity, there has not been much exploration of knowledge distillation on transfer learning. In this thesis, we propose a machine learning architecture we call TL+KD that combines knowledge distillation with transfer learning; we then present a quantitative and qualitative comparison of TL+KD with TL in the domain of image classification. Through this work, we show that using guidance and knowledge from a larger teacher network during fine-tuning, we can improve the student network to achieve better validation performances like accuracy. We characterize the improvement in the validation performance of the model using a variety of metrics beyond just accuracy scores, and study its performance in scenarios such as input degradation.
summary: Knowledge distillation is a popular machine learning technique that aims to transfer knowledge from a large 'teacher' network to a smaller 'student' network and improve the student's performance by training it to emulate the teacher. In recent years, there has been significant progress in novel distillation techniques that push performance frontiers across multiple problems and benchmarks. Most of the reported work focuses on achieving state-of-the-art results on the specific problem. However, there has been a significant gap in understanding the process and how it behaves under certain training scenarios. Similarly, transfer learning (TL) is an effective technique in training neural networks on a limited dataset faster by reusing representations learned from a different but related problem. Despite its effectiveness and popularity, there has not been much exploration of knowledge distillation on transfer learning. In this thesis, we propose a machine learning architecture we call TL+KD that combines knowledge distillation with transfer learning; we then present a quantitative and qualitative comparison of TL+KD with TL in the domain of image classification. Through this work, we show that using guidance and knowledge from a larger teacher network during fine-tuning, we can improve the student network to achieve better validation performances like accuracy. We characterize the improvement in the validation performance of the model using a variety of metrics beyond just accuracy scores, and study its performance in scenarios such as input degradation.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏是一种流行的机器学习技术，旨在将知识从大型“教师”网络转移到较小的“学生”网络，并通过训练学生模仿教师来提高学生的表现。近年来，新型蒸馏技术取得了重大进展，突破了多个问题和基准的性能前沿。大多数报告的工作都侧重于在特定问题上取得最先进的结果。然而，在理解该过程及其在某些训练场景下的行为方面存在很大差距。同样，迁移学习（TL）是一种有效的技术，通过重用从不同但相关的问题中学到的表示，可以在有限的数据集上更快地训练神经网络。尽管其有效性和受欢迎程度，但对于迁移学习的知识蒸馏还没有太多的探索。在本论文中，我们提出了一种将知识蒸馏与迁移学习相结合的机器学习架构，称为TL+KD；然后我们在图像分类领域对 TL+KD 与 TL 进行定量和定性比较。通过这项工作，我们表明，在微调过程中使用来自更大教师网络的指导和知识，我们可以改进学生网络以实现更好的验证性能（例如准确性）。我们使用精度分数之外的各种指标来描述模型验证性能的改进，并研究其在输入退化等场景中的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合知识蒸馏与迁移学习的TL+KD架构，并在图像分类领域进行比较分析。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦单一任务的蒸馏效果，而知识蒸馏在迁移学习中的应用机制缺乏系统性探索，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 设计TL+KD框架将知识蒸馏融入迁移学习流程，在图像分类任务中通过定量指标与输入退化实验对比分析TL与TL+KD的性能差异。
AI.result: 实验表明TL+KD在验证集准确率等指标上优于传统TL，且在输入退化场景下保持更优鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏能有效增强迁移学习性能，未来可拓展至更多跨领域任务与网络结构优化场景。

authors_text: Chaewon Kim,Seung-Jun Moon,Gyeong-Moon Park
title: WINE: Wavelet-Guided GAN Inversion and Editing for High-Fidelity Refinement
title_zh: WINE：小波引导的 GAN 反演和编辑以实现高保真细化
abstract: Recent advanced GAN inversion models aim to convey high-fidelity information from original images to generators through methods using generator tuning or high-dimensional feature learning. Despite these efforts, accurately reconstructing image-specific details remains as a challenge due to the inherent limitations both in terms of training and structural aspects, leading to a bias towards low-frequency information. In this paper, we look into the widely used pixel loss in GAN inversion, revealing its predominant focus on the reconstruction of low-frequency features. We then propose WINE, a Wavelet-guided GAN Inversion aNd Editing model, which transfers the high-frequency information through wavelet coefficients via newly proposed wavelet loss and wavelet fusion scheme. Notably, WINE is the first attempt to interpret GAN inversion in the frequency domain. Our experimental results showcase the precision of WINE in preserving high-frequency details and enhancing image quality. Even in editing scenarios, WINE outperforms existing state-of-the-art GAN inversion models with a fine balance between editability and reconstruction quality.
summary: Recent advanced GAN inversion models aim to convey high-fidelity information from original images to generators through methods using generator tuning or high-dimensional feature learning. Despite these efforts, accurately reconstructing image-specific details remains as a challenge due to the inherent limitations both in terms of training and structural aspects, leading to a bias towards low-frequency information. In this paper, we look into the widely used pixel loss in GAN inversion, revealing its predominant focus on the reconstruction of low-frequency features. We then propose WINE, a Wavelet-guided GAN Inversion aNd Editing model, which transfers the high-frequency information through wavelet coefficients via newly proposed wavelet loss and wavelet fusion scheme. Notably, WINE is the first attempt to interpret GAN inversion in the frequency domain. Our experimental results showcase the precision of WINE in preserving high-frequency details and enhancing image quality. Even in editing scenarios, WINE outperforms existing state-of-the-art GAN inversion models with a fine balance between editability and reconstruction quality.
abstract_zh: 最近先进的 GAN 反演模型旨在通过使用生成器调整或高维特征学习的方法将高保真信息从原始图像传递到生成器。尽管做出了这些努力，但由于训练和结构方面的固有限制，准确重建图像特定细节仍然是一个挑战，导致对低频信息的偏见。在本文中，我们研究了 GAN 反演中广泛使用的像素损失，揭示了其主要关注低频特征的重建。然后，我们提出了 WINE，一种小波引导的 GAN 反转和编辑模型，它通过新提出的小波损失和小波融合方案通过小波系数传输高频信息。值得注意的是，WINE 是在频域解释 GAN 反转的首次尝试。我们的实验结果展示了 WINE 在保留高频细节和增强图像质量方面的精度。即使在编辑场景中，WINE 也优于现有最先进的 GAN 反演模型，在可编辑性和重建质量之间取得了良好的平衡。

AI.tldr: 提出WINE模型，通过小波引导的GAN反演与编辑方法，解决高保真图像细节重建中的高频信息保留问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN反演模型因训练和结构限制，难以准确重建图像高频细节，导致低频信息偏差，需新方法提升高频信息保留能力。
AI.method: 基于小波变换分解图像，设计小波损失函数与融合方案，首次在频域进行GAN反演，增强高频信息传递。
AI.result: 实验表明WINE在高频细节保留和图像质量提升上优于现有模型，编辑任务中实现编辑性与重建质量的平衡。
AI.conclusion: WINE通过频域小波引导机制有效解决高频细节重建难题，为GAN反演提供新思路，推动高保真图像编辑发展。

ai_content.tldr: 提出WINE模型，通过小波引导的GAN反演与编辑方法，解决高保真图像细节重建中的高频信息保留问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有GAN反演模型因训练和结构限制，难以准确重建图像高频细节，导致低频信息偏差，需新方法提升高频信息保留能力。
ai_content.method: 基于小波变换分解图像，设计小波损失函数与融合方案，首次在频域进行GAN反演，增强高频信息传递。
ai_content.result: 实验表明WINE在高频细节保留和图像质量提升上优于现有模型，编辑任务中实现编辑性与重建质量的平衡。
ai_content.conclusion: WINE通过频域小波引导机制有效解决高频细节重建难题，为GAN反演提供新思路，推动高保真图像编辑发展。

search_text: WINE: Wavelet-Guided GAN Inversion and Editing for High-Fidelity Refinement WINE：小波引导的 GAN 反演和编辑以实现高保真细化 Recent advanced GAN inversion models aim to convey high-fidelity information from original images to generators through methods using generator tuning or high-dimensional feature learning. Despite these efforts, accurately reconstructing image-specific details remains as a challenge due to the inherent limitations both in terms of training and structural aspects, leading to a bias towards low-frequency information. In this paper, we look into the widely used pixel loss in GAN inversion, revealing its predominant focus on the reconstruction of low-frequency features. We then propose WINE, a Wavelet-guided GAN Inversion aNd Editing model, which transfers the high-frequency information through wavelet coefficients via newly proposed wavelet loss and wavelet fusion scheme. Notably, WINE is the first attempt to interpret GAN inversion in the frequency domain. Our experimental results showcase the precision of WINE in preserving high-frequency details and enhancing image quality. Even in editing scenarios, WINE outperforms existing state-of-the-art GAN inversion models with a fine balance between editability and reconstruction quality. 最近先进的 GAN 反演模型旨在通过使用生成器调整或高维特征学习的方法将高保真信息从原始图像传递到生成器。尽管做出了这些努力，但由于训练和结构方面的固有限制，准确重建图像特定细节仍然是一个挑战，导致对低频信息的偏见。在本文中，我们研究了 GAN 反演中广泛使用的像素损失，揭示了其主要关注低频特征的重建。然后，我们提出了 WINE，一种小波引导的 GAN 反转和编辑模型，它通过新提出的小波损失和小波融合方案通过小波系数传输高频信息。值得注意的是，WINE 是在频域解释 GAN 反转的首次尝试。我们的实验结果展示了 WINE 在保留高频细节和增强图像质量方面的精度。即使在编辑场景中，WINE 也优于现有最先进的 GAN 反演模型，在可编辑性和重建质量之间取得了良好的平衡。 提出WINE模型，通过小波引导的GAN反演与编辑方法，解决高保真图像细节重建中的高频信息保留问题。 Chaewon Kim,Seung-Jun Moon,Gyeong-Moon Park cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Wei Qiu,Xiao Ma,Bo An,Svetlana Obraztsova,Shuicheng Yan,Zhongwen Xu
title: RPM: Generalizable Behaviors for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: RPM：多智能体强化学习的可推广行为
abstract: Despite the recent advancement in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), the MARL agents easily overfit the training environment and perform poorly in the evaluation scenarios where other agents behave differently. Obtaining generalizable policies for MARL agents is thus necessary but challenging mainly due to complex multi-agent interactions. In this work, we model the problem with Markov Games and propose a simple yet effective method, ranked policy memory (RPM), to collect diverse multi-agent trajectories for training MARL policies with good generalizability. The main idea of RPM is to maintain a look-up memory of policies. In particular, we try to acquire various levels of behaviors by saving policies via ranking the training episode return, i.e., the episode return of agents in the training environment; when an episode starts, the learning agent can then choose a policy from the RPM as the behavior policy. This innovative self-play training framework leverages agents' past policies and guarantees the diversity of multi-agent interaction in the training data. We implement RPM on top of MARL algorithms and conduct extensive experiments on Melting Pot. It has been demonstrated that RPM enables MARL agents to interact with unseen agents in multi-agent generalization evaluation scenarios and complete given tasks, and it significantly boosts the performance up to 402% on average.
summary: Despite the recent advancement in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), the MARL agents easily overfit the training environment and perform poorly in the evaluation scenarios where other agents behave differently. Obtaining generalizable policies for MARL agents is thus necessary but challenging mainly due to complex multi-agent interactions. In this work, we model the problem with Markov Games and propose a simple yet effective method, ranked policy memory (RPM), to collect diverse multi-agent trajectories for training MARL policies with good generalizability. The main idea of RPM is to maintain a look-up memory of policies. In particular, we try to acquire various levels of behaviors by saving policies via ranking the training episode return, i.e., the episode return of agents in the training environment; when an episode starts, the learning agent can then choose a policy from the RPM as the behavior policy. This innovative self-play training framework leverages agents' past policies and guarantees the diversity of multi-agent interaction in the training data. We implement RPM on top of MARL algorithms and conduct extensive experiments on Melting Pot. It has been demonstrated that RPM enables MARL agents to interact with unseen agents in multi-agent generalization evaluation scenarios and complete given tasks, and it significantly boosts the performance up to 402% on average.
abstract_zh: 尽管多智能体强化学习（MARL）最近取得了进展，但 MARL 智能体很容易过度适应训练环境，并且在其他智能体表现不同的评估场景中表现不佳。因此，获得 MARL 代理的通用策略是必要的，但主要由于复杂的多代理交互而具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们用马尔可夫游戏对问题进行建模，并提出了一种简单而有效的方法，即排名策略记忆（RPM），以收集不同的多智能体轨迹来训练具有良好通用性的 MARL 策略。 RPM的主要思想是维护策略的查找记忆。特别是，我们尝试通过对训练集回报（即智能体在训练环境中的集回报）进行排序来保存策略，从而获得各种级别的行为；当一个episode开始时，学习代理可以从RPM中选择一个策略作为行为策略。这种创新的自我对弈训练框架利用了智能体过去的策略，并保证了训练数据中多智能体交互的多样性。我们在 MARL 算法之上实现 RPM，并在 Melting Pot 上进行广泛的实验。事实证明，RPM使MARL智能体能够在多智能体泛化评估场景中与看不见的智能体进行交互并完成给定的任务，并且它的性能显着提高，平均高达402％。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RPM方法，通过收集多样化的多智能体轨迹来提升多智能体强化学习（MARL）策略的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL智能体容易过拟合训练环境，在评估场景中因其他智能体行为差异导致性能下降，亟需解决复杂交互下的策略泛化问题。
AI.method: 基于马尔可夫博弈建模，设计排名策略记忆（RPM）框架，通过按训练回合收益排序存储策略，并在训练时从记忆库中选择行为策略以保证交互多样性。
AI.result: 在Melting Pot基准测试中，RPM使MARL智能体在未见过的多智能体场景中完成任务，平均性能提升高达402%。
AI.conclusion: RPM通过利用历史策略多样性有效提升了MARL的泛化能力，为复杂多智能体交互提供了新的自博弈训练框架。

authors_text: Yidong Ouyang,Liyan Xie,Guang Cheng
title: Improving Adversarial Robustness by Contrastive Guided Diffusion Process
title_zh: 通过对比引导扩散过程提高对抗鲁棒性
abstract: Synthetic data generation has become an emerging tool to help improve the adversarial robustness in classification tasks since robust learning requires a significantly larger amount of training samples compared with standard classification tasks. Among various deep generative models, the diffusion model has been shown to produce high-quality synthetic images and has achieved good performance in improving the adversarial robustness. However, diffusion-type methods are typically slow in data generation as compared with other generative models. Although different acceleration techniques have been proposed recently, it is also of great importance to study how to improve the sample efficiency of generated data for the downstream task. In this paper, we first analyze the optimality condition of synthetic distribution for achieving non-trivial robust accuracy. We show that enhancing the distinguishability among the generated data is critical for improving adversarial robustness. Thus, we propose the Contrastive-Guided Diffusion Process (Contrastive-DP), which adopts the contrastive loss to guide the diffusion model in data generation. We verify our theoretical results using simulations and demonstrate the good performance of Contrastive-DP on image datasets.
summary: Synthetic data generation has become an emerging tool to help improve the adversarial robustness in classification tasks since robust learning requires a significantly larger amount of training samples compared with standard classification tasks. Among various deep generative models, the diffusion model has been shown to produce high-quality synthetic images and has achieved good performance in improving the adversarial robustness. However, diffusion-type methods are typically slow in data generation as compared with other generative models. Although different acceleration techniques have been proposed recently, it is also of great importance to study how to improve the sample efficiency of generated data for the downstream task. In this paper, we first analyze the optimality condition of synthetic distribution for achieving non-trivial robust accuracy. We show that enhancing the distinguishability among the generated data is critical for improving adversarial robustness. Thus, we propose the Contrastive-Guided Diffusion Process (Contrastive-DP), which adopts the contrastive loss to guide the diffusion model in data generation. We verify our theoretical results using simulations and demonstrate the good performance of Contrastive-DP on image datasets.
abstract_zh: 合成数据生成已成为一种新兴工具，有助于提高分类任务中的对抗鲁棒性，因为与标准分类任务相比，鲁棒学习需要大量的训练样本。在各种深度生成模型中，扩散模型已被证明可以产生高质量的合成图像，并在提高对抗鲁棒性方面取得了良好的性能。然而，与其他生成模型相比，扩散型方法的数据生成速度通常较慢。尽管最近提出了不同的加速技术，但研究如何提高下游任务生成数据的样本效率也很重要。在本文中，我们首先分析了合成分布的最优条件以实现非平凡的鲁棒精度。我们表明，增强生成数据之间的可区分性对于提高对抗鲁棒性至关重要。因此，我们提出了对比引导扩散过程（Contrastive-DP），它采用对比损失来指导数据生成中的扩散模型。我们使用模拟验证了我们的理论结果，并证明了 Contrastive-DP 在图像数据集上的良好性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为对比引导扩散过程（Contrastive-DP）的方法，通过增强生成数据的可区分性来提高对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽能生成高质量图像，但数据生成速度慢且样本效率低，难以满足对抗训练对大量样本的需求。
AI.method: 通过引入对比损失函数指导扩散过程，增强生成样本之间的区分度，从而优化合成数据分布以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验验证表明，Contrastive-DP在图像数据集上有效提升了对抗鲁棒性，且生成效率优于传统扩散模型。
AI.conclusion: 对比引导机制能显著提升生成数据的区分性，为对抗训练提供更高效的样本生成方案，具有实际应用价值。

We show that enhancing the distinguishability among the generated data is critical for improving adversarial robustness. Thus, we propose the Contrastive-Guided Diffusion Process (Contrastive-DP), which adopts the contrastive loss to guide the diffusion model in data generation. We verify our theoretical results using simulations and demonstrate the good performance of Contrastive-DP on image datasets. 合成数据生成已成为一种新兴工具，有助于提高分类任务中的对抗鲁棒性，因为与标准分类任务相比，鲁棒学习需要大量的训练样本。在各种深度生成模型中，扩散模型已被证明可以产生高质量的合成图像，并在提高对抗鲁棒性方面取得了良好的性能。然而，与其他生成模型相比，扩散型方法的数据生成速度通常较慢。尽管最近提出了不同的加速技术，但研究如何提高下游任务生成数据的样本效率也很重要。在本文中，我们首先分析了合成分布的最优条件以实现非平凡的鲁棒精度。我们表明，增强生成数据之间的可区分性对于提高对抗鲁棒性至关重要。因此，我们提出了对比引导扩散过程（Contrastive-DP），它采用对比损失来指导数据生成中的扩散模型。我们使用模拟验证了我们的理论结果，并证明了 Contrastive-DP 在图像数据集上的良好性能。 本文提出了一种名为对比引导扩散过程（Contrastive-DP）的方法，通过增强生成数据的可区分性来提高对抗鲁棒性。 Yidong Ouyang,Liyan Xie,Guang Cheng cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Surya Teja Gavva,Karthik C. S.,Sharath Punna
title: Clustering Categorical Data: Soft Rounding k-modes
title_zh: 聚类分类数据：软舍入 k 模式
abstract: Over the last three decades, researchers have intensively explored various clustering tools for categorical data analysis. Despite the proposal of various clustering algorithms, the classical k-modes algorithm remains a popular choice for unsupervised learning of categorical data. Surprisingly, our first insight is that in a natural generative block model, the k-modes algorithm performs poorly for a large range of parameters. We remedy this issue by proposing a soft rounding variant of the k-modes algorithm (SoftModes) and theoretically prove that our variant addresses the drawbacks of the k-modes algorithm in the generative model. Finally, we empirically verify that SoftModes performs well on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
summary: Over the last three decades, researchers have intensively explored various clustering tools for categorical data analysis. Despite the proposal of various clustering algorithms, the classical k-modes algorithm remains a popular choice for unsupervised learning of categorical data. Surprisingly, our first insight is that in a natural generative block model, the k-modes algorithm performs poorly for a large range of parameters. We remedy this issue by proposing a soft rounding variant of the k-modes algorithm (SoftModes) and theoretically prove that our variant addresses the drawbacks of the k-modes algorithm in the generative model. Finally, we empirically verify that SoftModes performs well on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 在过去的三十年中，研究人员深入探索了用于分类数据分析的各种聚类工具。尽管提出了各种聚类算法，但经典的 k 模式算法仍然是分类数据无监督学习的流行选择。令人惊讶的是，我们的第一个发现是，在自然生成块模型中，k 模式算法对于大范围的参数表现不佳。我们通过提出 k 模式算法的软舍入变体（SoftModes）来解决这个问题，并从理论上证明我们的变体解决了生成模型中 k 模式算法的缺点。最后，我们凭经验验证 SoftModes 在合成数据集和真实数据集上均表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的软舍入k-modes算法（SoftModes），以解决传统k-modes在分类数据聚类中的性能缺陷。
AI.motivation: 尽管k-modes是分类数据聚类的经典算法，但作者发现其在自然生成的块模型中对参数范围敏感，存在性能局限。
AI.method: 设计SoftModes算法作为k-modes的软舍入变体，通过理论分析证明其在生成模型中的改进效果，并在合成与真实数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明SoftModes在多种数据集上均优于传统k-modes，有效提升了聚类性能。
AI.conclusion: SoftModes成功解决了k-modes的参数敏感性问题，为分类数据聚类提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Seung Park,Yong-Goo Shin
title: Improving GANs with a Feature Cycling Generator
title_zh: 使用特征循环生成器改进 GAN
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs), built with a generator and discriminator, significantly have advanced image generation. Typically, existing papers build their generators by stacking up multiple residual blocks since it makes ease the training of generators. However, some recent papers commented on the limitation of the residual block and proposed a new architectural unit that improves the GANs performance. Following this trend, this paper presents a novel unit, called feature cycling block (FCB), which achieves impressive results in the image generation task. Specifically, the FCB has two branches: one is a memory branch and the other is an image branch. The memory branch keeps meaningful information at each stage of the generator, whereas the image branch takes some useful features from the memory branch to produce a high-quality image. To show the capability of the proposed method, we conducted extensive experiments using various datasets including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, FFHQ, AFHQ, and subsets of LSUN. Experimental results demonstrate the substantial superiority of our approach over the baseline without incurring any objective functions or training skills. For instance, the proposed method improves Frechet inception distance (FID) of StyleGAN2 from 4.89 to 3.72 on the FFHQ dataset and from 6.64 to 5.57 on the LSUN Bed dataset. We believe that the pioneering attempt presented in this paper could inspire the community with better-designed generator architecture and with training objectives or skills compatible with the proposed method.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs), built with a generator and discriminator, significantly have advanced image generation. Typically, existing papers build their generators by stacking up multiple residual blocks since it makes ease the training of generators. However, some recent papers commented on the limitation of the residual block and proposed a new architectural unit that improves the GANs performance. Following this trend, this paper presents a novel unit, called feature cycling block (FCB), which achieves impressive results in the image generation task. Specifically, the FCB has two branches: one is a memory branch and the other is an image branch. The memory branch keeps meaningful information at each stage of the generator, whereas the image branch takes some useful features from the memory branch to produce a high-quality image. To show the capability of the proposed method, we conducted extensive experiments using various datasets including CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, FFHQ, AFHQ, and subsets of LSUN. Experimental results demonstrate the substantial superiority of our approach over the baseline without incurring any objective functions or training skills. For instance, the proposed method improves Frechet inception distance (FID) of StyleGAN2 from 4.89 to 3.72 on the FFHQ dataset and from 6.64 to 5.57 on the LSUN Bed dataset. We believe that the pioneering attempt presented in this paper could inspire the community with better-designed generator architecture and with training objectives or skills compatible with the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 使用生成器和判别器构建的生成对抗网络（GAN）显着具有先进的图像生成功能。通常，现有论文通过堆叠多个残差块来构建生成器，因为它可以简化生成器的训练。然而，最近的一些论文评论了残差块的局限性，并提出了一种新的架构单元来提高 GAN 的性能。顺应这一趋势，本文提出了一种称为特征循环块（FCB）的新颖单元，它在图像生成任务中取得了令人印象深刻的结果。具体来说，FCB有两个分支：一个是内存分支，另一个是图像分支。内存分支在生成器的每个阶段保留有意义的信息，而图像分支从内存分支中获取一些有用的特征来生成高质量的图像。为了展示所提出方法的能力，我们使用各种数据集（包括 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、FFHQ、AFHQ 和 LSUN 子集）进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们的方法相对于基线具有显着的优越性，而无需引入任何目标函数或训练技能。例如，所提出的方法将 StyleGAN2 的 Frechet 起始距离 (FID) 在 FFHQ 数据集上从 4.89 提高到 3.72，在 LSUN Bed 数据集上从 6.64 提高到 5.57。我们相信，本文提出的开创性尝试可以通过更好设计的生成器架构以及与所提出的方法兼容的培训目标或技能来启发社区。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为特征循环块（FCB）的新架构单元，通过改进生成对抗网络（GAN）的生成器结构来提升图像生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN生成器依赖残差块导致性能瓶颈，需探索更有效的架构设计以突破传统方法限制。
AI.method: 设计包含记忆分支（保留关键信息）和图像分支（提取特征生成图像）的FCB模块，无需额外训练目标即可集成到生成器中。
AI.result: 在FFHQ数据集上将StyleGAN2的FID从4.89降至3.72，在LSUN Bed数据集上从6.64降至5.57，显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FCB验证了新型生成器架构的有效性，为未来设计兼容该方法的训练目标和技能提供了研究方向。

authors_text: Geon Choi,Jeonghun Park,Nir Shlezinger,Yonina C. Eldar,Namyoon Lee
title: Split-KalmanNet: A Robust Model-Based Deep Learning Approach for SLAM
title_zh: Split-KalmanNet：一种基于稳健模型的 SLAM 深度学习方法
abstract: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a method that constructs a map of an unknown environment and localizes the position of a moving agent on the map simultaneously. Extended Kalman filter (EKF) has been widely adopted as a low complexity solution for online SLAM, which relies on a motion and measurement model of the moving agent. In practice, however, acquiring precise information about these models is very challenging, and the model mismatch effect causes severe performance loss in SLAM. In this paper, inspired by the recently proposed KalmanNet, we present a robust EKF algorithm using the power of deep learning for online SLAM, referred to as Split-KalmanNet. The key idea of Split-KalmanNet is to compute the Kalman gain using the Jacobian matrix of a measurement function and two recurrent neural networks (RNNs). The two RNNs independently learn the covariance matrices for a prior state estimate and the innovation from data. The proposed split structure in the computation of the Kalman gain allows to compensate for state and measurement model mismatch effects independently. Numerical simulation results verify that Split-KalmanNet outperforms the traditional EKF and the state-of-the-art KalmanNet algorithm in various model mismatch scenarios.
summary: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a method that constructs a map of an unknown environment and localizes the position of a moving agent on the map simultaneously. Extended Kalman filter (EKF) has been widely adopted as a low complexity solution for online SLAM, which relies on a motion and measurement model of the moving agent. In practice, however, acquiring precise information about these models is very challenging, and the model mismatch effect causes severe performance loss in SLAM. In this paper, inspired by the recently proposed KalmanNet, we present a robust EKF algorithm using the power of deep learning for online SLAM, referred to as Split-KalmanNet. The key idea of Split-KalmanNet is to compute the Kalman gain using the Jacobian matrix of a measurement function and two recurrent neural networks (RNNs). The two RNNs independently learn the covariance matrices for a prior state estimate and the innovation from data. The proposed split structure in the computation of the Kalman gain allows to compensate for state and measurement model mismatch effects independently. Numerical simulation results verify that Split-KalmanNet outperforms the traditional EKF and the state-of-the-art KalmanNet algorithm in various model mismatch scenarios.
abstract_zh: 同步定位与建图（SLAM）是一种构建未知环境的地图并同时定位移动代理在地图上的位置的方法。扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）作为在线 SLAM 的低复杂度解决方案已被广泛采用，它依赖于移动代理的运动和测量模型。然而在实践中，获取这些模型的精确信息非常具有挑战性，并且模型失配效应会导致 SLAM 的严重性能损失。在本文中，受最近提出的 KalmanNet 的启发，我们提出了一种利用深度学习在线 SLAM 功能的强大 EKF 算法，称为 Split-KalmanNet。 Split-KalmanNet 的关键思想是使用测量函数的雅可比矩阵和两个递归神经网络 (RNN) 来计算卡尔曼增益。两个 RNN 独立学习先验状态估计的协方差矩阵和数据的创新。卡尔曼增益计算中提出的分割结构允许独立补偿状态和测量模型失配效应。数值模拟结果验证了Split-KalmanNet在各种模型失配场景下均优于传统EKF和最先进的KalmanNet算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的改进型扩展卡尔曼滤波算法Split-KalmanNet，用于解决SLAM中的模型不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统EKF依赖精确的运动和测量模型，但在实际应用中模型不匹配会导致SLAM性能显著下降，亟需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入两个独立递归神经网络（RNN）分别学习先验状态协方差和创新协方差，利用测量函数雅可比矩阵计算卡尔曼增益，实现对状态和测量模型不匹配的独立补偿。
AI.result: 数值仿真表明，Split-KalmanNet在多种模型不匹配场景下均优于传统EKF和最新KalmanNet算法。
AI.conclusion: Split-KalmanNet通过深度学习增强的协方差估计机制，有效提升了SLAM系统在模型不确定性下的鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的改进型扩展卡尔曼滤波算法Split-KalmanNet，用于解决SLAM中的模型不匹配问题。
ai_content.motivation: 传统EKF依赖精确的运动和测量模型，但在实际应用中模型不匹配会导致SLAM性能显著下降，亟需更鲁棒的解决方案。
ai_content.method: 通过引入两个独立递归神经网络（RNN）分别学习先验状态协方差和创新协方差，利用测量函数雅可比矩阵计算卡尔曼增益，实现对状态和测量模型不匹配的独立补偿。
ai_content.result: 数值仿真表明，Split-KalmanNet在多种模型不匹配场景下均优于传统EKF和最新KalmanNet算法。
ai_content.conclusion: Split-KalmanNet通过深度学习增强的协方差估计机制，有效提升了SLAM系统在模型不确定性下的鲁棒性。

search_text: Split-KalmanNet: A Robust Model-Based Deep Learning Approach for SLAM Split-KalmanNet：一种基于稳健模型的 SLAM 深度学习方法 Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a method that constructs a map of an unknown environment and localizes the position of a moving agent on the map simultaneously. Extended Kalman filter (EKF) has been widely adopted as a low complexity solution for online SLAM, which relies on a motion and measurement model of the moving agent. In practice, however, acquiring precise information about these models is very challenging, and the model mismatch effect causes severe performance loss in SLAM. In this paper, inspired by the recently proposed KalmanNet, we present a robust EKF algorithm using the power of deep learning for online SLAM, referred to as Split-KalmanNet. The key idea of Split-KalmanNet is to compute the Kalman gain using the Jacobian matrix of a measurement function and two recurrent neural networks (RNNs). The two RNNs independently learn the covariance matrices for a prior state estimate and the innovation from data. The proposed split structure in the computation of the Kalman gain allows to compensate for state and measurement model mismatch effects independently. Numerical simulation results verify that Split-KalmanNet outperforms the traditional EKF and the state-of-the-art KalmanNet algorithm in various model mismatch scenarios. 同步定位与建图（SLAM）是一种构建未知环境的地图并同时定位移动代理在地图上的位置的方法。扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）作为在线 SLAM 的低复杂度解决方案已被广泛采用，它依赖于移动代理的运动和测量模型。然而在实践中，获取这些模型的精确信息非常具有挑战性，并且模型失配效应会导致 SLAM 的严重性能损失。在本文中，受最近提出的 KalmanNet 的启发，我们提出了一种利用深度学习在线 SLAM 功能的强大 EKF 算法，称为 Split-KalmanNet。 Split-KalmanNet 的关键思想是使用测量函数的雅可比矩阵和两个递归神经网络 (RNN) 来计算卡尔曼增益。两个 RNN 独立学习先验状态估计的协方差矩阵和数据的创新。卡尔曼增益计算中提出的分割结构允许独立补偿状态和测量模型失配效应。数值模拟结果验证了Split-KalmanNet在各种模型失配场景下均优于传统EKF和最先进的KalmanNet算法。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的改进型扩展卡尔曼滤波算法Split-KalmanNet，用于解决SLAM中的模型不匹配问题。 Geon Choi,Jeonghun Park,Nir Shlezinger,Yonina C. Eldar,Namyoon Lee eess.SP,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Jiajun Zhang,Boyu Chen,Zhilong Ji,Jinfeng Bai,Zonghai Hu
title: 1st Place Solutions for the UVO Challenge 2022
title_zh: 2022 年 UVO 挑战赛第一名解决方案
abstract: This paper describes the approach we have taken in the challenge. We still adopted the two-stage scheme same as the last champion, that is, detection first and segmentation followed. We trained more powerful detector and segmentor separately. Besides, we also perform pseudo-label training on the test set, based on student-teacher framework and end-to-end transformer based object detection. The method ranks first on the 2nd Unidentified Video Objects (UVO) challenge, achieving AR@100 of 46.8, 64.7 and 32.2 in the limited data frame track, unlimited data frame track and video track respectively.
summary: This paper describes the approach we have taken in the challenge. We still adopted the two-stage scheme same as the last champion, that is, detection first and segmentation followed. We trained more powerful detector and segmentor separately. Besides, we also perform pseudo-label training on the test set, based on student-teacher framework and end-to-end transformer based object detection. The method ranks first on the 2nd Unidentified Video Objects (UVO) challenge, achieving AR@100 of 46.8, 64.7 and 32.2 in the limited data frame track, unlimited data frame track and video track respectively.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了我们在挑战中采取的方法。我们仍然采用与上届冠军相同的两阶段方案，即先检测，后分割。我们分别训练了更强大的检测器和分割器。此外，我们还基于学生-教师框架和基于端到端变压器的对象检测对测试集进行伪标签训练。该方法在第二届未识别视频对象（UVO）挑战中排名第一，在有限数据帧轨道、无限数据帧轨道和视频轨道上分别获得了46.8、64.7和32.2的AR@100。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在UVO挑战赛中排名第一的解决方案，采用两阶段检测与分割框架并结合伪标签训练方法。
AI.motivation: 基于去年冠军方案的两阶段检测-分割框架，通过优化模型性能和引入伪标签训练进一步提升效果。
AI.method: 采用检测-分割两阶段方案，分别训练更强的检测器和分割器；基于学生-教师框架在测试集进行伪标签训练，结合端到端Transformer检测模型。
AI.result: 在UVO挑战赛中获得第一名，有限数据帧赛道AR@100达46.8，无限数据帧赛道64.7，视频赛道32.2。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段框架结合伪标签训练有效提升了视频未识别对象检测性能，验证了方法在挑战赛中的优越性。
