authors_text: Fachrina Dewi Puspitasari,Lik-Hang Lee
title: Review of Persuasive User Interface as Strategy for Technology Addiction in Virtual Environments
title_zh: 说服性用户界面作为虚拟环境中技术成瘾策略的回顾
abstract: In the era of virtuality, the increasingly ubiquitous technology bears the challenge of excessive user dependency, also known as user addiction. Augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR) have become increasingly integrated into daily life. Although discussions about the drawbacks of these technologies are abundant, their exploration for solutions is still rare. Thus, using the PRISMA methodology, this paper reviewed the literature on technology addiction and persuasive technology. After describing the key research trends, the paper summed up nine persuasive elements of user interfaces (UIs) that AR and VR developers could add to their apps to make them less addictive. Furthermore, this review paper encourages more research into a persuasive strategy for controlling user dependency in virtual-physical blended cyberspace.
summary: In the era of virtuality, the increasingly ubiquitous technology bears the challenge of excessive user dependency, also known as user addiction. Augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR) have become increasingly integrated into daily life. Although discussions about the drawbacks of these technologies are abundant, their exploration for solutions is still rare. Thus, using the PRISMA methodology, this paper reviewed the literature on technology addiction and persuasive technology. After describing the key research trends, the paper summed up nine persuasive elements of user interfaces (UIs) that AR and VR developers could add to their apps to make them less addictive. Furthermore, this review paper encourages more research into a persuasive strategy for controlling user dependency in virtual-physical blended cyberspace.
abstract_zh: 在虚拟化时代，日益无处不在的技术面临着用户过度依赖的挑战，也称为用户成瘾。增强现实（AR）和虚拟现实（VR）已越来越多地融入日常生活。尽管关于这些技术缺点的讨论很多，但对解决方案的探索仍然很少。因此，本文利用 PRISMA 方法，回顾了有关技术成瘾和说服技术的文献。在描述了关键研究趋势后，该论文总结了 AR 和 VR 开发人员可以添加到他们的应用程序中以降低其成瘾性的用户界面 (UI) 的九个有说服力的元素。此外，这篇评论文章鼓励更多地研究一种有说服力的策略，以控制虚拟-物理混合网络空间中的用户依赖性。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了说服性用户界面作为解决虚拟环境中技术成瘾问题的策略，并提出九个可应用于AR/VR应用的设计元素。
AI.motivation: 随着AR/VR技术普及，用户技术成瘾问题日益严重，但现有研究对解决方案的探索不足。
AI.method: 采用PRISMA方法系统回顾技术成瘾与说服技术相关文献，总结关键设计要素。
AI.result: 识别出九个可减少成瘾性的说服性用户界面元素，为开发者提供设计参考。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究如何在虚拟-物理混合空间中应用说服策略以控制用户依赖。

authors_text: Fabian Otto,Onur Celik,Hongyi Zhou,Hanna Ziesche,Ngo Anh Vien,Gerhard Neumann
title: Deep Black-Box Reinforcement Learning with Movement Primitives
title_zh: 使用运动原语的深度黑盒强化学习
abstract: \Episode-based reinforcement learning (ERL) algorithms treat reinforcement learning (RL) as a black-box optimization problem where we learn to select a parameter vector of a controller, often represented as a movement primitive, for a given task descriptor called a context. ERL offers several distinct benefits in comparison to step-based RL. It generates smooth control trajectories, can handle non-Markovian reward definitions, and the resulting exploration in parameter space is well suited for solving sparse reward settings. Yet, the high dimensionality of the movement primitive parameters has so far hampered the effective use of deep RL methods. In this paper, we present a new algorithm for deep ERL. It is based on differentiable trust region layers, a successful on-policy deep RL algorithm. These layers allow us to specify trust regions for the policy update that are solved exactly for each state using convex optimization, which enables policies learning with the high precision required for the ERL. We compare our ERL algorithm to state-of-the-art step-based algorithms in many complex simulated robotic control tasks. In doing so, we investigate different reward formulations - dense, sparse, and non-Markovian. While step-based algorithms perform well only on dense rewards, ERL performs favorably on sparse and non-Markovian rewards. Moreover, our results show that the sparse and the non-Markovian rewards are also often better suited to define the desired behavior, allowing us to obtain considerably higher quality policies compared to step-based RL.
summary: \Episode-based reinforcement learning (ERL) algorithms treat reinforcement learning (RL) as a black-box optimization problem where we learn to select a parameter vector of a controller, often represented as a movement primitive, for a given task descriptor called a context. ERL offers several distinct benefits in comparison to step-based RL. It generates smooth control trajectories, can handle non-Markovian reward definitions, and the resulting exploration in parameter space is well suited for solving sparse reward settings. Yet, the high dimensionality of the movement primitive parameters has so far hampered the effective use of deep RL methods. In this paper, we present a new algorithm for deep ERL. It is based on differentiable trust region layers, a successful on-policy deep RL algorithm. These layers allow us to specify trust regions for the policy update that are solved exactly for each state using convex optimization, which enables policies learning with the high precision required for the ERL. We compare our ERL algorithm to state-of-the-art step-based algorithms in many complex simulated robotic control tasks. In doing so, we investigate different reward formulations - dense, sparse, and non-Markovian. While step-based algorithms perform well only on dense rewards, ERL performs favorably on sparse and non-Markovian rewards. Moreover, our results show that the sparse and the non-Markovian rewards are also often better suited to define the desired behavior, allowing us to obtain considerably higher quality policies compared to step-based RL.
abstract_zh: 基于情节的强化学习（ERL）算法将强化学习（RL）视为黑盒优化问题，其中我们学习为称为上下文的给定任务描述符选择控制器的参数向量（通常表示为运动基元）。与基于步骤的 RL 相比，ERL 具有几个明显的优势。它生成平滑的控制轨迹，可以处理非马尔可夫奖励定义，并且由此产生的参数空间探索非常适合解决稀疏奖励设置。然而，运动原始参数的高维性迄今为止阻碍了深度强化学习方法的有效使用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的深度 ERL 算法。它基于可微信任区域层，这是一种成功的同策略深度强化学习算法。这些层使我们能够为策略更新指定信任区域，并使用凸优化针对每个状态精确求解，从而实现 ERL 所需的高精度策略学习。我们在许多复杂的模拟机器人控制任务中将我们的 ERL 算法与最先进的基于步骤的算法进行比较。在此过程中，我们研究了不同的奖励公式——密集、稀疏和非马尔可夫。虽然基于步骤的算法仅在密集奖励上表现良好，但 ERL 在稀疏和非马尔可夫奖励上表现良好。此外，我们的结果表明，稀疏和非马尔可夫奖励通常也更适合定义所需的行为，使我们能够获得比基于步骤的强化学习更高质量的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可微分信任区域层的深度黑盒强化学习算法，解决运动原语参数高维性问题，提升在稀疏和非马尔可夫奖励任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统基于回合的强化学习（ERL）因运动原语参数高维性难以有效应用深度RL，而基于步骤的算法在稀疏奖励场景中表现不足。
AI.method: 设计可微分信任区域层，通过凸优化精确求解每个状态的信任区域，实现高精度策略更新，结合深度RL框架进行训练。
AI.result: 在多个复杂机器人控制任务中，ERL算法在稀疏和非马尔可夫奖励场景下显著优于基于步骤的算法，且能生成更高质量的策略。
AI.conclusion: ERL算法通过信任区域层有效解决高维参数问题，在稀疏和非马尔可夫奖励任务中表现优异，未来可拓展至更复杂的实际应用。

search_text: Deep Black-Box Reinforcement Learning with Movement Primitives 使用运动原语的深度黑盒强化学习 \Episode-based reinforcement learning (ERL) algorithms treat reinforcement learning (RL) as a black-box optimization problem where we learn to select a parameter vector of a controller, often represented as a movement primitive, for a given task descriptor called a context. ERL offers several distinct benefits in comparison to step-based RL. It generates smooth control trajectories, can handle non-Markovian reward definitions, and the resulting exploration in parameter space is well suited for solving sparse reward settings. Yet, the high dimensionality of the movement primitive parameters has so far hampered the effective use of deep RL methods. In this paper, we present a new algorithm for deep ERL. It is based on differentiable trust region layers, a successful on-policy deep RL algorithm. These layers allow us to specify trust regions for the policy update that are solved exactly for each state using convex optimization, which enables policies learning with the high precision required for the ERL. We compare our ERL algorithm to state-of-the-art step-based algorithms in many complex simulated robotic control tasks. In doing so, we investigate different reward formulations - dense, sparse, and non-Markovian. While step-based algorithms perform well only on dense rewards, ERL performs favorably on sparse and non-Markovian rewards. Moreover, our results show that the sparse and the non-Markovian rewards are also often better suited to define the desired behavior, allowing us to obtain considerably higher quality policies compared to step-based RL. 基于情节的强化学习（ERL）算法将强化学习（RL）视为黑盒优化问题，其中我们学习为称为上下文的给定任务描述符选择控制器的参数向量（通常表示为运动基元）。与基于步骤的 RL 相比，ERL 具有几个明显的优势。它生成平滑的控制轨迹，可以处理非马尔可夫奖励定义，并且由此产生的参数空间探索非常适合解决稀疏奖励设置。然而，运动原始参数的高维性迄今为止阻碍了深度强化学习方法的有效使用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的深度 ERL 算法。它基于可微信任区域层，这是一种成功的同策略深度强化学习算法。这些层使我们能够为策略更新指定信任区域，并使用凸优化针对每个状态精确求解，从而实现 ERL 所需的高精度策略学习。我们在许多复杂的模拟机器人控制任务中将我们的 ERL 算法与最先进的基于步骤的算法进行比较。在此过程中，我们研究了不同的奖励公式——密集、稀疏和非马尔可夫。虽然基于步骤的算法仅在密集奖励上表现良好，但 ERL 在稀疏和非马尔可夫奖励上表现良好。此外，我们的结果表明，稀疏和非马尔可夫奖励通常也更适合定义所需的行为，使我们能够获得比基于步骤的强化学习更高质量的策略。 本文提出一种基于可微分信任区域层的深度黑盒强化学习算法，解决运动原语参数高维性问题，提升在稀疏和非马尔可夫奖励任务中的表现。 Fabian Otto,Onur Celik,Hongyi Zhou,Hanna Ziesche,Ngo Anh Vien,Gerhard Neumann cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Imran Khan Mirani,Chen Tianhua,Malak Abid Ali Khan,Syed Muhammad Aamir,Waseef Menhaj
title: Object Recognition in Different Lighting Conditions at Various Angles by Deep Learning Method
title_zh: 利用深度学习方法进行不同光照条件下、不同角度的物体识别
abstract: Existing computer vision and object detection methods strongly rely on neural networks and deep learning. This active research area is used for applications such as autonomous driving, aerial photography, protection, and monitoring. Futuristic object detection methods rely on rectangular, boundary boxes drawn over an object to accurately locate its location. The modern object recognition algorithms, however, are vulnerable to multiple factors, such as illumination, occlusion, viewing angle, or camera rotation as well as cost. Therefore, deep learning-based object recognition will significantly increase the recognition speed and compatible external interference. In this study, we use convolutional neural networks (CNN) to recognize items, the neural networks have the advantages of end-to-end, sparse relation, and sharing weights. This article aims to classify the name of the various object based on the position of an object's detected box. Instead, under different distances, we can get recognition results with different confidence. Through this study, we find that this model's accuracy through recognition is mainly influenced by the proportion of objects and the number of samples. When we have a small proportion of an object on camera, then we get higher recognition accuracy; if we have a much small number of samples, we can get greater accuracy in recognition. The epidemic has a great impact on the world economy where designing a cheaper object recognition system is the need of time.
summary: Existing computer vision and object detection methods strongly rely on neural networks and deep learning. This active research area is used for applications such as autonomous driving, aerial photography, protection, and monitoring. Futuristic object detection methods rely on rectangular, boundary boxes drawn over an object to accurately locate its location. The modern object recognition algorithms, however, are vulnerable to multiple factors, such as illumination, occlusion, viewing angle, or camera rotation as well as cost. Therefore, deep learning-based object recognition will significantly increase the recognition speed and compatible external interference. In this study, we use convolutional neural networks (CNN) to recognize items, the neural networks have the advantages of end-to-end, sparse relation, and sharing weights. This article aims to classify the name of the various object based on the position of an object's detected box. Instead, under different distances, we can get recognition results with different confidence. Through this study, we find that this model's accuracy through recognition is mainly influenced by the proportion of objects and the number of samples. When we have a small proportion of an object on camera, then we get higher recognition accuracy; if we have a much small number of samples, we can get greater accuracy in recognition. The epidemic has a great impact on the world economy where designing a cheaper object recognition system is the need of time.
abstract_zh: 现有的计算机视觉和目标检测方法强烈依赖神经网络和深度学习。这一活跃的研究领域用于自动驾驶、航空摄影、保护和监控等应用。未来的物体检测方法依靠在物体上绘制的矩形边界框来准确定位其位置。然而，现代物体识别算法容易受到多种因素的影响，例如照明、遮挡、视角或相机旋转以及成本。因此，基于深度学习的物体识别将显着提高识别速度并兼容外部干扰。在本研究中，我们使用卷积神经网络（CNN）来识别项目，神经网络具有端到端、稀疏关系和共享权重的优点。本文旨在根据检测到的对象框的位置对各种对象的名称进行分类。相反，在不同的距离下，我们可以获得不同置信度的识别结果。通过这项研究，我们发现该模型的识别准确率主要受物体比例和样本数量的影响。当相机上的物体比例较小时，我们会获得较高的识别准确率；如果我们的样本数量少得多，我们就能获得更高的识别准确率。疫情对世界经济影响很大，设计更便宜的物体识别系统是需要时间的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用深度学习方法（特别是卷积神经网络）在不同光照条件和角度下实现物体识别，分析物体比例和样本数量对识别准确率的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有物体识别算法易受光照、遮挡、视角等因素影响，且需提高识别速度并兼容外部干扰，同时需设计更经济的系统以应对疫情对经济的影响。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN），利用其端到端、稀疏关系和权重共享特性，基于检测框位置对物体名称进行分类，并分析不同距离、置信度、物体比例及样本数量对结果的影响。
AI.result: 模型准确率主要受物体在画面中的比例和样本数量影响：物体比例较小时识别准确率更高；样本数量较少时准确率反而提升。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法能有效提升物体识别鲁棒性，但需优化物体比例与样本数量的平衡，未来需设计更低成本的识别系统以满足实际需求。

authors_text: Fei Zheng,Chaochao Chen,Lingjuan Lyu,Xinyi Fu,Xing Fu,Weiqiang Wang,Xiaolin Zheng,Jianwei Yin
title: Protecting Split Learning by Potential Energy Loss
title_zh: 通过潜在的能量损失来保护分裂学习
abstract: As a practical privacy-preserving learning method, split learning has drawn much attention in academia and industry. However, its security is constantly being questioned since the intermediate results are shared during training and inference. In this paper, we focus on the privacy leakage from the forward embeddings of split learning. Specifically, since the forward embeddings contain too much information about the label, the attacker can either use a few labeled samples to fine-tune the top model or perform unsupervised attacks such as clustering to infer the true labels from the forward embeddings. To prevent such kind of privacy leakage, we propose the potential energy loss to make the forward embeddings become more 'complicated', by pushing embeddings of the same class towards the decision boundary. Therefore, it is hard for the attacker to learn from the forward embeddings. Experiment results show that our method significantly lowers the performance of both fine-tuning attacks and clustering attacks.
summary: As a practical privacy-preserving learning method, split learning has drawn much attention in academia and industry. However, its security is constantly being questioned since the intermediate results are shared during training and inference. In this paper, we focus on the privacy leakage from the forward embeddings of split learning. Specifically, since the forward embeddings contain too much information about the label, the attacker can either use a few labeled samples to fine-tune the top model or perform unsupervised attacks such as clustering to infer the true labels from the forward embeddings. To prevent such kind of privacy leakage, we propose the potential energy loss to make the forward embeddings become more 'complicated', by pushing embeddings of the same class towards the decision boundary. Therefore, it is hard for the attacker to learn from the forward embeddings. Experiment results show that our method significantly lowers the performance of both fine-tuning attacks and clustering attacks.
abstract_zh: 分割学习作为一种实用的隐私保护学习方法，受到了学术界和工业界的广泛关注。然而，由于训练和推理过程中中间结果是共享的，其安全性不断受到质疑。在本文中，我们重点关注分割学习的前向嵌入造成的隐私泄露。具体来说，由于前向嵌入包含太多有关标签的信息，攻击者可以使用一些标记样本来微调顶层模型，或者执行无监督攻击（例如聚类）以从前向嵌入推断真实标签。为了防止这种隐私泄露，我们提出了潜在的能量损失，通过将同一类的嵌入推向决策边界，使前向嵌入变得更加“复杂”。因此，攻击者很难从前向嵌入中学习。实验结果表明，我们的方法显着降低了微调攻击和聚类攻击的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过势能损失保护分割学习的隐私安全，针对前向嵌入信息泄露问题设计防御方法。
AI.motivation: 分割学习在训练和推理过程中共享中间结果，导致攻击者可通过前向嵌入推断敏感标签信息，现有方法难以有效防御此类攻击。
AI.method: 设计势能损失函数，通过将同类样本的前向嵌入推向决策边界，增加嵌入分布复杂度以干扰攻击者利用。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著降低攻击者微调攻击和聚类攻击的性能，有效缓解隐私泄露风险。
AI.conclusion: 势能损失能有效增强分割学习的隐私保护能力，为对抗嵌入信息泄露提供新思路。

search_text: Protecting Split Learning by Potential Energy Loss 通过潜在的能量损失来保护分裂学习 As a practical privacy-preserving learning method, split learning has drawn much attention in academia and industry. However, its security is constantly being questioned since the intermediate results are shared during training and inference. In this paper, we focus on the privacy leakage from the forward embeddings of split learning. Specifically, since the forward embeddings contain too much information about the label, the attacker can either use a few labeled samples to fine-tune the top model or perform unsupervised attacks such as clustering to infer the true labels from the forward embeddings. To prevent such kind of privacy leakage, we propose the potential energy loss to make the forward embeddings become more 'complicated', by pushing embeddings of the same class towards the decision boundary. Therefore, it is hard for the attacker to learn from the forward embeddings. Experiment results show that our method significantly lowers the performance of both fine-tuning attacks and clustering attacks. 分割学习作为一种实用的隐私保护学习方法，受到了学术界和工业界的广泛关注。然而，由于训练和推理过程中中间结果是共享的，其安全性不断受到质疑。在本文中，我们重点关注分割学习的前向嵌入造成的隐私泄露。具体来说，由于前向嵌入包含太多有关标签的信息，攻击者可以使用一些标记样本来微调顶层模型，或者执行无监督攻击（例如聚类）以从前向嵌入推断真实标签。为了防止这种隐私泄露，我们提出了潜在的能量损失，通过将同一类的嵌入推向决策边界，使前向嵌入变得更加“复杂”。因此，攻击者很难从前向嵌入中学习。实验结果表明，我们的方法显着降低了微调攻击和聚类攻击的性能。 本文提出通过势能损失保护分割学习的隐私安全，针对前向嵌入信息泄露问题设计防御方法。 Fei Zheng,Chaochao Chen,Lingjuan Lyu,Xinyi Fu,Xing Fu,Weiqiang Wang,Xiaolin Zheng,Jianwei Yin cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.DC,cs.LG

authors_text: Xin Li,Botian Shi,Yuenan Hou,Xingjiao Wu,Tianlong Ma,Yikang Li,Liang He
title: Homogeneous Multi-modal Feature Fusion and Interaction for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 用于 3D 物体检测的同质多模态特征融合和交互
abstract: Multi-modal 3D object detection has been an active research topic in autonomous driving. Nevertheless, it is non-trivial to explore the cross-modal feature fusion between sparse 3D points and dense 2D pixels. Recent approaches either fuse the image features with the point cloud features that are projected onto the 2D image plane or combine the sparse point cloud with dense image pixels. These fusion approaches often suffer from severe information loss, thus causing sub-optimal performance. To address these problems, we construct the homogeneous structure between the point cloud and images to avoid projective information loss by transforming the camera features into the LiDAR 3D space. In this paper, we propose a homogeneous multi-modal feature fusion and interaction method (HMFI) for 3D object detection. Specifically, we first design an image voxel lifter module (IVLM) to lift 2D image features into the 3D space and generate homogeneous image voxel features. Then, we fuse the voxelized point cloud features with the image features from different regions by introducing the self-attention based query fusion mechanism (QFM). Next, we propose a voxel feature interaction module (VFIM) to enforce the consistency of semantic information from identical objects in the homogeneous point cloud and image voxel representations, which can provide object-level alignment guidance for cross-modal feature fusion and strengthen the discriminative ability in complex backgrounds. We conduct extensive experiments on the KITTI and Waymo Open Dataset, and the proposed HMFI achieves better performance compared with the state-of-the-art multi-modal methods. Particularly, for the 3D detection of cyclist on the KITTI benchmark, HMFI surpasses all the published algorithms by a large margin.
summary: Multi-modal 3D object detection has been an active research topic in autonomous driving. Nevertheless, it is non-trivial to explore the cross-modal feature fusion between sparse 3D points and dense 2D pixels. Recent approaches either fuse the image features with the point cloud features that are projected onto the 2D image plane or combine the sparse point cloud with dense image pixels. These fusion approaches often suffer from severe information loss, thus causing sub-optimal performance. To address these problems, we construct the homogeneous structure between the point cloud and images to avoid projective information loss by transforming the camera features into the LiDAR 3D space. In this paper, we propose a homogeneous multi-modal feature fusion and interaction method (HMFI) for 3D object detection. Specifically, we first design an image voxel lifter module (IVLM) to lift 2D image features into the 3D space and generate homogeneous image voxel features. Then, we fuse the voxelized point cloud features with the image features from different regions by introducing the self-attention based query fusion mechanism (QFM). Next, we propose a voxel feature interaction module (VFIM) to enforce the consistency of semantic information from identical objects in the homogeneous point cloud and image voxel representations, which can provide object-level alignment guidance for cross-modal feature fusion and strengthen the discriminative ability in complex backgrounds. We conduct extensive experiments on the KITTI and Waymo Open Dataset, and the proposed HMFI achieves better performance compared with the state-of-the-art multi-modal methods. Particularly, for the 3D detection of cyclist on the KITTI benchmark, HMFI surpasses all the published algorithms by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 多模态 3D 物体检测一直是自动驾驶领域的一个活跃研究课题。然而，探索稀疏 3D 点和密集 2D 像素之间的跨模态特征融合并非易事。最近的方法要么将图像特征与投影到 2D 图像平面上的点云特征融合，要么将稀疏点云与密集图像像素相结合。这些融合方法通常会遭受严重的信息丢失，从而导致性能不佳。为了解决这些问题，我们通过将相机特征转换到 LiDAR 3D 空间来构建点云和图像之间的均匀结构，以避免投影信息丢失。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 3D 对象检测的同质多模态特征融合和交互方法（HMFI）。具体来说，我们首先设计一个图像体素提升模块（IVLM），将 2D 图像特征提升到 3D 空间并生成均匀的图像体素特征。然后，我们通过引入基于自注意力的查询融合机制（QFM）将体素化点云特征与来自不同区域的图像特征融合。接下来，我们提出了一种体素特征交互模块（VFIM）来强制同质点云和图像体素表示中相同对象的语义信息的一致性，它可以为跨模态特征融合提供对象级对齐指导，并增强复杂背景下的辨别能力。我们在 KITTI 和 Waymo 开放数据集上进行了广泛的实验，与最先进的多模态方法相比，所提出的 HMFI 取得了更好的性能。特别是，对于 KITTI 基准上的骑车人 3D 检测，HMFI 大幅超越了所有已发布的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种同质多模态特征融合与交互方法（HMFI），用于解决自动驾驶中3D目标检测的跨模态信息融合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过投影或直接结合点云与图像特征，导致信息丢失和性能不足，需探索避免投影损失的跨模态融合新途径。
AI.method: 构建点云与图像的同质结构，设计图像体素提升模块（IVLM）将2D图像特征映射到3D空间，通过自注意力查询融合机制（QFM）进行区域特征融合，并引入体素特征交互模块（VFIM）强化语义一致性。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Waymo数据集上，HMFI在3D目标检测中优于现有方法，尤其在骑行者检测任务中显著超越其他算法。
AI.conclusion: 同质结构有效缓解信息损失，验证了跨模态特征融合新思路的优越性，为复杂场景下的3D目标检测提供新方法。

authors_text: Jie Chen,Shouzhen Chen,Mingyuan Bai,Junbin Gao,Junping Zhang,Jian Pu
title: SA-MLP: Distilling Graph Knowledge from GNNs into Structure-Aware MLP
title_zh: SA-MLP：将 GNN 中的图知识提炼为结构感知 MLP
abstract: The message-passing mechanism helps Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) achieve remarkable results on various node classification tasks. Nevertheless, the recursive nodes fetching and aggregation in message-passing cause inference latency when deploying GNNs to large-scale graphs. One promising inference acceleration direction is to distill the GNNs into message-passing-free student multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs). However, the MLP student cannot fully learn the structure knowledge due to the lack of structure inputs, which causes inferior performance in the heterophily and inductive scenarios. To address this, we intend to inject structure information into MLP-like students in low-latency and interpretable ways. Specifically, we first design a Structure-Aware MLP (SA-MLP) student that encodes both features and structures without message-passing. Then, we introduce a novel structure-mixing knowledge distillation strategy to enhance the learning ability of MLPs for structure information. Furthermore, we design a latent structure embedding approximation technique with two-stage distillation for inductive scenarios. Extensive experiments on eight benchmark datasets under both transductive and inductive settings show that our SA-MLP can consistently outperform the teacher GNNs, while maintaining faster inference as MLPs. The source code of our work can be found in https://github.com/JC-202/SA-MLP.
summary: The message-passing mechanism helps Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) achieve remarkable results on various node classification tasks. Nevertheless, the recursive nodes fetching and aggregation in message-passing cause inference latency when deploying GNNs to large-scale graphs. One promising inference acceleration direction is to distill the GNNs into message-passing-free student multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs). However, the MLP student cannot fully learn the structure knowledge due to the lack of structure inputs, which causes inferior performance in the heterophily and inductive scenarios. To address this, we intend to inject structure information into MLP-like students in low-latency and interpretable ways. Specifically, we first design a Structure-Aware MLP (SA-MLP) student that encodes both features and structures without message-passing. Then, we introduce a novel structure-mixing knowledge distillation strategy to enhance the learning ability of MLPs for structure information. Furthermore, we design a latent structure embedding approximation technique with two-stage distillation for inductive scenarios. Extensive experiments on eight benchmark datasets under both transductive and inductive settings show that our SA-MLP can consistently outperform the teacher GNNs, while maintaining faster inference as MLPs. The source code of our work can be found in https://github.com/JC-202/SA-MLP.
abstract_zh: 消息传递机制帮助图神经网络（GNN）在各种节点分类任务上取得了显着的效果。然而，当将 GNN 部署到大规模图时，消息传递中的递归节点获取和聚合会导致推理延迟。一种有前途的推理加速方向是将 GNN 提炼成无消息传递的学生多层感知器 (MLP)。然而，由于缺乏结构输入，MLP学生无法充分学习结构知识，这导致在异质和归纳场景中表现较差。为了解决这个问题，我们打算以低延迟和可解释的方式向类似 MLP 的学生注入结构信息。具体来说，我们首先设计一个结构感知 MLP (SA-MLP) 学生，它可以在不传递消息的情况下对特征和结构进行编码。然后，我们引入了一种新颖的结构混合知识蒸馏策略来增强 MLP 对结构信息的学习能力。此外，我们针对归纳场景设计了一种具有两阶段蒸馏的潜在结构嵌入近似技术。在传导和归纳设置下对八个基准数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们的 SA-MLP 可以始终优于教师 GNN，同时保持与 MLP 一样更快的推理速度。我们工作的源代码可以在 https://github.com/JC-202/SA-MLP 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SA-MLP，通过结构感知的多层感知机（MLP）替代图神经网络（GNN），在保持高效推理的同时提升对图结构信息的学习能力。
AI.motivation: GNN在大规模图中因消息传递机制导致推理延迟，而传统MLP因缺乏结构输入无法有效学习图结构知识，导致在异质性和归纳场景中表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计结构感知MLP（SA-MLP）编码特征与结构信息，提出结构混合知识蒸馏策略，并开发两阶段蒸馏技术以增强归纳场景下的结构嵌入逼近能力。
AI.result: 在八个基准数据集的跨导和归纳设置实验中，SA-MLP在保持MLP高效推理优势的同时，性能持续优于教师GNN模型。
AI.conclusion: SA-MLP通过结构感知设计与蒸馏策略有效捕捉图结构知识，为图任务提供了兼具性能与效率的MLP替代方案。

search_text: SA-MLP: Distilling Graph Knowledge from GNNs into Structure-Aware MLP SA-MLP：将 GNN 中的图知识提炼为结构感知 MLP The message-passing mechanism helps Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) achieve remarkable results on various node classification tasks. Nevertheless, the recursive nodes fetching and aggregation in message-passing cause inference latency when deploying GNNs to large-scale graphs. One promising inference acceleration direction is to distill the GNNs into message-passing-free student multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs). However, the MLP student cannot fully learn the structure knowledge due to the lack of structure inputs, which causes inferior performance in the heterophily and inductive scenarios. To address this, we intend to inject structure information into MLP-like students in low-latency and interpretable ways. Specifically, we first design a Structure-Aware MLP (SA-MLP) student that encodes both features and structures without message-passing. Then, we introduce a novel structure-mixing knowledge distillation strategy to enhance the learning ability of MLPs for structure information. Furthermore, we design a latent structure embedding approximation technique with two-stage distillation for inductive scenarios. Extensive experiments on eight benchmark datasets under both transductive and inductive settings show that our SA-MLP can consistently outperform the teacher GNNs, while maintaining faster inference as MLPs. The source code of our work can be found in https://github.com/JC-202/SA-MLP. 消息传递机制帮助图神经网络（GNN）在各种节点分类任务上取得了显着的效果。然而，当将 GNN 部署到大规模图时，消息传递中的递归节点获取和聚合会导致推理延迟。一种有前途的推理加速方向是将 GNN 提炼成无消息传递的学生多层感知器 (MLP)。然而，由于缺乏结构输入，MLP学生无法充分学习结构知识，这导致在异质和归纳场景中表现较差。为了解决这个问题，我们打算以低延迟和可解释的方式向类似 MLP 的学生注入结构信息。具体来说，我们首先设计一个结构感知 MLP (SA-MLP) 学生，它可以在不传递消息的情况下对特征和结构进行编码。然后，我们引入了一种新颖的结构混合知识蒸馏策略来增强 MLP 对结构信息的学习能力。此外，我们针对归纳场景设计了一种具有两阶段蒸馏的潜在结构嵌入近似技术。在传导和归纳设置下对八个基准数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们的 SA-MLP 可以始终优于教师 GNN，同时保持与 MLP 一样更快的推理速度。我们工作的源代码可以在 https://github.com/JC-202/SA-MLP 中找到。 本文提出SA-MLP，通过结构感知的多层感知机（MLP）替代图神经网络（GNN），在保持高效推理的同时提升对图结构信息的学习能力。 Jie Chen,Shouzhen Chen,Mingyuan Bai,Junbin Gao,Junping Zhang,Jian Pu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Haofeng Liu,Heng Li,Huazhu Fu,Ruoxiu Xiao,Yunshu Gao,Yan Hu,Jiang Liu
title: Degradation-invariant Enhancement of Fundus Images via Pyramid Constraint Network
title_zh: 通过金字塔约束网络对眼底图像进行退化不变增强
comment: ef:International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer-Assisted Intervention. (2022) 507-516
comments: ef:International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer-Assisted Intervention. (2022) 507-516
abstract: As an economical and efficient fundus imaging modality, retinal fundus images have been widely adopted in clinical fundus examination. Unfortunately, fundus images often suffer from quality degradation caused by imaging interferences, leading to misdiagnosis. Despite impressive enhancement performances that state-of-the-art methods have achieved, challenges remain in clinical scenarios. For boosting the clinical deployment of fundus image enhancement, this paper proposes the pyramid constraint to develop a degradation-invariant enhancement network (PCE-Net), which mitigates the demand for clinical data and stably enhances unknown data. Firstly, high-quality images are randomly degraded to form sequences of low-quality ones sharing the same content (SeqLCs). Then individual low-quality images are decomposed to Laplacian pyramid features (LPF) as the multi-level input for the enhancement. Subsequently, a feature pyramid constraint (FPC) for the sequence is introduced to enforce the PCE-Net to learn a degradation-invariant model. Extensive experiments have been conducted under the evaluation metrics of enhancement and segmentation. The effectiveness of the PCE-Net was demonstrated in comparison with state-of-the-art methods and the ablation study. The source code of this study is publicly available at https://github.com/HeverLaw/PCENet-Image-Enhancement.
summary: As an economical and efficient fundus imaging modality, retinal fundus images have been widely adopted in clinical fundus examination. Unfortunately, fundus images often suffer from quality degradation caused by imaging interferences, leading to misdiagnosis. Despite impressive enhancement performances that state-of-the-art methods have achieved, challenges remain in clinical scenarios. For boosting the clinical deployment of fundus image enhancement, this paper proposes the pyramid constraint to develop a degradation-invariant enhancement network (PCE-Net), which mitigates the demand for clinical data and stably enhances unknown data. Firstly, high-quality images are randomly degraded to form sequences of low-quality ones sharing the same content (SeqLCs). Then individual low-quality images are decomposed to Laplacian pyramid features (LPF) as the multi-level input for the enhancement. Subsequently, a feature pyramid constraint (FPC) for the sequence is introduced to enforce the PCE-Net to learn a degradation-invariant model. Extensive experiments have been conducted under the evaluation metrics of enhancement and segmentation. The effectiveness of the PCE-Net was demonstrated in comparison with state-of-the-art methods and the ablation study. The source code of this study is publicly available at https://github.com/HeverLaw/PCENet-Image-Enhancement.
abstract_zh: 视网膜眼底图像作为一种经济、高效的眼底成像方式，已广泛应用于临床眼底检查。不幸的是，眼底图像经常因成像干扰而导致质量下降，从而导致误诊。尽管最先进的方法取得了令人印象深刻的增强性能，但临床场景中仍然存在挑战。为了促进眼底图像增强的临床部署，本文提出金字塔约束来开发退化不变增强网络（PCE-Net），从而减轻对临床数据的需求并稳定增强未知数据。首先，高质量图像被随机降级，形成共享相同内容的低质量图像序列（SeqLC）。然后将各个低质量图像分解为拉普拉斯金字塔特征（LPF）作为增强的多级输入。随后，引入序列的特征金字塔约束（FPC）来强制 PCE-Net 学习退化不变模型。在增强和分割的评估指标下进行了大量的实验。与最先进的方法和消融研究相比，证明了 PCE-Net 的有效性。这项研究的源代码可在 https://github.com/HeverLaw/PCENet-Image-Enhancement 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于金字塔约束网络（PCE-Net）的视网膜眼底图像增强方法，以解决因成像干扰导致的图像退化问题。
AI.motivation: 眼底图像常因成像干扰导致质量下降，现有增强方法在临床场景中仍存在不足，需减少对临床数据的依赖并稳定增强未知数据。
AI.method: 通过随机降质生成共享内容的低质量图像序列（SeqLCs），分解为拉普拉斯金字塔特征（LPF）作为多级输入，并引入特征金字塔约束（FPC）以学习退化不变模型。
AI.result: 在增强和分割评估指标下，PCE-Net相比现有方法表现更优，且通过消融实验验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: PCE-Net通过金字塔约束实现了鲁棒的图像增强，为临床眼底图像分析提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaoning Liu
title: Perceptual Multi-Exposure Fusion
title_zh: 感知多重曝光融合
abstract: As an ever-increasing demand for high dynamic range (HDR) scene shooting, multi-exposure image fusion (MEF) technology has abounded. In recent years, multi-scale exposure fusion approaches based on detail-enhancement have led the way for improvement in highlight and shadow details. Most of such methods, however, are too computationally expensive to be deployed on mobile devices. This paper presents a perceptual multi-exposure fusion method that not just ensures fine shadow/highlight details but with lower complexity than detailenhanced methods. We analyze the potential defects of three classical exposure measures in lieu of using detail-enhancement component and improve two of them, namely adaptive Wellexposedness (AWE) and the gradient of color images (3-D gradient). AWE designed in YCbCr color space considers the difference between varying exposure images. 3-D gradient is employed to extract fine details. We build a large-scale multiexposure benchmark dataset suitable for static scenes, which contains 167 image sequences all told. Experiments on the constructed dataset demonstrate that the proposed method exceeds existing eight state-of-the-art approaches in terms of visually and MEF-SSIM value. Moreover, our approach can achieve a better improvement for current image enhancement techniques, ensuring fine detail in bright light.
summary: As an ever-increasing demand for high dynamic range (HDR) scene shooting, multi-exposure image fusion (MEF) technology has abounded. In recent years, multi-scale exposure fusion approaches based on detail-enhancement have led the way for improvement in highlight and shadow details. Most of such methods, however, are too computationally expensive to be deployed on mobile devices. This paper presents a perceptual multi-exposure fusion method that not just ensures fine shadow/highlight details but with lower complexity than detailenhanced methods. We analyze the potential defects of three classical exposure measures in lieu of using detail-enhancement component and improve two of them, namely adaptive Wellexposedness (AWE) and the gradient of color images (3-D gradient). AWE designed in YCbCr color space considers the difference between varying exposure images. 3-D gradient is employed to extract fine details. We build a large-scale multiexposure benchmark dataset suitable for static scenes, which contains 167 image sequences all told. Experiments on the constructed dataset demonstrate that the proposed method exceeds existing eight state-of-the-art approaches in terms of visually and MEF-SSIM value. Moreover, our approach can achieve a better improvement for current image enhancement techniques, ensuring fine detail in bright light.
abstract_zh: 随着对高动态范围（HDR）场景拍摄的需求不断增长，多重曝光图像融合（MEF）技术不断涌现。近年来，基于细节增强的多尺度曝光融合方法引领了高光和阴影细节的改进。然而，大多数此类方法的计算成本太高，无法部署在移动设备上。本文提出了一种感知多重曝光融合方法，该方法不仅可以确保精细的阴影/高光细节，而且比细节增强方法的复杂度更低。我们分析了三种经典曝光措施代替使用细节增强组件的潜在缺陷，并改进了其中两种措施，即自适应良好曝光度（AWE）和彩色图像梯度（3D 梯度）。在 YCbCr 色彩空间中设计的 AWE 考虑了不同曝光图像之间的差异。采用 3-D 梯度来提取精细细节。我们构建了一个适合静态场景的大规模多重曝光基准数据集，其中总共包含 167 个图像序列。对构建的数据集的实验表明，所提出的方法在视觉效果和 MEF-SSIM 值方面超过了现有的八种最先进的方法。此外，我们的方法可以对当前的图像增强技术实现更好的改进，确保亮光下的精细细节。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种感知多曝光融合方法，在保证细节质量的同时降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于细节增强的多曝光融合方法计算成本过高，难以部署在移动设备上。
AI.method: 改进AWE和3-D梯度指标，在YCbCr色彩空间分析曝光差异并提取细节，构建大规模多曝光数据集。
AI.result: 在视觉效果和MEF-SSIM指标上优于8种先进方法，且能提升当前图像增强技术效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在计算效率与细节保留间取得平衡，适用于移动端HDR拍摄场景。

search_text: Perceptual Multi-Exposure Fusion 感知多重曝光融合 As an ever-increasing demand for high dynamic range (HDR) scene shooting, multi-exposure image fusion (MEF) technology has abounded. In recent years, multi-scale exposure fusion approaches based on detail-enhancement have led the way for improvement in highlight and shadow details. Most of such methods, however, are too computationally expensive to be deployed on mobile devices. This paper presents a perceptual multi-exposure fusion method that not just ensures fine shadow/highlight details but with lower complexity than detailenhanced methods. We analyze the potential defects of three classical exposure measures in lieu of using detail-enhancement component and improve two of them, namely adaptive Wellexposedness (AWE) and the gradient of color images (3-D gradient). AWE designed in YCbCr color space considers the difference between varying exposure images. 3-D gradient is employed to extract fine details. We build a large-scale multiexposure benchmark dataset suitable for static scenes, which contains 167 image sequences all told. Experiments on the constructed dataset demonstrate that the proposed method exceeds existing eight state-of-the-art approaches in terms of visually and MEF-SSIM value. Moreover, our approach can achieve a better improvement for current image enhancement techniques, ensuring fine detail in bright light. 随着对高动态范围（HDR）场景拍摄的需求不断增长，多重曝光图像融合（MEF）技术不断涌现。近年来，基于细节增强的多尺度曝光融合方法引领了高光和阴影细节的改进。然而，大多数此类方法的计算成本太高，无法部署在移动设备上。本文提出了一种感知多重曝光融合方法，该方法不仅可以确保精细的阴影/高光细节，而且比细节增强方法的复杂度更低。我们分析了三种经典曝光措施代替使用细节增强组件的潜在缺陷，并改进了其中两种措施，即自适应良好曝光度（AWE）和彩色图像梯度（3D 梯度）。在 YCbCr 色彩空间中设计的 AWE 考虑了不同曝光图像之间的差异。采用 3-D 梯度来提取精细细节。我们构建了一个适合静态场景的大规模多重曝光基准数据集，其中总共包含 167 个图像序列。对构建的数据集的实验表明，所提出的方法在视觉效果和 MEF-SSIM 值方面超过了现有的八种最先进的方法。此外，我们的方法可以对当前的图像增强技术实现更好的改进，确保亮光下的精细细节。 本文提出一种感知多曝光融合方法，在保证细节质量的同时降低计算复杂度。 Xiaoning Liu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yaoyao Ding,Cody Hao Yu,Bojian Zheng,Yizhi Liu,Yida Wang,Gennady Pekhimenko
title: Hidet: Task-Mapping Programming Paradigm for Deep Learning Tensor Programs
title_zh: Hidet：深度学习张量程序的任务映射编程范式
abstract: As deep learning models nowadays are widely adopted by both cloud services and edge devices, reducing the latency of deep learning model inferences becomes crucial to provide efficient model serving. However, it is challenging to develop efficient tensor programs for deep learning operators due to the high complexity of modern accelerators and the rapidly growing number of operators. Deep learning compilers, such as Apache TVM, adopt declarative scheduling primitives to lower the bar of developing tensor programs. However, we show that this approach is insufficient to cover state-of-the-art tensor program optimizations. In this paper, we propose to embed the scheduling process into tensor programs and use dedicated mappings, called task mappings, to define the computation assignment and ordering. This new approach greatly enriches the expressible optimizations by allowing developers to manipulate tensor programs at a much finer granularity. We call the proposed method the task-mapping programming paradigm. In addition, we propose a new post-scheduling fusion optimization that allows developers to focus on scheduling every single operator and automates the fusion after scheduling. It greatly reduces the engineering efforts for operator fusion. Our proposed paradigm also constructs an efficient hardware-centric schedule space, which is agnostic to the program input size and greatly reduces the tuning time. With the proposed paradigm, we implement a deep learning compiler Hidet. Extensive experiments on modern convolution and transformer models show that Hidet outperforms state-of-the-art DNN inference framework, ONNX Runtime, and compiler, TVM equipped with scheduler AutoTVM and Ansor, by up to 1.48x (1.22x on average). It also reduces the tuning time by 20x and 11x compared with AutoTVM and Ansor, respectively. We open-sourced hidet at https://www.github.com/hidet-org/hidet.
summary: As deep learning models nowadays are widely adopted by both cloud services and edge devices, reducing the latency of deep learning model inferences becomes crucial to provide efficient model serving. However, it is challenging to develop efficient tensor programs for deep learning operators due to the high complexity of modern accelerators and the rapidly growing number of operators. Deep learning compilers, such as Apache TVM, adopt declarative scheduling primitives to lower the bar of developing tensor programs. However, we show that this approach is insufficient to cover state-of-the-art tensor program optimizations. In this paper, we propose to embed the scheduling process into tensor programs and use dedicated mappings, called task mappings, to define the computation assignment and ordering. This new approach greatly enriches the expressible optimizations by allowing developers to manipulate tensor programs at a much finer granularity. We call the proposed method the task-mapping programming paradigm. In addition, we propose a new post-scheduling fusion optimization that allows developers to focus on scheduling every single operator and automates the fusion after scheduling. It greatly reduces the engineering efforts for operator fusion. Our proposed paradigm also constructs an efficient hardware-centric schedule space, which is agnostic to the program input size and greatly reduces the tuning time. With the proposed paradigm, we implement a deep learning compiler Hidet. Extensive experiments on modern convolution and transformer models show that Hidet outperforms state-of-the-art DNN inference framework, ONNX Runtime, and compiler, TVM equipped with scheduler AutoTVM and Ansor, by up to 1.48x (1.22x on average). It also reduces the tuning time by 20x and 11x compared with AutoTVM and Ansor, respectively. We open-sourced hidet at https://www.github.com/hidet-org/hidet.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习模型如今被云服务和边缘设备广泛采用，减少深度学习模型推理的延迟对于提供高效的模型服务至关重要。然而，由于现代加速器的高度复杂性和算子数量的快速增长，为深度学习算子开发高效的张量程序具有挑战性。深度学习编译器（例如 Apache TVM）采用声明性调度原语来降低开发张量程序的门槛。然而，我们表明这种方法不足以涵盖最先进的张量程序优化。在本文中，我们建议将调度过程嵌入到张量程序中，并使用称为任务映射的专用映射来定义计算分配和排序。这种新方法允许开发人员以更精细的粒度操作张量程序，极大地丰富了可表达的优化。我们将所提出的方法称为任务映射编程范式。此外，我们提出了一种新的调度后融合优化，使开发人员能够专注于调度每个算子，并在调度后自动执行融合。它大大减少了算子融合的工程工作量。我们提出的范例还构建了一个高效的以硬件为中心的调度空间，它与程序输入大小无关，并大大减少了调整时间。通过所提出的范例，我们实现了深度学习编译器 Hidet。对现代卷积和 Transformer 模型的大量实验表明，Hidet 的性能优于最先进的 DNN 推理框架、ONNX Runtime 和编译器、配备调度程序 AutoTVM 和 Ansor 的 TVM，最高可达 1.48 倍（平均 1.22 倍）。与 AutoTVM 和 Ansor 相比，它还分别将调整时间缩短了 20 倍和 11 倍。我们在 https://www.github.com/hidet-org/hidet 上开源了 hidet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Hidet的深度学习张量程序编译器，通过任务映射编程范式优化计算调度，提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习编译器（如TVM）的声明式调度方法难以覆盖前沿优化，导致开发高效张量程序复杂度高且调优耗时长。
AI.method: 将调度过程嵌入张量程序，通过任务映射定义计算分配与顺序，并引入后调度融合优化，构建硬件为中心的调度空间。
AI.result: Hidet在现代卷积和Transformer模型上相比ONNX Runtime、TVM等框架最高提速1.48倍，平均1.22倍，调优时间减少20倍和11倍。
AI.conclusion: 任务映射编程范式通过细粒度控制与自动化优化，显著提升了深度学习编译效率与性能，Hidet验证了该方法的有效性。

authors_text: Zhao-Heng Yin,Weirui Ye,Qifeng Chen,Yang Gao
title: Planning for Sample Efficient Imitation Learning
title_zh: 规划样本高效模仿学习
abstract: Imitation learning is a class of promising policy learning algorithms that is free from many practical issues with reinforcement learning, such as the reward design issue and the exploration hardness. However, the current imitation algorithm struggles to achieve both high performance and high in-environment sample efficiency simultaneously. Behavioral Cloning (BC) does not need in-environment interactions, but it suffers from the covariate shift problem which harms its performance. Adversarial Imitation Learning (AIL) turns imitation learning into a distribution matching problem. It can achieve better performance on some tasks but it requires a large number of in-environment interactions. Inspired by the recent success of EfficientZero in RL, we propose EfficientImitate (EI), a planning-based imitation learning method that can achieve high in-environment sample efficiency and performance simultaneously. Our algorithmic contribution in this paper is two-fold. First, we extend AIL into the MCTS-based RL. Second, we show the seemingly incompatible two classes of imitation algorithms (BC and AIL) can be naturally unified under our framework, enjoying the benefits of both. We benchmark our method not only on the state-based DeepMind Control Suite, but also on the image version which many previous works find highly challenging. Experimental results show that EI achieves state-of-the-art results in performance and sample efficiency. EI shows over 4x gain in performance in the limited sample setting on state-based and image-based tasks and can solve challenging problems like Humanoid, where previous methods fail with small amount of interactions. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhaohengyin/EfficientImitate.
summary: Imitation learning is a class of promising policy learning algorithms that is free from many practical issues with reinforcement learning, such as the reward design issue and the exploration hardness. However, the current imitation algorithm struggles to achieve both high performance and high in-environment sample efficiency simultaneously. Behavioral Cloning (BC) does not need in-environment interactions, but it suffers from the covariate shift problem which harms its performance. Adversarial Imitation Learning (AIL) turns imitation learning into a distribution matching problem. It can achieve better performance on some tasks but it requires a large number of in-environment interactions. Inspired by the recent success of EfficientZero in RL, we propose EfficientImitate (EI), a planning-based imitation learning method that can achieve high in-environment sample efficiency and performance simultaneously. Our algorithmic contribution in this paper is two-fold. First, we extend AIL into the MCTS-based RL. Second, we show the seemingly incompatible two classes of imitation algorithms (BC and AIL) can be naturally unified under our framework, enjoying the benefits of both. We benchmark our method not only on the state-based DeepMind Control Suite, but also on the image version which many previous works find highly challenging. Experimental results show that EI achieves state-of-the-art results in performance and sample efficiency. EI shows over 4x gain in performance in the limited sample setting on state-based and image-based tasks and can solve challenging problems like Humanoid, where previous methods fail with small amount of interactions. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhaohengyin/EfficientImitate.
abstract_zh: 模仿学习是一类有前途的策略学习算法，它没有强化学习的许多实际问题，例如奖励设计问题和探索难度。然而，当前的模仿算法很难同时实现高性能和高环境样本效率。行为克隆（BC）不需要环境内的交互，但它会遇到协变量偏移问题，从而损害其性能。对抗性模仿学习（AIL）将模仿学习转变为分布匹配问题。它可以在某些任务上获得更好的性能，但需要大量的环境内交互。受到 EfficientZero 最近在 RL 领域取得成功的启发，我们提出了 EfficientImitate (EI)，这是一种基于规划的模仿学习方法，可以同时实现较高的环境内样本效率和性能。我们在本文中的算法贡献有两个方面。首先，我们将 AIL 扩展到基于 MCTS 的 RL 中。其次，我们展示了看似不兼容的两类模仿算法（BC 和 AIL）可以在我们的框架下自然地统一，享受两者的好处。我们不仅在基于状态的 DeepMind Control Suite 上对我们的方法进行了基准测试，而且还在图像版本上进行了基准测试，而之前的许多工作都认为该版本极具挑战性。实验结果表明，EI 在性能和样本效率方面取得了最先进的结果。 EI 在基于状态和基于图像的任务的有限样本设置中显示出超过 4 倍的性能增益，并且可以解决像 Humanoid 这样的挑战性问题，而以前的方法在少量交互时会失败。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/zhaohengyin/EfficientImitate 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于规划的高效模仿学习方法EfficientImitate（EI），旨在同时实现高环境样本效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习算法（如行为克隆BC和对抗模仿学习AIL）在性能与样本效率之间存在矛盾：BC受协变量偏移影响，AIL需要大量环境交互。
AI.method: 受EfficientZero启发，将AIL扩展至基于MCTS的强化学习框架，并统一BC与AIL的优势，提出结合规划的模仿学习方法。
AI.result: 在DeepMind控制套件及图像任务中，EI在有限样本下性能提升超4倍，成功解决Humanoid等复杂任务，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: EfficientImitate通过融合BC与AIL的优势，实现了样本效率与性能的兼顾，为模仿学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Planning for Sample Efficient Imitation Learning 规划样本高效模仿学习 Imitation learning is a class of promising policy learning algorithms that is free from many practical issues with reinforcement learning, such as the reward design issue and the exploration hardness. However, the current imitation algorithm struggles to achieve both high performance and high in-environment sample efficiency simultaneously. Behavioral Cloning (BC) does not need in-environment interactions, but it suffers from the covariate shift problem which harms its performance. Adversarial Imitation Learning (AIL) turns imitation learning into a distribution matching problem. It can achieve better performance on some tasks but it requires a large number of in-environment interactions. Inspired by the recent success of EfficientZero in RL, we propose EfficientImitate (EI), a planning-based imitation learning method that can achieve high in-environment sample efficiency and performance simultaneously. Our algorithmic contribution in this paper is two-fold. First, we extend AIL into the MCTS-based RL. Second, we show the seemingly incompatible two classes of imitation algorithms (BC and AIL) can be naturally unified under our framework, enjoying the benefits of both. We benchmark our method not only on the state-based DeepMind Control Suite, but also on the image version which many previous works find highly challenging. Experimental results show that EI achieves state-of-the-art results in performance and sample efficiency. EI shows over 4x gain in performance in the limited sample setting on state-based and image-based tasks and can solve challenging problems like Humanoid, where previous methods fail with small amount of interactions. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhaohengyin/EfficientImitate. 模仿学习是一类有前途的策略学习算法，它没有强化学习的许多实际问题，例如奖励设计问题和探索难度。然而，当前的模仿算法很难同时实现高性能和高环境样本效率。行为克隆（BC）不需要环境内的交互，但它会遇到协变量偏移问题，从而损害其性能。对抗性模仿学习（AIL）将模仿学习转变为分布匹配问题。它可以在某些任务上获得更好的性能，但需要大量的环境内交互。受到 EfficientZero 最近在 RL 领域取得成功的启发，我们提出了 EfficientImitate (EI)，这是一种基于规划的模仿学习方法，可以同时实现较高的环境内样本效率和性能。我们在本文中的算法贡献有两个方面。首先，我们将 AIL 扩展到基于 MCTS 的 RL 中。其次，我们展示了看似不兼容的两类模仿算法（BC 和 AIL）可以在我们的框架下自然地统一，享受两者的好处。我们不仅在基于状态的 DeepMind Control Suite 上对我们的方法进行了基准测试，而且还在图像版本上进行了基准测试，而之前的许多工作都认为该版本极具挑战性。实验结果表明，EI 在性能和样本效率方面取得了最先进的结果。 EI 在基于状态和基于图像的任务的有限样本设置中显示出超过 4 倍的性能增益，并且可以解决像 Humanoid 这样的挑战性问题，而以前的方法在少量交互时会失败。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/zhaohengyin/EfficientImitate 获取。 本文提出了一种基于规划的高效模仿学习方法EfficientImitate（EI），旨在同时实现高环境样本效率和性能。 Zhao-Heng Yin,Weirui Ye,Qifeng Chen,Yang Gao cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Abhishek Gupta,Aldo Pacchiano,Yuexiang Zhai,Sham M. Kakade,Sergey Levine
title: Unpacking Reward Shaping: Understanding the Benefits of Reward Engineering on Sample Complexity
title_zh: 解析奖励塑造：了解奖励工程对样本复杂性的好处
abstract: Reinforcement learning provides an automated framework for learning behaviors from high-level reward specifications, but in practice the choice of reward function can be crucial for good results -- while in principle the reward only needs to specify what the task is, in reality practitioners often need to design more detailed rewards that provide the agent with some hints about how the task should be completed. The idea of this type of ``reward-shaping'' has been often discussed in the literature, and is often a critical part of practical applications, but there is relatively little formal characterization of how the choice of reward shaping can yield benefits in sample complexity. In this work, we build on the framework of novelty-based exploration to provide a simple scheme for incorporating shaped rewards into RL along with an analysis tool to show that particular choices of reward shaping provably improve sample efficiency. We characterize the class of problems where these gains are expected to be significant and show how this can be connected to practical algorithms in the literature. We confirm that these results hold in practice in an experimental evaluation, providing an insight into the mechanisms through which reward shaping can significantly improve the complexity of reinforcement learning while retaining asymptotic performance.
summary: Reinforcement learning provides an automated framework for learning behaviors from high-level reward specifications, but in practice the choice of reward function can be crucial for good results -- while in principle the reward only needs to specify what the task is, in reality practitioners often need to design more detailed rewards that provide the agent with some hints about how the task should be completed. The idea of this type of ``reward-shaping'' has been often discussed in the literature, and is often a critical part of practical applications, but there is relatively little formal characterization of how the choice of reward shaping can yield benefits in sample complexity. In this work, we build on the framework of novelty-based exploration to provide a simple scheme for incorporating shaped rewards into RL along with an analysis tool to show that particular choices of reward shaping provably improve sample efficiency. We characterize the class of problems where these gains are expected to be significant and show how this can be connected to practical algorithms in the literature. We confirm that these results hold in practice in an experimental evaluation, providing an insight into the mechanisms through which reward shaping can significantly improve the complexity of reinforcement learning while retaining asymptotic performance.
abstract_zh: 强化学习为从高级奖励规范中学习行为提供了一个自动化框架，但在实践中，奖励函数的选择对于获得良好的结果至关重要——虽然原则上奖励只需要指定任务是什么，但实际上，实践者通常需要设计更详细的奖励，为代理提供一些关于如何完成任务的提示。这种类型的“奖励塑造”的想法经常在文献中讨论，并且通常是实际应用的关键部分，但是对于奖励塑造的选择如何在样本复杂性方面产生好处的正式描述相对较少。在这项工作中，我们建立在基于新颖性的探索框架之上，提供了一个简单的方案，将成形奖励纳入强化学习中，并提供了一个分析工具，以证明奖励成形的特定选择可以提高样本效率。我们描述了预计这些收益将是显着的问题类别，并展示了如何将其与文献中的实际算法联系起来。我们确认这些结果在实验评估的实践中成立，提供了对奖励塑造可以显着提高强化学习复杂性同时保持渐近性能的机制的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了奖励塑造在强化学习中对样本复杂度的影响，并提出了一个基于新颖性探索的奖励塑造框架。
AI.motivation: 在实践中，奖励函数的设计对强化学习的效果至关重要，但目前缺乏对奖励塑造如何提升样本效率的正式分析。
AI.method: 本文基于新颖性探索框架，提出了一种将塑造奖励纳入强化学习的方法，并提供了一种分析工具来证明特定奖励塑造能提升样本效率。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在实际应用中能够显著提升样本效率，同时保持渐近性能。
AI.conclusion: 奖励塑造在某些问题上能显著降低强化学习的样本复杂度，且与现有算法兼容。

authors_text: Haoran You,Zhanyi Sun,Huihong Shi,Zhongzhi Yu,Yang Zhao,Yongan Zhang,Chaojian Li,Baopu Li,Yingyan Celine Lin
title: ViTCoD: Vision Transformer Acceleration via Dedicated Algorithm and Accelerator Co-Design
title_zh: ViTCoD：通过专用算法和加速器协同设计实现 Vision Transformer 加速
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance on various vision tasks. However, ViTs' self-attention module is still arguably a major bottleneck, limiting their achievable hardware efficiency. Meanwhile, existing accelerators dedicated to NLP Transformers are not optimal for ViTs. This is because there is a large difference between ViTs and NLP Transformers: ViTs have a relatively fixed number of input tokens, whose attention maps can be pruned by up to 90% even with fixed sparse patterns; while NLP Transformers need to handle input sequences of varying numbers of tokens and rely on on-the-fly predictions of dynamic sparse attention patterns for each input to achieve a decent sparsity (e.g., >=50%). To this end, we propose a dedicated algorithm and accelerator co-design framework dubbed ViTCoD for accelerating ViTs. Specifically, on the algorithm level, ViTCoD prunes and polarizes the attention maps to have either denser or sparser fixed patterns for regularizing two levels of workloads without hurting the accuracy, largely reducing the attention computations while leaving room for alleviating the remaining dominant data movements; on top of that, we further integrate a lightweight and learnable auto-encoder module to enable trading the dominant high-cost data movements for lower-cost computations. On the hardware level, we develop a dedicated accelerator to simultaneously coordinate the enforced denser/sparser workloads and encoder/decoder engines for boosted hardware utilization. Extensive experiments and ablation studies validate that ViTCoD largely reduces the dominant data movement costs, achieving speedups of up to 235.3x, 142.9x, 86.0x, 10.1x, and 6.8x over general computing platforms CPUs, EdgeGPUs, GPUs, and prior-art Transformer accelerators SpAtten and Sanger under an attention sparsity of 90%, respectively.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance on various vision tasks. However, ViTs' self-attention module is still arguably a major bottleneck, limiting their achievable hardware efficiency. Meanwhile, existing accelerators dedicated to NLP Transformers are not optimal for ViTs. This is because there is a large difference between ViTs and NLP Transformers: ViTs have a relatively fixed number of input tokens, whose attention maps can be pruned by up to 90% even with fixed sparse patterns; while NLP Transformers need to handle input sequences of varying numbers of tokens and rely on on-the-fly predictions of dynamic sparse attention patterns for each input to achieve a decent sparsity (e.g., >=50%). To this end, we propose a dedicated algorithm and accelerator co-design framework dubbed ViTCoD for accelerating ViTs. Specifically, on the algorithm level, ViTCoD prunes and polarizes the attention maps to have either denser or sparser fixed patterns for regularizing two levels of workloads without hurting the accuracy, largely reducing the attention computations while leaving room for alleviating the remaining dominant data movements; on top of that, we further integrate a lightweight and learnable auto-encoder module to enable trading the dominant high-cost data movements for lower-cost computations. On the hardware level, we develop a dedicated accelerator to simultaneously coordinate the enforced denser/sparser workloads and encoder/decoder engines for boosted hardware utilization. Extensive experiments and ablation studies validate that ViTCoD largely reduces the dominant data movement costs, achieving speedups of up to 235.3x, 142.9x, 86.0x, 10.1x, and 6.8x over general computing platforms CPUs, EdgeGPUs, GPUs, and prior-art Transformer accelerators SpAtten and Sanger under an attention sparsity of 90%, respectively.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformers (ViTs) 在各种视觉任务上都取得了最先进的性能。然而，ViT 的自注意力模块仍然可以说是一个主要瓶颈，限制了它们可实现的硬件效率。与此同时，现有的专用于 NLP Transformer 的加速器对于 ViT 来说并不是最佳的。这是因为 ViT 和 NLP Transformer 之间存在很大差异：ViT 具有相对固定数量的输入 token，即使具有固定的稀疏模式，其注意力图也可以被修剪高达 90%；而 NLP Transformer 需要处理不同数量 token 的输入序列，并依赖于每个输入的动态稀疏注意力模式的动态预测来实现适当的稀疏性（例如，>=50%）。为此，我们提出了一种名为 ViTCoD 的专用算法和加速器协同设计框架，用于加速 ViT。具体来说，在算法层面，ViTCoD 对注意力图进行修剪和极化，使其具有更密集或更稀疏的固定模式，以在不损害准确性的情况下规范两个级别的工作负载，大大减少注意力计算，同时为缓解剩余的主要数据移动留出空间；最重要的是，我们进一步集成了一个轻量级且可学习的自动编码器模块，以便能够将占主导地位的高成本数据移动换成更低成本的计算。在硬件层面，我们开发了一个专用加速器来同时协调强制的密集/稀疏工作负载和编码器/解码器引擎，以提高硬件利用率。大量实验和消融研究证实，ViTCoD 很大程度上降低了主要的数据移动成本，在注意力稀疏度为 90% 的情况下，与通用计算平台 CPU、EdgeGPU、GPU 和现有 Transformer 加速器 SpAtten 和 Sanger 相比，速度分别提高了 235.3 倍、142.9 倍、86.0 倍、10.1 倍和 6.8 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViTCoD框架，通过专用算法与加速器协同设计加速视觉Transformer（ViT）。
AI.motivation: ViT的自注意力模块存在硬件效率瓶颈，现有NLP加速器因输入token处理方式和稀疏性差异不适用于ViT。
AI.method: 算法层面通过剪枝和极化注意力图生成固定稀疏模式，结合轻量自编码器模块降低数据移动成本；硬件层面设计专用加速器协调计算单元提升利用率。
AI.result: 在90%注意力稀疏度下，相比CPU、EdgeGPU、GPU及现有加速器分别实现最高235.3x、142.9x、86.0x、10.1x、6.8x加速。
AI.conclusion: ViTCoD通过算法-硬件协同设计有效降低数据移动开销，在保持精度的同时显著提升ViT推理效率。

search_text: ViTCoD: Vision Transformer Acceleration via Dedicated Algorithm and Accelerator Co-Design ViTCoD：通过专用算法和加速器协同设计实现 Vision Transformer 加速 Vision Transformers (ViTs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance on various vision tasks. However, ViTs' self-attention module is still arguably a major bottleneck, limiting their achievable hardware efficiency. Meanwhile, existing accelerators dedicated to NLP Transformers are not optimal for ViTs. This is because there is a large difference between ViTs and NLP Transformers: ViTs have a relatively fixed number of input tokens, whose attention maps can be pruned by up to 90% even with fixed sparse patterns; while NLP Transformers need to handle input sequences of varying numbers of tokens and rely on on-the-fly predictions of dynamic sparse attention patterns for each input to achieve a decent sparsity (e.g., >=50%). To this end, we propose a dedicated algorithm and accelerator co-design framework dubbed ViTCoD for accelerating ViTs. Specifically, on the algorithm level, ViTCoD prunes and polarizes the attention maps to have either denser or sparser fixed patterns for regularizing two levels of workloads without hurting the accuracy, largely reducing the attention computations while leaving room for alleviating the remaining dominant data movements; on top of that, we further integrate a lightweight and learnable auto-encoder module to enable trading the dominant high-cost data movements for lower-cost computations. On the hardware level, we develop a dedicated accelerator to simultaneously coordinate the enforced denser/sparser workloads and encoder/decoder engines for boosted hardware utilization. Extensive experiments and ablation studies validate that ViTCoD largely reduces the dominant data movement costs, achieving speedups of up to 235.3x, 142.9x, 86.0x, 10.1x, and 6.8x over general computing platforms CPUs, EdgeGPUs, GPUs, and prior-art Transformer accelerators SpAtten and Sanger under an attention sparsity of 90%, respectively. Vision Transformers (ViTs) 在各种视觉任务上都取得了最先进的性能。然而，ViT 的自注意力模块仍然可以说是一个主要瓶颈，限制了它们可实现的硬件效率。与此同时，现有的专用于 NLP Transformer 的加速器对于 ViT 来说并不是最佳的。这是因为 ViT 和 NLP Transformer 之间存在很大差异：ViT 具有相对固定数量的输入 token，即使具有固定的稀疏模式，其注意力图也可以被修剪高达 90%；而 NLP Transformer 需要处理不同数量 token 的输入序列，并依赖于每个输入的动态稀疏注意力模式的动态预测来实现适当的稀疏性（例如，>=50%）。为此，我们提出了一种名为 ViTCoD 的专用算法和加速器协同设计框架，用于加速 ViT。具体来说，在算法层面，ViTCoD 对注意力图进行修剪和极化，使其具有更密集或更稀疏的固定模式，以在不损害准确性的情况下规范两个级别的工作负载，大大减少注意力计算，同时为缓解剩余的主要数据移动留出空间；最重要的是，我们进一步集成了一个轻量级且可学习的自动编码器模块，以便能够将占主导地位的高成本数据移动换成更低成本的计算。在硬件层面，我们开发了一个专用加速器来同时协调强制的密集/稀疏工作负载和编码器/解码器引擎，以提高硬件利用率。大量实验和消融研究证实，ViTCoD 很大程度上降低了主要的数据移动成本，在注意力稀疏度为 90% 的情况下，与通用计算平台 CPU、EdgeGPU、GPU 和现有 Transformer 加速器 SpAtten 和 Sanger 相比，速度分别提高了 235.3 倍、142.9 倍、86.0 倍、10.1 倍和 6.8 倍。 本文提出ViTCoD框架，通过专用算法与加速器协同设计加速视觉Transformer（ViT）。 Haoran You,Zhanyi Sun,Huihong Shi,Zhongzhi Yu,Yang Zhao,Yongan Zhang,Chaojian Li,Baopu Li,Yingyan Celine Lin cs.LG,cs.AR,cs.CV

authors_text: Chao Hu,Weibin Qiu,Weijie Wu,Liqiang Zhu
title: Spatio-Temporal-based Context Fusion for Video Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于视频异常检测的基于时空的上下文融合
abstract: Video anomaly detection aims to discover abnormal events in videos, and the principal objects are target objects such as people and vehicles. Each target in the video data has rich spatio-temporal context information. Most existing methods only focus on the temporal context, ignoring the role of the spatial context in anomaly detection. The spatial context information represents the relationship between the detection target and surrounding targets. Anomaly detection makes a lot of sense. To this end, a video anomaly detection algorithm based on target spatio-temporal context fusion is proposed. Firstly, the target in the video frame is extracted through the target detection network to reduce background interference. Then the optical flow map of two adjacent frames is calculated. Motion features are used multiple targets in the video frame to construct spatial context simultaneously, re-encoding the target appearance and motion features, and finally reconstructing the above features through the spatio-temporal dual-stream network, and using the reconstruction error to represent the abnormal score. The algorithm achieves frame-level AUCs of 98.5% and 86.3% on the UCSDped2 and Avenue datasets, respectively. On the UCSDped2 dataset, the spatio-temporal dual-stream network improves frames by 5.1% and 0.3%, respectively, compared to the temporal and spatial stream networks. After using spatial context encoding, the frame-level AUC is enhanced by 1%, which verifies the method's effectiveness.
summary: Video anomaly detection aims to discover abnormal events in videos, and the principal objects are target objects such as people and vehicles. Each target in the video data has rich spatio-temporal context information. Most existing methods only focus on the temporal context, ignoring the role of the spatial context in anomaly detection. The spatial context information represents the relationship between the detection target and surrounding targets. Anomaly detection makes a lot of sense. To this end, a video anomaly detection algorithm based on target spatio-temporal context fusion is proposed. Firstly, the target in the video frame is extracted through the target detection network to reduce background interference. Then the optical flow map of two adjacent frames is calculated. Motion features are used multiple targets in the video frame to construct spatial context simultaneously, re-encoding the target appearance and motion features, and finally reconstructing the above features through the spatio-temporal dual-stream network, and using the reconstruction error to represent the abnormal score. The algorithm achieves frame-level AUCs of 98.5% and 86.3% on the UCSDped2 and Avenue datasets, respectively. On the UCSDped2 dataset, the spatio-temporal dual-stream network improves frames by 5.1% and 0.3%, respectively, compared to the temporal and spatial stream networks. After using spatial context encoding, the frame-level AUC is enhanced by 1%, which verifies the method's effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 视频异常检测旨在发现视频中的异常事件，主要对象是人、车辆等目标对象。视频数据中的每个目标都具有丰富的时空上下文信息。大多数现有方法仅关注时间上下文，忽略了空间上下文在异常检测中的作用。空间上下文信息表示检测目标与周围目标之间的关系。异常检测很有意义。为此，提出一种基于目标时空上下文融合的视频异常检测算法。首先，通过目标检测网络提取视频帧中的目标，以减少背景干扰。然后计算相邻两帧的光流图。运动特征是利用视频帧中的多个目标同时构建空间上下文，对目标外观和运动特征进行重新编码，最后通过时空双流网络重构上述特征，并用重构误差来表示异常得分。该算法在 UCSDped2 和 Avenue 数据集上分别实现了 98.5% 和 86.3% 的帧级 AUC。在 UCSDped2 数据集上，与时空流网络相比，时空双流网络的帧率分别提高了 5.1% 和 0.3%。使用空间上下文编码后，帧级AUC提升了1%，验证了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空上下文融合的视频异常检测算法，通过结合目标的空间和时间信息提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多关注时间上下文而忽略空间上下文，而空间上下文能反映目标与周围目标的关系，对异常检测具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过目标检测网络提取视频帧中的目标，计算相邻帧光流图获取运动特征，同时构建空间上下文并重新编码目标外观与运动特征，最终通过时空双流网络重构特征并利用重构误差作为异常评分。
AI.result: 在UCSDped2和Avenue数据集上分别达到98.5%和86.3%的帧级AUC，时空双流网络相比单独时空流网络在UCSDped2数据集上提升5.1%和0.3%，空间上下文编码使帧级AUC提升1%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过融合时空上下文有效提升了视频异常检测性能，实验结果验证了其有效性。
